# Social Media Feature Bible

## 1. Executive Summary

This deliverable is a comprehensive synthesis of feature audits conducted across 25 major social media platforms. It establishes the foundational feature set and competitive landscape for the development of **Wakka Wakka**, a next-generation decentralized social network.

### Key Statistics
- **Platforms Audited**: 25 platforms
- **Total Researched Features**: 1250 features (exactly 50 features per platform)
- **Unique Master Features**: 1082 unique features (deduplicated across categories)
- **Wakka Wakka Feature Improvement Proposals**: 1082 tailored proposals
- **Unique Innovations Proposed**: 100 original features (completely unique from existing platform features)

### Feature Category Breakdown
| Category | Unique Features Count | Researched Features Count | Innovations Count |
|---|---|---|---|
| Content Creation & Editing | 113 | 125 | 10 |
| Content Discovery & Search | 121 | 125 | 10 |
| Interpersonal & Community Engagement | 115 | 125 | 10 |
| Direct Messaging & Communication | 94 | 125 | 10 |
| Monetization & E-Commerce | 115 | 125 | 10 |
| Analytics, Business & Creator Tools | 87 | 125 | 10 |
| Privacy, Security & Safety | 121 | 125 | 10 |
| Developer APIs & Integrations | 93 | 125 | 10 |
| Notifications & Time Management | 114 | 125 | 10 |
| Account Settings & Authentication | 109 | 125 | 10 |

---

## 2. Per-Platform Feature Audit

This section contains the full, unabridged content of the feature audits for all 25 researched platforms. Each platform features exactly 50 distinct entries organized across the 10 reconciled categories.

### Platform: Apaya

This document compiles the feature research for Apaya, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Dynamic Text Stylizer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Stylizes text messages using custom fonts, kinetic text effects, and colorful gradients before sending.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Styles. Select text in the chat bar, tap the "Style" button, choose a font or motion effect, and tap send.

### 2. Quick Voice Overlay
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Records and overlays voice commentary onto images or video clips before sharing them in chats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Commentary. Choose an image/video to send, tap the microphone overlay icon, record your voice note, and send the combined media.

### 3. Auto-Cropping Canvas
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically resizes and crops photos to optimized canvas ratios matching the target chat or channel layout.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Intelligent Cropper. Insert an image in the editor, select the canvas tool, and tap "Auto-Optimize" to crop around the focal point.

### 4. Multi-frame Collage
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Combines multiple photos into custom grid collages directly in the composer.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Layout Editor. Tap the image attachment icon, select multiple pictures, and choose a grid template to compile them into a single collage.

### 5. In-app GIF Designer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Converts short video loops or image sequences into custom animated GIFs with text captions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: GIF Creator. Select a short video in the app gallery, tap "Make GIF," adjust the loop bounds, add optional captions, and export/send.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Interest-Based Channels
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to explore and join public channels cataloged by specific topic interests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Discovery Directory. Open the search portal, tap "Interest Channels," select categories (e.g. Technology, Art), and follow your preferred feeds.

### 7. Voice-to-Text Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Performs voice searches to find chats, channels, contacts, and shared files.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Vocal Queries. Tap the microphone icon in the global search bar, state your search query, and view matched files and chats.

### 8. Shared Links Library
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Consolidates all web links shared across chats into a single searchable library.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Link Database. Open chat details, tap "Shared Links" to view an organized index categorized by domain, title, and sender.

### 9. Chat Pinning Matrix
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Pins and organizes multiple conversations into custom grid layouts at the top of the chat page.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Grid Pins. Long-press a chat thread, tap the Pin Matrix option, and assign the chat to a specific grid position (up to 9 slots).

### 10. Tagged Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Uses hashtags and custom label tags to search and sort historical messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Metadata Search. Type a hash tag (e.g. `#invoice`) or click a tag filter in the search menu to isolate labeled messages.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Apaya Spaces
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates interactive audio and video rooms for live discussions, meetings, and presentations within communities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live Audio Rooms. Open a community dashboard, tap "Start Space," enter a title, configure access permissions, and go live.

### 12. Multi-option Surveys
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Launches interactive, multi-option surveys and question forms in group chats to collect member feedback.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Survey Generator. Tap the compose extension icon, select "Survey," define multiple questions and checkbox answers, and publish.

### 13. Live Stage Broadcasts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows verified creators to stream live video broadcasts to an audience with moderation controls.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Streaming Stage. In profile options, select "Go Live on Stage," adjust stream quality, configure chat moderation, and begin broadcasting.

### 14. Group Call Hand-raise
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables participants in large group calls to raise their virtual hand to request speaking privileges.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Moderated Calls. During a call, tap the hand icon. The call host receives a notification to unmute or invite the user to speak.

### 15. Interactive Shared Scribble
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A collaborative whiteboard where group chat members can draw, sketch, and annotate together in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Whiteboard. Tap the attachment icon, select "Scribble," and open the canvas to draw simultaneously with active contacts.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Whisper Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends temporary text messages that blur out after reading, requiring the recipient to tap to reveal them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hidden Messages. Toggle the padlock icon in the text bar before typing a message to send it as a blurred Whisper message.

### 17. Delayed Sending Queue
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Places outgoing messages in a queue scheduled for delivery at custom times or user status triggers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Outbox Scheduler. Type a message, long-press the send button, select "Queue Delivery," and configure the release conditions.

### 18. Push-to-Talk Intercom
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Turns chats into real-time walkie-talkie intercom lines, playing audio messages instantly out loud on receiving devices.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Intercom Mode. Double-tap the microphone icon in a chat to toggle Intercom on, then hold and talk to broadcast voice instantly.

### 19. Circular Video Snapshots
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Captures and sends circular video clips up to 30 seconds directly from the chat camera interface.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Circular Clips. Tap the camera shortcut in the chat composer, select the round video mode, and capture a quick clip.

### 20. Multi-lingual Translator
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Automatically translates incoming messages into the user's native language in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inline Translation. In chat settings, toggle "Auto-Translate," select the target language, and view translated text below original messages.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Digital Tipping Gateway
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users to send digital tips and micro-payments directly to creators or contacts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Tipping Portal. Tap the coin icon below a post or message, select the tip amount, authenticate payments, and transfer funds.

### 22. Premium Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables channel owners to restrict access to exclusive feeds, chats, or forums behind monthly subscription tiers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Paid Memberships. Go to Channel Settings > Monetization, define subscription tiers and pricing, and bind exclusive channels.

### 23. In-chat Showcase Catalog
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows merchants to send interactive product showcases and buyable catalogs directly into chat windows.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Product Cards. In business settings, compile a catalog, tap "Share product," and select a contact to deliver shoppable cards.

### 24. Automated Billing bot
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates an automated billing bot that generates invoices, receipts, and tracks payment statuses in-chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Conversational Invoicing. Command the billing bot in chat to issue a payment request (e.g. `/bill $50`), facilitating checkout.

### 25. Sponsored Banner Ads
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays non-intrusive sponsored banner ads at the bottom of public discovery feeds and channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Ads. Configure ad campaigns in the advertiser manager, target categories, and display banners to target audiences.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Engagement Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays detailed post view, share, and interaction analytics for channels and community spaces.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Analytics Suite. Open a channel, click the stats icon in the menu to review charts showing weekly engagement and viewer growth.

### 27. Business Hours Auto-Reply
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Automatically responds to incoming messages with custom messages during designated non-business hours.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Away Responders. Go to Business Tools > Auto-Replies, configure business operating hours, and write the away template message.

### 28. Automated FAQ bots
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Deploys automated chatbots that scan customer queries and provide instant answers from a built-in FAQ database.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chatbot Assistant. Import a list of questions and answers in Bot Settings, and assign the chatbot to handle initial customer contacts.

### 29. Broadcast Lists
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows businesses to send updates and promotional announcements to multiple contacts simultaneously.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Broadcast Lists. Open contacts, tap "Create Broadcast," select recipients, and send a message that delivers individually.

### 30. Message Delivery Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks real-time delivery and read statuses for broadcast lists and group announcements.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Delivery Metrics. Click on a broadcast message info panel to view statistics on how many recipients received and read the message.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Cryptographic Vault
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A secure, encrypted folder in the app to store confidential documents, photos, and messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Secure Vault. Go to Settings > Security, activate the Cryptographic Vault, set a master password, and move sensitive files into it.

### 32. Ghost Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Hides online presence, last seen status, typing indicators, and read receipts across the app.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stealth Settings. Go to Settings > Privacy, toggle "Ghost Mode" on to browse chats without broadcasting activity status.

### 33. Local App Shield
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents external apps and screen capture tools from reading data or taking screenshots within the app.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Privacy Shield. Enable "App Shield" in Security settings to block OS-level screenshots and screen sharing.

### 34. View-Once Media Screen-lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically destroys view-once media if the app detects a lock-screen event or focus loss.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Active Media Guard. The platform automatically monitors app focus during view-once playback, locking and deleting the media if focus changes.

### 35. Trusted Devices Manager
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Audits and manages devices authorized to access the account, requiring confirmation from existing devices for new logins.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Authorization Panel. Access in Settings > Authorized Devices to review connected sessions and authorize new devices via QR codes.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Apaya Bot Framework
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Provides software libraries and APIs to build, test, and host interactive bots within the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bot SDK. Access developer documentation, register a bot ID, and use the SDK to capture chat events and respond dynamically.

### 37. Custom Webhooks
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Delivers real-time HTTP callbacks to external developer endpoints when events occur in chats or channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Webhook Setup. Configure target endpoint URLs and select event triggers (e.g. new messages, member joins) in the developer console.

### 38. Direct Web Widgets
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Embeds channel feeds, chat rooms, and follow buttons directly onto third-party web pages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Widget Embeds. Copy the generated iframe widget HTML snippet from channel settings and paste it into external web pages.

### 39. OAuth 2.0 Identity Bridge
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows users to log into external services and websites securely using their Apaya credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Identity Provider. Set up OAuth applications in the developer portal, enabling "Log in with Apaya" options on third-party sites.

### 40. Database Sync API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Synchronizes local user data and chat metadata with external backup databases or CRM suites.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sync Engine. Connect external databases via secure API endpoints using HTTPS and API key authentication headers.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. Custom Chat Ringers
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Assigns distinct ringtones and alert sounds to specific contacts and groups.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ringtone Selector. Open a contact info page, tap "Notifications," select "Custom Sound," and choose a ringtone from the local list.

### 42. Notification Bundler
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Consolidates alerts from active group chats into a single bundled notification to reduce lock-screen clutter.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Bundling. Go to Settings > Notifications, enable "Group Bundles," and configure the bundler's trigger frequency.

### 43. Mute Schedules
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically silences notifications during set daily schedules, such as working hours or sleep times.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Scheduled Mute. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Quiet Hours, configure start and end times, and toggle active days.

### 44. High-Priority Previews
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Pinpoints high-priority notifications, displaying detailed message content on top of other alerts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Priority Settings. Go to Settings > Notifications, select important contacts, and enable "High Priority Previews" for their alerts.

### 45. Silent Dispatch Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows sending messages without triggering sound or vibration notifications on the recipient's device.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Silent Sending. Long-press the send button and select "Silent Send" to deliver the message quietly.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Multi-profile Switcher
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to manage and switch between multiple sub-profiles (e.g., work, personal) within a single account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Manager. Tap your avatar in the side menu, select "Add Profile," and switch profiles instantly without logging out.

### 47. Cloud Chat Backups
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Backs up chat history and media to secure cloud storage platforms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Backup Utility. Go to Settings > Account > Backups, select cloud targets (Google Drive, iCloud), and configure auto-backup schedules.

### 48. Passkey Login
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Enables passwordless authentication using biometric sensors or device PINs to log into accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Passkey Configuration. Go to Settings > Account > Security, tap "Set up Passkey," and link the account to the device's secure enclave.

### 49. Account Liquidation Timer
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Automatically deletes the account and all associated data after a specified period of complete user inactivity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Self-Destruct Timer. Go to Settings > Privacy > Account Liquidation, and select the inactivity duration (e.g. 6 months).

### 50. Data Export Utility
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates and exports a complete archive of user data, including chats, media, and settings, in JSON or HTML format.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Export Portal. Go to Settings > Account > Export Data, select folders and formats, and request a download link.

---

### Platform: Band

This document compiles the feature research for Band, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Post Rich Text Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to write community posts with styled text including bold, italics, underlines, bulleted lists, and inline hyperlinks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Editing. Click the post composer field on the group main board, select text to modify, and use the formatting toolbar overlay to apply formatting.

### 2. Polling Tool with Multi-Choice & Anonymous voting
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables group members or admins to create interactive polls that support multiple selections, user-added choices, and anonymous voting.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Polling. In the post composer, click the "Poll" icon, write the question, add options, and check the toggles for "Allow multiple choices" or "Anonymous voting."

### 3. To-Do List and Task Assigner
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows group members to create checkboxes for specific tasks, set deadlines, and assign them to group members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Task Management. Click the "+" button in the post composer, select "To-Do," enter the task title, set a due date on the calendar picker, and select members to assign the task to.

### 4. Attachment Uploader (PDF, Doc, ZIP)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables uploading and sharing of productivity and binary files directly within posts and chat rooms, supporting large file attachments.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: File Sharing. Tap the paperclip icon in the post composer or chat input box, browse local device storage to choose a PDF, document, or archive file up to 2GB, and upload.

### 5. Image Markup / Annotation Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides built-in drawing and annotation tools to edit images, add labels, insert arrows, and crop before publishing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Image Annotations. Upload a photo in the post composer, tap the image thumbnail, select the edit/markup icon, use the brush or text tools to highlight specific details, and tap "Done."

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Hash-tag Directory & Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Automatically catalogs posts using hashtags and provides a directory to view all group content associated with specific topics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Tag Navigation. Click on any hyperlinked hashtag (e.g., `#announcement`) in a post to open a feed of posts sharing that tag, or browse the group's hashtag index.

### 7. Band Directory & Public Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to explore and join public Band groups categorized by interests, hobby types, or search terms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Directory Discovery. Navigate to the "Discover" tab, browse top-level categories (e.g., Sports, Gaming, Parents), or enter search terms to locate open public groups.

### 8. Pinned Post Section (Notice board)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Highlights important announcements by pinning up to 10 posts at the top of the Band board for easy visibility by all members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Pinned Notices. Click the drop-down menu on a published post, select "Pin as notice," and the post will appear in the pinned announcement carousel at the top of the group feed.

### 9. Global Search within Band
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to run keyword searches across all posts, comments, chat histories, uploaded files, and photos within a specific Band.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Contextual Search. Tap the search icon at the top of the Band, input a search term, and use the filter tabs (Posts, Chats, Files, Photos) to narrow down results.

### 10. Shared Album Media Browser
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Organizes all uploaded photos and videos in a dedicated, structured gallery interface featuring folder organization.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Folders. Click the "Albums" tab in the Band menu, create custom folders, and browse uploaded media sorted by upload date or contributing member.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. RSVP Event Calendar
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A shared calendar where admins can schedule events, collect RSVPs, and manage attendee lists.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Calendar RSVPs. Select the "Calendar" tab, tap an event date, click RSVP, and select "Attending," "Maybe," or "Not Attending" to update your status.

### 12. Member Profiles & Bio Cards
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Custom user profile cards within each Band, showing band-specific roles, bios, contact details, and activity histories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Directory. Access the member directory list from the side menu, tap any user's profile card, and view their band-specific introduction and past posts.

### 13. Band Level / Roles Administration
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows creators to designate member roles (Admin, Co-admin, Member) and customize group permissions granularly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Permission Governance. Go to Band Settings > Member settings > Change Member Role, select a user, and assign administrative permissions.

### 14. Birthday Calendar & Auto-congratulations
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Aggregates member birthdays in a group calendar and automatically publishes celebratory notices on the Band board.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Milestone Reminders. Enable the "Show member birthdays" setting in the group calendar. The platform will auto-generate a birthday congratulatory post when the date is reached.

### 15. Shout-outs & Badges
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Permits admins and members to award recognition badges or custom digital stickers to highlight exceptional member contributions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Peer Recognition. Tap the comment section of a post, click the sticker menu, select from the custom badge pack (e.g., "Star Contributor"), and post the sticker.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Group Chat Rooms (Open & Private)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows members of a Band to open dedicated, real-time group chat threads for quick messaging separate from the main board.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live Chatrooms. Go to the Chat tab, click the "+" icon, select the members you want to chat with, select "Group Chat," and enter a room name.

### 17. Voice & Video Group Calling
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Built-in VoIP voice and video calls within chat rooms, allowing multiple members to join and share screens.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Calls. Open any chat room, tap the call phone icon in the header, choose "Voice Call" or "Video Call," and invite active members.

### 18. Voice Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send short audio voice clips directly into a chat window.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Push-to-Record. Press and hold the microphone icon next to the chat text box, speak your message, and release to send the audio recording.

### 19. Message Read Receipts (Detailed view)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Tracks who has opened chat messages, displaying a count and a list of specific readers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Receipt Auditing. Tap the numeric "Read" indicator next to any sent message bubble in a chat to open a drawer displaying the names of members who have viewed it.

### 20. DM Ban/Ignore list
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to mute or block individual group members from sending direct message requests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Blocking. Open a chat room with a specific member, tap the menu list icon, and select "Mute notifications" or "Block member" to halt further communications.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Paid Member Dues & Stripe Connect
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Restricts access to a Band to paying subscribers, managing recurring membership fee collection.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Membership Subscription Gate. Go to Band Settings > Subscription dues, set the price and billing frequency, click "Connect with Stripe," and complete stripe authorization.

### 22. In-App Sticker Store
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Offers premium digital sticker and emoji packs for purchase to customize messaging and board replies.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Storefront. Click the emoticon icon in the composer, tap the "+" store shortcut, select a sticker pack, and complete the purchase using Google Play or Apple App Store billing.

### 23. Group Merch / Print-on-Demand Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates with custom merchandising platforms to let groups design and sell custom clothing or gear to members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Merch Linking. Navigate to the Band Business Center, click "Create Store," upload a group logo graphic, choose items to print, and publish the shop link on the notice board.

### 24. Ad-Free Group Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows Band admins to pay a platform fee that removes all third-party advertisements from their Band for all members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ad Removal. Navigate to Band Settings > "Remove Advertisements," select the monthly or annual subscription tier, and enter payment credentials.

### 25. Sponsored Post Placement
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables organizations to run sponsored banner ads targeted to public interest Band directories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ad Manager. Go to Band Ad Console, set your daily ad budget, upload image or text ad creatives, select interest targets, and launch.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Band Member Activity Reports
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides creators with visual charts summarizing daily active users, new membership signups, and board engagement levels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Analytics. Navigate to Band Settings > Activity Stats to view analytics dashboards showing member login and activity trends.

### 27. File Storage Quota Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks the storage quota consumed by uploaded group attachments, photos, and files.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Storage Auditing. Go to Band Settings > Manage Storage to view a detailed breakdown of total disk space used out of the group's quota.

### 28. Sign-up Sheets (Duty Roster Creator)
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Creates interactive volunteer sign-up sheets that allow members to lock in specific time slots or duties.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Roster Coordination. Click the "+" composer tool, select "Sign-up Sheet," input a title, add separate shift times or items needed, and publish to collect signups.

### 29. Poll Results Export
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Generates a detailed CSV file mapping poll options to the names of members who voted for them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Poll Auditing. Open a completed poll on the board, click the options menu, select "Export to CSV," and save the spreadsheet file.

### 30. Public Band SEO Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks web search traffic, click-through rates, and Google indexing statistics for public Bands.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Search Optimization. Access SEO Tools in Band Settings, viewing impressions, page ranks, and search query keywords that lead users to the public page.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Custom Admission Questions
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prompts applicants with customized screening questions that they must answer before admins approve their join request.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Onboarding Gate. Go to Band Settings > Join settings > Admission Questions, write up to three short-answer questions, and review answers under the "Requests" dashboard.

### 32. Band Invite Code / QR Code Access
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts group joining to secure invitation links, numerical invite codes, or scanned QR codes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Invite Controls. Click "Invite," choose to generate an invite link or QR code, set the link's expiration duration (e.g., 24 hours), and distribute.

### 33. Word Filtering (Auto-moderation)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically reviews board posts and comments, blocking those that contain specified keywords.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Censorship. Go to Band Settings > Moderation > Word Filter, type keywords to ban, and toggle "Auto-delete matches."

### 34. Hide Member List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows admins to hide the member directory from regular members to protect privacy.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Member Directory Privacy. Go to Band Settings > Privacy settings, and toggle "Hide member list from regular members" to active.

### 35. Report & Kick/Ban Member Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables admins to permanently eject disruptive members and ban them from rejoin attempts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Expulsion. Tap the member directory list, click the target member, select "Kick out," choose a violation category, and check the "Ban permanently" box.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Band Open API (REST)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer API providing access to post announcements, read boards, and fetch member details programmatically.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Web Service Integration. Register an app on `developers.band.us` to acquire token keys, making REST HTTP requests to write to specific Band endpoints.

### 37. External Calendar Sync (iCal/Google)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Syncs Band calendar events to external personal calendar software.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Calendar Sync. Open Calendar settings, click "Export Calendar Feed," copy the iCal URL, and paste it into Google Calendar or Outlook settings.

### 38. Google Drive & Dropbox File Linker
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects cloud storage platforms to select and link remote documents within post updates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Cloud Storage Link. In the post composer, click the cloud icon, authenticate your Google Drive or Dropbox login, select the file, and insert the download link.

### 39. Microsoft Teams / Slack Integration Bridge
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Relays Band announcements to internal enterprise chat rooms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Webhook Relays. Copy the incoming webhook URL from your Slack channel settings, navigate to Band Settings > Integrations, and paste it to configure auto-relaying.

### 40. Smart TV Casting
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Streams group video feeds, live webcasts, or photo galleries onto smart TVs.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Casting. Open a video post or photo within the mobile app, tap the Chromecast or AirPlay icon in the player container, and choose the output TV device.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. Urgent Notice Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends a push alert that overrides normal muting preferences for emergency communications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Emergency Broadcast. When creating a notice post, check the box "Set as Urgent Notice" before publishing. The post will ring on all member phones even if muted.

### 42. Per-Band Notification Profiles
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Permits configuring distinct notification rules and sound alerts for different Bands.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Alert Behavior. Click Band Settings > Notifications, and customize separate toggles for posts, comments, chats, and events.

### 43. Snooze Group Chats
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Silences notifications from active chat rooms temporarily without exiting the chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Temporary Muting. Open the chat room, click the settings cog or menu, tap the bell icon, and select a snooze duration (e.g., "Mute for 1 hour" or "Mute for 8 hours").

### 44. Daily Digest Emails
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Consolidates unread group activity into a single daily notification summary email.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Digest. Navigate to Account settings > Email settings, and check "Send daily digest of unread board posts."

### 45. Do Not Disturb Schedule
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Auto-blocks all incoming push alerts during specified daily hours (e.g., sleeping hours).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sleep Schedules. Open App Settings > Notifications > Do Not Disturb, set the start time (e.g., 10:00 PM) and end time (e.g., 7:00 AM), and toggle on.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Multi-Account Login Switcher
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows logging into multiple Band profiles on a single mobile device and switching profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Switching. Open the main side menu, tap your profile avatar dropdown, select "Add Account," log in, and tap avatars to switch.

### 47. Biometric App Lock (Face ID/Fingerprint)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Locks the Band app behind Face ID, fingerprint, or PIN lock screen security.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: App Access Security. Navigate to Settings > Security > App Lock, toggle on, select your preferred biometric method, and configure the auto-lock timeout.

### 48. Primary Phone Number verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Links the profile to a validated cellular number via SMS one-time password verification.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Phone Verification. Open Settings > Account details > Phone number, enter your number, input the 6-digit confirmation code received by SMS, and save.

### 49. Connected Device Management
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Lists all active devices and browsers logged into the account, with options to force remote logout.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Session Auditing. Navigate to Settings > Security > Logged-in Devices, review active sessions, and tap "Log out" next to unrecognized devices.

### 50. GDPR Data Retention Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to configure how long their personal logs, messages, and deleted posts are retained in platform databases.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Expiration. Open Settings > Privacy > Data retention, select the auto-delete time limit for deleted posts or chats (e.g., 3 months, 6 months, or 1 year), and click "Apply."

---

### Platform: BeReal

This document compiles the feature research for BeReal, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. BeReal Dual Camera Photography
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Captures front-facing and rear-facing photos simultaneously when the user takes their daily post. It ensures that the viewer sees both what the creator is looking at and their immediate reaction.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Dual Capture Interface. When the daily notification triggers, tap the camera button, align your shot, and tap the shutter button to take both photos at the same time.

### 2. BeReal RealMojis Selfie Capture
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to take specific selfie reactions to represent emojis (e.g., thumbs up, laughing face) for reacting to friends' posts. These custom reactions are saved in the user's reaction drawer to be used repeatedly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Selfie Reaction Creator. Tap the emoji reaction button on a friend's post, choose a reaction type, line up your face in the circular frame, and capture your custom RealMoji.

### 3. BeReal Late Posting Marker
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Permits users to post their daily BeReal after the initial two-minute window has expired, attaching a timestamp showing how late they were. It ensures that users can still share their day even if they missed the immediate alert.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Late Upload Annotation. If you miss the prompt, open the app at any time later in the day and tap the "Post a Late BeReal" prompt to capture and publish your post.

### 4. BeReal Retake Tracker
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Counts the number of times a user re-shoots their daily photo before publishing it, displaying the count to their friends. It promotes visual authenticity by showing if a post was carefully staged or captured on the first try.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creative Authenticity Analytics. Retakes are logged automatically when you delete a draft shot and click the shutter button again. The count is visible to friends when they tap the three dots on your published post.

### 5. BeReal Video BeReal Clips
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: An option that records a short, three-second video clip leading up to the static daily photo capture. It captures a quick snippet of live action to add motion and depth to the daily post.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live Photo Recording. In the camera screen, tap the "Video" toggle in the top corner to activate video mode, then hold the shutter button to capture the motion.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. BeReal Friends Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: The main chronological feed showcasing the daily BeReal posts shared by a user's approved friends list. To encourage participation, a user must publish their own daily post before they can view their friends' uploads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private chronological feed. Open the application, and the default screen will display the "My Friends" feed tab. To unlock your friends' posts, you must first publish your own daily post.

### 7. BeReal Memories Calendar Archive
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A private grid calendar showing a chronological visual archive of all the user's past daily BeReal posts. It acts as a personal photo journal, allowing users to look back on what they did on any specific day.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Historic Archive Index. Tap your profile icon in the top-right corner of the app, and select the "Memories" calendar grid to click on specific dates and view past uploads.

### 8. BeReal Global Discovery Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public feed tab listing daily posts shared by users worldwide who have set their visibility settings to public. It allows users to peek into the daily lives of people from different cultures across the globe.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Public Post Search. From the main feed, swipe left or tap the "Discovery" tab at the top of the interface to browse through public uploads from around the world.

### 9. BeReal Discovery Geolocation Map
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An interactive map view displaying the location pins of public BeReal posts globally, helping users find content in specific regions. Users can click on geographical pins to explore local posts in different cities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Location Directory. In the "Discovery" tab, tap the map icon in the top corner to load a global map, and pinch-to-zoom to click pins and view local posts.

### 10. BeReal RealMojis Notification Widget
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A mobile home screen widget displaying friends' latest BeReal photos in real-time without needing to open the app. It updates automatically when friends upload new content, keeping users connected directly from their home screens.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Home Screen Widget. Add the BeReal widget to your device's home screen via system settings. The widget automatically updates its visual content whenever a friend publishes a new post.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. BeReal RealMojis Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables reacting to a friend's daily post using a custom pre-recorded selfie RealMoji instead of standard keyboard characters. It creates a personalized way of responding to friends' posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Selfie Reactions. Tap the emoji smiley icon in the bottom-right corner of a friend's post, choose one of your pre-recorded RealMojis, and tap to apply it.

### 12. BeReal Post Comments
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A private commenting section under a friend's BeReal post that is only visible to the user and their shared friends. It provides a secure space for friends to discuss their daily activities and plan hangouts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Conversation Threads. Click the "Add Comment" button at the bottom of a friend's post, write your comment, and press enter to post.

### 13. BeReal Contact Sync Friend Discovery
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Scans the user's mobile device contact list to find and send friend invitations to people they know. It makes building a network fast by identifying which contacts already have active accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Contact Book Matching. Tap the "Add Friends" icon (two silhouettes) on the top-left of the feed, click "Find Contacts," and grant permission to see recommendations.

### 14. BeReal Cross-Platform Post Export
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to share their daily BeReal to external applications such as Instagram Stories or WhatsApp chats. It helps users cross-promote their content and share daily moments with their other social networks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Export Service. Open your published BeReal, tap the share icon (arrow or three dots), select "Share to other apps," and choose your preferred destination.

### 15. BeReal RealMoji Customization Panel
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A manager within the reaction menu that allows users to delete and re-record their saved RealMojis. It gives users the flexibility to refresh their reaction selfies whenever they want.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Reaction Management. Long-press on any of your saved circular RealMojis inside the reaction tray, click the "Delete" trash can icon, and capture a new selfie reaction.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. BeReal Direct Chat System
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A direct, private text messaging feature that allows friends to chat privately inside the application. It provides an integrated chat workspace to continue conversations started in comment threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Chat Rooms. Open a friend's profile page or tap their username on a post, and click the chat bubble icon "RealChat" to open a messaging thread.

### 17. BeReal Private Photo Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to send private, one-off photos to friends directly inside a private chat window. These photos are captured using the front and rear cameras to maintain the platform's signature dual style.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Camera Utility. Open a private chat, tap the camera icon next to the text input box, capture a photo using the front/rear cameras, and tap "Send."

### 18. BeReal RealMojis in Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to send their pre-saved RealMoji selfie reactions as direct, standalone chat messages. It makes messaging more expressive by letting users respond with their actual facial expressions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Selfie Icons. In a private chat thread, tap the emoji smiley face inside the chat box, select a RealMoji, and tap to send it as a message bubble.

### 19. BeReal RealChat Notification Mute
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A setting that silences notifications for a specific private chat thread, reducing incoming alerts. It helps users manage busy conversations without leaving the chat room entirely.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Thread Mute Control. Inside a private chat room, tap the contact's name at the top of the screen, select "Mute Notifications," and choose the mute setting.

### 20. BeReal Chat Message Deletion
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables users to delete specific text or photo messages from the chat view for both themselves and the recipient. It allows retracting accidental messages or clearing sensitive chats permanently.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Message Removal. In a chat thread, tap and hold the message bubble you want to remove, and click "Delete for everyone" in the pop-up options.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. BeReal RealBrands Official Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users to search for and subscribe to verified official brand accounts, celebrities, and creators. Subscribing adds these public profiles to a secondary tab within the user's daily feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Brand Following Portal. Open the search menu, type a verified brand username (e.g., "Adidas"), and tap the "Subscribe" button to add them to your feed.

### 22. BeReal Sponsored Behind-The-Scenes Campaigns
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A promotional placement tool that enables official brand partners to post behind-the-scenes content in the Discovery feed. It allows brands to engage with users in the same candid format as normal profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Branded Campaigns. Sponsored posts appear directly in the Discovery feed. Users can tap the brand's profile card to view details or promotional offers.

### 23. BeReal Branded Product Tagging
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows official brand accounts to tag products in their daily BeReal posts, routing users to their digital shop. Viewers can tap these tags to explore product specifications and purchase details.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Product Link Tags. Verified brand accounts can click "Add Tags" when posting, search their product catalog, and place a tag. Viewers tap the tag to open the shop page.

### 24. BeReal Promotional Feed Placement
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Interstitial advertising slots inserted between friends' posts on the home feed. These placements are labeled clearly and allow users to discover products while catching up with friends.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ad Integration. Promoted posts are inserted dynamically by the system. Users can interact by rating them or dismiss them by tapping "Hide Ad."

### 25. BeReal In-App Digital Item Purchase Shop
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app storefront created by Voodoo that allows users to purchase premium frames, visual themes, or emoji packs. It provides a non-intrusive monetization model that lets users customize their profile aesthetics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Microtransactions. Navigate to settings, select "Digital Shop," browse premium aesthetic skins or visual frames, and complete the transaction using Apple Pay or Google Pay.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. BeReal RealBrands Analytics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An analytics control panel for verified brand profiles displaying overall views, shares, and reaction rates. It provides brands with numerical insight into their campaign effectiveness and community reach.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Brand Analytics Suite. Log in to your verified brand account, navigate to profile settings, and click "Insights" to view engagement charts.

### 27. BeReal RealBrands Follower Growth Tracker
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A tracking widget showing weekly statistics for new subscribers, retention rates, and unfollow trends. It helps creators and brand marketing teams monitor their audience growth over time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Follower Growth Metrics. In the Insights tab, select the "Subscribers" header to view charts displaying weekly user acquisition.

### 28. BeReal Post Engagement Statistics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays detailed statistics on how many subscribers reacted to a post and which RealMoji emojis were used most. It allows brand coordinators to analyze which styles of content resonate best with their target audience.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Interaction Analytics. Open any of your brand's published posts, tap the "View Statistics" link, and review the detailed breakdown.

### 29. BeReal Campaign Scheduling Console
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An interface that enables verified brand accounts to schedule promotional posts to align with campaign timelines. It provides marketing coordinators with a tool to manage and queue content in advance.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Brand Post Scheduler. In the brand creator panel, select "Campaigns," draft a post, click "Schedule," and set the release time window.

### 30. BeReal Audience Location Demographics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Aggregates demographic location data showing where the brand's active followers are located globally. It helps brands customize their posting schedules and product offerings for specific geographic regions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Geographical Demographics. In the Insights console, tap "Audience," and scroll down to the "Locations" map to view regions with high subscriber concentrations.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. BeReal Post Audience Selector
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables users to set their daily post visibility to either "Friends Only" or "Discovery" (Public) before uploading. It allows users to keep their daily lives private or share them globally.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Privacy Controls. When taking your BeReal, tap the privacy icon at the bottom of the screen to choose between "My Friends Only" or "Discovery" before tapping send.

### 32. BeReal Geolocation Toggle
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to enable or disable sharing their precise GPS coordinates on their daily post. Disabling location removes the map pin while keeping the photo viewable.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Precise Location Control. On the post preview screen, tap the location indicator icon to toggle it to "Location Off" or "Location On" before publishing.

### 33. BeReal User Blocking
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Blocks a user, preventing them from finding your account, viewing your posts, or sending you chat requests. It is a critical safety tool to stop harassment and enforce personal boundaries.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Access Restrictions. Go to the user's profile page, tap the three dots in the top-right corner, and select "Block User."

### 34. BeReal Content Reporting System
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An in-app flag tool that allows users to report posts, comments, or RealMojis that violate guidelines. Reported content is flagged and sent directly to review teams for moderation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Abuse Reporting System. Tap the three dots on the post you want to report, select "Report," choose the violation type from the list, and submit.

### 35. BeReal Friend List Hiding
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A privacy setting that hides the user's friend list from other users on the platform. It helps protect user privacy and prevents strangers from mining contact lists.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Contact Privacy Control. Navigate to Settings > Privacy, and toggle the "Hide Friend List" option to active.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. BeReal Simultaneous Daily Push Alert
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: The daily push notification sent simultaneously to all users in a specific region, prompting them to post within two minutes. It creates a shared daily moment where everyone posts their current status together.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Regional Notification Alert. Triggered automatically at a randomized time daily. Tap the notification banner to launch the camera and start the two-minute countdown.

### 37. BeReal Region Selection Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures the geographic region of the user's account to align the daily notification with local time. It ensures that the notification triggers during daytime hours for the user's current location.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Time Zone Customization. Open Settings > Time Zone, select your current continent/region, and click "Save" to align daily notifications with local daytime.

### 38. BeReal Notification Snooze Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A setting that silences go-live push notifications during work hours or personal events. It allows users to prevent interruptions without permanently disabling app notifications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: App Alerts Silencing. Navigate to device system settings, select BeReal > Notifications, and customize your alert schedule.

### 39. BeReal Live Feed Updates Pause
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A control that pauses feed synchronization, reducing battery usage and screen time. It lets users manual refresh the feed only when they choose.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sync Toggle. Go to Settings > Preferences, and toggle "Background Refresh" to off.

### 40. BeReal Custom Alert Tone Selection
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to select custom audio alert tones for BeReal notifications on their mobile devices. It lets users personalize the daily notification alert to stand out from other app sounds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Audio Personalization. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Ringtone, and select your preferred audio tone.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. BeReal Spotify API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic linkage that enables the BeReal app to check the user's Spotify active playback and share music details on their posts. It displays the song title, artist, and album art directly on the daily photo.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Spotify Integration API. Open Settings > Integrations, tap "Link Spotify," log in to your Spotify account, and grant the application permissions to query your currently playing track details.

### 42. BeReal Apple Music API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic API integration that fetches details of the user's currently playing track from Apple Music to display on daily posts. It allows viewers to click the track to listen to a preview or save it to their library.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Apple Music API. Go to Settings > Integrations, tap "Link Apple Music," and authorize the app to access your music activity permissions on your device.

### 43. BeReal OAuth 2.0 Web Authentication
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A secure OAuth identity verification endpoint that allows third-party services to authenticate users using their BeReal login details. It simplifies registration on developer portals and partner sites.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Identity API. Access the BeReal Developer Portal, register your app, redirect users to `https://auth.bereal.team/oauth/authorize`, and exchange authorization codes for access tokens.

### 44. BeReal RealMojis Web SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer SDK that allows integrating BeReal custom RealMoji selfie reactions into third-party blogging platforms or comment widgets. It extends the platform's unique reaction format to external websites.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RealMoji Integration SDK. Download the SDK package from the developer site, embed it in your web app, and use methods like `BeRealRealMoji.load()` to display user reaction icons.

### 45. BeReal Post Published Webhook
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Webhook integration that sends real-time HTTPS POST callbacks with JSON payloads to developer servers when a user uploads their daily post. It allows developers to trigger external automations or update stats immediately.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Notification Webhook. Register a webhook callback URL in your developer dashboard, select the event `post.published`, and write a server script to capture the JSON notification metadata.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. BeReal Phone Number Sign-in Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A passwordless authentication system that verifies user identity by sending a secure SMS verification code. It speeds up sign-in while maintaining high account security.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Secure Login Verification. Enter your registered phone number on the login screen, receive the 6-digit SMS verification code, and type it into the app to log in.

### 47. BeReal Contact Sync Control
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A settings control that enables or disables syncing contacts, with options to delete previously synced data. It gives users complete control over how their phone contact books are used by the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sync Settings Manager. Open Settings > Privacy > Contact Syncing, and toggle the switch to active or tap "Delete Synced Contacts" to purge stored data.

### 48. BeReal Account Deactivation Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: An in-app account deletion tool that initiates the process of permanently deleting all user data and media. It satisfies privacy regulations by allowing users to wipe their profiles completely.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Permanent Data Deletion. Navigate to Settings > Account > Delete Account, select a reason, confirm your password, and submit the deletion request.

### 49. BeReal Data Archive Export Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to request a downloadable archive containing all their account history, comments, and media. It provides data portability, packaging all historic BeReal photos into a secure ZIP file.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Personal Data Download. Go to Settings > Privacy > Download My Data, tap "Request Export," and wait for the download link to be emailed.

### 50. BeReal Active Sessions Manager
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a history of active devices, IP addresses, and locations that are logged in, with options to log out. It allows users to detect suspicious access and terminate rogue sessions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Security Session Auditing. Navigate to Settings > Security > Active Sessions, review the list of devices, and click "Terminate Session" to log out any unrecognized device.

---

### Platform: Bluesky

This document compiles the feature research for Bluesky, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Bluesky Text Composer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to post text updates up to 300 characters, with pasted URLs automatically processed and resolved into rich link card previews.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Composition. Click the "New Post" button in the bottom right corner of the screen, enter your text, and verify that any included link generates a preview card.

### 2. Bluesky Video Uploads
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to upload and publish vertical or horizontal video clips up to 60 seconds long directly in their posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Post Composition. Click the "New Post" button, tap the camera icon in the composer toolbar, select a video file from your device, and click "Post" to begin uploading.

### 3. Bluesky Alt Text Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Prompts users to add descriptive alternative text descriptions to all image uploads to enhance accessibility for screen readers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Accessibility Metadata. After selecting an image in the post composer, click the "ALT" button overlay on the image thumbnail to open the text editor, type your description, and click "Done."

### 4. Bluesky Rich Text Facets
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Formats interactive elements like user mentions, links, and hashtags within a post dynamically without counting toward character limits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Dynamic Text Markup. Type a "@" followed by a user handle (e.g. `@name.bsky.social`) or a hashtag (e.g. `#atproto`) in the composer. The app automatically highlights and links the text upon posting.

### 5. Bluesky Thread Composer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to build and publish multiple connected posts at once, creating a clean conversational thread.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Thread Publisher. Click "New Post," then click the "+" button next to the post button to add a new post to the sequence. Repeat for up to 10 posts, then click "Post All."

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Bluesky Custom Feeds
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to subscribe to and pin specialized feeds developed by the community using custom algorithms, keywords, or lists.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Decentralized Feeds. Tap the Feeds tab, click "Discover Feeds" to browse custom algorithmic streams, and click the "+" button to pin your favorite feeds to your home bar.

### 7. Bluesky Search Query Syntax
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Supports advanced operators within the search bar to locate specific posts and profiles on the network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Filter Search. Enter search parameters like `from:username`, `since:2026-01-01`, or negative flags like `-word` in the search input box to filter results.

### 8. Bluesky Discover Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A default personalized algorithmic feed showcasing popular posts, trending discussions, and customized content recommendations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Recommendations. Tap the Home icon on the navigation panel and swipe or click the "Discover" tab in the top header.

### 9. Bluesky Feeds Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public repository of all registered custom feeds that can be searched and filtered by popularity, creator, or topic.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Search Index. Navigate to the Feeds tab in the main sidebar, select "Discover Feeds," and type keywords in the feed search bar to find custom timelines.

### 10. Bluesky Topic Hashtags
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Aggregates all posts containing a specific hashtag into a chronological stream of posts featuring that tag.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hashtag Streams. Click any active hashtag link in a post caption (e.g., `#gardening`) or search a hashtag in the search box to view the corresponding real-time topic feed.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Bluesky Lists
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables users to create and manage custom collections of accounts for muting, blocking, or creating custom feed filters.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Grouping. Navigate to lists under Settings > Moderation > Mute Lists or User Lists, click "New List," add accounts, and name the list.

### 12. Bluesky Reply Thread Views
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Customizes the layout of thread replies to show conversations chronologically, by popularity, or in a nested tree structure.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Thread Layout Settings. Access Settings > Thread Preferences, and select your preferred view mode under the reply thread options.

### 13. Bluesky Quote Posts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Shares another user's post with your own text comment or media attachment appended above the original content.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Quoted Shares. Tap the circular arrow repost icon below a post, select "Quote Post," write your commentary in the composer, and tap "Post."

### 14. Bluesky Starter Packs
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to bundle a set of recommended accounts and custom feeds into a shareable package to help new users onboard.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Curations. Go to your profile, tap the "Starter Packs" tab, select "Create Starter Pack," choose up to 50 accounts and 3 feeds, name the pack, and click publish.

### 15. Bluesky Decoupled Quote Posts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows the creator of a post to detach their post from another user's quote post to prevent unwanted associations or contexts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Quote Post Moderation. Navigate to the quote post that links to your original post, click the three-dot menu on the quote post, and select "Detach my post."

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Bluesky Direct Messaging
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to exchange private, one-on-one text messages directly with other accounts on the network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Messaging. Tap the chat envelope icon in the main navigation bar, click the "New Chat" icon, search for a user handle, and type your message.

### 17. Bluesky DM Permission Controls
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Manages who can send you direct messages, restricting incoming messages to specific circles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: DM Security Settings. Tap the settings gear icon within the Chat interface, and select between "Everyone," "Users I follow," or "No one."

### 18. Bluesky DM Message Requests
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Isolates direct messages sent by users you do not follow into a separate folder for manual approval.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Request Filtering. Open the Chat section in the app. Message requests are separated into a "Requests" tab at the top of the chat list, which you can tap to review or ignore.

### 19. Bluesky Direct Message Deletion
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Deletes direct messages from your own inbox view without deleting them from the recipient's inbox.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Message Deletion. Open a chat thread, long-press a specific message bubble, and tap "Delete for me" from the popup menu.

### 20. Bluesky DM Notification Badges
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Displays a red badge counter over the chat icon in the navigation bar to alert users to unread direct messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Alerts. Enabled by default. Manage push notification behavior under Settings > Notifications > Chat Messages to toggle alerts on or off.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Bluesky Domain Registration Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates with third-party domain registrars to let users purchase and map custom domains to use as their handle directly inside the app.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Handle Purchase Portal. Go to Settings > Change Handle. Select "I have my own domain," click "Buy a new domain," search for available domain names, and complete the purchase via the Namecheap integration.

### 22. Bluesky Creator Tip Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays links on user profiles pointing to third-party payment services like Ko-fi, Patreon, or Buy Me a Coffee.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Monetization Links. Edit your profile, and paste your payment gateway URL in the bio or description field. The app detects standard payment links and displays a payment badge.

### 23. Bluesky Professional Accounts
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Specialized profiles for business and media entities that support custom external storefront links.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Commercial Profile Setup. Edit profile settings, select profile type "Professional," and fill in business details including physical location and store URL.

### 24. Bluesky Custom Feed Monetization
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows developers of custom feeds to embed sponsor banners or external tip links in feed descriptions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Description Sponsorships. Feed developers format their feed configuration metadata to include sponsor links and payment details within the description text.

### 25. Bluesky Affiliate Link Preview Support
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays optimized product card layouts when posting ecommerce affiliate URLs, showing prices and buy buttons.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Affiliate Product Cards. When pasting an affiliate link (e.g. Amazon Affiliate) in the post composer, click the card preview checkbox to generate a formatted shopping card.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Bluesky Post View Counters
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays a public counter showing the total number of views or impressions on individual posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Reach Auditing. Look at the bottom of any post. Next to the repost and reply counts, the view count icon shows the total number of times the post has appeared on screens.

### 27. Bluesky Feed Performance Metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides developers of custom feeds with dashboards showing active subscriber counts, API requests, and usage.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Analytics. Access via the feed generator dashboard in your development environment to inspect API logs and check subscriber rates.

### 28. Bluesky Third-Party Analytics Integration
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators to sync their account with external tools like SkyFeed or deck.blue to analyze follower growth and post engagements.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: External Tool Synchronization. Authorize third-party analytics clients by generating an App Password in your settings and logging in on the tool's platform.

### 29. Bluesky Profile Share Cards
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Generates stylized image files containing QR codes and profile details for cross-platform sharing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile QR Generator. Open your profile page, click the three-dot menu next to your handle, select "Share Profile," and tap "Save Image" to export the card.
