### 30. Bluesky Custom Handle Manager
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Upgrades user handles from standard `.bsky.social` subdomains to custom DNS domains to verify brand authenticity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Handle Verification. Go to Settings > Change Handle. Select "I have my own domain," enter your custom domain name, and configure DNS records as prompted to verify ownership.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Bluesky Labeling Services
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to subscribe to independent third-party moderation services that apply warnings or filter content in their feeds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Third-Party Moderation. Go to Settings > Moderation > Labelers, browse community labelers, and click "Subscribe" to apply their safety tags to your feed.

### 32. Bluesky Custom Mute Lists
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables users to create and subscribe to public blocklists and mute lists created by the community.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Shared Blocklists. Navigate to Settings > Moderation > Mute Lists, and browse or search for lists (e.g. "Spam Accounts") to mute all accounts on the list at once.

### 33. Bluesky Content Filters
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Configures visibility rules for sensitive content, hate speech, spam, and violence.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Category Muting. Go to Settings > Moderation > Content Filters, and set categories (e.g. "Explicit Content") to "Show," "Warn," or "Hide."

### 34. Bluesky Thread Reply Hiding
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows the author of a thread to hide replies to keep their discussion sections relevant.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Comment Moderation. Tap the three-dot menu next to a reply on your post, select "Hide reply," and confirm the action.

### 35. Bluesky Block Propagation
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Instantly hides the user's posts, replies, and profile page from blocked accounts across the decentralized network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: User Blocking. Click the three-dot menu on any profile page or post, and select "Block account." The block propagates to your personal data server.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Bluesky Push Alert Preferences
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Customizes the delivery of push notifications for interactions such as likes, reposts, mentions, and follows.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mobile Alert Customization. Go to Settings > Notifications, and toggle the individual switches for each category of interaction.

### 37. Bluesky Notification Filtering
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Filters notifications to exclude interactions from accounts you don't follow or new accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Notification Inbox Filters. Open the Notifications tab, tap the settings gear icon, and select "Filter notifications from people you don't follow" or "Filter new accounts."

### 38. Bluesky Badge Count Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures the red notification badge counts on the app icon to only update for specific event categories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Badge Settings. Go to Settings > Notifications, scroll down to "Badge Count," and choose whether to count "All Notifications" or "Mentions and Replies Only."

### 39. Bluesky Push Schedule Quiet Hours
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Syncs notifications with mobile operating system quiet periods to silence notifications during scheduled hours.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Scheduled Silent Hours. Configured via your device's native settings (iOS Focus Mode or Android Do Not Disturb) to mute Bluesky push alerts.

### 40. Bluesky Mute Thread
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notifications for a specific conversational thread to stop receiving alerts from replies.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Conversational Thread Muting. Open the thread, click the three-dot menu at the top of the root post, and select "Mute thread."

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Bluesky AT Protocol XRPC
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: The core remote procedure call protocol used to query, create, and modify records in the decentralized network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: XRPC Endpoint Query. Developers make HTTP POST or GET requests to the XRPC service URL (e.g. `https://bsky.social/xrpc/app.bsky.feed.getTimeline`) with bearer tokens.

### 42. Bluesky Lexicons
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Schema definitions written in JSON that define data types, RPC methods, and records for the network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Schema Validation. Developers read schema definitions from the `@atproto/api` package, creating objects that match the specified lexicon schemas (e.g. `app.bsky.actor.profile`).

### 43. Bluesky Personal Data Server API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: API endpoints on Personal Data Server (PDS) nodes used to manage repositories, uploads, and authentication.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Repository Management. Interact with your hosting PDS via endpoint `/xrpc/com.atproto.repo.createRecord` to publish data programmatically.

### 44. Bluesky Firehose API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A WebSockets subscription endpoint that streams every public event and record modification across the network in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Event Stream. Open a WebSocket connection to the relay firehose URL (e.g. `wss://bsky.network/xrpc/com.atproto.sync.subscribeRepos`) to parse incoming CAR block streams.

### 45. Bluesky AppView Service
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Central indexing API service used to query compiled timelines, threads, and user profiles across servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Compiled Index Queries. Query the AppView endpoints (e.g. `GET /xrpc/app.bsky.feed.getPostThread`) to retrieve aggregated, user-facing thread layouts.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Bluesky App Passwords
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Creates unique, single-purpose passwords for logging into third-party apps without sharing main credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Third-Party Credentials. Navigate to Settings > App Passwords, click "Add App Password," give it a label, and save the generated password code.

### 47. Bluesky Data Repository Export
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Downloads the user's complete data repository, containing all posts, likes, follows, and history as a CAR file.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Data Download. Navigate to Settings > Account > Export My Data, and click the download button to request your archive file.

### 48. Bluesky Domain Handle Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Configures DNS TXT or HTTP redirect records on a custom domain to verify and change the user's handle.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Handle Verification DNS. Go to Settings > Change Handle. Select "I have my own domain," enter your custom domain name, and configure the DNS TXT record `_atproto` with your host value.

### 49. Bluesky Two-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Requires email-based verification codes when logging in from new devices to secure access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Protection. Go to Settings > Two-Factor Authentication. Toggle "Require code on login" to enable, and verify via email verification.

### 50. Bluesky Personal Data Server Transfer
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Migrates the user's complete account data, posts, and social graph from one PDS provider to another.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: PDS Migration. Go to Settings > Account > Advanced, select "Transfer Account," input the address of your new PDS provider, and authorize the migration.

---

### Platform: Bumble

This document compiles the feature research for Bumble, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Profile Prompts & Icebreakers
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to answer pre-written questions (e.g., "My ideal Sunday is...") that display directly on their profile card to start conversations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bio Customization. In the profile editor, tap "Add prompt," select a prompt from the catalog, type your response in the text field, and save to publish.

### 2. Bumble Badges (Lifestyle, Interests, Work)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Simple icon indicators that users can add to their profiles to quickly display height, zodiac sign, exercise frequency, relationship goals, or education levels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Demographic Badges. Edit profile, scroll down to the "My Info" or "Life habits" section, select specific Badges (e.g., "Non-smoker," "Active"), and tap save.

### 3. Photo Verification Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A verification feature where the platform requests users to take a real-time photo copying a specific pose, certifying their identity and granting a blue checkmark badge.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Identity Verification. Tap the verification badge link in the profile settings, emulate the prompted hand pose in the camera view, snap the photo, and submit for moderator review.

### 4. Spotify Favorite Artists Link
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Integrates with a user's Spotify account to show their top played musical artists directly at the bottom of their Bumble profile page.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Music Integration. In the edit profile page, scroll down to the Spotify block, click "Connect Spotify," enter your Spotify account credentials to authorize, and select which top artists to display.

### 5. Bumble Bizz / BFF Bio Sections
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides distinct profile text editors and formatting options specifically tailored to professional networking (Bizz) or friendship seeking (BFF).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mode-Specific Profiles. Switch the app mode to BFF or Bizz via the side menu, click "Edit Profile," and fill out fields designed for work histories or friendly interests rather than romantic ones.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Swiping Profile Discovery Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: The core swiping card interface that allows users to discover local profiles, swiping right to indicate interest or left to pass.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Swiping UI. On the main feed, swipe a user's profile card to the right to register a like or swipe it to the left to reject.

### 7. Advanced Search Filters (Premium Filters)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to filter potential matches based on specific criteria such as political leanings, height, relationship intent, or education.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Filter Preferences. Click the swipe settings icon in the top right of the swipe screen, click "Advanced Filters," select your preferences, and toggle on "Apply filters."

### 8. Incognito Mode (Incognito Swiping)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Hides a user's profile from the public swiping queue, showing their card only to users they have actively swiped right on.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stealth Discovery. Navigate to Premium Settings, scroll down to "Incognito Mode," and toggle the switch to active to browse profiles privately.

### 9. Travel Mode
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows premium users to temporarily change their swipe location coordinates to another city, matching with users there before arriving.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Location Spoofer. Go to Settings > Travel Mode, search for and select your target city, and the discovery feed will refresh to show users in that location.

### 10. Bumble BFF & Bizz Modes Toggle
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to toggle their discovery feed among dating matches, friendly connections, or professional networking opportunities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mode Selector. Tap the mode header at the top center of the swiping screen, and select "Dating," "BFF," or "Bizz" from the drop-down menu.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Women-Initiate-First Match Control
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enforces a double-opt-in rule where only female users can send the first message after a heterosexual match, with a 24-hour expiration window.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Matching Logic. Once a match is made in Dating mode, a 24-hour countdown timer begins. The female user must send a message to open the chat window, otherwise the match expires.

### 12. Opening Moves
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to set a default prompt question that matches can respond to immediately to open the conversation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Openers. Go to Chat Settings > Opening Move, select a pre-written question or type a custom one, and it will be presented to matches to answer.

### 13. Extend Match Timer
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to add 24 hours to the countdown timer of an expiring match to keep the match from dissolving.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Expiration Extensions. Open the active match queue, click on the profile icon of the match that has less than 24 hours remaining, and click the "Extend" button.

### 14. Compliments Tool
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables users to send a short message to a potential match before an official match has occurred, attaching it to a specific profile card element.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Pre-Match Communication. Tap the yellow star icon on someone's profile prompt response or photo, type a message up to 150 characters, and send.

### 15. Speed Dating (Blind Chat Event)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A scheduled real-time event where users are paired to chat for three minutes without seeing each other's photos, revealing profiles only if both agree.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Blind Swiping. Join the event during designated hours via the Explore tab, chat with the paired user, and tap the "Match" button to view photos if the match is mutual.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. In-App Video & Voice Calling
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables matches to start video calls or voice chats directly inside the chat interface without sharing personal contact numbers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: In-App Calls. Open an active match chat window, tap the phone receiver icon for voice or the camera icon for video in the top right, and wait for connection.

### 17. Voice Notes in Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send voice messages directly into a match chat thread.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Voice Recording. Inside the chat window, tap and hold the microphone icon next to the text input box, record your audio message, and release to send.

### 18. Interactive Question Game
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: An interactive game built into the chat console where both matched users must answer the same card-style question before their answers are revealed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Messaging Icebreakers. Inside a chat, tap the question card icon next to the input box, select a card, type your answer, and wait for your match to answer to reveal both responses.

### 19. Reaction Emojis & Stickers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Permits users to apply emoji reactions directly to specific message bubbles in their chats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Quick Reactions. Double-tap a received message bubble in the chat thread, and select one of the floating emojis (e.g., heart, laugh, thumbs up) to apply a reaction.

### 20. Photo & GIF Messenger
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables matched users to share images from their camera rolls or search and send animated GIFs.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multimedia Chat. Tap the image icon to select a local photo, or tap the GIF button to search the Giphy directory and send files within the chat console.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Bumble Premium/Boost Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Paid recurring subscription packages that unlock premium features like unlimited swipes, backtracking, and advanced search filters.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Tiered Premium Services. Tap the profile silhouette icon, select "Upgrade to Premium," select a billing frequency (e.g., weekly, monthly, or lifetime), and complete checkout.

### 22. Spotlight Feature
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A premium purchase that highlights a user's profile card to the front of local discovery queues for 30 minutes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Boost. Tap the Spotlight icon on the swiping screen, click "Use Spotlight," and your profile is prioritized. A timer displays on screen showing the remaining boost.

### 23. SuperSwipe Feature
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A paid interaction that lets another user know you are highly interested in them before they swipe on your card.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Premium Swiping. Tap the heart-shaped SuperSwipe icon on a user's profile card to swipe right with high priority, sending them a notification when your profile appears.

### 24. Bumble Coins In-App Currency
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app virtual currency that users can purchase and spend to activate Spotlights and SuperSwipes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: App Wallet. Go to your profile settings, tap "Bumble Coins," select a coin package, and purchase using the mobile store payment framework.

### 25. Backtrack Feature (Premium)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows premium users to undo an accidental left swipe (rejection) and return the profile to the screen.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Undo Swipes. If you swipe left accidentally, shake your phone or tap the undo arrow in the top left corner of the screen to reload the profile.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. "Beeline" Profile Views (Who Liked Me)
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays a list of profiles that have already swiped right on your card, allowing for instant matching.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inbound Swipes list. Tap the chat bubble icon to view the match queue, click the gold-circled profile photo previewing who liked you, and browse the list of fans.

### 27. Match Rate Analytics (My Stats request)
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides users with a detailed downloadable summary of their profile performance, including swipe numbers and match rates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: User Performance Data. Go to Settings > Contact Support > Request Data, and submit a ticket to receive a CSV file detailing your swipe history and statistics.

### 28. Profile Strength Meter
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An interactive tracker displaying profile completeness and suggesting changes to optimize match rates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Optimization Dashboard. Open the edit profile screen, observe the completeness percentage meter, and tap the recommended actions (e.g., "Add 3 badges to increase views").

### 29. Swipe/Match Peak Time Alerts
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Monitors local swipe volumes and notifies users when activity levels are high in their area.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Activity Alerts. The platform sends push notifications stating "Swiping is 3x higher now! Activate Spotlight to stand out."

### 30. Professional Resume Linker (Bumble Bizz)
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows Bizz mode users to link their professional resumes or sync their LinkedIn profiles to their bio cards.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Career Portfolios. In Bizz Mode, open the profile editor, scroll to the professional details, select "Link LinkedIn" or click "Upload Resume," and upload a PDF file.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Snooze Mode (Mental Health Break)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Pauses profile visibility in discovery feeds without deleting matches, chats, or profile details.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Temporary Deactivation. Go to Settings > Snooze, select a snooze duration (e.g., 24 hours, 72 hours, or indefinitely), and optionally select an away status message.

### 32. Private Detector (Automatic NSFW Blurring)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically detects and blurs explicit or NSFW photos sent in chats, prompting users with a safety warning before viewing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Censorship. The platform analyzes incoming images. If a violation is flagged, it blurs the image, displays a warning dialog, and offers buttons to view or report.

### 33. Report and Block Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to block and report profiles for harassment, fake photos, or behavior violating the terms of service.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Block & Report UI. Scroll to the bottom of the user's profile or click the three dots in a chat window, select "Block & Report," specify the reason, and submit.

### 34. Safety Center Hub
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A dedicated in-app resource directory providing security guidelines, support helplines, and reporting instructions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Security Resources. Click your profile avatar, tap "Safety Center," and browse directories covering online security, dating safety tips, and mental health resources.

### 35. Unmatch Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to dissolve a match, permanently deleting the chat history and removing profiles from both sides' feeds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Match Dissolution. In the chat interface, tap the three dots in the top right corner, click "Unmatch," select a reason, and confirm to erase the conversation.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Instagram Feed Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects with Instagram to display a grid of the user's latest 24 Instagram posts directly on their Bumble profile page.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instagram Feed Sync. In the profile editor, click "Connect Instagram," log in on the redirect screen, authorize access, and select to display.

### 37. Spotify Top Tracks Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Spotify to let users choose a specific song to highlight as their profile "Anthem," playable by visitors.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Snippet Integration. Connect your Spotify account under profile editing, search for a track in the "My Anthem" bar, select it, and a 30-second play button will display on your profile.

### 38. Bumble Web Client Platform
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A web-based client that lets users swipe, manage matches, and message from desktop browsers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Desktop Swiping. Go to `bumble.com/app` in a browser, log in via phone number or Apple/Facebook credentials, and access the swiping interface.

### 39. Apple Health / Fitness Link
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Syncs activity metrics from Apple Health to automatically assign lifestyle badges (e.g., "Active").
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Health Integration. Go to Account Settings > Connections, authorize Apple Health sync permissions, and select specific activity metrics to showcase.

### 40. Google Sign-In API integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects Google authentication to allow secure, one-tap login and registration.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Login Integrations. On the app login screen, select "Continue with Google," choose your Google account in the OAuth popup, and log in securely.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. Match Expiring Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends urgent push notifications to users when a match is within 1 hour of expiring to prompt messaging.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Expiration Alerts. If a match has 1 hour left on its timer, the system automatically sends a push notification stating "Your match with [Name] is about to expire! Say hello now."

### 42. Daily Swiping Limit Cap
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Restricts the number of right swipes a user can perform in a 24-hour period on the free tier, showing a countdown timer until reset.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Usage Limit. Once the daily limit of likes is reached, the app displays a full-screen block card with a countdown timer until the next swipe batch is ready.

### 43. Bumble BFF Event Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends push notifications and alerts when local mixers or BFF community events are scheduled in the user's area.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Local Alerts. Turn on "BFF Events" notifications in settings to receive push updates when local organizers host friendly events.

### 44. Message Read Receipts Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to control whether their matches can see when they have read direct messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Read Status Control. Go to Settings > Privacy settings > Read Receipts, and toggle the switch on or off.

### 45. Email Match Digests
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Compiles recent match numbers and profile views into a weekly email summary digest.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Summaries. Go to Settings > Email notifications, scroll down to the "Match digests" option, and toggle it to active.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Phone Authentication with OTP
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to register and log in securely using their mobile number and a verification SMS code.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: OTP Verification. Enter your phone number on the login screen, receive a 6-digit verification code via SMS, and input the code to access the account.

### 47. Federated Apple ID Login
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Integrates Apple ID login allowing iOS users to log in securely using Face ID or Touch ID authentication.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: iOS Federated Login. Click "Log in with Apple" on the welcome screen, authenticate with Apple biometrics, and authorize profile mapping.

### 48. Account Deactivation (Pause Account)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily hide their profile from the swipe queue while preserving active conversations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Discovery Muting. Go to Settings > Account, and toggle off "Show me on Bumble" to withdraw your profile from queues while maintaining active chats.

### 49. Request GDPR Account Data
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permits users to request a complete archive download of their profile data, history, and matches.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Archiving. Go to Settings > Privacy settings > Request data, and the platform will email a link to download your ZIP data archive within 30 days.

### 50. Account Permanent Deletion
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A self-serve option to permanently delete a user profile and delete all account history from the platform databases.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Deletion. Go to Settings > Delete Account, type the word "DELETE" in the confirmation field, and click "Confirm" to delete all records.

---

### Platform: Buz Voice Connects

This document compiles the feature research for Buz, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. One-Tap Voice Note Recorder
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send voice messages instantly by holding a single button on the screen, capturing high-quality audio formats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Push-to-Record. Press and hold the main microphone button on the screen, speak your message, and release to send the audio note.

### 2. Voice-to-Text Transcription Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically transcribes spoken voice messages into text overlays in real-time, aiding accessibility and readability.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Speech-to-Text. Under a received voice message, tap the "Show transcript" button, and the app will generate and show the text version of the audio.

### 3. Voice Filter & Effect Changer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Applies digital audio effects (e.g., echo, pitch adjustment, robotic tone) to recorded voice clips before they are sent.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Modification. While holding the microphone button, slide your finger up to the wave icon, choose an effect (e.g., "Deep Voice," "Chipmunk"), and record.

### 4. Microphone Sensitivity Tuning
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Adjusts background noise suppression levels and microphone input sensitivity to filter out wind, traffic, or chatter.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sound Levelizer. Go to Audio Settings, drag the sensitivity slider to establish a high or low input volume threshold, and toggle noise cancellation.

### 5. Voice Note Trim / Edit Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to crop or trim silent or unwanted portions from their recorded voice messages before publishing or sending.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Trimmer. Double-tap a recorded voice note preview, drag the yellow start and end markers to crop the audio timeline, and click "Send."

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Voice Status Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Permits users to search for active contacts or channels based on their active voice status icons (e.g., "Studying," "Gym," "Do Not Disturb").
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Status Directories. Open the search page, select the status filters, or type keyword cues to filter users showing matching voice statuses.

### 7. Nearby Voice Channels
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Discovers local public voice rooms or walkie-talkie circles based on GPS location data.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Geo-Location Rooms. Go to the Discover tab, select "Voice Rooms Nearby," grant location permissions, and join active nearby chatrooms.

### 8. Global Voice Channel Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public directory cataloging open voice streams and walkie-talkie groups categorized by language, topic, or region.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Public Directories. Go to the Discover tab, browse interest categories (e.g., Gaming, Music, English Practice), and select a room card to listen in.

### 9. Voice Note Tagging & Folder Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Organizes saved voice notes using tags (e.g., `#work`, `#ideas`), allowing users to search and play saved audio notes quickly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Saved Audio Search. Under saved recordings, click a voice clip, add custom tags, and use the search bar to locate specific tags.

### 10. Discover Friends via Contacts Sync
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Matches users with contacts in their address book who have registered Buz accounts, suggesting them as friends.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Address Book Matching. Go to Add Friends, select "Sync Contacts," authorize contact list access, and tap "Add" next to matching users.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Walkie-Talkie Group Channel
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A live voice channel where group members can broadcast live audio to all connected members in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live Group Channels. Open a group chat, tap "Start Live Session," and members can tap the talk button to speak to the group.

### 12. Live Voice Listener List
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays the profile avatars of all users who are currently listening to a live voice channel or walkie-talkie stream.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Indicators. Open the active channel dashboard, view the participant list, and check who has their microphone enabled or is strictly listening.

### 13. Emoji Voice Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows listeners to send floating emoji reactions that trigger short sound effects while a user is speaking in a live channel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Reactions. Tap the emoji reaction bar during a live talk, select a reaction, and floating icons and audio triggers will broadcast.

### 14. Co-Host / Channel Administrator Delegation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables channel creators to delegate administrative permissions to other group members to moderate live audio streams.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Leadership Assignment. In Channel settings, select the members list, tap a member name, and select "Make Admin" to grant moderator capabilities.

### 15. Shared Audio Playlist
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Permits group members to upload MP3 audio files to a shared channel queue, playing music or audio synchronously.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Audio. Open the channel playlist tab, click "Add Audio," upload an MP3 file, and queue the track for group listening.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Instant Walkie-Talkie (Push-to-Talk) DM
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A direct messaging function that immediately streams and plays voice messages out loud on the recipient's phone if they have the app active.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live PTT Streaming. Hold the PTT button in a direct message window to stream audio to the contact's speaker.

### 17. Offline Voice Messaging Queue
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Saves recorded voice notes locally when offline and automatically delivers them when a cellular or Wi-Fi connection is restored.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Offline Syncing. If cellular signal is lost, record your message. The app queues the file and uploads it automatically when online.

### 18. Auto-Play Voice Sequence
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Plays multiple unread voice messages in a conversation consecutively without requiring the user to press play on each one.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hands-free Audio Play. Open a chat with unread messages, tap the first voice message bubble, and the app will play all unread audio notes in order.

### 19. Whisper Mode (Low-volume PTT)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Automatically routes voice playback from the external speaker to the earpiece speaker when the phone is held to the ear.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Proximity Audio Routing. Bring the phone to your ear while listening to a walkie-talkie message; the proximity sensor will route sound to the earpiece.

### 20. Audio Read Receipts
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Displays a visual indicator showing whether the recipient has played a sent voice message.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Listening Receipts. Look for the headphone icon next to your sent voice bubble; it will turn blue once the recipient has played the audio file.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Premium Voice Filters Pack
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Offers access to premium audio modulation and character voice synthesis packs for purchase.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Storefront. Open the Voice Shop, select a filter package (e.g., "Sci-Fi Voice Pack"), and complete the payment using mobile store billing.

### 22. Paid Channel Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows channel creators to charge a monthly subscription fee for access to exclusive live voice rooms or audio archives.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Monetization. Go to Channel Settings > Monetization, set the subscription price, and link a Stripe account for payouts.

### 23. Virtual Gifting during Live Audio
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows listeners to buy and send virtual stickers and gifts to speakers in live rooms, which hosts can exchange for cash payouts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Virtual Donations. Open the gift panel during a broadcast, select a gift (e.g., "Golden Microphone"), and send it to the speaker using purchased coins.

### 24. Ad-Free Subscription Tier
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monthly platform subscription plan that removes banner ads and audio promos from the app experience.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Platform Subscriptions. Go to Profile Settings > Upgrade, select the monthly ad-free subscription option, and complete the transaction.

### 25. Sponsored Audio Ads
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Short sponsored audio ads inserted between voice note playbacks in public interest channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sound Ads. Advertisers use the Buz Ads Portal to upload short audio spots and bid on placement frequencies across public voice categories.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Audio Creator Stats Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays analytics for voice channels, including total listening hours, peak listeners, and listener country distributions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Metrics. Open Channel Tools > Analytics to view dashboards showing listening duration, visitor numbers, and geographic metrics.

### 27. Live Room Audience Retention Tracker
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays retention charts showing when listeners joined or left during a live voice broadcast.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Engagement Analytics. Navigate to Live Room Analytics, observing the line graph representing user counts mapped against the stream timeline.

### 28. Voice Note Download Utility
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows users and creators to export and download voice messages to their devices as high-quality WAV files.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Export. Long-press a voice message bubble, click "Save as File," choose a destination directory on your device, and save.

### 29. Audio Transcription Export
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Exports the text transcriptions of conversations and voice chats into text or spreadsheet files.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Exports. Under Chat Settings, click "Export Transcripts," select the date range of conversations, and download the resulting TXT file.

### 30. Creator Audio Promo Codes
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows premium channel hosts to generate promotional codes offering free or discounted trial memberships to their channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Promo Campaigns. Go to Channel settings > Promotions, click "Generate Codes," define the validity period and discount percentage, and export code lists.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Incognito Voice Profile (Voice Masking)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Scrambles or alters voice pitch automatically in public channels to protect a user's real voice identity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Voice Masking. Go to Settings > Privacy settings, toggle on "Voice Masking for Public Channels," and select a default filter style.

### 32. Block List Management
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents blocked users from sending walkie-talkie voice calls or messaging you on the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Contact Block. Open the user profile card of the target contact, tap the menu settings icon, and select "Block user" to stop communications.

### 33. Auto-Delete Voice History
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically deletes voice message files from the app interface and device storage immediately after playback.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Self-Destructing Audio. Go to Settings > Chat Privacy, and toggle on "Auto-delete played voice messages" to purge audio files from cache.

### 34. Channel Moderation Filter
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows channel hosts to mute, kick, or ban members who post inappropriate or disruptive audio.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Speaker Moderation. Tap the participant icon in a live room, click a username, and select "Mute microphone" or "Ban from channel."

### 35. Safety Reporting Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to flag abusive, explicit, or threatening audio messages for review by Buz moderation teams.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Flagging. Long-press the offending voice message bubble, tap "Report," select the violation category, and submit the audio clip for inspection.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Buz Voice Webhook Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Delivers real-time HTTP callbacks to external developer endpoints when new voice messages are received and transcribed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Developer Webhooks. Register a callback URL in the Buz developer settings dashboard, and select the triggers (e.g., `message.transcribed`) to receive JSON payloads.

### 37. Buz SDK for Games
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A mobile game SDK that allows developers to integrate Buz's instant voice walkie-talkie communication into external mobile games.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: In-Game Voice API. Import the Buz iOS or Android SDK, retrieve an app key, and integrate the PTT commands in game UI hooks.

### 38. Siri / Google Assistant Voice Shortcuts
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with iOS Siri and Google Assistant, allowing users to send voice walkie-talkie messages using OS voice commands.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Voice Assistant Shortcuts. Navigate to Settings > Shortcuts, select "Buz Voice Connect," write a verbal trigger phrase, and link it to a specific friend.

### 39. External Microphone Bluetooth Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Bluetooth headsets, utilizing headset hardware buttons to activate and record push-to-talk messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bluetooth Drivers. Connect a Bluetooth headset, navigate to Audio Input settings, select the connected headset, and toggle "Hardware button PTT."

### 40. Smart Watch Walkie-Talkie App
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A dedicated app for Apple Watch and WearOS that lets users send and play voice messages directly from their smartwatch.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Watch Complications. Install the Buz companion app on your smartwatch, link your account, and tap the watch face microphone to talk.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. PTT Push Alert Tone
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to select custom alert ringtones and walkie-talkie chirp sounds for incoming live voice requests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Notification Soundboard. Open Settings > Sound alerts, click the "Incoming walkie-talkie alert" option, select a sound clip, and tap "Save."

### 42. Scheduled Quiet Time
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures a schedule during which incoming walkie-talkie audio will not play out loud, automatically routing alerts to silent notifications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Silence Schedule. Open settings, tap Quiet Hours, toggle on, and choose your sleep times (e.g., 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM) to mute audio output.

### 43. Voice Message Read Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends a push notification to your device as soon as a recipient finishes listening to a voice note you sent.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Listen Notifications. Go to Settings > Notifications, and toggle on "Message listened alerts" to receive notifications on playback.

### 44. Alert Snoozing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily mute notifications and live audio playback from a busy chat or channel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Muting. Tap the top bar of a chatroom, click "Mute," and select a snooze duration (e.g., "Snooze for 1 hour" or "Snooze for 8 hours").

### 45. Channel Join/Leave Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggles notification alerts when users enter or exit a live walkie-talkie stream.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Participant Alerts. In Channel Settings, toggle off the "Announce join/leave" switch to silence membership change announcements during broadcasts.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Phone Number Registration & Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Registers and secures accounts using a mobile phone number validated by an SMS one-time password.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Phone Verification login. Enter your mobile number on the signup page, input the 6-digit OTP code received by SMS, and verify.

### 47. Federated OAuth Sign-In (Google & Apple)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to log in securely using Google or Apple accounts, integrating authentication APIs.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Login. Tap "Continue with Google" or "Continue with Apple" on the welcome screen, and verify to set up profile details.

### 48. Account Nickname & Profile Picture Customization
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to configure their public display nickname, avatar image, and brief bio status line.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Editing. Tap the Profile avatar, edit the display name text field, select a new avatar photo, write a bio note, and tap save.

### 49. Request Data Export (GDPR)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to download a ZIP archive containing all their registered profile details, active channels, and audio transcripts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Retrieval. Go to Settings > Privacy > Download Data, click the request button, and wait for the download link to be emailed.

### 50. Account Permanent Deletion
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A self-service portal to permanently delete a user account and purge all audio recordings and data from servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Permanent Deletion. Go to Settings > Account settings, select "Delete Account," type your password, and click the confirmation button to delete all data.

---

### Platform: Discord

This document compiles the feature research for Discord, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Discord Soundboard
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to play short audio clips directly into voice channels, broadcasting the sound effects to all participants.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Voice Channel Audio Board. Join any voice channel, click the soundboard icon (resembling a speaker) on the bottom left overlay panel, and select a pre-loaded sound.

### 2. Discord Rich Text Markdown
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Supports inline text styling and layouts inside channel chats using standard markdown notation like asterisks, tildes, and code blocks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Text Styling. Type asterisks around text for italics (e.g. `*italic*`), double asterisks for bold (`**bold**`), or triple backticks for formatted code blocks (` ```code``` `).

### 3. Discord Custom Emojis and Stickers
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows server administrators to upload custom graphic images and animated stickers for members to use in messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Emoji Uploader. Go to Server Settings > Emoji. Click "Upload Emoji," select a local PNG or GIF file, and define its shortcode keyword.

### 4. Discord Clips
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Records and saves recent gameplay and audio directly within a screen-share stream, saving it locally for quick post creation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Video Captures. Enable clipping in Settings > Clips. While streaming a game in a voice channel, press the designated hotkey (default: Alt+C) to save the last 30 seconds of video.

### 5. Discord Avatar Decorations
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to customize their visual presence by applying animated, themed borders and effects to their profile picture.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Visual Customization. Access User Settings > Profiles, click "Change Decoration," and choose from your purchased or unlocked animated borders.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Discord Server Discovery
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public directory of verified, partnered, and community-run Discord servers that users can browse by interest tags.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Directory. Click the compass icon at the bottom of the left-hand server sidebar, select a category, and type keywords in the search field to find public servers.

### 7. Discord Channel Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Offers a robust query search functionality inside text channels using criteria parameters like sender, dates, and media attachments.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Advanced Query Search. Tap the search bar in the top right, and select a filter chip like `from:username`, `has:file`, or `before:yyyy-mm-dd` to filter matching messages.

### 8. Discord Hubs for Students
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Connects verified school email accounts to a localized network directory of student-run Discord servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Student Network Explorer. Click the compass icon, select "Student Hubs," enter your official school email address to receive a validation link, and browse matching student directories.

### 9. Discord Browse Channels Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated management view inside servers allowing members to subscribe to or hide channels from their left-hand sidebar list.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Sidebar Layout. Click the "Browse Channels" tab at the top of the server list, check or uncheck individual channels, or complete the server's onboarding questionnaire again.

### 10. Discord Server Search Bar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A localized search engine that parses messages, links, and user profiles strictly within the currently active server.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Content Index. Select a server, click the search box in the top right corner, type your query, and filter results by "Relevance" or "Recency."

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Discord Role Hierarchy and Permissions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Establishes administrative rights and visual labels by creating and assigning server roles with custom priorities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Role Customizer. Navigate to Server Settings > Roles. Click "Create Role," set a custom color, and toggle specific permission flags like "Manage Channels" or "Administrator."

### 12. Discord Stage Channels
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Moderated audio rooms designed to host structured panel discussions, presentations, and QA sessions for large audiences.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Audio Events. Click the "+" button in your server's channel list, select "Stage Channel" as the type, set a title, and define the moderator roles before opening the room.

### 13. Discord Server Events
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows administrators to schedule voice, video, or physical events with calendar reminder links for server members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Event Organizer. Click the server name at the top of the sidebar, select "Create Event," fill in the venue type (e.g. voice channel or external location), time, and description, and click "Create."

### 14. Discord Forum Channels
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Provides structured, message-board-style discussion spaces where users create separate posts with tag labels and comments.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Forum Thread Boards. Click the "+" button in the channel list, select "Forum Channel," define tag labels (e.g. "Support" or "Chat"), and set guidelines for new posts.

### 15. Discord Member Onboarding Screens
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays welcome popups, rules verification steps, and channel customization questionnaires for new members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Join Questionnaire. Access Server Settings > Safety Setup > Onboarding. Define default channels, create member profile questions, and toggle "Rules Screening" to require verification.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Discord Direct Message Voice Calls
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to initiate private, high-quality audio or video calls with a friend outside of any server environment.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Audio Contacts. Open your Direct Messages list, select a conversation thread, and click the phone or camera icon in the top right corner to start a call.

### 17. Discord DM Group Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Creates private, invitation-only text and voice channels for up to 10 friends, bypasses server setup completely.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Group Channels. Click the "+" icon at the top of your Direct Messages list, select the contacts you want to add, and click "Create Group DM."

### 18. Discord Message Threading
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Creates nested, sub-channel conversations stemming from a single message to keep chat topics organized.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Nested Chat Threads. Hover over any message in a text channel, click the "#" thread icon, name the thread, and send a message to open the sidebar thread window.

### 19. Discord Pin Message
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Saves crucial posts or links in a dedicated channel registry, making them easily retrievable by members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Anchored Messages. Hover over a message, click the three-dot menu, and select "Pin Message." View all pinned messages by clicking the pushpin icon in the channel header.

### 20. Discord Voice Message Recording
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Records and sends short audio voice messages directly into a direct message or server chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Messaging. Press and hold the microphone icon in the chat input bar on mobile, record your voice note, and release the icon to instantly send it.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Discord Server Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows server owners to create paid tiers that grant members custom roles, special channels, and custom badges.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Monetization Hub. Go to Server Settings > Server Subscriptions. Connect a Stripe account, set up pricing tiers, and define the specific role permissions for each tier.

### 22. Discord Nitro Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monthly paid upgrade service that boosts individual user capabilities across the entire Discord platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Premium Tier Subscription. Access User Settings > Nitro. Select a plan (Nitro or Nitro Basic) and complete payment to unlock features like 500MB uploads, HD streaming, and custom emoji usage.

### 23. Discord App Shop
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app storefront where users can buy premium avatar decorations, profile effects, and soundboard sounds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Cosmetics Store. Click the "Shop" tab at the top of your Direct Messages list, browse the themes (e.g. Anime, Fantasy), and purchase decorations using a linked credit card.

### 24. Discord Server Boosting
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows members to purchase boosts that collectively upgrade server performance, audio quality, and custom slot allowances.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Upgrades. Click on a server's name, select "Server Boost," select the number of boosts to apply, and complete the check-out process.

### 25. Discord One-Time Purchases
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates checkout mechanisms for buying digital tickets, games, or exclusive content inside developer applications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: App Monetization Store. Interact with a developer bot or app interface in a server, select an item to purchase (e.g. a game expansion), and complete payment via Discord's payment modal.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Discord Server Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides server owners with a data dashboard tracking member growth, active communicators, and long-term retention.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Analytics Dashboard. Accessible under Server Settings > Server Insights on servers with over 500 members. Generates CSV exports tracking activity over time.

### 27. Discord Announcement Channels
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Specialized text channels that allow admins to broadcast posts to external servers that choose to follow the channel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Broadcast Syndication. Click the "+" button in the channel list, select "Announcement Channel," write a post, and click "Publish" to push it to all subscribing servers.

### 28. Discord Creator Portal
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A web resource containing tutorials, analytics guides, and monetization optimization tools for server managers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Learning Center. Access via `discord.com/creator-portal` using your Discord account credentials to read optimization case studies and join the official Creator Server.

### 29. Discord Welcome Screen Customizer
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Builds a clean, visual landing popup page displaying recommended channels and descriptions for new visitors.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Welcome Banners. Open Server Settings > Welcome Screen. Click "Set up Welcome Screen," choose target channels, add descriptions, and upload a custom server description.

### 30. Discord Server Webhook Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks delivery rates, latency, and response codes for webhook integration payloads inside server channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: API Webhook Monitoring. Under Server Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. Check the status log of individual webhooks to verify programmatic payload traffic.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Discord AutoMod
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated content moderation engine that scans, blocks, or flags messages containing blocked keywords or spam.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Filter Rules. Open Server Settings > Safety Setup > AutoMod. Click "Create Rule," define the trigger keywords, choose action alerts, and set up exemption roles.

### 32. Discord Block & Mute List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents designated accounts from direct messaging you, sending friend requests, or showing up in text and voice channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: User Relationship Management. Right-click on a user's name or avatar profile card, and select "Block" or "Mute" from the context menu list.

### 33. Discord Friend Request Filters
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts the range of users who are allowed to send you incoming friend invitations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Request Permission Toggles. Access User Settings > Friend Requests. Toggle off "Everyone," "Friends of Friends," or "Server Members" to adjust privacy levels.

### 34. Discord Safe Direct Messaging
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Scans and automatically deletes direct messages that contain explicit media, files, or links.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Security Scanner. Access User Settings > Privacy & Safety. Select between "Filter direct messages from everyone," "Filter direct messages from non-friends," or "Do not filter."

### 35. Discord Verification Levels
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Server-wide safety requirements that set criteria for how long an account must be registered or verified before posting.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Entry Constraints. Navigate to Server Settings > Safety Setup > Verification Level. Choose levels ranging from "None" to "Very High" (requires verified phone number).

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Discord Server Mute Options
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes message alerts and push notifications for an entire server, category, or channel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Silencing. Right-click on a server icon or channel name, select "Mute Server" or "Mute Channel," and choose a duration from 15 minutes to "Until I turn it back on."

### 37. Discord Desktop Notification Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Controls unread indicators, push notification sounds, text-to-speech alerts, and system-level alerts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sound & Push Alerts. Navigate to User Settings > Notifications. Toggle the settings for "Enable Desktop Notifications," "Text-to-Speech," and individual event sounds.

### 38. Discord Notification Overrides
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Establishes custom alerts for specific search keywords, phrases, or individual user tags within a server.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Keyword Alerts. Click the server name, select "Notification Settings," scroll down to "Notification Overrides," and add custom channels or categories with distinct alert rules.

### 39. Discord Push Notification Timeout
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sets the idle time threshold that must pass before desktop notifications are redirected to mobile push alerts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Idle Notification Sync. Navigate to User Settings > Notifications, scroll to "Push Notification Active Timeout," and set a duration (e.g. 10 minutes).

### 40. Discord Do Not Disturb Mode
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Changes your user presence status to suppress all incoming sound alerts and desktop popups globally.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Status Muting. Click your avatar icon in the bottom left corner, select the status submenu, and click "Do Not Disturb" to silence alerts.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Discord Gateway API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A WebSockets-based API that streams real-time events like message creations, voice status changes, and server updates to developer clients.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Event Stream. Developers configure a WebSocket client connection to the URL `wss://gateway.discord.gg` using their bot account token to receive JSON event payloads.

### 42. Discord REST API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An HTTPS API that allows developers to programmatically manage servers, channels, messages, roles, and user profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Programmatic Server Actions. Make authorized HTTP requests to base endpoint `https://discord.com/api/v10` (e.g. `POST /channels/{channel.id}/messages` to send a message).

### 43. Discord Interactions API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Receives user-triggered actions (like slash commands, buttons, and select menus) and sends responses via HTTP webhooks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive App Backend. Developers configure an interactions endpoint URL on the Discord Developer Portal. The server receives POST payloads and must respond within 3 seconds.

### 44. Discord Embedded App SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An SDK that enables developers to build web apps and multiplayer games that run directly inside Discord voice channel activities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Voice Activity Development. Developers import the `@discord/embedded-app-sdk` package in their web app, calling initialization routines to authenticate and sync states with voice sessions.

### 45. Discord OAuth 2.0 Identity Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Authenticates users and requests access permissions for their server lists, connections, and profile details.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Identity Auth. Developers configure authorization redirect links pointing to `/api/oauth2/authorize` with requested scopes (e.g. `identify guilds`).

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Discord Two-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures account access by requiring a TOTP security code from an authenticator app when logging in.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Protection. Navigate to User Settings > My Account, click "Enable Two-Factor Auth," scan the QR code with an authenticator app, and save the backup codes.

### 47. Discord Authorized Apps
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a history of third-party applications that have been granted access to your account details, with options to revoke access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Third-Party Integration Audit. Navigate to User Settings > Authorized Apps. Click "Deauthorize" next to any app to revoke its access tokens.

### 48. Discord User Connections
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Integrates external accounts like Spotify, Steam, Xbox, and PlayStation to display game status and activity on profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Social Presence Linking. Go to User Settings > Connections. Click on a service icon, log in to verify ownership, and toggle "Display on profile."

### 49. Discord Account Deletion and Disable
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily deactivate their accounts or permanently delete their user data and servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Offboarding. Open User Settings > My Account. Click "Delete Account" or "Disable Account," enter your password and 2FA code to confirm the action.

### 50. Discord Security Keys
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to register hardware keys or biometric logins for passwordless authentication.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hardware Credential Manager. Go to User Settings > My Account. Click "Register a Security Key" under the password security section and follow the browser prompts.

---

### Platform: Facebook

This document compiles the feature research for Facebook, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Disappearing Stories
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Shares photos or short videos that remain visible to friends or followers for exactly 24 hours before disappearing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Transient Stories. Created by clicking "Create Story" at the top of the Feed. Supports interactive features like text overlays, music stickers, and polls.

### 2. Reels Creation & Audio Sync
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Compiles short-form, portrait-oriented videos with audio overlays, transitions, text effects, and speed controls.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Vertical Video Editor. Created via the Reels tab on mobile. Offers an "Audio Sync" tool that automatically aligns video clips to the rhythm of a selected music track.

### 3. Feeling/Activity Status Post
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Appends a descriptive mood or action emoji to a standard text post (e.g., "feeling excited" or "eating pizza").
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Status Annotations. Triggered by clicking the "Feeling/activity" option in the post composer window. The activity appears next to the poster's name.

### 4. Live Producer Streaming
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Broadcasts high-definition live video feeds to Facebook Pages or Groups using professional external cameras and encoding software.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Professional Live Stream. Accessed on desktop via `facebook.com/live/producer`. Supports stream keys, API inputs, custom graphics, and live commenting.

### 5. Post Background Styling
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Highlights short text posts by placing the text on top of a selected graphic background or gradient.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Post Layouts. Activated automatically in the post composer when typing a text post under 130 characters. Users click a colored grid icon to select a design.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Feed Preferences (Manage Favorites)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to designate up to 30 friends and pages to prioritize their content at the top of their Feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Home Feed. Configured in Settings > Feed Preferences > Favorites. Posts from selected favorites are marked with a star icon.

### 7. Chronological Feeds Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated navigation shortcut that displays posts from friends, groups, and followed pages in a strict reverse-chronological order, bypassing the main algorithmic feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chronological Feed Navigation. Accessed by tapping the "Feeds" tab on the mobile app navigation bar or selecting "Feeds" in the left-hand navigation pane on desktop.

### 8. Advanced Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to locate posts, photos, videos, people, pages, and groups on the platform using granular filter criteria such as date, location, and source.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Targeted Search. Enter a query in the search bar, then use the left-hand filter panel (desktop) or top filter pill menu (mobile) to refine results by "Posts you've seen," "Tagged location," or "Date posted."

### 9. Hashtag Topic Feeds
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Aggregates all public posts, articles, and discussion threads containing a specific hashtag into a unified, scrollable topic feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Topic Discovery. Click on any blue hyperlinked hashtag (e.g., `#gardening`) in a post caption to open its dedicated feed page. Users can also type `facebook.com/hashtag/TopicName` directly in a browser.

### 10. Watch Video Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated video discovery tab that aggregates recommended long-form videos, live streams, and reels based on user viewing habits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Discovery Portal. Accessed by clicking the video icon ("Watch") in the shortcut bar. Offers personalized categories such as "Live," "Music," "Following," and "Saved."

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Facebook Groups & Admin Tools
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to create closed or public discussion groups with moderator tools, member lists, and customizable rules.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Moderation. Navigate to the main home screen menu, select "Groups," tap the "+" icon or "Create Group" button, fill in group settings (name, privacy level), invite members, and tap "Create."

### 12. Facebook Events Scheduler
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Organizes online or offline events with geographic coordinates, ticket links, invitation lists, and public discussion feeds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Calendar invites. Click "Create Event" in the events tab, define parameters (time, location, description), invite friends, and manage responses.

### 13. Facebook Pages for Business
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Specialized profiles for brands, public figures, and businesses to build a public following and run targeted advertising campaigns.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Brand Profiles. Navigate to the main menu or Facebook bookmarks section, select "Pages," tap "Create" or "Create New Page," enter page details (name, category, bio), and click "Create Page."

### 14. Custom Member Onboarding Questionnaires
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Prompts prospective members to answer up to three custom questions before admins review their request to join a private group.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Onboarding. Configured by Group Admins in Group Settings > Member Questions. Can include multiple-choice or written-answer formats.

### 15. Community Moderation Rules
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Sets up to 10 community rules that display on the group's "About" page, outlining expected behavior and guidelines.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Rules. Created under the Admin Tools menu under "Group Rules." These rules can be selected as reasons when deleting posts.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. End-to-End Encrypted Messenger Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
