- **Description**: Provides private chat rooms that encrypt messages, voice calls, and media, ensuring they cannot be accessed by third parties.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Encrypted Chats. Accessed in Messenger by starting a new conversation and toggling the padlock icon, or by selecting "Secret Conversation" in chat settings.

### 17. Messenger Vanish Mode
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Deletes all viewed messages, photos, links, and voice notes automatically as soon as the recipient reads them and closes the chat window.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Chats. Activated within a mobile Messenger thread by swiping up from the bottom of the screen until the "Vanish Mode" screen displays.

### 18. Messenger Broadcast Channels
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A public one-to-many messaging tool for creators and public figures to broadcast updates, voice notes, photos, and polls to a large audience of subscribers directly in their inbox.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Broadcasting. Started from a Facebook Page or creator profile by tapping "Create Broadcast Channel" in the settings. Followers receive an invitation notification to join.

### 19. Reaction Customization
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to react to specific chat bubbles with a customized selection of emojis.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Emoji Reactions. Activated by long-pressing a message inside Messenger, tapping the "+" icon, and editing the default quick-reaction palette.

### 20. Consolidated Shared Media Viewer
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Groups all media, files, documents, and web links shared in a message thread into a structured library.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Shared Chat Library. Accessed by opening a chat thread, tapping the contact’s name at the top, and selecting "View media, files & links."

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Localized Marketplace Listing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users to post items for sale, listing them in a geographic grid accessible to local buyers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: P2P E-Commerce. Accessed via the Marketplace tab > "Sell." Sellers fill in category, item condition, price, location radius, and upload photos.

### 22. Professional Shops
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Digital storefronts that allow businesses to showcase catalogs and sell products directly through Facebook.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Storefront integration. Set up using Meta Commerce Manager. Supports catalog uploads, inventory management, and direct checkouts via Meta Pay.

### 23. Product Tagging in Media
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows pages to tag specific items from their Shop catalog directly in feed photos, videos, or reels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Clickable Store tags. Managed during the post composition phase by clicking "Tag Products" and selecting items from the synced store catalog.

### 24. Marketplace Buyer/Seller Ratings
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A feedback system that lets buyers and sellers rate their transaction experience on a 1-5 star scale.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Transaction Reviews. Prompts appear in Messenger after a listing is marked as "Sold" to rate the specific buyer/seller, displaying scores on profiles.

### 25. Shipping and Payment Processing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates shipping label creation and payment collection through Facebook Marketplace for nationwide delivery.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Marketplace Logistics. Configured by selecting "Shipping and Local Pickup" during listing. Payments are processed via Meta Pay, generating shipping labels.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Meta Business Suite Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An analytical workspace that compiles audience reach, trends, growth, and advertising performance across Facebook and Instagram.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Business Analytics. Accessible at `business.facebook.com`. Offers customized reports that track paid vs. organic reach over custom date ranges.

### 27. Facebook Professional Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A mobile hub showing real-time statistics on net followers, post impressions, engagement rates, and content reach.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mobile Analytics Hub. Accessed via the "View Tools" button on your Facebook page profile. Displays a comparison of metrics against the prior 28-day period.

### 28. Detailed Audience Demographics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Visualizes information regarding the age, gender, geographic cities, and countries of a page's followers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Demographics Visualizer. Located in Meta Business Suite Insights > Audience. Helps brands adjust their post timing and topics based on active regions.

### 29. Content Scheduling Calendar
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A grid calendar displaying scheduled, drafted, and published posts, allowing creators to organize content timelines.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Planner Calendar. Managed in Meta Business Suite > Planner. Users can drag and drop scheduled posts to reschedule them visually.

### 30. Meta Page Access Management
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows page owners to assign granular, task-based access permissions (e.g., content creation, messaging, ads management) to team members without sharing password credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Page Management. Go to Settings > Page Setup > Page Access. Tap "Add New," input the email address or profile name of the team member, select their permission level (Full control or Partial access), and send the invitation.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Moderation Assist
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated assistant that screens and hides comments based on rules set by the page owner.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Comment Moderation. Accessed via Facebook Professional Dashboard > Moderation Assist. Rules include hiding comments containing links or profanity.

### 32. Profile Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts access to a user's profile photos, albums, and posts, displaying them only to confirmed friends.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Lockdowns. Enabled on mobile by visiting your profile, clicking the three dots next to "Edit Profile," and selecting "Lock Profile."

### 33. Custom Comment Filters
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows page owners to upload a CSV file containing specific offensive words or phrases to be blocked.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Keyword Blocklists. Configured in Page Settings > Privacy > Public Posts > Comment Moderation. Comments containing these terms are hidden automatically.

### 34. Support Inbox
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A tracking portal where users can monitor reports they have filed and view notices of copyright or community standards violations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Violation Tracking. Accessed in Settings > Support Inbox. Shows status updates and communication history with Facebook's review team.

### 35. Custom Audience Lists
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Divides Facebook friends into subgroups (e.g., "Close Friends," "Acquaintances") to tailor post visibility.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Granular Share Permissions. Managed under Friends > Custom Lists. When posting, users select the specific list from the audience selector dropdown.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Your Time on Facebook (Quiet Mode)
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Tracks app usage statistics and lets users schedule quiet periods where push notifications are muted.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Usage Break Scheduling. Found in Settings > Your Time on Facebook. Users can set a daily reminder limit or schedule "Quiet Mode" to block notifications.

### 37. Custom Notification Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to customize how they receive updates for tags, comments, group activity, and page updates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Channel Settings. Managed in Settings > Notifications. Users can turn push, email, and SMS notifications on or off for individual activity categories.

### 38. Daily Time Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Set a daily time threshold that prompts a full-screen block once reached, forcing users to exit.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Screen Limits. Settings > Your Time on Facebook > Set Daily Time Reminder. Choose limits between 15 minutes and 23 hours.

### 39. Notification Snoozing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes all push notification alerts immediately for a temporary duration (e.g., 8 hours).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Temporary Muting. Tap and hold a push notification, or navigate to Settings > Notifications, select "Mute notifications," and choose a time.

### 40. Group Notification Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures post alerts on a per-group basis to limit feed clutter from hyperactive communities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Alert Frequencies. Inside any Facebook Group, tap "Joined" > "Manage Notifications," and select "All Posts," "Highlights," or "Off."

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Facebook Graph API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic HTTP interface enabling developers to query, post, and delete profiles, page statistics, posts, and comments.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RESTful API Endpoint. Configured under Meta Developer Portal. Integrates OAuth access tokens to call HTTP endpoints (e.g., `/v20.0/me`).

### 42. Facebook Login SDK (OAuth)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to add a secure "Log in with Facebook" button to external websites and applications, easing user signup.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Authentication. Developers import the Facebook Login JavaScript or mobile SDKs, linking authentication callbacks to their servers.

### 43. Facebook Webhooks API (Real-time Developer Alerts)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Delivers real-time HTTPS callbacks to developer servers for events such as lead generation forms, page messages, and feed edits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Webhook Alerts. Configured on the Meta App Dashboard under the Webhooks product tab. Developers select a topic (e.g., "Page"), enter their callback URL and verify token, and subscribe to fields.

### 44. Business Manager API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects external agency platforms to programmatically manage ad accounts, product catalogs, and pixel trackers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Enterprise Commerce API. Integration points for Meta Business Suite, calling ad-creation and tracking pixel APIs programmatically.

### 45. Meta Marketing API SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic SDKs in Python, Java, and PHP that allow developers to automate ad campaign creation, custom audience building, and real-time budget management.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Ads SDK. Integrated using package managers (e.g., `pip install facebook-business`). Requires a Marketing API app access token and system user credentials.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Login Alerts & Unrecognized Device Tracking
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Sends immediate email or push notifications when an account is accessed from a new browser or physical location.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Security Alert Logs. Enabled in Account Center > Password and Security > Login Alerts. Shows a map of active sessions.

### 47. Legacy Contact Designation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permits a user to choose a friend or family member to manage their account if it becomes memorialized after their passing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post-Mortem Profile Management. Configured under Settings > Account Center > Personal Details > Memorialization. Legacy contacts can pin posts.

### 48. Meta Account Center
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Central hub to manage password, two-factor authentication, ad preferences, and shared details across Facebook and Instagram.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Meta Settings. Open Settings > Account Center. Links cross-platform security preferences in a unified dashboard.

### 49. App Password Generation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates unique, one-time passwords for older platforms (such as Xbox or smart TVs) that do not support 2FA formats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Security credentials. Configured under Account Center > Password and Security > App Passwords. Generates random strings for login.

### 50. Authorized Logins (Trusted Devices Management)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a history of recognized browsers and devices that are authorized to access the account without requiring a two-factor verification code, with options to revoke access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Login Device Auditing. Access via Meta Account Center > Password and security > Two-factor authentication > Authorized logins. Select recognized devices to inspect details or tap the "X" button to log them out and require 2FA on their next attempt.

---

### Platform: Facebook Messenger

This document compiles the feature research for Facebook Messenger, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Messenger Stories
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Shares photos and short videos that remain visible to friends for 24 hours, supporting overlays, text, and music.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Stories. Tap "Add to Story" in the People or Stories tab, capture or select media, add stickers, and share.

### 2. AR Camera Effects
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Applies augmented reality filters, face distortions, and virtual backgrounds to photos, videos, and live video calls.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Augmented Reality. Open the camera in Messenger or start a video call, then tap the effects/smiley icon to browse and apply filters.

### 3. Soundmojis
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Sends emojis that play a short, matching sound clip in the chat window when tapped.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Expression. Tap the emoji button in a chat, select the sound wave icon, choose a Soundmoji to preview, and tap send.

### 4. Boomerang Loops
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Records short, back-and-forth looping video clips using the in-app camera.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Looping Video. Open the Messenger camera, select the "Boomerang" mode from the sidebar, press and hold record, and send.

### 5. Word Effects
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Triggers screen-filling floating emoji animations when specific custom key phrases are sent in a chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Triggered Animations. Tap the chat header info page, select "Word Effects," define a keyword or phrase, select a corresponding emoji, and save.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Active Contacts Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays a list of Facebook friends and contacts who are currently online or were recently active.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Presence List. Tap the "People" tab in the bottom navigation bar and select "Active" to view a real-time list of online friends with green status indicators.

### 7. Marketplace Chats Index
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Organizes buyer and seller conversations from Facebook Marketplace in a dedicated sub-folder.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: E-commerce Folder. Select the menu drawer in Messenger, tap "Marketplace" to view all active product negotiation and purchase chats.

### 8. Keyword Chat Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Finds specific text messages and keyword matches across all historical chats or within a single chat thread.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Queries. Tap the search bar at the top of the chat list, type your search query, or tap a chat header and select "Search in Conversation."

### 9. Archived Conversations
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Hides conversations from the main chats feed by moving them into an archived archive folder.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Archiving. Swipe left on a chat thread in the chats list and select "Archive" to hide it. Access it anytime via the menu drawer under "Archive."

### 10. Message Requests Filter
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Filters messages sent by users who are not connected with the recipient, categorizing them as spam or request inquiries.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Request Inbox. Tap the menu drawer in Messenger, select "Message Requests" to view pending messages, and choose to "Accept" or "Delete" them.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Group Chats
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Combines multiple users into a single chat room for text chat, media sharing, and group audio/video calling.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Conversations. Tap the compose pencil icon at the top right, toggle "Create a group chat," select contacts, name the group, and tap "Create."

### 12. Broadcast Channels
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Public message threads where creators can broadcast announcements, updates, and polls to their subscribers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: One-to-Many Channels. Creators set up a broadcast channel from their page or profile info page, invite subscribers, and post updates.

### 13. Watch Together Co-Viewing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows group call participants to watch videos, Facebook watch shows, and movies together in real-time sync.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Co-watching. During a Messenger video call, swipe up to access the menu, tap "Watch Together," and search or select a video.

### 14. Co-AR Call Effects
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables video call participants to apply matching or interactive AR filters that react to each other simultaneously.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Joint Filters. During a video call, select the Effects icon, choose "Group Effects," and select an effect for all participants to interact with.

### 15. Shared Group Albums
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows group chat members to upload, view, and organize photos and videos into shared albums inside the group.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Media. Inside a group chat info page, tap "Shared Media" or "Albums," tap "Create Album," name it, and add media files.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Voice Messaging Waves
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends voice notes with visual sound wave previews that let recipients scrub through audio durations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Notes. Press and hold the microphone icon in a chat to record, swipe up to lock, and tap send to share the wave preview.

### 17. Group Video Calls
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Launches high-definition video calls hosting multiple participants with grid layouts and interactive call options.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Meetings. Open a group chat thread, tap the video camera icon at the top right to start a video call, notifying all group members.

### 18. Video Screen Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Broadcasts the caller's mobile or desktop screen display to other participants during a video call.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live Screen Sharing. Swipe up on the control panel during a video call, tap "Share your screen," confirm the permission, and browse your device.

### 19. Forwarding Limits
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Limits forwarding a message to a maximum of 5 chats at a time to prevent the spread of spam and misinformation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Spam Prevention. Select a message, tap the "Forward" button, and select up to 5 individual chats or groups before the platform blocks additional targets.

### 20. Swipe to Reply
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Quotes a specific message in a chat by swiping right on it, allowing structured, inline conversations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Threaded Replies. Swipe right on any message in a chat thread to attach it as a quote above your message composer.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Peer-to-Peer Payments
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users in supported regions to send and receive money directly through chat using a linked debit card or PayPal account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Payments. Tap the "+" attachment icon in a chat, select "Payments," enter the dollar amount, verify authentication, and send.

### 22. Sponsored Inbox Messages
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays targeted promotional ads from businesses directly within the Messenger chat list alongside user conversations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inline Ads. Managed via Meta Ads Manager. Businesses target demographics, and the ad displays in the user's inbox; tapping it opens a chat with the business.

### 23. Click-to-Messenger Ads
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Ad formats on Facebook or Instagram that open a Messenger chat window with a pre-populated greeting when clicked.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ad Routing. Set up in Meta Ads Manager with "Messenger" selected as the target messaging app, linking social media campaigns to direct chat flows.

### 24. In-Chat Business Checkout
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables businesses to send payment requests and product links for checkout directly within the chat window.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Conversational Commerce. A customer clicks a product card sent by a business, completes shipping/payment details in the overlay, and buys.

### 25. Subscription Message Alerts
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows businesses to send recurring automated notifications, updates, and promotions to users who have opted into subscription alerts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Alerts. Configure via the Messenger Platform API, setting up custom subscription flows and scheduling broadcast lists.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Business Page Inbox
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A unified inbox that allows page administrators to manage customer conversations from both Facebook and Instagram.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-Page Inbox. Access via Meta Business Suite or the Messenger app by switching the active profile to the Facebook Page.

### 27. Automated Instant Responses
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Automatically responds to customer messages with predefined welcome greetings or away messages during non-business hours.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Replies. Set up in Meta Business Suite > Inbox > Automations. Customize triggers, active times, and reply templates.

### 28. Response Time Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays metrics on how quickly a page responds to customer inquiries, showcasing the response badge on the profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Responsiveness Metrics. View in Meta Business Suite Inbox settings. Highlights "Typically replies in minutes" or "hours" based on live chat history.

### 29. Customer Lead Templates
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Creates interactive questionnaires within the chat window to qualify leads and gather customer contact information automatically.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Lead Generation. Configure in Meta Ads Manager or Page settings under Automated Chat, setting custom fields (e.g. email, phone number).

### 30. Conversation Labels
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Organizes customer chats by applying custom labels like "New Customer," "Pending Payment," or "Order Shipped."
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Tagging. Open a conversation in Meta Business Suite Inbox, tap the label icon in the details panel, select or create a label, and apply.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Encrypted Chat Threads
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Provides end-to-end encrypted chats where all messages, media, and calls are stored securely on-device.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: E2EE Chats. Swipe up on an active chat to enter Vanish Mode, or start a new chat and toggle the lock icon to initiate secure end-to-end encryption.

### 32. Messenger App Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures access to the Messenger app using biometric authentication (Face ID/Touch ID) or the device passcode.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Biometric Protection. Go to Settings > Privacy & Safety > App Lock, toggle "Require Face ID" (or fingerprint), and select the lock timing.

### 33. Granular Block Options
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to block someone only on Messenger (messages and calls) while keeping them as a friend on Facebook.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Contact Blocking. Tap a contact's photo in chat, select "Block," and choose "Block messages and calls" or "Block on Facebook."

### 34. In-Chat Safety Notices
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Displays safety tips and educational banners when a user receives a message from a suspicious account or stranger.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Threat Mitigation. Messenger automatically displays banner notices at the top of chats containing links to report or block accounts behaving suspiciously.

### 35. Restricted Accounts Mute
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Mutes a contact's notifications and hides their chat from the active chat list without letting them know they are restricted.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Restriction. Tap a contact's name, select "Restrict" from the privacy options. The thread is moved out of sight and read receipts are disabled.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Messenger Platform API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects external backend servers to Messenger to send and receive text, templates, and quick replies.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Developer Platform. Register a Meta Developer App, link a Facebook Page, set up Webhooks, and obtain access tokens to make API requests.

### 37. Webview Chat Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to open custom HTML/CSS/JS web pages inside a modal window directly within the Messenger app.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Modals. Configure a URL button in a generic template to open with the `messenger_extensions` SDK enabled for context sharing.

### 38. Bot-to-Human Handover Protocol
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Passes control of a conversation from an automated chatbot to a live customer service agent seamlessly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Session Handover. Use the Handover Protocol API to send a request to transfer the control from the Primary Receiver bot to the Secondary Receiver inbox.

### 39. Website Chat Plugin
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Embeds a Messenger chat window on external websites, letting visitors chat with the business using their Facebook account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Web Embed. In Meta Business Suite, configure the Chat Plugin, whitelist the website's domain, copy the generated code snippet, and paste it into the HTML.

### 40. Business Persona API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to display custom names and avatars for customer service agents rather than the generic Page name.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Agent Personalization. Create a Persona object via the API, and include the `persona_id` in the JSON payload of outbound messages.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. Custom Chat Themes
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Changes the chat bubble colors, gradients, and background wallpaper for individual chat threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Visual Themes. Open a chat, tap the contact or group name at the top, select "Theme," and pick a theme preset (e.g. Pride, Ocean, Custom gradients).

### 42. Floating Chat Heads
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Displays round chat bubbles on top of other mobile applications (Android only) for quick messaging access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-tasking Bubbles. Go to Settings, toggle "Chat Heads" to on, and allow the "Display over other apps" permission in Android settings.

### 43. Multi-Option Thread Muting
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes alerts for specific chat threads for pre-defined durations (15 minutes, 1 hour, 8 hours, 24 hours, or Until I turn it back on).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Muter. Long-press a chat thread in the chats list, tap "Mute," select the mute duration, and confirm.

### 44. Hide Notification Previews
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Hides the sender's name and message content in push notifications, displaying only "1 new message" or similar.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Notification Privacy. Go to Settings > Notifications & Sounds, and toggle off "Show previews" to secure incoming alerts.

### 45. Do Not Disturb Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily pauses all Messenger notifications for a set duration, letting users focus without distractions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mute All Notifications. Go to Settings > Notifications & Sounds, tap "Do Not Disturb," and select the pause duration.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Meta Accounts Center Sync
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Syncs settings, profiles, and login details across Meta platforms (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Sync. Go to Settings > Accounts Center to link Meta accounts, coordinate profile pictures, and sync active statuses.

### 47. Active Status Indicator
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Toggles the green dot status display that shows contacts when the user is online or active.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Online Status. Go to Settings > Active Status, and toggle off "Show when you're active" to hide presence details.

### 48. Multi-Device Login Sync
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Synchronizes chat threads, settings, and read statuses across all logged-in devices in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Device Sync. Authenticate via Meta Accounts Center on new devices to automatically sync and access chat threads securely.

### 49. Delete Chat History
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permanently deletes all messages and media in a specific chat thread from the user's account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Thread Deletion. Swipe left on a conversation in the chats list, tap the three-dot "More" button, select "Delete," and confirm.

### 50. E-Secure Backup PIN
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures end-to-end encrypted chat backups in cloud storage using a user-defined 6-digit PIN.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Secure Recovery. In Chat settings > End-to-end encrypted chats > Secure storage, select "Create 6-digit PIN" and authenticate to enable cloud backups.

---

### Platform: Instagram

This document compiles the feature research for Instagram, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Reels Templates
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to reuse the exact timing, audio sync, and clip transitions of an existing, successful Reel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creative Templates. Tap the "Use template" prompt on any template-enabled Reel in the feed, select your own photos or video clips from your device's camera roll, and the app will automatically crop and sync them to the audio's beats.

### 2. Dual Camera Capture
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables capturing photos or videos using the front and rear cameras of the device simultaneously to capture action and reaction.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-Camera Layout. Open the Stories or Reels camera, tap the down arrow on the left-hand toolbar to expand camera options, select "Dual," and tap the record button.

### 3. Grid Preview
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to preview how a draft post or Reel will fit visually into their existing profile grid layout before publishing it.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Grid Layout. On the final upload screen of a draft post, tap "Show preview" to see a mock-up of your profile grid with the new post inserted, then drag and crop to adjust visual alignment.

### 4. Adjustable Reels Playback/Recording Speed
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Modifies the recording speed of video clips relative to the backing audio, allowing slow-motion or fast-forward effects.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Speed Customization. Open the Reels camera, tap the speed icon (marked as "1x" by default) on the left panel, and choose speed settings (0.3x, 0.5x, 1x, 2x, 3x, or 4x) before recording.

### 5. Carousel Posts
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Post up to 10 photos or videos in a single swipeable feed post, allowing multi-media story collections.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Swipeable Media Carousel. Select multiple photos from the device library when uploading a feed post, arrange their order, and add separate filters or tags to each image.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. "Not Interested" Feedback
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Instructs the Explore page and feed algorithms to stop recommending content similar to a selected post.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Preference Control. Tap on an unwanted post in the Explore tab, tap the three dots in the upper-right corner of the post, and select "Not Interested."

### 7. Interactive Map Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A map-based search tool showing geotagged posts and popular businesses near a selected location.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Geolocation Indexing. Tap the search icon, enter a city or neighborhood (e.g., "Downtown Seattle"), tap the search results, and tap the map icon to see top-rated public posts geotagged there.

### 8. Audio Page Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Groups all Reels using a specific audio track or sound, allowing creators to assess trends and save audio for future use.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Trending Audio Directory. Tap the scrolling audio track name at the bottom of any Reel to open the audio's dedicated page. Tap "Save audio" to store it in your creative vault.

### 9. Favorites Feed Filter
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Changes the main home feed to display only chronological posts from a pre-selected list of favorite accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Home Feed Filters. Tap the "Instagram" logo in the top-left corner of the Home screen, and select "Favorites" from the dropdown list. Manage the list under Settings > Favorites.

### 10. Story Highlights
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Pins expired Stories to folders on the user's profile page, bypassing the default 24-hour disappearance rule.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Content Archives. Navigate to profile, tap "+" under "Story Highlights," select archived Stories from history, enter a folder name, choose a cover photo, and tap "Add."

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Collaborative Posts (Collabs)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows a single feed post or Reel to be co-authored by up to 4 accounts (1 owner + 3 collaborators), sharing likes, views, and comments across profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Shared Reach Collaborations. On the final post creation screen, tap "Tag people," select "Invite collaborators," search for up to three partner accounts, and publish. The post is shared to their feeds and profile grids once they accept.

### 12. "Add Yours" Interactive Prompts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates public, interactive chains in Stories where other users can respond to a prompt with their own Stories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Public Story Chains. In the Story editing interface, tap stickers, select the "Add Yours" sticker, type a prompt (e.g., "Show your workspace"), and publish.

### 13. Interactive Story Polls
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Embeds interactive, two-option voting stickers in Stories to collect real-time feedback from viewers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Poll Stickers. Select the "Poll" sticker in Stories, input a question, customize the two answer fields, and share. Swipe up to view vote tallies.

### 14. Broadcast Channels
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: One-to-many messaging tool for creators to share text, voice notes, photos, and polls with fans.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Read-Only Creator Feeds. Go to DM inbox, tap the compose icon, select "Create broadcast channel," name it, and invite followers.

### 15. Live Rooms (Up to 4 Users)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Host live video broadcasts with up to three guests simultaneously in split-screen format.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-Host Broadcasting. Open the Live camera, tap the "Rooms" icon, select the guests you want to invite, and start the broadcast to merge audiences.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Silent Messages (`/silent`)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Delivers a direct message without triggering a push notification or sound on the recipient's device.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Silent Message Delivery. Open a DM thread, type `/silent` at the very beginning of your message text followed by your content, and tap send.

### 17. Vanish Mode
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Deletes all messages, photos, and links within a direct message thread as soon as the recipient reads them and both users close the chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Private Chats. Open an active DM conversation, swipe up from the bottom of the screen until the "Release to turn on Vanish Mode" animation completes.

### 18. Emoji Message Reactions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to quickly react to any individual direct message with a specific emoji instead of typing a text response.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Quick Reactions. Double-tap a message bubble to quickly apply a heart reaction, or long-press the message bubble to select any emoji from the drawer.

### 19. Hands-Free DM Voice Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Records and sends voice messages in chats without requiring the user to hold down the microphone button.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Voice Note Recording. Open a DM, press and hold the microphone icon, swipe up toward the padlock icon to lock the recording, and tap send when finished.

### 20. Saved Replies (Quick Replies)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows professional and creator accounts to assign keyboard shortcuts to pre-written message templates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Business Text Templates. Go to Settings > Creator/Business > Saved Replies, tap "+", enter a shortcut (e.g., "info"), and type the full message.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Feed & Reels Product Tagging
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Embeds interactive product links directly onto items shown in organic feed posts, Reels, or Stories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Clickable Product Tags. During final upload, tap "Tag products," tap the photo/video, search for the item from your connected catalog, and select it to overlay a shopping tag.

### 22. Profile Storefront (Instagram Shop)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays a dedicated shopping tab on a business's profile, hosting custom collections and catalog items.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Native Catalog Storefronts. Sync product catalog via Meta Commerce Manager, go to Settings > Business > Shopping, and enable the Shop feature.

### 23. In-App Checkout
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows customers to purchase tagged items directly inside Instagram using stored Meta Pay credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Checkout Processing. Viewers tap a tagged product, select "Add to bag" and "Checkout on Instagram," select shipping/billing options, and complete order.

### 24. Shopping in DMs
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows business owners to send custom shoppable invoices and product details directly inside DM threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Invoice Processing. In a DM, tap the blue "+" icon in the DM toolbar, select "Product," choose an item from the synced catalog, and send it.

### 25. Instagram Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables creators to charge a monthly fee in exchange for exclusive content, badges, and communication channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instagram Creator Paywalls. Eligible creators go to Instagram Professional Dashboard > Subscriptions, set a monthly price, and publish subscription-only content.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Instagram Professional Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A mobile dashboard for creators and business accounts to track overall performance, access creator tools, and review educational materials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Performance Hub. Tap "Instagram Professional Dashboard" at the top of your profile page on the mobile app to access overall account reach, engagement trends, and monetization eligibility.

### 27. Instagram Post Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides detailed reach, impression, and engagement analytics for individual posts, reels, or stories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Individual Post Metrics. Tap the "View insights" link directly underneath a published post on your profile to see breakdowns of reach (followers vs non-followers), profile visits, and likes/shares.

### 28. In-App Content Scheduling
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows professional accounts to schedule feed posts and Reels up to 75 days in advance directly in the composer interface.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instagram Scheduling Engine. In the post composer, scroll to the bottom, tap "Advanced Settings," toggle on "Schedule this post," and select the target date and time.

### 29. Audience Demographics Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays charts tracking follower growth and demographic information such as age ranges, gender, and top cities/countries.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Follower Growth Insights. Tap "Instagram Professional Dashboard," select "Total followers," and scroll to see charts detailing active times, top locations, and demographic splits.

### 30. Reels Play Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Details play counts, total watch time, average watch time, and initial vs repeat view rates for Reels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Performance Metrics. Tap "View insights" on an individual Reel, and scroll down to the "Reels plays" section to view total plays, watch time, and retention curves.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Close Friends List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts access to specific Stories and feed posts to a custom-curated subset of followers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Selective Audience Sharing. Go to Profile > Menu > Close Friends, check the boxes next to the followers you wish to include, and share Stories with the green Close Friends button.

### 32. Hidden Words Filtering
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically hides comments and message requests that contain specific offensive keywords, phrases, or emojis defined by Meta or the user.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Muting Lists. Go to Settings > Privacy > Hidden Words. Toggle "Hide comments" and "Hide message requests" to active, and input custom phrases.

### 33. Limits Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Temporarily blocks or restricts comments and DMs from accounts that do not follow you, or have only followed you recently.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Viral Moderation Safety. Go to Settings > Privacy > Limits, select the group you want to limit, and set a duration limit (e.g., 3 days).

### 34. Restrict Account Option
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Quietly limits a problematic user's ability to interact with your profile without blocking them or notifying them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Soft-Blocking Controls. Open the target user's profile, tap the three dots in the upper right, and select "Restrict." Their comments will only be visible to themselves.

### 35. Account Blocking with Ban Evasion Prevention
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Blocks a user and preemptively blocks any new profiles they create under their IP or device footprint.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hard Account Ban. Tap the three dots on a user's profile, select "Block," and choose the option "Block [username] and new accounts they may create."

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Quiet Mode
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Pause push notifications and auto-reply to DMs during selected daily periods.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sleep & Break Scheduling. Settings > Notifications > Quiet Mode. Enable the mode and select your daily start and end times to silence all pings.

### 37. Notification Digests
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Group notification updates into a single daily summary instead of instant push alerts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Frequency Control. Settings > Notifications > Notification Digests. Toggle on and select a time of day to receive your summary.

### 38. Daily Limit Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Prompt users with a full-screen alert once they hit their set daily app limit.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Usage Cap Limiters. Settings > Your Activity > Time Spent > Set daily limit. Select a duration (e.g., 45 minutes) to receive the alert.

### 39. "Take a Break" Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Prompts users to close the app after a chosen duration of continuous scrolling, such as 10, 20, or 30 minutes, to manage time spent.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Well-being Reminders. Settings > Your Activity > Time Spent > Set reminder to take breaks. Choose a time interval (e.g., 20 minutes) and tap "Done."

### 40. Push Notification Category Mutes
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to customize and toggle push notifications for specific activity categories like likes, comments, and broadcasts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Alert Filters. Settings > Notifications. Tap on "Posts, stories and comments" or "Direct messages" and toggle notification groups to "Off", "From profiles I follow", or "From everyone".

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Instagram Graph API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows business profiles to schedule posts, manage comments, and track metrics externally.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Developer Endpoint Access. Programmatic RESTful API endpoints authorized via Facebook Login tokens for developer accounts.

### 42. Instagram Webhooks (Graph API Subscriptions)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Delivers real-time event notifications to external servers whenever comments, mentions, or stories are posted on a professional account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Webhooks. Configured via the App Dashboard on the Meta Developer Portal by subscribing to the `instagram` topic and verifying webhook URL endpoints.

### 43. Instagram Basic Display API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows external websites to retrieve public profile details, images, and video files from public Instagram profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Read API. Set up app registration on the Meta Developers portal, configure OAuth redirect URLs, and call the user profile media endpoints.

### 44. Messenger API for Instagram
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Enables developers to programmatically receive and respond to user direct messages and comments using external messaging platforms and webhooks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: DM Automation. Configured on the Meta Developer Portal by linking an Instagram Professional Account to a Facebook Page, activating the Messenger API, and registering webhooks for the `instagram_messaging` scopes.

### 45. Instagram Graph API Publishing Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic endpoint allowing developers to upload photo or video binaries and publish them automatically as feed posts or Reels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Media Publishing. Calls the `POST /{instagram-business-account-id}/media` endpoint to upload the container, followed by the `media_publish` endpoint to post it.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Enhances account security by requiring a secondary verification code from an external source when logging in.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instagram Multi-Factor Settings. Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication, tap "Get Started," and select Authenticator App, WhatsApp, or Text Message.

### 47. Login Activity & Device Management
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Monitors and lists all active sessions logged into your account, providing locations, device models, and remote logout options.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Device Session Log. Navigate to Settings > Security > Login Activity. Review active devices and tap "Log out" for unrecognized devices.

### 48. Login with Facebook (Meta Single Sign-On)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Authenticate and log in using linked Meta/Facebook account credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Single Sign-On. On the login screen, click "Log in with Facebook" to utilize Meta's single-sign-on OAuth pipeline.

### 49. Download Your Information
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Request a downloadable archive file containing all your profile history, chat messages, uploaded media, and profile metrics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: GDPR Data Portability. Settings > Account Center > Your Information and Permissions > Download Your Information. Request download links via email.

### 50. Account Status Dashboard
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Provides a clear view of any policy infractions, copyright notices, or community guideline violations active on your profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Compliance Checking. Settings > Account Status. Check the indicators showing if your content can be recommended or if you have violated guidelines.

---

### Platform: Kick

This document compiles the feature research for Kick, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Kick Creator Dashboard Live Stream Management
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: The dedicated streaming management dashboard for Kick creators to change their current title, category, and tags before going live. It allows real-time edits to the broadcast's metadata to optimize search indexing and viewer attraction.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Settings Editor. Open the Creator Dashboard, navigate to the "Stream Manager" tab, click "Edit Stream Info" on the quick actions panel, update fields, and click "Save."

### 2. Kick Broadcast Stream Key Generation
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Generates unique RTMP stream URLs and secure stream keys required to connect external encoding software to Kick servers. These credentials must be kept confidential as they allow anyone to stream directly to the creator's channel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Encoder Connection Credentials. Go to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Stream Key, click "Copy" next to the Stream URL and Stream Key fields, and paste them into the settings of your encoder software.

### 3. Kick Clips Creation Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables viewers and creators to capture and trim up to 60-second video segments from a live stream or past broadcast. These captured highlights are stored on the channel's profile page and can be easily shared across other social networks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Video Trimmer. Click the clip icon (scissors) on the video player overlay, adjust the start and end sliders on the timeline popup, type a title, and click "Trim Clip."

### 4. Kick Creator Dashboard Broadcast Feed Preview
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A low-latency video player inside the creator dashboard that displays the outgoing live video feed. It allows streamers to monitor their video quality, frame rates, and connection status in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Feed Monitor. Access the Creator Dashboard and select "Stream Manager." Toggle the "Preview" block on the dashboard panel to view the live video broadcast.

### 5. Kick Chat Bot Integration Setup
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows streamers to connect external moderators and bots to handle automated chat features and overlay graphics. It streamlines chat moderation and enhances community interaction through custom commands and loyalty points systems.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Chat Utility. Navigate to your chat, type `/mod [botname]` (e.g., `/mod Botrix`), then open the bot's web platform and click "Link Kick Account" to authorize connection.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Kick Recommended Live Carousel
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A prominent visual slider at the top of the Kick homepage showcasing featured live broadcasts across gaming, music, and creative arts. It helps users discover prominent creators who are currently streaming live on the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Front Page Discovery. Navigate to `kick.com` on a web browser, and use the left and right navigation arrows on the banner to browse featured live streamers.

### 7. Kick Category Browse Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A catalog that displays all active live streams on the platform categorized by specific game titles or creative activities. It organizes broadcasts in descending order of current viewers to help users explore trending genres.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Main Directory Search. Click the "Browse" link at the top-left of the page, and select from subcategories like "Gaming," "IRL," "Music," or "Creative" to see active channels sorted by view count.

### 8. Kick Sub-Category Tag Filtering
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to filter category feeds using specific descriptive labels such as language, genre, or stream style. It makes discovery much faster by filtering out irrelevant broadcasts and highlighting exact content matches.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Filter Chips. Click on any game or category in the directory, and select one of the circular tags from the horizontal filter bar to narrow results.

### 9. Kick Followed Channels Sidebar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A collapsing left-hand sidebar on the desktop view that lists followed creators in order of their live status. It provides quick, one-click access to active streams that the user regularly watches.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Tracking List. Navigate to any page on `kick.com`, view the sidebar on the left side of the screen, and click on any live creator’s avatar to load their stream.

### 10. Kick Live Search Auto-Suggest
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dynamic search bar that returns instant, auto-suggested listings for channels, games, and active categories. It updates recommendations as you type to speed up user navigation across the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Search Query Autocomplete. Click the search bar at the top center of the desktop header, type in a search query, and select the corresponding channel or game card from the dropdown menu.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Kick Live Chat Window
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A real-time chat interface displaying text messages, subscription alerts, and sub emotes next to the stream. It serves as the primary hub for immediate discussion and social interaction between the streamer and the audience.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Communication Interface. Located on the right side of the stream window on desktop, or in the bottom half on mobile. Type your comment in the text input area and press "Send."

### 12. Kick Channel Emote Selection
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: An interface that displays global Kick emotes and creator-specific custom emotes for subscribers to post in chat. It enables expressive visual communication and highlights subscriber status in public chat feeds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Emote Picker. Click the smiling face icon in the bottom-right corner of the chat input box, scroll to select an emote, and click to insert it.

### 13. Kick Creator Raid Redirect
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows streamers to send their entire active audience to another creator's live stream at the end of their broadcast. It fosters cross-channel networking and keeps viewers engaged within the platform's ecosystem.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Raid Execution. Type `/raid [channel_name]` in the chat window or select the Raid option in the Quick Actions panel of the dashboard, wait for the timer, and click "Raid Now."

### 14. Kick Chat Polls Creator
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A moderation tool that allows streamers and mods to launch real-time surveys in chat to collect votes. It provides an easy way to gather viewer feedback on gameplay choices or stream topics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Poll Command. Type `/poll new [question] | [option1] | [option2]` in chat, or use the interactive poll creator in the Creator Dashboard under Community tools.

### 15. Kick Loyalty Badge System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A customized badge asset system showing loyalty badges next to subscriber names in chat based on subscription age. Creators can design and upload unique badge graphics for different subscription milestones.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Loyalty Sub Badges. Managed in Creator Dashboard > Viewer Rewards > Badges. Creators upload custom icons for 1-month, 3-month, 6-month, and annual milestones.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Kick Chat Whispers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A direct, private messaging channel that allows users to send private text messages to other registered users. It enables one-on-one private chats away from public channel communication fields.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Text Messaging. Click the Whisper chat bubble icon in the top header menu, search for the user's display name, click "Start Chatting," and enter your message.

### 17. Kick Chat Username Mentions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: An alert mechanism that draws a user's attention in chat by typing their username and highlighting the chat block. It highlights the target message block in yellow and triggers a browser notification if configured.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: User Mention Highlights. Type `@` followed by the recipient's display username inside the channel chat input bar, and press enter to post the highlighted text.

### 18. Kick Whisper Mute Settings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to block or mute individual users from sending them direct messages or whispers on the platform. It helps protect users from harassment and filters out unsolicited chat conversations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Message Blocking. Open the Whisper window with the user, click the settings gear inside their specific chat box, and select "Mute User" or "Block User."

### 19. Kick Chat User Card Inspector
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A clickable pop-up profile summary within chat that allows users to check account details. It displays quick actions like follow, block, report, and direct message shortcuts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Profile Card. Click on any username in the channel chat list or chat stream to open their user card, and click the "Message" button to launch a private Whisper.

### 20. Kick Whisper Spam Filter
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A security filter that blocks whispers from unknown users unless they are followed or friends. It protects the user's private inbox from automated bot spam and unsolicited messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Whisper Filtering. Go to Account Settings > Privacy & Safety, scroll to "Whisper Permissions," and select the checkbox "Only receive whispers from users I follow."

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Kick Creator Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A subscription plan costing $4.99 per month that provides creators with 95% of subscription revenue. It allows viewers to directly support creators while unlocking custom emotes and ad-free streaming.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Paid Channel Subscriptions. Click the green "Subscribe" button below the stream player, select Tier 1, and complete transaction details using Stripe or credit cards.

### 22. Kick Gifted Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows viewers to buy channel subscriptions and distribute them to other chat participants. It is a key tool for community building and rewarding active chat participants.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Gifted Subscription Purchases. Click the "Gift a Sub" option inside the subscription popup, select "Gift to Community" or "Gift to specific user," choose the sub count, and complete checkout.

### 23. Kick Stripe Payout Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Creator portal integration that connects the creator's Kick account with Stripe to receive monthly payout earnings. It automates financial payouts and ensures secure processing of all digital transactions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Payment Setup. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Revenue > Payment Method, click "Connect Stripe," fill out Stripe onboarding forms, and authorize payouts.

### 24. Kick Chat Message Pinning
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A premium moderation tool that allows streamers or moderators to pin important text or sponsor links. Pinned messages remain fixed at the top of the chat panel for high visibility.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Message Pinning. Hover over any chat message in the stream chat window, click the vertical three dots, and select "Pin Message" to display it in a fixed banner at the top of chat.

### 25. Kick Subscription Leaderboards
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A leaderboard widget displayed in the chat header listing the top community subscription gifters in real-time. It encourages friendly competition among viewers and publicly recognizes top channel supporters.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Gifting Rankings. Displayed automatically in the chat panel header. Viewers can click the leaderboard icon to toggle the list showing the top three sub-gifters for the current broadcast.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Kick Creator Dashboard Analytics Panel
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An analytics dashboard offering visual charts of viewer counts, follower conversion rates, and chat density. It helps creators evaluate their stream performance and identify growth trends.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Analytics Suite. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Analytics > Overview, and use the filter dropdowns to set custom timeframes for review.

### 27. Kick Creator Program Progress Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A checklist tracker that monitors a streamer's metrics against the requirements for the Kick Creator Incentive Program. It displays real-time progress for hours streamed, active days, and unique viewers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Achievement Trackers. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Achievement or KCIP tab to view criteria status, including hours streamed and active days.

### 28. Kick Stream Sessions Log
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A historical log showing all past live stream sessions, total view hours, and peak concurrent viewers. It allows creators to review the analytics of individual broadcasts for scheduling optimization.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Historic Session Directory. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Analytics > Streams, and click on individual stream dates to inspect performance summaries.

### 29. Kick Revenue Breakdown Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An analytics widget detailing income sources, separating earnings between subscriptions, gifted subs, and ads. It provides creators with clear financial transparency and historical revenue data.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Financial Tracking Hub. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Revenue > Earnings, where you can view charts detailing net earnings and monthly payouts.

### 30. Kick Moderator Action Audit Log
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A panel displaying a history of all moderation actions, such as user timeouts and message deletions, taken in chat. It helps streamers monitor moderator activity and maintain consistency in channel rules enforcement.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mod Action Audit Logs. Open the Creator Dashboard, navigate to Settings > Moderator Logs, and filter by moderator name or action type.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Kick AutoMod Bad Word Filter
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated filter that screens chat messages and blocks comments containing banned or blacklisted words. It intercepts toxic comments before they appear in public to maintain a healthy chat environment.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Keyword Filtering. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Chat Settings > AutoMod, toggle "Enable AutoMod," and input custom words to block.

### 32. Kick Chat Slow Mode Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts chat message frequency, requiring users to wait a set number of seconds between messages. It helps moderators manage fast-moving chats and reduces comment spam during peak times.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Rate Throttle. Type `/slow [seconds]` (e.g., `/slow 5`) in the chat window, or toggle "Slow Mode" inside the Creator Dashboard Chat Settings panel.

### 33. Kick Follower-Only Chat Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts chat participation to users who have followed the channel for a designated duration. It prevents drive-by chat raids and encourages viewers to follow to participate in the conversation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Exclusive Chat Access. Type `/followers [duration]` (e.g., `/followers 10m`) in chat, or select the Follower-Only toggle in the chat configuration menu.

### 34. Kick Banned Users Management List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A portal displaying all banned or timed-out users in a channel, with options to manage ban appeals. It gives creators and head moderators central control over the channel's moderation records.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ban Management Console. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Community > Banned Users, where you can search names or click "Unban" to restore chat rights.

### 35. Kick Email-Verified Chat Constraint
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents non-verified accounts from posting messages in chat, blocking automated spam accounts. It requires chatters to complete email verification before they can participate in live streams.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Verified Accounts Mode. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Community > Chat Settings, and check the option "Require Email Verification."

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Kick Creator Go-Live Push Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Direct alerts dispatched to mobile devices when a followed streamer begins a live broadcast. It helps bring active followers back to the stream as soon as the creator goes live.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Go-Live Push Settings. Open a creator's profile page, click the "Follow" heart, and tap the bell icon to toggle push alerts.

### 37. Kick Creator Live Email Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automated email notifications containing the stream category, title, and live thumbnail sent to followers. It provides offline users with detailed stream information in their personal inboxes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Alert Toggle. Go to Account Settings > Notifications, scroll to "Email Notifications," and toggle "Live Broadcasts" to on.

### 38. Kick Notification Snooze Control
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An option to mute or snooze all push notifications from Kick for a designated time. It helps users manage interruptions during busy or quiet periods of their day.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Temporary Muting. Tap and hold a Kick push notification on your mobile screen, or access the mobile app settings to toggle notification snoozing for 1, 8, or 24 hours.

### 39. Kick Chat Scroll Freeze
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Freezes chat scrolling when the user scrolls up, enabling them to read past comments. It stops auto-scrolling so moderators or users can read specific messages at their own pace.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Navigation Lock. Scroll up inside the chat pane during a live broadcast to halt auto-scrolling, and click the "Resume Chat" arrow to return.

### 40. Kick VOD Auto-Publishing Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Streamer setting that automatically saves and publishes live broadcasts as Video-On-Demand archives. It allows streamers to choose whether their streams are saved publicly or deleted immediately after ending.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: VOD Archive Rules. Go to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Channel, and toggle "Store past broadcasts" to active to retain archives for 14 days.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Kick API Channel Status Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic JSON endpoint returning live status, viewer count, category details, and stream title for any channel. It allows developers to integrate real-time stream status indicators into external apps.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RESTful API Endpoint. Send an HTTP GET request to `https://kick.com/api/v1/channels/[channel_slug]` to fetch channel statistics, metadata, and follower counts in JSON format.

### 42. Kick Chat WebSocket Protocol
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: WebSocket service allowing developers to connect custom chat bots to read and send chat messages. It enables developers to handle real-time chat moderation and interactive games programmatically.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: WebSocket Integration API. Open a WebSocket connection to Kick's Chat Server (using Pusher ws endpoints at `ws-us2.pusher.com`), subscribe to the channel `chatrooms.[id].v2`, and capture JSON chat event payloads.

### 43. Kick Third-Party Overlay API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: API connectors allowing third-party tools to import and display Kick follower and subscription alerts. It lets developers and streamers create dynamic browser alerts for on-screen stream overlays.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Overlay APIs. Access your StreamLabs dashboard, click "Add Platform," paste your Kick profile link to sync events, and copy the widget URL into your OBS browser source.

### 44. Kick OAuth 2.0 Authentication Service
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Secure OAuth authorization framework that enables third-party apps to authenticate users using Kick login credentials. It secures user credentials while allowing authorized integrations to access account scopes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Identity API. Direct users to the Kick OAuth endpoint specifying `client_id`, `redirect_uri`, and required permission scopes to receive verification tokens.

### 45. Kick Webhook Events API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic webhook subscriptions pushing JSON payloads to developer servers for subscription or donation events. It removes the need for polling and alerts developers instantly when channel monetization events occur.
