- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: JSON Callback Webhooks. Configure webhook endpoints in the developer portal, register callback URLs, and write listener scripts to capture JSON POST data when new transactions occur.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Kick Two-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Security configuration requiring a login verification code generated by an authenticator application. It adds an essential layer of security to prevent unauthorized access and protect streamer payout accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Security Settings. Go to Account Settings > Security, click "Enable 2FA," scan the QR code with an authenticator app, and enter the generated verification code.

### 47. Kick Profile Customization Manager
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Settings panel allowing users to update display username, bio description, profile picture, and offline banner. It enables creators to refresh their channel branding and social links easily.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Metadata Editor. Navigate to Account Settings > Profile, upload new image assets, edit the text fields, and click "Save Changes."

### 48. Kick Account Deletion Request System
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A self-service tool that initiates account deletion, permanently purging account details and files. It enforces data privacy compliance by removing all personal records after a confirmation cooldown.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Purging Console. Navigate to Account Settings > Account, click the "Delete Account" button, confirm your request, and click the confirmation link sent to your registered email address.

### 49. Kick Password Reset Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Account recovery system sending password reset links to registered email addresses. It allows users to regain access to their accounts securely if they forget their password.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Credential Recovery. Click "Forgot Password" on the Kick login page, enter your email address, open the verification link received, and submit a new secure password.

### 50. Kick Account Security Audit Log
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays security data including login device types, IP addresses, dates, and locations. It helps users audit login history and terminate sessions on unrecognized devices.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Active Sessions Log. Open Account Settings > Security, inspect the list of active sessions, and click "Revoke Session" or "Log Out from All Devices."

---

### Platform: Lemon8

This document compiles the feature research for Lemon8, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Lemon8 In-App Photo Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A comprehensive image-editing tool that allows creators to crop, adjust contrast, apply filters, and tune color curves. It provides mobile creators with all the standard tools needed to optimize photo aesthetics before publishing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Built-in Image Editor. Tap the "+" icon at the bottom of the navigation bar, choose a photo from the gallery, and select from the "Filter" or "Adjust" menus at the bottom of the interface.

### 2. Lemon8 Creative Layout Templates
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Pre-styled visual layouts specifically optimized for categories like Fashion, Beauty, Travel, and Food. These templates help creators design aesthetically pleasing, magazine-like posts with minimal manual effort.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Design Layout Presets. In the post editing interface, select the "Templates" tab at the bottom panel and browse through pre-configured styles, then tap one to apply it to your selected photo.

### 3. Lemon8 Font Styling Overlays
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: An overlay tool that enables creators to add customizable text titles and descriptions directly on their images. It offers a variety of fonts, colors, borders, and shadows to highlight key aspects of the post.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Formatting System. In the post editing screen, tap the "Text" tool, type your text, choose a font family, adjust background borders, and drag the text block to position it.

### 4. Lemon8 Sticker Library
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A library of icons, arrows, pointers, and seasonal graphics that creators can place onto images. These stickers help draw viewers' attention to specific product details or design elements within a photo.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Graphic Overlay Asset. Tap the "Stickers" icon in the post creator toolbar, browse or search for a sticker (e.g., pointing hand), and tap to place it, dragging the corners to resize.

### 5. Lemon8 Multi-Photo Carousel
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to upload up to 10 photos in a single post, creating swipeable slide carousels. This feature enables sharing structured storytelling collections, product reviews, or step-by-step guides.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Image Carousel Post. In the image upload gallery, select the "Multi-select" checkbox, tap up to 10 photos in your preferred order, and tap "Next" to edit them collectively.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Lemon8 For You Recommendation Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A personalized home feed that uses machine learning algorithms to serve content tailored to the user's interests. It dynamically adjusts recommendation streams based on the user's historical interaction and viewing patterns.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Interest Stream. Open the app and tap the "For You" header at the top of the main home screen to scroll through personalized posts.

### 7. Lemon8 Category Navigation Tabs
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Horizontal navigation menus that divide the platform's feeds into interest topics like Fashion, Beauty, Food, Travel, and Pets. Users can tap these tabs to explore content in specific niches without relying on search queries.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Topical Directory Tabs. Swipe horizontally on the top navigation bar of the homepage or tap on tabs like "Fashion" or "Food" to view content specifically tagged under that vertical.

### 8. Lemon8 Keyword Search Console
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search interface with auto-suggestions that allows users to find posts, accounts, and popular hashtags. It provides real-time search results to help users discover relevant inspiration and creator profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Directory Search Interface. Tap the magnifying glass icon at the top-right corner of the home page, type search keywords into the field, and view filtered results divided into "Posts" and "Users."

### 9. Lemon8 Trending Topic Hashtag Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search-page listing that aggregates current popular hashtags and topic campaigns run by the community. Clicking on any hashtag opens a dedicated feed displaying all related posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hot Topics Finder. Tap the search icon, and scroll down to the "Trending" section to view a list of popular hashtags (e.g., `#ootd` or `#travelguide`), clicking on any tag to open its dedicated post feed.

### 10. Lemon8 Post Collections
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A bookmarking feature that lets users save inspiring posts and organize them into categorized, themed folders. These collections are saved privately in the user's profile for future reference.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Bookmarking folders. Tap the bookmark banner icon at the bottom of any post to save it, then tap "Add to Collection" to select or create a themed folder.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Lemon8 Follow System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Subscribes a user to a creator's profile, prioritizing their posts in the "Following" tab of the homepage. It helps users build a curated feed of their favorite influencers and friends.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Feed Subscription. Tap the "Follow" button next to a creator's name on their post, or visit their profile page and tap the blue "Follow" button.

### 12. Lemon8 Post Comments
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A public messaging thread below posts where users can write comments and engage with the creator or other fans. It allows for detailed Q&A about products, travel tips, or styling suggestions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Public Discussion Feed. Tap the speech bubble icon on the bottom panel of a post to open the comments, type your message in the text field, and tap the upload arrow.

### 13. Lemon8 Heart Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows viewers to show appreciation for a post by double-tapping the image or clicking the heart icon. It provides direct engagement feedback that influences the recommendation algorithm.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Likes Indicator. Tap the heart icon at the bottom-left of a post feed item, or double-tap anywhere on the main image to light up the heart in pink.

### 14. Lemon8 Direct Link Content Sharing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Generates direct links, QR codes, or custom cards to share Lemon8 posts across external messaging and social apps. It allows users to easily share inspirational content with friends who are not on the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Cross-Platform Sharing. Tap the arrow share icon in the bottom-right corner of a post, and select "Copy Link" or choose from direct app shortcuts like WhatsApp or Instagram.

### 15. Lemon8 Template Application
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to reuse the exact visual templates and layouts designed by other creators in their own posts. It promotes community layout sharing and makes aesthetic post creation accessible to everyone.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Design Layout Sharing. When viewing a post that uses a Lemon8 template, tap the template tag button on the screen to load the template directly into your post editor.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Lemon8 Direct Messaging
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Provides private direct messaging channels for users to send one-on-one text messages to each other. It facilitates private networking and communication between creators and followers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Chat Window. Go to the Notifications tab, tap the chat bubble icon in the top-right corner to open the inbox, select a contact, and begin typing.

### 17. Lemon8 Photo Sharing in DM
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows sending images directly from the device camera roll inside private chat threads. It enables users to share inspiration photos and product ideas privately.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Image Sharing. Open a direct message chat room, tap the "+" or image icon next to the chat text bar, select a photo from your gallery, and tap "Send."

### 18. Lemon8 Post Card Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows sharing Lemon8 post cards directly to a friend's private message inbox from the post view. It lets users share ideas and recommendations without leaving the in-app chat interface.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Message Sharing. Tap the share arrow on any Lemon8 post, search or select a friend from the direct message sharing list, write a note, and tap "Send."

### 19. Lemon8 Direct Message Notifications Toggle
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: An alert mute setting that enables users to turn notifications off for individual chat threads or the entire DM system. It helps users manage their notifications and reduce distractions during busy hours.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Alert Customization. Open a chat thread, tap the three dots in the top-right corner, and toggle the "Mute Notifications" switch to active.

### 20. Lemon8 Chat Block and Report
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A safety control to block unwanted users from sending direct messages and report malicious conversations to the help desk. It ensures user safety by preventing harassment and filtering spam.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Safety Control. In the top-right menu of a chat thread, click the three dots, select "Block" to prevent further contact, or click "Report" to submit the thread for audit.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Lemon8 Retail Product Tagging
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to tag specific items in photos, linking them directly to external retail web stores. It provides viewers with direct shopping access to items featured in fashion and home decor posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Shoppable Retail Links. In the post editing screen, tap the "Tag" option, choose "Product Link," input the retail URL (such as Amazon or Zara), name the item, and position the tag.

### 22. Lemon8 Affiliate Storefront Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows verified creators to link Amazon storefronts, LTK shops, or personal blogs directly in their profile bio. It helps creators monetize their influence by directing traffic to their affiliate hubs.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bio URL Links. Navigate to Profile > Edit Profile, paste your affiliate or storefront link into the designated "Website" field, and click "Save."

### 23. Lemon8 Sponsored Content Flag
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A regulatory setting that enables creators to flag specific posts as sponsored collaborations or paid partnerships. It ensures legal compliance and transparency regarding paid promotions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Paid Promotion Disclosure. On the final publishing screen of a post, scroll to "Advanced Settings" and toggle "Paid Partnership / Sponsored" to on before posting.

### 24. Lemon8 ByteDance Brand Campaigns Portal
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app campaign center that connects popular creators with public relations agencies for sponsored content requests. It allows creators to apply for paid campaigns directly within the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sponsor Campaign Hub. Go to Settings > Creator Tools, tap "Brand Campaigns Portal," and review the lists of active campaigns, submitting your profile to apply.

### 25. Lemon8 Product Showcase Carousel
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A dedicated display carousel on a creator's profile page containing catalog listings of partnered brand products. It creates a personalized storefront for creators to recommend and sell curated items.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Storefront Display. Enabled in settings under "Profile Shop Settings." Once active, select products from your synced catalog to display in the profile tab.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Lemon8 Creator Center Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A dashboard that provides creators with overall metrics on post views, profile visits, shares, likes, and comment counts. It offers valuable insights into which posts are driving the most engagement.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Analytics Suite. Navigate to Profile > Settings (gear icon), tap "Creator Center," and select "Analytics" to view performance charts.

### 27. Lemon8 Individual Post Performance metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays detailed statistics for individual posts, showing traffic sources, views, saves, and watch-time ratios. It helps creators identify their most successful content and optimize future uploads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Statistics Inspector. Open any of your own published posts, tap the "View Insights" link at the bottom of the post card, and review the detailed analytics report.

### 28. Lemon8 Follower Demographics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Visualizes follower demographic profiles, showing gender splits, age distributions, and location percentages. It helps creators tailor their content and schedule posts based on their target audience.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Demographics. In the Creator Center Analytics page, click the "Followers" tab to view interactive charts displaying audience segmentation.

### 29. Lemon8 Creator Academy Tutorials
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A resource center with tutorials, guides, and trends to help creators improve photo quality and caption writing. It provides creators with regular updates on what styles are trending.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Education Hub. Open the Creator Center and select "Creator Academy" to browse tutorials categorized by photography, layout design, and niche topics.

### 30. Lemon8 Draft Post Vault
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators to save, edit, and organize multiple draft posts, retaining edits, stickers, and links until they are ready to publish. It provides a convenient workspace for creators working on campaigns or content batches.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Drafting Manager. When editing a post, click the "Save Draft" button at the bottom-left of the final creation page. Access drafts via the "+" post creation screen under "Drafts."

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Lemon8 Private Account Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Sets the account to private, requiring manually approving or declining new follower requests. It limits profile and post visibility to approved followers only.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Privacy Settings. Navigate to Profile > Settings > Privacy, and toggle the "Private Account" option to active.

### 32. Lemon8 Comment Filtering System
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to filter and auto-hide public comments that contain specific keywords or offensive phrases. It helps creators maintain a positive and safe community environment under their posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Comment Blocklist. Go to Settings > Privacy > Comment Filters, input custom keywords separated by commas, and tap "Save."

### 33. Lemon8 Post Visibility Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables setting the visibility of individual posts to "Public," "Friends Only," or "Private" when publishing or after. It gives users control over who can view specific uploads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Selective Content Access. On the final post creation screen (or by clicking the three dots on a published post), select "Who can view this post" and choose the preferred visibility level.

### 34. Lemon8 Direct Message Permissions
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts who can initiate direct message conversations with the user, helping prevent spam and unwanted contacts. Users can restrict incoming DMs to only people they follow.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: DM Access Control. Navigate to Settings > Privacy > Who can send me DMs, and select between "Everyone," "Followers," or "No One."

### 35. Lemon8 Content Reporting Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An interface to report posts, comments, or accounts that violate platform guidelines to moderators. It helps keep the platform safe by routing reported content to review teams.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Abuse Reporting System. Tap the three dots in the top-right corner of any post or profile, tap "Report," select the violation reason from the checklist, and submit.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Lemon8 Push Notifications Preferences
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to customize exactly which events trigger mobile push notifications, including likes, comments, and mentions. It helps users reduce screen time and manage in-app distractions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Push Notification Muting. Go to Settings > Notifications, and toggle the checkboxes next to individual items like "Likes," "Comments," or "Direct Messages."

### 37. Lemon8 Screen Time Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An in-app digital wellness tool that tracks daily app usage and locks the app with a passcode once the limit is reached. It encourages healthy usage habits and helps users manage their time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Usage Limit Scheduler. Go to Settings > Digital Wellbeing > Screen Time Management, set a daily limit (e.g., 60 minutes), and enter a 4-digit passcode to enable the lock.

### 38. Lemon8 In-App Alert Bell
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A dedicated notifications center inside the app listing all user comments, mentions, likes, and system alerts. It organizes all account activity in a single feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Center Feed. Tap the "Inbox" icon (bell) in the bottom navigation bar to view your categorized activity logs.

### 39. Lemon8 Notification Pause Scheduling
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A scheduler that automatically mutes all push notifications during specified hours of the day. It allows users to set daily quiet times during sleep or work.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Silent Hours Scheduler. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Do Not Disturb Schedule, toggle it on, and configure your daily start and end quiet times.

### 40. Lemon8 Weekly Activity Report
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An automated notification that summarizes weekly screen time, average daily use, and engagement rates on the app. It provides users with insight into their consumption habits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Wellbeing Summary. Access Settings > Digital Wellbeing, and toggle "Weekly Reports" to receive a summary push alert every Sunday morning.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Lemon8 Login via TikTok API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic login API that allows developers of third-party apps to authenticate Lemon8 users using ByteDance/TikTok account credentials. It simplifies registration for external portals and partners.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Identity API. Access the ByteDance Open Developer portal, integrate the TikTok Login SDK, configure redirect URIs, and request user authorization scopes for Lemon8 authentication.

### 42. Lemon8 Content Share SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer SDK enabling third-party photo editors and travel apps to upload images and text directly to Lemon8 from their apps. It streamlines content workflows by bypassing local device storage.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Share Integration API. Download the Lemon8 Share SDK for iOS/Android from the developer site, link it to your app's sharing menu, and implement the share callback request methods.

### 43. Lemon8 Web OAuth 2.0 Authentication
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: The secure OAuth protocol interface utilized by partner platforms to verify user identity and request user profile permissions. It protects credentials while sharing access permissions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Secure Token Exchange. Register your web portal on the developer dashboard, call the OAuth endpoint `https://open.lemon8-app.com/oauth/authorize` with a Client ID, and capture the authorization code.

### 44. Lemon8 Brand Portal Webhooks
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Webhook APIs that deliver real-time JSON callback notifications to developer servers when brand campaigns or review requests are updated. It allows marketing agencies to sync campaign statuses instantly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Subscription Webhooks. In the Brand Portal developer console, register an active HTTPS endpoint URL and select event subscriptions like `campaign.status_changed` to capture JSON callbacks.

### 45. Lemon8 Feed Aggregation API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A RESTful JSON API used by ByteDance partners to pull public trending posts and display them in external widgets. It enables displaying curated lifestyle feeds programmatically on external websites.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Public Content API. Authenticate your API requests using a developer key, and execute GET queries to the endpoint `https://api.lemon8-app.com/v1/discovery/trending` to fetch JSON lists of trending posts.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Lemon8 Account Linking System
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to link their Lemon8 profile with TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube accounts for cross-platform sharing. It makes cross-platform promotion and verification much easier for creators.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Social Connection Manager. Go to Settings > Edit Profile, tap "Linked Accounts," select the social platform, and follow the redirect prompts to authenticate.

### 47. Lemon8 Password Management Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Security portal for setting, updating, or resetting the account password. It helps users protect their accounts from unauthorized logins and update expired passwords.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Credential Configuration. Navigate to Settings > Security, select "Password," enter your old password followed by the new password, and click "Submit."

### 48. Lemon8 Contact Verification Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows adding and verifying phone numbers or email addresses to secure the account and facilitate recovery. It provides recovery points to prevent permanent account lockouts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Verification Settings Editor. Open Settings > Account and Security, tap "Phone" or "Email," input your details, enter the SMS/Email verification code sent, and click "Verify."

### 49. Lemon8 Account Deactivation System
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A settings option that allows users to permanently delete their account and purge all data after a 30-day grace period. It ensures compliance with user privacy policies and data protection regulations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Purge Console. Navigate to Settings > Account and Security > Delete Account, confirm the warning terms, enter your verification code, and tap "Confirm Deletion."

### 50. Lemon8 Language and Region Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Configures the app display language and changes the content curation region for localized posts. It allows users to customize their interface and feed recommendations based on language and geography.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Localization Manager. Access Settings > App Settings > App Language, select your preferred language, and adjust "Content Region" to choose your location.

---

### Platform: LinkedIn

This document compiles the feature research for LinkedIn, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. LinkedIn Articles Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A long-form publishing tool that allows users to write blog-style articles directly on the platform. It supports adding header images, styling text with markdown, and embedding hyperlinks or multimedia elements.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Professional Blog Editor. Click the "Write article" button in the post composer on your desktop homepage, enter your header and text, and click publish.

### 2. LinkedIn Carousel Posts
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to post multiple images or PDF slides that display as a swipeable carousel in the feed. This format is widely used for sharing slide decks, step-by-step guides, and graphics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Document-Based Slider. Click the "Share document" icon in the post composer, upload your PDF or presentation file, add a caption, and post it to create a carousel.

### 3. LinkedIn Video Uploads & Captions
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A native video uploader supporting professional and educational video sharing. Creators can upload custom SRT subtitle files to ensure that videos are accessible when played without sound.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Native Professional Video. Select the video icon in the post composer, upload your video file, click "Select caption file" to add your SRT track, and post.

### 4. LinkedIn Post Composer Templates
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Preset visual backgrounds and text layouts designed to make short posts stand out. Users can choose from various color schemes, layouts, and pre-formatted text headers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Graphic Post Creator. Open the post composer, select "Create a template," choose your desired background layout, write your text, and click done.

### 5. LinkedIn Newsletter Creator
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to group their articles under a subscription newsletter feed. Subscribers receive automatic email and in-app notifications whenever a new issue is published.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Professional Newsletter Hub. Tap the "Write article" button, click the "Create newsletter" option in the article editor header, set your title and publishing frequency, and save.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. LinkedIn Advanced People Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search tool that allows users to find professional profiles using specific filters. Users can refine searches by industry, current or past employer, geographic location, and connection degree.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Targeted Profile Finder. Type a name or role in the search bar, click search, click "All Filters" at the top of the page, apply your filter criteria, and view results.

### 7. LinkedIn Job Search Engine
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A comprehensive job board listing opportunities across industries. Users can filter listings by remote status, experience level, salary range, and application type.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Career Board Search. Click the "Jobs" icon in the navigation bar, enter keywords and locations, click search, and use the filter pills at the top to refine results.

### 8. LinkedIn Skill Assessment Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A directory of standardized tests that allow users to verify their technical and professional skills. Passing an assessment adds a verification badge to the user's profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Skill Verification Portal. Open your profile page, scroll down to the "Skills" section, click "Demonstrate skills," select "Take skill assessment," and complete the test.

### 9. LinkedIn Hashtag Following
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to follow specific hashtag topic channels to customize their feed. Following hashtags ensures that relevant professional discussions appear on the user's homepage.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Topic Feed Customizer. Search for a hashtag (e.g., `#tech`) in the search bar, select it from the results, and click the blue "Follow" button.

### 10. LinkedIn Saved Items
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A bookmarking system where users can store saved jobs, articles, and posts. Saved items are grouped in a private portal for easy reference.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Bookmark Hub. Click the bookmark ribbon or three-dot menu on any job post or article, select "Save," and access them via the "My Items" section in the left sidebar.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. LinkedIn Connections System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Defines professional relationships using three degrees of connection. This helps users map their professional network and understand how they are connected to other members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Professional Network Mapper. Visit a member's profile page and click the "Connect" button to invite them to your network, or click "Follow" to view their public posts.

### 12. LinkedIn Recommendations and Endorsements
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Features that allow connections to validate a user's skills and write reviews of their professional experience. These testimonials are displayed publicly on the user's profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Peer Reference Panel. Scroll to the "Recommendations" section on a colleague's profile, click "Recommend [Name]," write your review, and submit it for their approval.

### 13. LinkedIn Groups Directory
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Niche discussion forums where professionals can share ideas, ask questions, and network. Groups are organized around specific industries, interests, or alumni networks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Professional Forums. Click the "Groups" link under the "Work" menu in the navigation bar, search for your industry topic, and click "Request to join."

### 14. LinkedIn InMail Messaging
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A premium messaging feature that allows users to send messages directly to people they are not connected with. This is widely used by recruiters and sales professionals for outreach.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Out-of-Network Messages. Open the profile of a member outside your network, click the "InMail" button on their card, write your message, and click send.

### 15. LinkedIn Events & Live Audio
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Virtual hubs that host live audio panel discussions or video broadcasts. Users can RSVP to events, invite connections, and participate in live chat during the broadcast.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Virtual Event Builder. Click the "+" button next to "Events" in the left sidebar of your home feed, enter the event details, choose the format, and click "Save."

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. LinkedIn Message Inboxes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A divided messaging panel that separates conversation threads into Focused and Other tabs. This keeps important professional chats organized while filtering out marketing pitches and spam.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Messaging Tab Separator. Click the "Messaging" icon in the navigation bar, and select either the "Focused" or "Other" tab to view organized conversations.

### 17. LinkedIn Smart Replies
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: AI-generated quick reply options displayed at the bottom of the chat interface. These replies are customized based on the context of the incoming message to help users respond quickly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Response Panel. Open an incoming message thread, select one of the suggested text bubbles at the bottom, edit the text if desired, and click send.

### 18. LinkedIn Direct Video Meetings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables users to start video calls directly from messaging threads. The system integrates with Microsoft Teams, Zoom, or LinkedIn's native video conferencing tool.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: In-Chat Video Call. Open a message thread, click the video camera icon in the top right, select your conferencing provider, and send the meeting link.

### 19. LinkedIn Attachment Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to send resumes, PDFs, photos, and spreadsheets directly within direct messages. This streamlines the application and networking process.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: In-Chat Document Exchange. Inside a message thread, click the paperclip or paper icon next to the text entry box, select the file from your device, and click send.

### 20. LinkedIn Chat Emojis and GIPHY Integration
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Integrates emojis and animated GIFs into messaging threads to make conversations more engaging. Users can quickly search and add visual elements to express ideas.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Visual Chat Attachments. In any LinkedIn chat window, select the smiley face icon or the GIF button next to the input area, search for your item in the panel, and hit send.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. LinkedIn Premium Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Paid subscription tiers offering expanded profile views, additional search filters, and InMail credits. Tiers include Premium Career, Premium Business, and Sales Navigator.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Paid Membership Manager. Click your profile icon, select "Premium Subscription Settings," choose your subscription level, and complete the payment information.

### 22. LinkedIn Ads Manager Campaign Portal
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An advertising dashboard where businesses set budgets and create sponsored content, message ads, or dynamic text ads. Campaigns can be configured to target specific professional cohorts based on company size, job seniority, and industry fields.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: B2B Advertising Portal. Navigate to `linkedin.com/campaignmanager`, link your company page, create an ad account, set up your daily budgets, and select target audiences.

### 23. LinkedIn Talent Solutions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An enterprise recruiter platform that allows companies to search, track, and contact potential candidates. It provides advanced search filters and candidate tracking tools.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Recruiter Console. Access the Talent Solutions dashboard at `talent.linkedin.com`, log in with your recruiter credentials, and set up your candidate searches.

### 24. LinkedIn Learning Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A subscription-based learning portal offering thousands of professional video courses. Users can complete courses to earn certificates that display on their profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Educational Video Library. Access LinkedIn Learning via the "Work" menu in the navigation bar, search for courses, subscribe, and complete video tutorials.

### 25. LinkedIn Sales Navigator
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A lead generation platform offering advanced lead search filters, lead recommendations, and CRM integrations. It helps sales professionals identify and contact key decision makers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sales Leads Manager. Open Sales Navigator from the top navigation bar, set your lead search filters, save target accounts, and track updates.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. LinkedIn Profile Analytics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An analytics dashboard showing weekly profile views, search appearances, and post impressions. This dashboard helps creators monitor their personal reach and engagement.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Reach Dashboard. Navigate to your main profile page, click on the "Analytics" or "Dashboard" section below your intro card, and view your performance metrics.

### 27. LinkedIn Creator Mode
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A profile setting that highlights your content and lists your followed topics on your profile card. It changes the default action on your profile from "Connect" to "Follow."
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Creator Layout. Open your profile page, click the "Creator Mode" option under the "Resources" section, select your topic hashtags, and toggle the switch to "On."

### 28. LinkedIn Company Page Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A metrics dashboard for business page admins that tracks follower demographics, visitor trends, and update engagement. This dashboard helps companies measure the effectiveness of their brand updates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Corporate Page Tracker. Navigate to your Organization Page admin center, click the Analytics dropdown, and select visitors, followers, or posts to view detailed graphs.

### 29. LinkedIn Ad Campaign Reporting
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An advertising metrics dashboard tracking conversion rates, return on ad spend, and demographic data. This dashboard helps advertisers optimize campaigns and measure audience responses.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ads Dashboard. Log in to Campaign Manager, select your account, and navigate to the "Performance" or "Demographics" reporting tabs to inspect campaign data.

### 30. LinkedIn Employee Advocacy Tools
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A management tool that allows companies to curate content for employees to share on their personal feeds. This helps companies extend their reach through their employees' networks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Curated Content Portal. Open your company page admin menu, click "Employee Advocacy," add content suggestions to the portal, and invite employees to share them.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. LinkedIn Private Profile Viewing Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A privacy setting that hides your identity when visiting other member profiles. When active, the profile owner only sees that an anonymous member viewed their profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Anonymous Viewing Toggle. Go to Settings & Privacy > Visibility > Profile viewing options, select "Private mode," and click save to activate.

### 32. LinkedIn Connection Visibility Controls
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Controls whether your connections can see your list of connections. Restricting this setting prevents other members from browsing your professional network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Network Privacy Settings. Go to Settings & Privacy > Visibility > Connections, and toggle the switch next to "Who can see your connections" to your preference.

### 33. LinkedIn Data Sharing Preferences
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to manage how LinkedIn shares profile data with third-party partners. Users can opt out of data sharing for research, advertising, and job match systems.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Third-Party Data Controls. Open Settings & Privacy > Data privacy > Data sharing and personalization, and toggle off the data sharing switches.

### 34. LinkedIn Blocking & Reporting
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to block accounts and report profiles for violating community guidelines. Blocking prevents the user from viewing your profile, sending messages, or connecting.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Restrictions. Click the "More" button on a member's profile page, select "Report / Block" from the dropdown menu, select your reason, and confirm.

### 35. LinkedIn Active Session Auditing
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A security dashboard showing all devices, browsers, and locations currently logged into the account. Users can audit login history and close active sessions remotely.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Session Security Manager. Go to Settings & Privacy > Sign-in and security > Where you're signed in, review the list of active sessions, and click "End session" to log them out.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. LinkedIn Notification Settings Hub
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A central hub where users can manage alerts for job openings, connections, messaging, and network updates. Users can customize alerts for push notifications, emails, and in-app notifications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Notification Manager. Go to Settings & Privacy > Notifications, select the category you want to modify, and toggle the switches to adjust frequency.

### 37. LinkedIn Job Alert Frequency
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to customize the frequency of email and push alerts for saved job search criteria. Users can set alerts to arrive daily or weekly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Career Alert Settings. Click the "Jobs" icon in the navigation bar, click "Job Alerts," select the alert you want to edit, and adjust the frequency dropdown.

### 38. LinkedIn Mute Conversation
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notifications for individual message threads without deleting the conversation. This prevents push and email alerts from interrupting your work.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inbox Conversation Muter. Tap the three dots next to the search bar inside any active chat session, and select 'Mute conversation' to silence future notifications.

### 39. LinkedIn Daily Digest Emails
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Bundles network updates and news alerts into a single daily email digest. This reduces the number of individual email notifications sent to your inbox.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Digest Toggle. Open Settings & Privacy > Notifications, select "Email Frequency," and toggle on the "Daily Digest" option.

### 40. LinkedIn Feed Preference Customization
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggles feed sorting between Top (algorithmic recommendations) and Recent (chronological updates). This allows users to control how content is organized on their homepage.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Sort Toggle. Click the dropdown arrow next to "Sort by" under the post composer on your desktop homepage, and select "Top" or "Recent."

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. LinkedIn Share API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A REST-based API that enables developers to automate sharing updates, links, and media to a member's professional feed. This interface is widely integrated with content management systems and corporate marketing tools.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: B2B Share API. Register a developer project in the LinkedIn Developer Portal, request the Share on LinkedIn permission, and send JSON POST requests to the `/v2/ugcPosts` endpoint.

### 42. LinkedIn Sign In API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An identity integration API based on the OpenID Connect protocol. It allows third-party developers to implement "Sign in with LinkedIn" buttons on their websites to retrieve profile details securely.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: OAuth Login Integration. Configure OAuth redirect URLs in the Developer Portal, and integrate the Sign In API endpoints (`https://www.linkedin.com/oauth/v2/authorization`) into your login flow.

### 43. LinkedIn Marketing Developer Platform API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic interface allowing developers to manage ad accounts, campaigns, budgets, and retrieve lead generation data. This API supports integration with enterprise marketing automation systems.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Marketing Automation Endpoint. Request access to the Marketing Developer Platform in the Developer Portal, obtain tokens, and make HTTP requests to the campaign endpoints.

### 44. LinkedIn Learning API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows enterprise organizations to integrate LinkedIn Learning progress, user records, and course catalogs with external learning management systems (LMS). It supports standard LMS protocols like xAPI.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: LMS Integration Interface. Access the LinkedIn Learning admin settings, generate API credentials (client ID and secret), and configure the integration URL in your LMS dashboard.

### 45. LinkedIn Webhooks API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A real-time HTTP callback system that sends instant notifications to corporate servers when page actions occur. This allows organizations to monitor comments, track company page reactions, and capture lead gen form entries.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: B2B Real-time Webhooks. Register your callback endpoint in the LinkedIn Developer Portal under the Webhooks tab, complete the verification handshake, and subscribe to page events.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. LinkedIn Two-Step Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Provides security for professional accounts by requiring an additional security code at login from unrecognized browsers or mobile devices. This helps prevent unauthorized access to user profile details and business pages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Credential Security Controls. Go to Settings & Privacy > Sign-in and security, select Two-step verification, click 'Turn on', and choose your preferred verification mode.

### 47. LinkedIn Primary Email Management
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to manage the email addresses linked to their account. Users can add backup emails, confirm new addresses, and change their primary contact address for account recovery.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Email Settings. Go to Settings & Privacy > Sign-in and security > Email addresses, click "Add email address," confirm it via email link, and click "Make primary."

### 48. LinkedIn Data Archive Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Compiles a comprehensive download of a user's professional archive, including connections list, message history, profile page details, and search history. This exports all interactions in structured CSV and HTML formats for personal backup.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Professional Archive Downloader. Open Settings & Privacy, select Data privacy, click on 'Get a copy of your data', choose the specific data buckets, and request the archive link.

### 49. LinkedIn Account Merging Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A portal that allows users to merge two duplicate LinkedIn accounts. This combines connections and deletes the duplicate account, preserving network integrity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Merger tool. Go to Settings & Privacy > Account preferences > Account management > Merge accounts, enter the login credentials of the duplicate account, and confirm.

### 50. LinkedIn Account Deactivation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Initiates a request to temporarily hibernate or permanently delete a LinkedIn account. Permanent deletion removes the profile, connections, and all postings from the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Closure Portal. Go to Settings & Privacy > Account preferences > Account management > Close account, select your reason for leaving, enter your password, and confirm the deletion.

---

### Platform: Mastodon

This document compiles the feature research for Mastodon, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Mastodon Content Warning
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to hide the text or media of their post behind a custom spoiler warning text label, requiring readers to click to reveal it.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Content Flags. In the post composer, click the "CW" button, type your warning label in the text box that appears, and write the main content below it.

### 2. Mastodon Character Count Limits
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Offers a default 500-character text post capacity, though individual federated instances can configure this limit higher or lower.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Post Editor. Open the compose window, enter your message, and check the counter in the bottom corner of the input box which counts down from 500.

### 3. Mastodon Media Formatting & Alt Text
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Attaches alternative text descriptions to photos, videos, and audio uploads to support accessibility tools.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Accessibility Metadata. After attaching a file using the paperclip icon in the composer, click "Describe for the visually impaired," write your explanation, and click "Apply."

### 4. Mastodon Custom Emojis
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Permits users to insert custom emojis uploaded and managed by the administrator of their specific home instance.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instance Custom Emojis. Click the smiley face icon in the post composer to open the emoji selector, and scroll down to your server's custom category to choose a unique graphic.

### 5. Mastodon Post Language Selector
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Tags posts with specific language identifiers to assist other users with translation tools and timeline filtering.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Metadata Tagging. Click the language abbreviation button (e.g. "EN") in the post composer toolbar, and select your written language from the list before posting.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Mastodon Federated Timeline
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays a real-time chronological stream of public posts from users across all external servers that are federated with your instance.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Fediverse Global Feed. Click the "Explore" tab or the "Federated" timeline link in the right-hand panel of the web interface.

### 7. Mastodon Local Timeline
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Shows a real-time chronological stream of public posts written only by users registered on your specific server.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Local Server Feed. Click the "Local" link in the right-hand navigation panel of the web interface to view your server's localized community posts.

### 8. Mastodon Hashtag Following
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Inserts posts containing specific hashtag topics directly into your main home timeline.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hashtag Feed Subscriptions. Search for a hashtag (e.g. `#atproto`) in the search bar, click on it to open its feed, and tap the follow icon (a person with a plus sign) in the header.

### 9. Mastodon Explore Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A curated discovery tab showcasing trending posts, popular hashtags, and recommended users on your server.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Trending Content Feed. Click the "Explore" tab in the main navigation list. Swipe through the tabs for "Posts," "Tags," "Links," and "Community."

### 10. Mastodon Server Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A searchable directory of federated servers that can be filtered by topic, language, and signup policies.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instance Discovery Portal. Access via `joinmastodon.org/servers` in a browser, and use the filter buttons to search for instances that fit your interest.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Mastodon Local Server Rules
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Outlines instance policies that users must agree to during signup and follow to avoid account suspension.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Community Guidelines. Viewable on the landing page of any instance (e.g., `server.domain/about`). Users must check the box agreeing to these rules during registration.

### 12. Mastodon Direct Reblogs
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Shares public posts directly to your followers' feeds, preserving the original author's federated identity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Amplification. Click the circular arrows icon (Boost) below a post. The post will be shared and show your boost action.

### 13. Mastodon Group Accounts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Automated community accounts that re-share any post mentioning their handle to all their followers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Mentions. Search for a group profile (e.g. `@group@domain.org`), follow it, and mention its handle in your posts to federate your content to the group's followers.

### 14. Mastodon Server Migration Tool
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Moves your profile, followers, blocks, and mutes from one server instance to another without losing your social graph.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Fediverse Profile Relocation. In settings on your old account, go to Account > Moving to a different account. Input the new account handle, then on the new account configure the alias link under Account > Moving from a different account.

### 15. Mastodon Custom Lists
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates custom timeline views of selected users to track their activity without cluttering your main feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Stream Groups. Click "Lists" in the navigation pane, tap "New List," name it, and add accounts using the search tool or from your following list.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Mastodon Private Mention Visibility
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Restricts post visibility to only people mentioned in the post, acting as a direct message within the federated network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Visibility Controls. Tap the globe or lock icon in the post composer to open the privacy menu, and select "Mentioned people only."

### 17. Mastodon DM Filtering
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Filters out private mention posts from users you do not follow into a separate review tab.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Inbox Filtering. Open Preferences > Notifications. Under the notifications filtering options, check "Filter private mentions from non-followings."

### 18. Mastodon DM Notification Alerts
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Configures distinct alert behaviors for posts set to "Mentioned people only" to distinguish them from public mentions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Message Alerts. Access Preferences > Notifications. Toggle the specific desktop notification or email alert checkboxes for "Private Mention."

### 19. Mastodon Direct Message History
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Compiles all posts with "Mentioned people only" visibility into a dedicated, scrollable Direct Messages interface.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Message Timeline. Click the "Direct Messages" or "Chats" link in the right-hand panel of the web interface to view private conversations.

### 20. Mastodon Chat Link Integrations
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to paste video conference or private chat links inside direct posts, formatting them as clickable badges.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Call Link Formatting. Paste a meeting URL (e.g. from Jitsi) inside a "Mentioned people only" post. The system parses and formats it as a secure call button.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Mastodon Admin Donation Pages
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays instance-wide crowdfunding links (like Patreon, Open Collective, or LiberaPay) on the server's landing page.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Funding Info. Viewable by visiting `server.domain/about`. Admins configure these links under Admin Settings > Site Settings > Funding.

### 22. Mastodon Creator Profile Tip Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Provides verified tip and donation link buttons on user profiles via structured metadata table fields.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Metadata Configuration. Open Preferences > Profile > Appearance. Add a label (e.g. "Patreon") and paste your payment URL into the metadata row fields.

### 23. Mastodon Verified Link Sponsorships
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Uses rel="me" link tags to verify ownership of external store links, displaying them in green on the user's profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: E-commerce Verification. Add a link to your store (e.g. Shopify site) in your profile metadata. Add the tag `rel="me"` to the link on your store page to trigger the green checkmark.

### 24. Mastodon Server Membership Fees
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows server administrators to gate registration behind required contributions or subscriptions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Gatekeepers. Configured by admins in Admin Settings > Registration. Select "Requires donation/subscription" and paste payment gateways for checkout.

### 25. Mastodon Commercial Affiliate Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Supports publishing affiliate product links with custom descriptions, making links easy to read without tracking parameters.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Affiliate Links. Paste the URL containing your affiliate tag in the composer. Mastodon parses the destination domain, removing raw tracker strings while maintaining your affiliate ID.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Mastodon Public Post Statistics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays total reblogs (boosts), favorites, and replies on individual posts across federated servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Engagement Counters. Tap or click on any individual post to open its detailed view, showing the counts next to the action icons.

### 27. Mastodon Server Stats API
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A public API endpoint that outputs general instance statistics including total users, active users, and post counts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Analytics Query. Developers fetch the JSON payload by making an HTTP GET request to `https://server.domain/api/v1/instance/activity` or `https://server.domain/api/v2/instance`.

### 28. Mastodon Column Layout
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An advanced web user interface featuring multiple scrollable columns for monitoring timelines, notifications, and custom lists simultaneously.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-column Workspace. Navigate to Preferences > Appearance, check "Enable advanced web interface," and save changes to transform your dashboard.

### 29. Mastodon Profile Metadata Fields
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows users to define up to 4 custom label-value metadata pairs to showcase links, pronouns, or professional details.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Metadata Manager. Access Preferences > Profile > Appearance. Under the table fields, enter a label (e.g. "Website") and a value (e.g. link or text).

### 30. Mastodon Domain Moderation Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An admin dashboard tracking incoming and outgoing federation traffic, blocked instances, and report volume.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Moderation Metrics. Access via Admin Settings > Moderation > Federation. Shows graphs of active domains, report resolution rates, and block history.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Mastodon Instance Domain Blocking
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Blocks communication with entire external server domains to prevent their users from interacting with your profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Server Domain Blocks. Go to Preferences > Moderation > Domain blocks. Click "Add block," enter the domain of the instance you wish to block, and select the block level.

### 32. Mastodon Automated Post Archiving
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically deletes or archives posts that are older than a user-specified duration.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Cleanup. Navigate to Preferences > Automated post deletion. Toggle the option on, select the age threshold (e.g. one month), and save settings.

### 33. Mastodon Opt-Out of Search Indexing
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requests search engines and internal search utilities not to index the user's posts or profile details.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Search Visibility Toggle. Go to Preferences > Profile > Appearance. Uncheck "Opt-out of search engine indexing" or check "Require approval for search" to adjust settings.

### 34. Mastodon Profile Approval Requirement
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires manual approval of all follower requests before they can view your posts and timeline.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Account Toggle. Go to Preferences > Profile > Appearance. Check the box "Require follow requests" and click save to lock down your account.

### 35. Mastodon Report Fediverse Propagation
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Forwards a moderation report to the administrators of the user's remote home server for evaluation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Cross-server Reporting. Click the three-dot menu on a post or profile, select "Report," select the category, and toggle the switch for "Forward report to remote administrator."

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Mastodon Notification Types Filter
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Filters your notifications feed by category to focus on specific interactions like mentions or boosts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Notification Feed Filters. Open the Notifications tab in the dashboard, and select filter buttons at the top (e.g. "Mentions" or "Polls") to refine the display list.

### 37. Mastodon Push Notification Subscriptions
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Uses the Web Push API to send push notifications to mobile or desktop browsers when you are offline.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Offline Alert Subscriptions. Navigate to Preferences > Notifications > Push notifications, authorize browser permissions, and select event triggers.

### 38. Mastodon Mute and Block Timers
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily silences notifications or posts from specific users for a set duration before expiring.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mute Scheduling. Click the three-dot menu on a user's profile, select "Mute," choose the duration (e.g. 1 hour, 1 day, 1 week, or Indefinite), and click confirm.

### 39. Mastodon Notification Sounds
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Plays customizable audio cues when new notifications are received in the web dashboard.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Auditory Notifications. Navigate to Preferences > Appearance, scroll down to the notification sounds checkboxes, and check "Play sound for new notifications."

### 40. Mastodon Filter Rules
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Creates rules to hide posts containing specific keywords from notifications, home feeds, and explore views.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Keyword Filtering. Navigate to Preferences > Filters, click "Add new filter," enter the keywords, choose where to apply the filter (e.g. Home feed), and set an optional expiry date.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Mastodon REST API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Standardized REST API matching the Mastodon schema for managing accounts, posts, timelines, and relationships.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: REST API Queries. Developers call HTTPS endpoints (e.g., `GET https://server.domain/api/v1/timelines/home`) with Bearer tokens to build clients.

### 42. Mastodon Streaming API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A WebSockets-based API that streams real-time updates and notification events to external clients.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Websocket Streaming connection. Open a connection to websocket URL `wss://server.domain/api/v1/streaming` and subscribe to streams (e.g. `user` or `public`).

### 43. Mastodon ActivityPub Protocol Endpoints
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Core decentralized ActivityPub endpoints used to deliver and retrieve posts, likes, and follows across servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Inbox Delivery. Developers target user inbox endpoints (e.g., `POST https://server.domain/users/username/inbox`) with signed HTTPS payloads.

### 44. Mastodon Webhook Subscriptions
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Server-level webhook triggers that send JSON payloads to developer servers on events like status updates or reports.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time System Webhooks. Set up under Admin Settings > Webhooks. Developers input target URLs, secret keys, and subscribe to events like `status.created` or `report.created`.

### 45. Mastodon App Registration Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: API endpoint used by developers to register new client applications and retrieve OAuth credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: OAuth App Creation. Make an HTTP POST request to `/api/v1/apps` with body parameters `client_name`, `redirect_uris`, and `scopes` to receive a client ID and secret.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Mastodon Two-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures your login credentials by requiring a TOTP security code from an authenticator app.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Login Protection. Go to Preferences > Account > Two-factor authentication, click "Enable," scan the QR code with your authenticator app, and enter a generated code to confirm.

### 47. Mastodon Account Alias Migration
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Sets up a redirect alias from an old account to a new one, displaying a redirect banner to followers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Handover. Go to Preferences > Account > Account settings. Scroll to "Move to a different account," enter your new account's full handle, and submit.

### 48. Mastodon Profile Metadata Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Verifies ownership of personal websites by searching for rel="me" backlink tags on target pages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Identity Verification. Paste your personal site link into a profile metadata field, and add the attribute `rel="me"` to the link on your site to trigger the verification.

### 49. Mastodon Authorized Applications
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays all third-party applications that have been granted access to your account details.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: App Access Auditing. Go to Preferences > Authorized applications. Click the "Revoke" button next to any app to revoke its access tokens.

### 50. Mastodon Archive Export
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates and downloads a ZIP archive containing all account information, posts, and media in an ActivityPub-compliant format.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Backup Data Export. Go to Preferences > Import and export > Data export. Click "Request backup" and download the generated ZIP archive once compiled.

---

### Platform: Meetup

This document compiles the feature research for Meetup, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Meetup Event Scheduler
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows group organizers to create and schedule physical or virtual events, specifying the date, time, location, and event details.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Creation. Accessed by navigating to the group page, clicking "Create Event," entering the event title, date, time, selecting physical address or Zoom/virtual link, and saving.

### 2. Recurring Event Template
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Permits organizers to configure repeat schedules for events that happen on a regular basis (e.g., weekly or monthly) without recreating them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Scheduled Reoccurrence. Within the event scheduler, toggle the "Repeat this event" option, select the frequency (e.g., "Every 2 weeks"), and specify the end date.

### 3. Draft Event Save
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables organizers to save an in-progress event configuration as a draft, allowing them to resume editing and publish later.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Work-in-Progress Storage. In the event creation wizard, click "Save as draft" in the footer menu to save parameters and exit. The draft is retrievable from the "Drafts" tab on the organizer's group dashboard.

### 4. Event Custom Image Crop & Upload
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows organizers to upload custom banner images for events and crop them to fit the standard Meetup display dimensions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Formatting. During event setup, click "Add event photo," select a JPG or PNG file from local storage, drag the crop boundaries to select the visible area, and click "Save."

### 5. Group About Page Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A rich text editor for describing the Meetup group's purpose, rules, history, and target member demographic.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Page Personalization. Navigate to Group Settings > Group profile > About section, and use the formatting toolbar to input text, bold headings, list bullet points, and insert hyperlinks.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Map-Based Event Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays upcoming local Meetup events on an interactive map, allowing users to discover communities by physical proximity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Geographic Exploration. From the search homepage, toggle the "Map view" icon, adjust the map zoom level, and click on individual event pin-drops to view pop-up details and RSVP options.

### 7. Interest-Based Personalization Engine
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Recommends groups and events based on interests selected by the user during onboarding or updated in their profile settings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Recommendations. During account creation or via Settings > Interests, select topics (e.g., "Outdoors," "Board Games"). The homepage feed will automatically prioritize groups matching these tags.

### 8. Calendar Integration & Feed Export
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Generates a personalized calendar feed URL containing the user's upcoming Meetups, compatible with external calendars like Google Calendar or Apple Calendar.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Calendar Syncing. Navigate to Profile Settings > Connections, click "Export Calendar Feed," copy the generated iCal link, and paste it into the "Add calendar by URL" field in your external calendar app.

### 9. Keyword Search with Radius Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to input search terms and filter results by distance radius from a specific zip code or city.
