- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Distance Filtering. Type a query (e.g., "React Development") into the search bar, click "Filters," select the distance dropdown (ranging from 2 miles to 100 miles), and click "Apply."

### 10. Find a Group/Event Category Browser
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A structured directory classifying Meetup groups into specific top-level categories (e.g., Tech, Writing, Fitness) for guided browsing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Category Navigation. Click the "Explore" button on the main navigation bar, select a category card, and browse the curated list of groups and events sorted by relevance and popularity.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Event RSVP List
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays the names and profiles of members who have RSVP'd to an event, including waitlist status and guests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Attendance Transparency. Open any event page, scroll to the "Attendees" section, and click "See all" to view the list of confirmed attendees, guests count, and waitlisted members.

### 12. Meetup Group Discussions & Comments
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Threaded message boards on group and event pages that allow members to post questions, share resources, and interact before and after events.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Boards. Go to the group's home page, select the "Discussions" tab, type a comment in the text field, and tap "Post." Users can reply directly to specific posts to start threads.

### 13. Organizer Roles & Permissions Delegation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables the primary group organizer to assign co-organizer, assistant organizer, or event host roles to trusted members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Leadership Delegation. Go to Group Settings > Members, search for a member's name, click the three-dot menu next to their profile, select "Change role," choose the new role, and save.

### 14. Event Attendance Tracker
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Provides organizers with a tool to mark members as present, absent, or no-shows during or after an event.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Roll Call Tool. Open the event page in the organizer app, select "Manage attendees," toggle the checkmarks next to each attendee's name to record their physical presence, and click "Submit."

### 15. Group Photo Album Contributions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows members and organizers to upload photos taken during Meetup events to a shared, group-specific photo album.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Visual Archives. Navigate to a past event page, scroll to the photos section, click "Upload photo," select images from the device gallery, and confirm upload to make them visible to all group members.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Contact Organizer Tool
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Provides a direct messaging link on the group homepage, allowing prospective or current members to ask organizers private questions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Leader Contact. Click the "Contact Organizer" button located on the sidebar of the group's homepage, type a message in the text window, and click "Send message."

### 17. Group-Wide Organizer Announcements
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows organizers to broadcast emails and push notifications containing important updates to all registered group members simultaneously.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Broadcast Messaging. Go to Organizer Tools > Email members, write the message subject and body, check "Send to all members," and click "Send announcement."

### 18. Direct Message Chat Rooms
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Private, one-on-one text-based chat rooms that allow members to converse directly and build individual connections.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Messaging. Tap the speech bubble icon in the header, click "New Chat," search for a member's name, type a message in the chat box, and press enter.

### 19. Event Discussion Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A dedicated chat room specific to a single event that automatically includes all members who have RSVP'd.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event-Specific Communication. Open an upcoming event page, click "Join Event Chat," and send text messages or coordinate logistics with other attendees.

### 20. Member Profile Message Block
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to restrict who can initiate direct message conversations with them to prevent spam or unwanted outreach.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Privacy. Navigate to Settings > Privacy, scroll to the "Direct Messages" section, select "Only members of my groups" or "Nobody," and save changes.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Ticketed Events (Event Fee Collections)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables organizers to charge a fee to attend specific events, requiring payment during the RSVP process.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Ticketing. When creating an event, toggle "Charge a fee" to active, enter the price, select the accepted payment method, choose a refund policy, and save.

### 22. Group Member Dues
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows organizers to require members to pay a recurring subscription fee (monthly or annually) to maintain active membership in the group.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Recurring Subscriptions. Navigate to Group Settings > Member dues, click "Set up dues," enter the price and billing frequency, specify a trial period if desired, and link a Stripe account.

### 23. Sponsorship Banner Placements
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables organizers to feature local businesses or sponsors on their group's homepage and event pages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sponsored Placements. Go to Group Settings > Sponsors, click "Add sponsor," enter the sponsor's name, upload their logo banner, paste their website URL, and save.

### 24. Stripe Integration for Organizers
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Connects an organizer's Meetup account with Stripe to process event fees and membership dues securely, depositing funds directly into their bank account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Payment Processing Gateway. Go to Payment Settings, click "Connect with Stripe," enter your business or personal details on the Stripe authorization screen, and return to Meetup.

### 25. Organizer Subscription Billing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Meetup's native billing system that charges organizers a monthly or semi-annual subscription fee to host groups on the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Platform Hosting Subscriptions. Go to Settings > Subscription, select the preferred hosting plan (e.g., standard or pro), enter credit card details, and click "Activate."

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Group Growth Analytics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays charts tracking total member counts, growth rates, and page view metrics over selectable time periods.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Growth Tracking. Navigate to Organizer tools > Analytics to view visual charts illustrating cumulative member growth, new joins, and page visits.

### 27. RSVP Conversion Metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks the ratio of unique page views to confirmed RSVPs for individual events, helping organizers evaluate their event marketing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Performance Analytics. Open Event Tools > Traffic, and analyze the metrics displaying total page impressions alongside total click-through RSVPs.

### 28. Member Survey Tool
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows organizers to publish simple polls to members to gather feedback on event locations, times, or topics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Member Polling. Under the group's Discussion page, click "Create Poll," enter a question, add up to 5 response options, select the duration, and click "Post."

### 29. Attendance History Reports
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Generates and downloads historical records of event attendance, including member details and no-show statuses, as a CSV file.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Exporting. Navigate to Organizer tools > Reports > Attendance, select the date range of past events, and click "Download CSV."

### 30. Group Promo Codes
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Permits organizers to create discount or promotional code strings that members can apply to bypass or reduce ticketed event fees.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Discount Codes. Go to Event settings > Pricing > Promo Codes, click "Add Code," enter the code string, select the discount percentage or fixed amount, and click "Save."

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Private Group Settings
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts visibility of the group's event details, location pins, and member list to approved group members only.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Privacy Configuration. Go to Group settings > Privacy settings, and select "Private group" to hide details from public web searches and non-members.

### 32. Member Approval Queue
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires new members to answer onboarding questions and obtain organizer approval before gaining access to a private group.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Membership Gatekeeping. Under Group Settings, enable "Approval required," click "Set questions," write up to three custom entry questions, and review applicant answers in the pending queue.

### 33. Report Member/Group Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to flag individual profiles, event pages, or entire groups that violate Meetup's community guidelines or terms of service.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Abuse Reporting. Tap the flag or three-dot icon on any profile, event description, or group page, select the violation reason (e.g., spam, safety concerns), and click "Submit report."

### 34. Block Member Action
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents a blocked user from sending direct messages to you, viewing your profile, or joining any group where you are the primary organizer.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Member Blocking. Open the target user's profile, click the three-dot menu, select "Block member," and click "Confirm."

### 35. Event Host Moderation Tools
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Gives designated event hosts the authority to remove members from an event RSVP list or ban them from the group during or after an event.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RSVP Moderation. Navigate to the event's attendee list, find the disruptive member, click the three dots next to their name, and select "Remove RSVP" or "Ban from group."

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Meetup REST API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer API that provides RESTful endpoints to query public groups, events, locations, and member counts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: API Data Retrieval. Access `api.meetup.com`, authenticate with developer API keys or OAuth, and make HTTP requests to fetch event JSON data.

### 37. OAuth 2.0 Identity Login
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Secure federated login API allowing third-party sites to authenticate users using their Meetup credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: User Authentication API. Register an application in the Meetup developer dashboard to receive a client ID and secret, configuring redirect URIs for secure user login.

### 38. Zoom Virtual Event Link Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Zoom to automatically generate and assign virtual meeting links when organizers schedule an online event.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Conference Linking. When scheduling an online event, select "Zoom" as the host method, sign in to link your Zoom account, and the meeting URL will populate automatically.

### 39. WordPress Event Plugin Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Supports embedding Meetup group details and upcoming event calendars on external WordPress websites via shortcodes or widgets.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Web Widgets. Install the official Meetup block or widget plugin in WordPress, input your Meetup group URL, and publish to display live event schedules.

### 40. Zapier Automation Connectors
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Zapier to trigger automated actions (such as adding RSVPs to Google Sheets) when a user interacts with a Meetup group.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Integrations. Create a Zap, choose Meetup as the trigger app, select the event (e.g., "New RSVP"), link your Google Sheets account as the action, and map the fields.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. New Event Push Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends immediate push notifications to a user's mobile device when a group they belong to publishes a new event.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Push Notifications. Go to Account Settings > Notifications, select the mobile push channel, and toggle the switch for "New event in joined groups" to active.

### 42. RSVP Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatic email notifications sent to members 24 to 48 hours before an event, prompting them to confirm or update their RSVP status.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Reminders. System-generated emails are sent automatically based on event settings. Users can toggle "Upcoming event alerts" under Email Preferences.

### 43. Event Schedule Conflict Detector
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Evaluates a user's calendar when they RSVP to an event and warns them if they have already committed to another Meetup at the same time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Overlap Warning. If a time conflict exists when clicking "Attend," the platform displays an alert stating "You already have an event scheduled at this time. RSVP anyway?"

### 44. Quiet Hours / Snooze Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily mute all push notification alerts from Meetup for a set period.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alarm Muting. Navigate to App Settings > Notifications > Mute notifications, and select a snooze duration (e.g., "1 Hour," "8 Hours," or "Until tomorrow").

### 45. Weekly Group Digests
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends a compiled email summarizing the upcoming week's events for all groups the user has joined.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Digests. Go to Settings > Email Preferences, scroll to "Weekly digest of local events," and toggle the switch on.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Social Login Link (Google, Apple, Facebook)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to link their Google, Apple, or Facebook accounts for secure, one-click login access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Identity. Go to Account Settings > Linked Accounts, click the "Connect" button next to Google, Apple, or Facebook, and authorize.

### 47. Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Adds a layer of security by requiring a code from an authenticator app in addition to a password when logging in.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Security Hardening. Navigate to Account Settings > Security, toggle the "Two-factor authentication" switch, scan the QR code with your authenticator app, and enter the 6-digit confirmation code.

### 48. Location Radius Customization
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to set their primary city location and define the geographic search radius used to discover local events.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Location Targeting. Go to Profile Settings > Location, enter a city or zip code, select a radius slider value (from 5 miles to 100 miles), and click "Save."

### 49. GDPR Data Archive Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Provides users with a downloadable file containing all of their personal data, group memberships, and messages stored on the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Privacy Downloads. Go to Settings > Privacy, click "Request data download," and wait for an email containing a link to download the ZIP data archive.

### 50. Account Deactivation & Deletion
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Self-service options for users to temporarily disable their profile or permanently delete their account and associated data.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Termination. Go to Account Settings, scroll to the bottom, click "Deactivate account" or "Request account deletion," enter your password to confirm, and click "Submit."

---

### Platform: Publer

This document compiles the feature research for Publer, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Multi-Platform Post Composer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to draft, format, and customize a single post layout to be shared simultaneously across multiple connected social media networks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Omnichannel Composer. Open the post composition window, select the target social channels (e.g., Facebook, LinkedIn, X), type your copy, and click the network tabs to customize details for each.

### 2. AI Assist Content Generator
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Integrates with artificial intelligence to automatically generate post captions, rewrite copy, or recommend hashtags based on user prompts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: AI Text Generator. Click the AI Assist button within the composer, input a prompt (e.g., "Write a marketing pitch for new shoes"), choose tone options, and insert the generated text.

### 3. Built-in Image & Video Editor (Canva & VistaCreate Integration)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Integrates Canva and VistaCreate within the Publer editor, allowing users to design and modify visual media without leaving the app.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Visual Media Editor. Tap the image upload icon in the post composer, click "Design on Canva" or "Design on VistaCreate," create or edit graphics in the overlay browser, and save the file directly to the post draft.

### 4. Auto-Scheduling & Queue System
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically queues posts into the next available preset time slot for each social media account, ensuring consistent publishing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Scheduled Queues. Go to Posting Schedule to set default weekly timeslots. When drafting a post, click "Auto-Schedule" to assign the post to the next empty time slot.

### 5. Bulk Media Uploader & Scheduler
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows uploading up to 500 images, videos, or GIFs at once, automatically creating separate scheduled posts for each file.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bulk Scheduling. Click the bulk scheduler tab, drag and drop files from local storage, write a default caption template, set the interval between posts (e.g., "1 day apart"), and click schedule.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Visual Calendar Planner
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays all scheduled, draft, and published posts in an interactive calendar format supporting drag-and-drop rescheduling.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Calendars. Click the "Calendar" tab, view posts by month, week, or day, and drag individual post cards to different dates or times to reschedule.

### 7. Social Media Feed Search (Inbox)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Searches through brand mentions, comments, and direct message contents across connected social channels in a single search console.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Search Filters. Open the Unified Inbox, type keywords into the search bar, and filter by platform, message type, or read status.

### 8. RSS Feed Automation Parser
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Automatically imports content from external blog RSS feeds and schedules updates whenever a new article is published.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RSS Content Sync. Go to RSS Feeds, click "Add RSS feed," paste the XML link, set your post templates with title and link tags, and save to configure auto-posting.

### 9. Content Library Search & Tag Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to save media assets and templates in a library, using keyword searches and tag filters to locate them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Asset Repositories. Open the Media Library tab, click "Tags" to filter resources by labels (e.g., `#summercampaign`), or search filenames using the search bar.

### 10. Hashtag Generator & Suggestion Engine
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Recommends popular or trending hashtags based on the caption text entered in the post composer.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Keyword Tagging. Type a post caption, click the hashtag wand icon in the footer toolbar, and select from the suggested tags list to append them to your post.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Unified Social Inbox
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Consolidates comments, direct messages, and brand reviews from multiple social channels into a single inbox, allowing users to reply directly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Management. Navigate to the Inbox tab, select an unread customer comment, write a response in the text pane, and click "Send reply."

### 12. Comment Auto-Responder (Auto-Comment on Post)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows scheduling a follow-up comment to post automatically alongside the main post, useful for sharing links.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Auto-Comments. In the post composer, expand the "Follow-up comment" section, input text or links, and the system will publish this comment as soon as the main post goes live.

### 13. Auto-Follow / Auto-Like Rules
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Automatically engages with target profiles or hashtags based on user-defined interaction rules to grow accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Growth Automation. Navigate to Automation Settings, write rules (e.g., "Like posts containing tag #webdev"), set daily action limits, and save.

### 14. Customer Sentiment Tagging
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Uses natural language processing to tag incoming inbox messages as positive, negative, or neutral.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Customer Sentiment Analysis. Within the Inbox, view the automated colored sentiment tag next to messages, and sort queries by sentiment to prioritize critical feedback.

### 15. Link in Bio (Linkin.bio Page Creator)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A customizable landing page generator that links social posts to specific product or webpage URLs.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Landing Page Management. Open the Link in Bio tab, select your theme layout, add buttons and custom links, and copy the generated link to place in your Instagram or TikTok profile bios.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Direct Message Inbox Manager
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Receives, tracks, and manages private direct messages from platforms like Facebook Pages and Instagram Business profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inbox Direct Messaging. Navigate to the Inbox tab, filter by "Direct Messages," select a conversation thread, write your reply, and send.

### 17. Canned Responses Shortcut
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Stores text templates for frequently asked questions, allowing users to insert them into chat windows with shortcuts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Quick Replies. Go to Inbox Settings > Canned Responses, save templates with keyword shortcut triggers, and click the template icon in chats to paste.

### 18. Message Assigner / Internal Delegation
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Assigns customer direct messages or comment threads to specific team members in the workspace.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Teammate Assignment. In the Unified Inbox, select a message thread, click the "Assign to" dropdown in the top header, select a teammate, and write internal notes.

### 19. Real-Time DM Alerts
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends desktop browser notifications or in-app pings as soon as a new direct message is received on any connected channel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instant Desktop Notifications. Go to Settings > Notifications, and toggle on "Browser alerts for incoming DMs" to enable real-time message popups.

### 20. Internal Team Chat Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows team members to leave private notes and comments inside customer message threads, invisible to the customer.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Notes. Under a client's message bubble in the Inbox, toggle "Internal Note," type your comment, and click save to display it to colleagues.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Shopify & WooCommerce Product Linker
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Connects with online stores to tag products directly in social posts, facilitating social selling.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Product Catalog Sync. Go to Settings > Integrations, link your Shopify or WooCommerce store, and click the product tag icon in the post composer to select items from your catalog.

### 22. Publer Affiliate Program Partner
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Provides users with referral links and displays a metrics dashboard tracking sign-ups, clicks, and affiliate payouts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Referral Programs. Access the Affiliate Program page from the dashboard sidebar, copy your unique referral URL, and check the payout transaction log.

### 23. Custom Brand Watermarking
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Automatically overlays a logo file as a watermark on scheduled image or video posts to protect intellectual property.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Watermarks. Go to Settings > Watermarks, upload your PNG logo, set its opacity, size, and corner placement, and save to auto-apply it.

### 24. Client Billing Management
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Provides agency owners with tools to configure workspace plans and invoice clients for managing their social accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Client Portals. Access Workspace Settings > Client Invoicing, configure pricing plans, add credit cards, and manage client bills.

### 25. Paid Ad Boost Scheduler
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Schedules Facebook and Instagram ad boosting budgets directly from the scheduling dashboard.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Social Ad Boosting. When scheduling a post, check "Boost Post," select your Meta Ad Account, set budget limits, input targeting details, and save.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Comprehensive Performance Analytics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays charts tracking reach, link clicks, impressions, and engagement metrics over custom date ranges.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Analytics. Open the Analytics tab, select the date range from the date picker, choose the social network tab, and view performance charts.

### 27. Automated PDF Report Generator
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Generates and emails PDF reports of social media performance to client or team email addresses on weekly or monthly schedules.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Scheduled Reporting. In the Analytics tab, click "Export," select "PDF Report," configure the scheduled send frequency (e.g., "Monthly"), enter recipient email addresses, and save.

### 28. Best Time to Post Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Analyzes historical audience engagement to calculate and recommend the most effective hours to post on each platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Time Heatmaps. Go to Analytics > Best Times, review the weekly heatmap showing high-engagement slots, and click "Apply to Schedule" to update your queue settings.

### 29. Individual Post Performance Tracker
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks detailed engagement metrics for specific published posts, listing likes, comments, retweets, and clicks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Auditing. Go to Posts > History, click the "Analytics" button under any published post card, and view the metrics popup.

### 30. Competitor Performance Tracker
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Benchmarks engagement levels and posting frequencies of competitor accounts alongside your own.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Competitor Benchmarking. In the Analytics tab, click "Competitors," click "Add Competitor Page," input the public profile URL, and compare metrics.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Workspace Access Roles & Permissions
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts workspace tool and social account access by assigning roles (Owner, Admin, Editor, Client) with custom permissions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Workspace Security. Go to Workspace Settings > Members, click "Invite Member," enter their email, select their role, and configure permissions.

### 32. Post Approval Workflow
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires posts created by junior members to be reviewed and approved by managers before they are scheduled.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Editorial Gatekeeping. Set a team member's role to "Requires Approval." When they draft a post and click "Submit," it is placed in the "Pending Approval" queue.

### 33. Secure API Key Encryption
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Encrypts and stores connected social platform OAuth tokens securely, hiding raw account passwords from the interface.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Token Security. When adding social accounts, Publer uses the official API OAuth authentication screens. The resulting access tokens are encrypted using security protocols.

### 34. Auditing Logs (Activity History)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Tracks and logs all actions performed in a workspace, noting who created, modified, approved, or deleted posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Activity History. Navigate to Settings > Activity Log, and browse the chronological list of workspace events filterable by user and date.

### 35. Client Access Sandbox Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Provides clients with a viewing dashboard where they can approve or request changes to posts without editing capabilities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Client Portals. Invite a client using the "Client" or "Viewer" role settings, allowing them to click "Approve" or leave comments on draft posts.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Publer REST API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer API providing RESTful endpoints to manage workspaces, upload media, schedule posts, and fetch analytics programmatically.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Developer API endpoints. Access the developer console, generate a client access token, and make authenticated HTTPS requests to `/v1/posts` endpoints.

### 37. Browser Extension Scheduler
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A browser extension for Chrome, Firefox, and Safari that allows scheduling text, links, or images from any webpage.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Web Extensions. Install the Publer extension, hover over any web image, click the Publer icon, and schedule it in the pop-up window.

### 38. Bitly & Custom URL Shorteners Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates link shortening tools to automatically compress post links and track click-through numbers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: URL Shortening. Go to Settings > Link Shortener, select your preferred shortener (e.g., Bitly, Rebrandly), enter your API key to authenticate, and toggle auto-shorten.

### 39. Google Drive / Dropbox Import Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects cloud storage accounts, allowing users to import photos, videos, and media directly into the Publer library.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Cloud Media Import. Inside the composer or media library, click "Import from Cloud," select Google Drive or Dropbox, log in to authorize, and select files.

### 40. Mastodon & Fediverse API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with decentralized Fediverse platform APIs to schedule posts to Mastodon servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Fediverse Integration. Click "Add Account," select Mastodon, enter your server instance URL, log in to authorize the app, and schedule posts.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. Failed Post Email & Push Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends immediate email or push alerts to workspace owners when a scheduled post fails to publish.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Error Alerts. The system monitors API publishing statuses and sends alerts (e.g., "Post failed on Facebook due to expired token") with troubleshooting links.

### 42. Weekly Workspace Digest
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Compiles weekly summaries of scheduled posts, upcoming events, inbox metrics, and audience growth into an email.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Notification Summaries. Go to Account Settings > Notifications, and toggle on "Weekly workspace summary email."

### 43. Slack/Discord Channel Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends post status updates and approval requests directly to team Slack or Discord channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Integrations. Connect your Slack or Discord workspace via the Integrations menu, and configure notifications for events like "Post approved" or "Post failed."

### 44. Snooze Approval Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily mutes pending post approval push notifications and emails.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Reminder Snoozing. Go to Notification Settings, select "Snooze approval alerts," choose a snooze duration, and confirm to mute pings.

### 45. Holiday Calendar Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Integrates a holiday calendar displaying international dates alongside ready-made content templates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Planners. Toggle "Show Holiday Calendar" in the main scheduling calendar view, click on highlighted holiday squares, and click "Use Template" to create a themed post.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Single Sign-On (SSO) with Google/Facebook
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Integrates federated authentication platforms to allow secure, one-click access using Google or Facebook credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Identity login. On the login screen, click "Log in with Google" or "Log in with Facebook" and complete authorization.

### 47. Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA/2FA)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures login by requiring an authentication code from an authenticator app alongside the password.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: MFA Setup. Go to Account Security, toggle "Two-Factor Authentication" to active, scan the QR code with your authenticator app, and enter the verification code.

### 48. Account Deletion & Data Purge
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Self-service portal that permanently deletes the user account, workspace data, and all connected social tokens.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Wiping. Go to Settings > Account settings, scroll to the bottom, click "Delete Account," type your password, and click the confirmation button.

### 49. Workspace Migration Tool
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows transferring social channels and historical post records from one workspace to another.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Migration. Navigate to Workspace Settings > Workspaces, select the social accounts to move, click "Transfer," select the destination workspace, and save.

### 50. Invoice billing history & Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Provides access to view and download PDF invoices for all past subscription transactions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Billing Records. Go to Settings > Billing, scroll down to the "Billing History" table, and click "Download PDF" next to any invoice row.

---

### Platform: Reddit

This document compiles the feature research for Reddit, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Reddit Rich Text Post Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A multi-format composer that supports markdown formatting, lists, tables, and inline media. It allows users to write comprehensive text posts and add headings or blockquotes before submitting them to subreddits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Post Editor. Click the "Create Post" button at the top of the feed or inside a subreddit, write your text, and use the formatting toolbar to design your post.

### 2. Reddit Poll Creation
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: An interactive post format that allows users to create multiple-choice questions within a community. Users can specify up to six voting options and set a custom poll duration ranging from 1 to 7 days.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Interactive Polls. Open the post composer, select the "Poll" tab, enter your question, fill in the voting choices, set the poll duration, and post it.

### 3. Reddit Image & Video Uploads
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A native media uploader that supports hosting photos, photo galleries, and video files directly on Reddit's servers. Creators can add captions and custom alt-text descriptions to images for accessibility before publishing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Native Media Uploader. Select the "Images & Video" tab in the post composer, click upload to import media files from your device, add captions if desired, and select your target subreddit to submit.

### 4. Reddit Post Flairs
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Customizable text or emoji tags added to posts to categorize content within a specific subreddit. Post flairs help organize discussions and allow users to filter the subreddit feed by topic tags.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Tags. Before publishing your post in the composer, click the "Add Flair" button, select from the subreddit's list of pre-configured flairs, and click apply.

### 5. Reddit Spoiler and NSFW Tags
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Privacy tags that blur post images and videos to prevent users from seeing sensitive or spoiler content by default. Users must click on the blurred post to reveal the hidden media.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Visibility Toggles. In the post composer window, click the "Spoiler" or "NSFW" (Not Safe For Work) buttons at the bottom toolbar to apply the blurring tags before submitting.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Reddit Search Bar & Advanced Operators
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search engine that scans subreddits, posts, comments, and user profiles across the platform. Users can filter queries using advanced parameters such as `author:username`, `site:domain.com`, or `subreddit:name` to pinpoint information.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Search Operator Filters. Click on the search bar at the top of the page, enter your search term alongside advanced operators (e.g., `author:spez`), and press enter to display filtered results.

### 7. Reddit Custom Feeds
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A feed aggregation tool that allows users to group multiple subreddits into a single, custom feed. This lets users organize their home page by topic, such as creating a feed for tech news and another for hobbies.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Feed Customizer. Navigate to a subreddit you want to group, tap the three-dot menu in the top right, select "Add to Custom Feed," and create or select a feed list.

### 8. Reddit Home Feed Sort Options
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Modifies the sorting algorithm of the user's home or subreddit feeds to prioritize different posts. Sorting options include Best, Hot, New, Top, and Rising, which arrange posts based on vote counts, age, and activity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Sort Dropdown. Open the homepage or any subreddit, click the sort dropdown menu located below the banner, and select your preferred sorting order (e.g., "New" for chronological updates).

### 9. Reddit Subreddit Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A categorized explorer that showcases popular and trending subreddits grouped by interest categories like gaming, sports, or technology. This directory helps users discover new communities that align with their personal interests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Topic Browser. Click the navigation menu button on the left side of the screen, scroll to the "Explore" or "Popular" section, and browse subreddits by interest categories.

### 10. Reddit Saved Posts & Comments
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A private bookmarking system that allows users to save posts and comments to a dedicated list. This list is synced across all devices, enabling users to retrieve important information easily.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Personal Bookmark List. Click the bookmark ribbon icon at the bottom of any post, or select "Save" from the three-dot menu next to a comment, then access them via your profile's "Saved" tab.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Reddit Upvote/Downvote System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A democratic voting system that determines the visibility and ranking of posts and comments. Upvotes increase visibility and push content to the top, while downvotes lower content and hide low-quality posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Content Evaluation. Tap the upward arrow icon next to a post or comment to upvote it, or click the downward arrow to downvote it.

### 12. Reddit Subreddit Creation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows any account that meets basic age and karma requirements to establish a new subreddit. Creators define the community name, rules, topic tags, and assume the initial moderator role.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Setup Wizard. Open the left sidebar menu, click "Create a Community," enter a unique name, select your privacy setting (Public, Restricted, or Private), and click "Create."

### 13. Reddit Community Karma
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A numerical score displayed on profiles that represents the user's contributions to the platform. It is calculated based on upvotes received on posts and comments, serving as a measure of digital reputation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Reputational Score Tracking. Earn karma by posting engaging content or helpful comments that receive upvotes from other community members. The total score is viewable on your profile card.

### 14. Reddit User Flairs
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Customizable text or image labels that appear next to a user's name when posting in a specific subreddit. Subreddit moderators define these flairs to indicate roles, expertise, or community jokes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Username Labels. Open the subreddit homepage, click the three-dot menu next to the search bar (mobile) or check the "User Flair Preview" section on the right sidebar (desktop), and select a flair.

### 15. Reddit Mod Queue & Tools
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A moderation dashboard that displays reported posts, comments, and spam alerts within a subreddit. Subreddit moderators use this hub to approve, remove, or lock content that violates community guidelines.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Moderation Queue Hub. Open a subreddit you moderate, click the "Mod Tools" button in the sidebar or banner, and select "Queue" or "Reported" to view and resolve flags.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Reddit Direct Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A traditional, private messaging system that allows users to send text messages directly to other individual accounts. These messages support basic text formatting and markdown links.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Peer-to-Peer Messages. Visit another user's profile page, tap the "Chat" button, or select the three-dot menu and click "Send Message" to start a private conversation thread.

### 17. Reddit Group Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Private, real-time messaging rooms that support communication among multiple Reddit users. Users can invite friends to chat rooms, share posts, and exchange messages instantly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-User Direct Chat. Open the Chat tab in the app, tap the "+" icon at the top of the panel, select multiple users from your contact history, and start a group thread.

### 18. Reddit Chat Channels
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Public, real-time chat rooms hosted within specific subreddits for community discussions. These channels allow members to chat casually about trending topics without creating post threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Chat Hub. Navigate to a subreddit that has chat channels enabled, tap the "Chat" tab at the top of the community page, and select a channel to join the discussion.

### 19. Reddit Whitelist Messaging Settings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A safety setting that controls who can initiate chat requests or send direct messages to your account. Users can choose to receive messages from everyone, accounts older than 30 days, or block all incoming requests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Privacy Controls. Open Settings > Account Settings, scroll to the "Chat and Messaging" section, and adjust the dropdown menus to restrict incoming messages.

### 20. Reddit Emoji Reactions in Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to react to specific chat bubbles inside direct messages and group chats using custom emojis. This helps users quickly respond to messages without sending text replies.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Chat Reactions. Open an active chat thread, press and hold on a message bubble, and select an emoji from the pop-up reaction tray.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Reddit Gold System
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A purchasing system that allows users to buy virtual gold to award to high-quality posts and comments. Awarding gold highlights the content, showing appreciation for helpful contributions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Gifting System. Tap the "Award" or "Gold" button located below a post or comment, select a gold package, and complete the in-app purchase to award the content.

### 22. Reddit Contributor Program
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monetization program that allows eligible creators to earn real money payouts based on the gold and karma they receive. Creators must meet verification requirements and maintain active engagement to withdraw funds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Cashout Portal. Open the user menu, tap "Contributor Program," complete the identity verification process, link your bank account, and track your payout eligibility.

### 23. Reddit Collectible Avatars
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Limited-edition, blockchain-backed digital avatars that users can purchase in the Reddit Shop. These avatars allow users to customize their profile icon and display special visual effects on comments.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Avatar Digital Shop. Open your profile menu, tap "Style Avatar," navigate to the "Shop" tab, select a collectible avatar, and purchase it using stored payment methods.

### 24. Reddit Premium Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A paid monthly subscription that removes ads from the platform, provides monthly gold allotments, and unlocks exclusive avatar accessories. Subscribing also grants access to a private subreddit for premium members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Paid Membership Settings. Open your profile menu, select "Reddit Premium," choose a monthly or annual billing plan, and complete the subscription checkout.

### 25. Reddit Ads Bid Manager
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A self-serve dashboard where companies bid on sponsored post slots, megathreads, and conversation ads. Advertisers target niche interest groups by selecting specific subreddits, category tags, and user locations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Ad Bidder. Visit `ads.reddit.com` in a browser, enter billing details, configure your targeted subreddits list, and set up your CPC bids.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Reddit Post Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A statistics panel displayed under posts created by the user. It tracks metrics such as total views, upvote rate, and share count, helping creators understand post performance.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Statistics Tracker. Open a post you created, and look at the "Post Insights" section located below the main post body to view performance metrics.

### 27. Reddit Ads Manager Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An analytics dashboard for advertisers that tracks campaign impressions, clicks, click-through rates, and conversions. This dashboard helps businesses measure the return on their ad spend.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Campaign Metrics Panel. Log in to the Ads Manager dashboard, navigate to the "Dashboard" or "Reporting" tab, and customize date filters to review campaign performance.

### 28. Reddit Subreddit Traffic Stats
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A moderator tool that displays page views, unique visitors, and subscriber growth over daily, weekly, and monthly periods. This tool helps moderators track community activity trends.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Traffic Dashboard. Open your moderated subreddit, click "Mod Tools" in the sidebar, and select "Traffic Stats" to view visual traffic charts.

### 29. Reddit Developer Console
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A developer hub that allows users to register applications, retrieve client IDs, and manage API applications. This console is used to configure OAuth redirect URLs and test API integrations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Developer Application Manager. Navigate to `reddit.com/prefs/apps` in a web browser, log in with your developer account, click "Create App," fill in details, and save.

### 30. Reddit Creator Hub
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A portal that provides tutorials, documentation, and best practices for growing and managing communities on Reddit. It helps creators learn how to increase engagement and moderate effectively.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Learning Portal. Open a browser, navigate to `creators.reddit.com`, and search for resources on community growth, posting tips, and moderation strategies.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Reddit Anonymous Browsing Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A temporary browsing session that does not record search history, vote logs, or modify recommendation algorithms. This allows users to browse Reddit privately without affecting their profile data.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Browsing Mode. Tap your profile icon in the mobile app, click the dropdown menu next to your username, and select "Anonymous Browsing" to activate.

### 32. Reddit Block User Settings
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A security feature that allows users to block specific accounts. Once blocked, the account's posts, comments, and direct message requests are completely hidden from your feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Blocking Tool. Visit the profile of the user you want to block, click the three-dot menu, and select "Block User" to restrict interaction.

### 33. Reddit Content Blurring
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A display setting that automatically blurs NSFW or sensitive media by default. This helps prevent users from viewing explicit content unexpectedly while scrolling.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Blurring Toggle. Go to Settings > User Settings, click the "Feed Settings" tab, and toggle the "Safe For Work (SFW) mode" or "Blur NSFW Images" switch to "On."

### 34. Reddit Account Activity Logs
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A security log that displays recent IP addresses, browser agents, and locations that accessed the account. This allows users to audit login history and detect unauthorized access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Login Session Auditing. Navigate to `reddit.com/personal-data` or open Settings > Account Settings > Security, and select "Account Activity" to inspect details.

### 35. Reddit Custom Report Reasons
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A reporting tool that allows users to flag posts or comments for violating subreddit-specific rules or platform guidelines. Users can choose from a list of rules or submit custom reasons.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Flagging Interface. Click the "Report" button located under any post or comment, select the rule that was violated, and submit the report to moderators.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Reddit Push Notification Customization
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Provides granular toggles for various events on the platform, such as upvotes on posts, replies to comments, and direct message invitations. This allows users to filter out noisy alerts while retaining critical inbox notices.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Activity Alert Toggles. Navigate to the User Settings page, select the Notifications option, and use the toggles next to each action type to enable or disable specific alerts.

### 37. Reddit Inbox Alerts Muting
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to mute notifications for individual posts or comment threads they have participated in. This prevents inbox spam when a thread becomes popular.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Thread Alert Control. Open the post thread, tap the three-dot menu in the top right, and select "Disable reply updates" or "Mute thread."

### 38. Reddit Digests via Email
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Bundles popular posts and updates from followed subreddits into daily or weekly emails. This helps users stay updated without checking the app constantly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Digest Settings. Go to Settings > Email Settings, scroll down to the "Email Digests" option, and toggle the frequency settings.

### 39. Reddit Feed Auto-Refresh Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A setting that controls whether the feed auto-updates when the app is opened or active. Users can manage this setting to save mobile data and prevent feed layout changes while reading.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Refresh Toggle. Open the mobile app settings, tap "General," and toggle the "Auto-Refresh Feed" switch to your preferred state.

### 40. Reddit App Badges
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggles the numerical notification count badge displayed on the app icon. This helps users manage screen time by removing visual cues that encourage app opens.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Icon Badge Settings. Navigate to Settings > Manage Notifications in the mobile app, scroll to the bottom, and toggle off the "App Badge" switch.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Reddit REST API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A RESTful interface that allows developers to programmatically extract subreddits, submit posts, add comment replies, and vote on content. This API serves as the backbone for custom client applications and automated moderating systems.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: REST Developer Endpoint. Create a developer application under `reddit.com/prefs/apps` to retrieve client credentials, and call resource endpoints such as `/api/v1/me` with OAuth tokens.

### 42. Reddit OAuth2 Authentication
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A secure authorization protocol that allows third-party applications to request access tokens on behalf of Reddit users. This protocol ensures that user credentials are not shared with third-party tools.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Secure Token Endpoint. Implement the OAuth2 authorization code flow pointing to `https://www.reddit.com/api/v1/authorize` to request scope access.

### 43. Reddit Developer Platform (Devwit SDK)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A development platform and SDK that allows developers to build native apps, interactive post widgets, and moderation bots directly on Reddit's infrastructure. It supports TypeScript-based app builds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Native Platform SDK. Install the Devwit command-line tool via npm, run `devwit new` to initialize a project, and deploy your app to Reddit's cloud.

### 44. Reddit Webhooks API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An event-driven developer tool that pushes real-time JSON event alerts to a configured server whenever new activity occurs in a monitored subreddit. Developers can subscribe to event triggers such as new posts or comment approvals.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subreddit Event Webhooks. Open your Developer Platform app settings, input your server's destination URL, select subreddit event hooks, and secure with custom headers.

### 45. Reddit AutoModerator Config API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An API endpoint that allows moderators to programmatically read and update subreddit AutoModerator YAML rule files. This allows developers to automate rule updates and spam filter settings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Rule Configuration Endpoint. Execute an authenticated POST request to the config endpoint (`https://oauth.reddit.com/r/{subreddit}/wiki/config/automoderator`) with updated YAML text.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Reddit Two-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures login sessions by requiring a verification code generated by an authenticator application in addition to a password. This adds an extra layer of protection to user accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Two-Step Login Setup. Open Settings > Account Settings, scroll to the "Security" section, select "Two-Factor Authentication," scan the QR code with your authenticator app, and verify.

### 47. Reddit Connected Accounts
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Links your Reddit account with Apple or Google profiles for streamlined logins. Once connected, users can sign in to Reddit instantly using federated authentication.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Identity Link. Go to Settings > User Settings, navigate to the "Connected Accounts" section, and click "Connect" next to Apple or Google to authorize.

### 48. Reddit Data Export Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates a downloadable file containing a user's entire community interaction log on the platform. This archive includes upvote history, comments made, posts submitted, and moderation actions taken.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community History Downloader. Access `reddit.com/settings/data-request` using a browser, specify the request date range, confirm with your password, and submit the request.

### 49. Reddit Password Reset Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Sends password recovery links to the user's verified email address to restore account access. This allows users to reset their credentials securely if they forget them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Password Recovery Portal. Navigate to the login screen, click "Forgot password," enter your username and email address, and click the recovery link sent to your inbox.

### 50. Reddit Deactivate Account Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permanently deletes a Reddit account and removes the username from posts and comments. This action is irreversible, and deleted usernames cannot be registered again.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Permanent Deactivation. Navigate to User Settings, scroll to the bottom of the page, click "Deactivate Account," enter your username and password, check the confirmation box, and submit.

---

### Platform: Snapchat

This document compiles the feature research for Snapchat, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Snapchat Lenses
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Applies real-time augmented reality filters to faces or environments through the camera interface. This allows users to morph their appearance, play interactive mini-games, or project digital objects into their physical space.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Augmented Reality Overlays. Swipe left or right on the main camera screen to cycle through active Lenses, then tap or press and hold the capture button to take a photo or record a video.

### 2. Snapchat Filters
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Overlay artistic designs, location-specific geofilters, current time, temperature, or speed metrics onto captured photos or videos. These filters dynamically change based on physical location and real-time environmental context.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Graphic Overlays. After capturing a photo or video snap, swipe horizontally across the screen to preview and apply available filters.

### 3. Snapchat Sounds
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Adds licensed music tracks or custom audio recordings to snaps prior to sharing. Users can browse a vast library of trending songs or create their own sound clips to overlay on video content.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Overlay Editor. Tap the music note icon on the right-hand toolbar of the camera screen, browse or search for a track, select the specific audio segment, and add it to the snap.

### 4. Snapchat 3D Bitmojis in Snaps
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Places a personalized three-dimensional avatar of the user into the camera view using augmented reality. The avatar can be animated to perform dances, express emotions, or react to the environment in real time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Avatar AR Projection. Open the Snapchat camera, tap the screen to activate the Lens carousel, search for your Bitmoji Lens, and drag the avatar to position it in your physical environment.

### 5. Snapchat Director Mode
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Accesses a suite of professional video editing tools directly within the Snapchat app interface. Features include green screen overlays, dual-camera capture, speed controls, and a precise multi-clip trimmer.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Advanced Video Editor. Tap the video camera icon labeled "Director Mode" on the camera toolbar, select your desired tool like "Green Screen" or "Dual," and begin recording multi-clip content.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Snapchat Spotlight
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated, algorithmically driven feed that showcases short-form, vertical videos submitted by the community. Users can scroll endlessly to discover trending challenges, comedy sketches, and creative content from other creators.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Short-Form Video Feed. Tap the play button icon in the bottom-right corner of the main app navigation bar to open the Spotlight feed, then swipe up to browse videos.

### 7. Snapchat Map (Snap Map)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An interactive geographical map that displays the location of friends who choose to share their coordinates. It also aggregates public snaps onto a heatmap, allowing users to discover events and stories happening nearby or around the world.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Location-Based Discovery. Swipe down on the main camera screen to open the Snap Map, pinch to zoom, and tap on heat spots to view public stories submitted from that location.

### 8. Snapchat Discover
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A content hub featuring curated stories, shows, and articles from verified publishers, media companies, and popular creators. The layout uses tile-based previews that update daily with localized news, pop culture, and entertainment content.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Publisher Story Hub. Swipe left from the main camera screen past the chat tab, or tap the double-story icon at the bottom of the screen to browse the Discover directory.

### 9. Snapchat Scan
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An intelligent visual search utility that uses the camera to identify objects in the physical world. It can recognize plants, scan food labels for nutritional info, solve math equations, or identify songs playing in the background via Shazam.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Visual Search Utility. Point the camera at an object, document, or QR code, then press and hold the center screen to activate the Scan utility and display information cards.

### 10. Snapchat Search Bar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A global search utility at the top of the interface used to find accounts, lenses, publisher shows, and trending topics. It provides instant suggestions as the user types and displays categorized results for quick navigation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Global Navigation Search. Tap the magnifying glass icon in the top-left corner of the camera or chat screen, type your query, and tap on a user, Lens, or show from the search results.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Snapchat Streaks
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Tracks the consecutive number of days two friends have sent direct photo or video snaps to each other. This visual counter encourages daily communication and displays a flame emoji next to the contact's name.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Gamified Engagement Tracker. Send a photo or video snap to a friend, and ensure they send one back within 24 hours to initiate and maintain the streak counter next to their chat profile.

### 12. Snapchat Stories (My Story)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to post chronological photo and video updates that are visible to their friends or the public. The compiled content remains viewable for exactly 24 hours before automatically expiring.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Status Updates. Capture a snap, tap the "Send To" button in the bottom right, select "My Story," and tap the send arrow to publish the snap.

### 13. Snapchat Public Profiles
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Dedicated profile spaces for creators, brands, and public figures to showcase their public content. These profiles allow users to add a bio, website link, subscriber count, and pin permanent stories called highlights.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Profile Management. Tap your profile icon, scroll to the "Public Profile" section, tap "Create Public Profile," and edit your settings to display subscriber counts and pinned highlights.

### 14. Snapchat Group Chats
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Shared conversation spaces supporting up to 100 participants for messaging, media sharing, and group calls. Group chats allow users to send snaps that are delivered to all members simultaneously and support live voice or video conferencing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-User Chat Spaces. Tap the chat icon, click the pen-and-paper button in the bottom right, select the friends you want to add, and tap "Chat with Group" to begin the conversation.

### 15. Snapchat Bitmoji Outfits & Customization
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables users to design and modify a digital avatar that represents them across the platform. Users can customize facial features, hair, and select clothing items from designer brands to update their look in chats and on the Snap Map.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Avatar Editor. Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner, select your Bitmoji avatar, tap "Change Outfit" or "Edit Bitmoji," select your items, and tap "Save" to apply.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Snapchat Ephemeral Chat Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Text, voice, and media messages sent in direct threads that are deleted by default after viewing. Users can tap on messages to save them in the chat history, which highlights them in grey.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Self-Deleting Direct Chat. Open a chat thread, type your message, and tap send. The message will disappear from the thread once the recipient opens and exits the chat.

### 17. Snapchat Live Video Calling
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Initiates real-time, face-to-face video conversations with individual contacts or groups. The video calling interface allows participants to apply active AR Lenses and filters during the live call.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-Time Video Calls. Open a chat thread, click the call button (camera symbol) in the header bar, and swipe to apply AR Lenses.

### 18. Snapchat Voice Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends recorded voice messages directly within chat threads. This is useful for hands-free communication, displaying a waveform in the chat bubble that recipients can play at their convenience.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Chat Messages. Open a chat thread, press and hold the microphone icon next to the text entry box, speak your message, and release the icon to send.

### 19. Snapchat Chat Reactions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Reacts to individual chat messages in a thread using specialized Bitmoji stickers or standard emojis. This allows users to quickly express feelings like laughter, shock, or approval without typing a text reply.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Emoji/Bitmoji Reactions. Long-press on a chat bubble in a conversation thread, then select an emoji or a customized Bitmoji sticker from the pop-up reaction bar.

### 20. Snapchat Map Location Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shares your live real-time location or static coordinates with a friend directly inside a chat thread. This allows friends to track your arrival or find where you are on the Snap Map.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Coordinate Sharing. Open a chat thread, tap the location pin icon or the "+" icon next to the chat bar, select "Share My Live Location" or "Send My Current Location," and choose the duration.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Snapchat Spotlight Challenges
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Direct monetization programs where creators can submit short vertical videos to specific topic challenges. Users compete for cash prizes by producing highly engaging content using featured sounds, lenses, or topics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Cash Challenges. Navigate to the Spotlight feed, tap the trending sound or lens name, select "Submit to Challenge" if available, capture your video, and submit.

### 22. Snapchat Store
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app digital marketplace where users can purchase official Snapchat hardware, brand merchandise, or exclusive virtual assets. Transactions are completed within the application using stored payment methods.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital In-App Shop. Tap your profile icon, scroll to the "Snap Store" or "Shop" category, select a product or digital item, enter shipping/payment details, and complete the checkout.

### 23. Snapchat AR Shopping Lenses
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Interactive try-on experiences that allow users to virtually test cosmetics, eyewear, and clothing using the camera. These lenses feature product details and a direct "Shop" button that links to checkout pages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Virtual Try-On Commerce. Open the camera, search for shopping lenses in the lens explorer, apply the lens to view the product on your face or body, and tap the "Shop" button to make a purchase.

### 24. Snapchat Creator Marketplace
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A business platform that connects verified Snapchat creators with brands looking to collaborate on sponsored marketing campaigns. Brands can search for creators based on audience demographics, vertical specialties, and location.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Sponsorship Network. Access the Creator Marketplace portal on a web browser at `creators.snapchat.com`, log in with your creator account, update your portfolio, and view brand inquiries.

### 25. Snapchat Tokens
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A virtual in-app currency that users can purchase with real money to gift to creators or buy digital items. Gifting tokens translates to financial rewards for creators, fostering an ecosystem of viewer support.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Digital Gifting Currency. Tap your profile icon, go to the Token Shop, select a token package, purchase it via app store billing, and tap the gift icon on a creator's public story to send tokens.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Snapchat Insights for Creators
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
