- **Description**: A comprehensive analytics dashboard that provides data on story views, view time, subscriber growth, and audience demographics. This tool helps creators understand what content resonates best with their viewers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Analytics Dashboard. Tap your public profile, select "Insights," and toggle between views to track metrics such as reach, age splits, and top geographic locations over a 7-day or 28-day period.

### 27. Snapchat Ads Manager
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A self-serve web application that enables businesses to create, target, and run advertisement campaigns across Snapchat. It supports formats like single image/video ads, collection ads, and story ads with budget optimization.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Advertising Campaign Portal. Open a web browser, navigate to `ads.snapchat.com`, log in with your business account, select "Create Campaign," set your budget, define target demographics, and upload ad creatives.

### 28. Snapchat Ads Manager Audience Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A research tool within Ads Manager that helps businesses identify and analyze Snapchat audience segments. It displays detailed information on user behaviors, purchase intent, device usage, and interests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Research Hub. Log in to Ads Manager, select "Audience Insights" from the main menu, apply target filters (location, age, gender), and view visual reports on demographic profiles and lifestyle categories.

### 29. Snapchat Lens Web Builder
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A web-based creation platform designed for brands to build custom augmented reality lenses without writing code. It offers template libraries, simple customization fields, and immediate publishing options for ad campaigns.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Browser Lens Creator. Go to `lensbuilder.snapchat.com` on a desktop web browser, select a pre-made template, upload custom logos or 2D assets, set active parameters, and submit the lens for review.

### 30. Snapchat Brand Profiles
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Permanent, customizable homepages for businesses to showcase their brand assets, active AR lenses, highlights, and connected stores. This serves as a central landing page for organic Snapchat traffic.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Business Landing Page. Managed via Meta Business Manager or Snapchat Business Suite. Access your brand profile settings to customize logos, link shopping catalogs, and pin highlights.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Snapchat My Eyes Only
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A secure, password-protected folder within the Memories section of the app. It allows users to hide sensitive snaps from their main gallery, requiring a separate 4-digit PIN or passcode to view them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Media Vault. Swipe up from the camera screen to open Memories, tap "Select" in the top-right, choose snaps, tap the "More" option, select "Move to My Eyes Only," and set up your passcode.

### 32. Snapchat Ghost Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A privacy setting that hides a user's location from all friends on the Snap Map. When activated, the user's Bitmoji disappears from the map, but the user can still view the locations of friends who share their coordinates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Location Sharing Opt-Out. Swipe down on the camera screen to open the Snap Map, tap the gear icon in the top-right corner, and toggle on the "Ghost Mode" switch.

### 33. Snapchat Quick Add Privacy
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A settings toggle that controls whether a user's account is suggested to others in the "Quick Add" section. Disabling this prevents acquaintances or strangers from finding the account via mutual connections.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Suggestion Control Settings. Tap your profile icon, tap the gear icon to open Settings, scroll down to "Privacy Controls," select "See Me in Quick Add," and uncheck the box.

### 34. Snapchat Custom Story Privacy
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables users to create private or custom stories where they manually choose which friends can view and add content. This provides absolute control over who participates in shared digital scrapbooks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Restricted Audience Stories. Tap your profile icon, select "+ New Story," tap "Custom Story" or "Private Story," choose the allowed friends from your contacts list, name the story, and tap "Create Story."

### 35. Snapchat In-App Reporting
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A reporting tool that allows users to submit objectionable content or abusive profiles directly to safety teams. The system categorizes reports (harassment, spam, self-harm) to expedite review and action.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Moderation Reports. Press and hold on the offending snap, story tile, or username in chat, tap the flag icon or "Report" button, select the reason for the report, and submit.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Snapchat Notification Customization
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to manage the frequency and type of alerts they receive on their mobile device. Users can toggle notifications for snaps, chat messages, story updates, and friend suggestions independently.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Frequency Settings. Tap your profile icon, click the gear icon for Settings, select "Notifications," and check or uncheck individual alert categories to match your preference.

### 37. Snapchat Custom Story Expiration
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows Snapchat+ subscribers to customize the duration of their stories, changing them from the standard 24-hour window. Stories can be set to expire in 1 hour, 4 hours, 12 hours, 2 days, or up to 1 week.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Flexible Expiration Timers. Create a snap, select "My Story," tap the gear icon next to it, choose your desired expiration limit, and publish the snap.

### 38. Snapchat Sleep Mode
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Integrates with system-level focus modes or in-app mute features to pause all push alerts during sleeping hours. When active, incoming snaps and messages are received silently without waking the screen.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Silent Hours Scheduler. Open Settings > Notifications, tap "Quiet Hours" or "Do Not Disturb," and schedule the start and end times to mute alerts automatically.

### 39. Snapchat Story Notification Muting
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes story alerts for specific friends who post updates frequently. This allows users to stay connected without getting constantly interrupted by push alerts whenever that contact posts a new snap.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Selective Alert Muting. Tap and hold your friend's profile name in the chat feed, select "Story Settings," and toggle off "Story Notifications."

### 40. Snapchat Chat Expiration Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures whether chat messages in a direct thread are deleted immediately after viewing or 24 hours after they are read. This gives users flexibility in managing their conversation archives.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Retention Toggles. Long-press on a friend's chat header in your feed, select "Chat Settings," tap "Delete Chats...", and choose between "After Viewing" and "24 Hours after Viewing."

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Snapchat Camera Kit SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A software development kit that allows developers to integrate Snapchat's camera features and augmented reality lenses directly into their own mobile applications. This extends Snapchat's AR ecosystem to external platforms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mobile AR Integration. Developers access the Snap Developer Portal, download the Camera Kit SDK for iOS/Android, and initialize it within their app codebase using API keys.

### 42. Snapchat Login Kit
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An identity integration SDK that allows developers to add secure "Log in with Snapchat" functionality to external websites and applications. It simplifies user registration by retrieving the user's display name and Bitmoji avatar.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: OAuth Federated Identity. Register your application on the Snap Developer Portal, configure OAuth redirect URLs, and import the Login Kit SDK into your client application.

### 43. Snapchat Creative Kit
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer utility that enables external apps to pass media, links, or dynamic stickers directly to the Snapchat camera. This lets users share third-party app experiences, such as music tracks or achievements, as a custom snap sticker.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Shared Media Pipeline. Developers implement the Creative Kit library in their app and configure a button that calls the Snapchat share intent with custom payload assets.

### 44. Snapchat Bitmoji Kit
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to import and display users' personalized Bitmoji avatars inside third-party mobile applications and web tools. This creates cross-platform personalized profiles using Snapchat's avatar ecosystem.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Avatar Sync SDK. Download the Bitmoji Kit from the Snap Developer Portal, link it to your app's login flow, and request permission to display the user's custom sticker pack.

### 45. Snapchat Marketing API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic REST API that allows developers and agencies to manage ad campaigns, automate ad creation, and update budgets. It enables direct programmatic access to extract performance metrics from Snap's advertising database.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: REST Campaign Endpoint. Integrate OAuth2 tokens, and execute HTTP requests to the Marketing API endpoints to manage ad structures.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Snapchat Two-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Adds an extra layer of security to the login process by requiring a verification code in addition to a password. Users can receive codes via SMS or generate them using an external authenticator application.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Two-Step Verification. Tap your profile icon, tap the gear icon for Settings, select "Two-Factor Authentication," tap "Continue," and choose "SMS Verification" or "Authenticator App."

### 47. Snapchat Username Modification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to change their public Snapchat username once per year. This updates how friends search for the user without losing their friend list, streaks, or Memories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Identifier Settings. Navigate to Settings, tap "Username," select "Change Username," enter the new name, verify availability, and enter your password to confirm.

### 48. Snapchat Account Portability
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Compiles a secure digital folder containing the user's complete Snap history, including chat messages, geofilter usage, account logs, and saved Memories. This enables users to retrieve their multimedia content off the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Memories and Media Downloader. Visit `accounts.snapchat.com` on a web browser, select "My Data", choose whether to include Memories, and submit a download request.

### 49. Snapchat Connected Devices
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a list of all mobile devices and web browsers that are currently authorized to access the Snapchat account. Users can review device names, login dates, and revoke authorization for unfamiliar devices.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Session Device Auditing. Go to Settings > Two-Factor Authentication > Forget Devices, select the device you want to remove, and tap the delete "X" to log it out immediately.

### 50. Snapchat Account Deletion Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Initiates a request to permanently deactivate and delete a Snapchat account. The account is immediately deactivated for 30 days, during which the user can log in to cancel the deletion before it becomes permanent.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Deactivation Portal. On the web, visit `accounts.snapchat.com` and select "Delete My Account," or scroll to the bottom of the in-app Settings menu and select "Delete Account."

---

### Platform: Telegram

This document compiles the feature research for Telegram, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. In-App Media Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides advanced editing tools for photos and videos, including drawing, adding animated stickers, text, and adjusting brightness/contrast.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Editor. Attach a photo/video in a chat, tap the edit brush icon, adjust levels or apply stickers, and tap the checkmark.

### 2. Video Profile Avatars
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to set a short looping video as their profile avatar instead of a static photo.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Dynamic Avatars. Go to Settings > Edit > Set Profile Photo or Video, capture or upload a video clip, select a frame for the static thumbnail, and save.

### 3. Custom Emoji Packs
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to upload and use personalized custom emoji sets in chats, reactions, and statuses.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Personalized Expression. Open the Emoji Panel in any chat, tap the "+" icon or navigate to Settings > Stickers and Emoji, and import custom emoji sets.

### 4. Scheduled Messages
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Sends messages automatically at a specified date and time in the future.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Delayed Message Delivery. Type a message in a chat, long-press the send button, select "Schedule message," choose the date and time, and tap Send.

### 5. Voice Transcription
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Transcribes voice and video messages into readable text with a single tap.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio-to-Text. Tap the "->A" icon next to any incoming voice or video message to instantly generate a text transcription (Premium feature).

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Public Broadcasting Channels
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows creators to broadcast messages, media, and files to an unlimited number of subscribers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mass Broadcast. Tap the compose icon, select "New Channel," choose the name and set the visibility to "Public," creating a unique `@username` link.

### 7. Global Username Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Finds public channels, groups, bots, and users by entering their unique `@` username in the search bar.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Directory Lookup. Type a username or keyword into the main search bar at the top of the chat list, and select from the "Global Search" results.

### 8. Customizable Chat Folders
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Groups chat threads into distinct tabs based on custom filters like "Unread," "Channels," "Groups," or manually selected chats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Organization. Go to Settings > Chat Folders, select "Create New Folder," add chats or include/exclude categories, and name the folder.

### 9. People Nearby Discovery
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to find and connect with other Telegram users and public groups physically close to them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Location Discovery. Open the contact menu, select "Find People Nearby," grant location permissions, and toggle "Make Myself Visible" if desired.

### 10. Saved Messages Cloud
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A personal cloud storage chat where users can forward important messages, store media, and keep notes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Personal Cloud. Access via the side menu (or settings) under "Saved Messages," or forward any message from any chat to the "Saved Messages" contact.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Group Topic Threads
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Organizes discussion within large groups by creating sub-topic channels to keep conversations structured.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sub-Group Forums. In group settings (for groups with 100+ members), toggle "Topics" to on. Group admins and members can then create new threads.

### 12. Supergroups
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables massive group chats hosting up to 200,000 members, featuring advanced moderation and pinning.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mega Communities. Automatically upgrades standard groups as membership grows, allowing admins to pin messages, restrict members, and manage access.

### 13. Voice Chat Live Streams
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Broadcasts live audio and video discussions to channels or groups with speaker controls and recording options.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Spaces. Tap the group/channel profile header, tap the three-dot menu, select "Start Voice Chat" (or "Start Live Stream"), and invite participants.

### 14. Channel Discussion Groups
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Links a public group chat to a broadcast channel, allowing subscribers to comment on and discuss channel posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Comments. Open channel settings, tap "Discussion," select an existing group or create a new one, and link them to enable commenting.

### 15. Interactive Polls & Quizzes
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates multiple-choice polls, anonymous voting, or educational quizzes with single/multiple answers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: In-Chat Voting. Tap the attachment icon in a group/channel, select "Poll," write the options, toggle "Quiz Mode" if desired, and send.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Secret Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Provides end-to-end encrypted chats with self-destruct timers that leave no trace on Telegram's servers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Secure Messaging. Open a contact's profile, tap the three-dot menu, select "Start Secret Chat," and set a self-destruct timer on messages.

### 17. Sent Message Editing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to edit the text of sent messages within 48 hours of dispatch.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Correction. Long-press a message you sent, tap the edit pencil icon, modify the text, and tap the checkmark to save edits.

### 18. Silent Message Dispatch
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends a message to a recipient without playing a notification sound on their device.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Quiet Sending. Type a message, long-press the send button, and select "Send without sound" to deliver it silently.

### 19. Telescope Video Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Records and sends round video messages up to 60 seconds that stream instantly in-chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Circular Video notes. Tap the microphone icon once to switch to video, then press and hold the camera icon to record the video note.

### 20. In-Chat Translation
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Translates messages written in foreign languages directly within the chat interface in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inline Translator. Enable in Settings > Language > Show Translate Button. Tap a foreign message and select "Translate" from the context menu.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Telegram Stars Currency
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A virtual currency used to pay for digital goods, services, and exclusive content offered by creators and bots.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: In-App Payments. Purchase Stars via app store in-app purchases, then spend them inside bots, mini-apps, or paid channel subscription tiers.

### 22. Premium Paid Channels
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows channel owners to lock exclusive content or posts behind a paid subscription or Star fee.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Paywalled Content. Enable monetization in channel settings, post media, set the price in Stars, and publish. Users must pay to unlock.

### 23. Sponsored Messages Ad Platform
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays context-based, privacy-respecting sponsored posts at the bottom of public channels with large subscriber bases.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Privacy Ads. Created via `promote.telegram.org`. Advertisers target public channels based on topics without targeting individual user profiles.

### 24. In-App Payment Bots
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates bots that accept payments from credit cards and third-party gateways (Stripe, Google Pay) inside chats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Conversational Commerce. Interact with a merchant bot, click checkout, input payment info via the integrated overlay, and complete the order.

### 25. Fragment TON Marketplace
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A decentralized auction platform where users can buy and sell collectible usernames, anonymous phone numbers, and ads using TON cryptocurrency.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Decentralized Assets. Link a TON wallet to `fragment.com` to bid on usernames, transfer collectibles, or sell owned digital assets.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Channel Growth Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays detailed growth, views, languages, and interaction analytics for channels with more than 50 subscribers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stats Dashboard. Open the channel profile, tap the three-dot menu, select "Statistics" to view charts on subscriber flow and views.

### 27. Telegram Business Suite
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Unlocks professional features for business accounts, including greeting messages, away replies, custom quick replies, and location tags.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Business Dashboard. Subscribe to Telegram Premium or navigate to Settings > Telegram Business to customize operational settings.

### 28. Topic Engagement Metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks view count, message counts, and active member statistics inside individual group topics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Topic Analytics. Group owners access topic statistics from the Group Info page > Statistics menu to audit discussion activity.

### 29. Interactive Bot API
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows developers to build highly interactive bots and mini-apps using Python, Node.js, and HTTP requests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Developer Interface. Start a conversation with `@BotFather`, generate a bot token, and connect it to a server hosting the bot logic.

### 30. Bot Welcome Intros
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Configures custom start screens, media, and description texts that display before a user launches a bot.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bot Onboarding. Customize bot profiles and start screens using command options inside `@BotFather` settings.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Auto-Delete Timers
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically deletes all messages in a selected chat after a duration of 24 hours, 7 days, or 1 month.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Auto-Destruct Chats. In chat settings, tap the three-dot menu, select "Auto-delete," choose the time interval, and apply to the chat.

### 32. Phone Number Hiding
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Hides the user's phone number from all users or specific contacts, using the username as the primary identity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Phone Masking. Go to Settings > Privacy and Security > Phone Number, and select "Nobody" to hide the number.

### 33. Password Session Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures access to the Telegram application using a local PIN or alphanumeric password.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: App Lock Screen. Go to Settings > Privacy and Security > Passcode Lock, enable it, and set the PIN and auto-lock timeout.

### 34. Active Device Manager
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Displays a list of all active sessions and devices logged into the account, with the ability to terminate sessions remotely.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Session Auditor. Go to Settings > Devices to review logged-in locations, IP addresses, and revoke any suspicious sessions.

### 35. Content Forward Protection
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts members from forwarding messages, copying text, or saving media from private groups or channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: DRM Chats. Open group/channel settings, tap "Group Type" (or "Channel Type"), and toggle "Restrict saving content" to on.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Extensible Bot API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Provides rich widgets, custom keyboard overlays, and inline queries for third-party bots.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bot Customization. Developers use JSON request payloads to send inline keyboard buttons, invoice forms, or custom media.

### 37. TDLib Open Source Library
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An open-source library that implements all Telegram client features, allowing developers to build custom Telegram apps.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Client SDK. Integrate TDLib into C++, Java, C#, or Python projects to handle networking, local database storage, and cryptography.

### 38. MTProto Protocol API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A high-performance, secure protocol used for accessing the Telegram API from client applications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Core Protocol. Connect custom client software to Telegram's production API gateway using MTProto schema handshakes.

### 39. In-Chat HTML5 Web Apps
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Launches full-scale HTML5 web applications (Mini Apps) directly inside chat windows.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Web Interfaces. Register a Mini App via `@BotFather`, then launch it in-app using inline buttons or custom menu links.

### 40. Payment Gateway API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects Telegram bots to merchant payment gateways to handle credit card payments in-app.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Merchant Integration. Link provider accounts (e.g. Stripe) to the bot via `@BotFather` and construct payment payloads using the API.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. Custom Mute Durations
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes chat notifications for a completely customizable duration, such as 2 hours, 3 days, or permanently.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Muting. Long-press a chat, tap "Mute," select "Mute for..." and configure a custom duration using the date-time picker.

### 42. Notification Alert Exceptions
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Overrides general notification settings to customize alerts for specific contacts or groups.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Exception Manager. Go to Settings > Notifications and Sounds, tap "Add Exception" under Private Chats or Groups, and select specific rules.

### 43. Smart Alert Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sets limits on how often a chat can notify the user (e.g., maximum of 2 notifications every 10 minutes).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Frequency Control. Navigate to chat settings > Notifications > Customize, and set the alert frequency limit under the Smart Mute section.

### 44. Focus Filter Sync
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Integrates with Apple Focus or Android Work modes to filter which Telegram notifications can wake the screen.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: OS Focus Sync. Go to mobile OS Settings > Focus, add Telegram, and configure allowed contacts and notification priority tiers.

### 45. Non-Contact Auto-Archive
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically archives and mutes messages from new, unknown users who are not in the contact list.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inbox Filter. Go to Settings > Privacy and Security > Archive and Mute, and toggle "Archive and Mute" to on.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Multi-Account Switcher
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to log into up to three different phone numbers on the same Telegram application and switch between them instantly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-profile management. Open the side menu, tap the down arrow next to the username, select "Add Account," and input the phone number.

### 47. Username Domain Mapping
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Links custom domains or web addresses directly to a Telegram profile, channel, or group username.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Web Links. Format the link as `https://t.me/<username>`, which opens the target resource in the Telegram client or browser.

### 48. Cloud Two-Factor Password
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Requires an additional password when logging in from a new device, supplementing the standard SMS verification code.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Two-Step Verification. Go to Settings > Privacy and Security > Two-Step Verification, enter a password, set a hint, and provide a recovery email.

### 49. Auto-Self-Destruct Timer
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Automatically deletes the entire account, including all chats and media, if the user does not log in for a set period.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Lifespan. Go to Settings > Privacy and Security > Delete my account if away for, and select 1, 3, 6, or 12 months.

### 50. Large File Storage Tiers
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows sending and storing massive files up to 2GB (4GB for Premium users) in Saved Messages or chats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: File Repository. Tap the attachment icon, select "File," browse files, and upload. Files are stored in Telegram's secure cloud indefinitely.

---

### Platform: Threads

This document compiles the feature research for Threads, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Threads Voice Posts
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to record voice clips to share as threads, which are automatically transcribed into readable text overlays.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Post Composition. Tap the microphone icon in the thread composer on mobile, hold or tap to record your message, and review the automatic text transcription before sharing.

### 2. Threads Character Expansion
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides a generous text limit of 500 characters per individual post, giving users more room for detailed thoughts compared to other microblogging platforms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Post Editor. Open the post composer, type your message, and monitor the circular progress bar in the bottom right corner to track character usage.

### 3. Threads Interactive Polls
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Adds user-facing interactive question polls with up to four customizable options that remain active for 24 hours.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Poll Creator. Tap the graph icon in the thread composer, type your question, define the choices, and tap post to start gathering responses from followers.

### 4. Threads Photo Grid Layout
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to organize up to 10 photos or videos in a single post using pre-built visual carousel or grid arrangements.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Carousel Media Layouts. Select multiple images from the device gallery inside the post composer, then swipe to choose between standard slideshow, collage, or grid layouts.

### 5. Threads Video Captioning
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically processes and overlays closed captions onto uploaded video files to ensure accessibility and quiet viewing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automatic Video Captions. Upload a video in the composer, click the three-dot menu on the video thumbnail, select "Add Captions," and edit the generated text before publishing.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Threads Following Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays a chronological stream composed strictly of posts from profiles the user actively follows, bypassing the main algorithmic recommendations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chronological Feed Navigation. Tap the Threads home icon or logo at the top of the mobile screen, and select the "Following" tab to switch views.

### 7. Threads Tagged Topic Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Filters search results and clusters public discussions using hyperlinked topic tags, replacing traditional hashtags with inline keywords.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Tagged Topic Discovery. Highlight text or tap the "#" icon in the composer to select a tag topic, or click on a blue topic tag in any feed to open its dedicated search stream.

### 8. Threads For You Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An algorithmically driven timeline that curates posts, replies, and trends based on your interactions, followed accounts, and overall network engagement.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Recommendations. Access the main home view on the app. By default, the application loads the "For You" feed, which updates dynamically when pulled down.

### 9. Threads Keyword Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Searches the entire platform's database for public posts containing specific words or phrases rather than just searching for user account handles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Search. Tap the magnifying glass icon in the navigation bar, type your query into the search field, and toggle the results view between "Profiles" and "Search."

### 10. Threads Hidden Words Feed Filter
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Removes specific posts, threads, and search results containing designated keywords from appearing on the user's discovery feeds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Keyword Filtering. Access Settings > Privacy > Hidden Words. Toggle "Custom words and phrases" on, and enter the terms you wish to filter out of your views.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Threads Repost & Quote
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Shares public posts directly with your followers as a clean repost, or with attached commentary in a quote post format.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Amplification. Tap the double-arrow repost icon beneath any thread, then select either "Repost" to share it instantly or "Quote" to open a composer with the original post attached.

### 12. Threads Mention Control
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Manages permission levels for who can tag or mention your profile name in their public threads and replies.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mention Security. Navigate to Settings > Privacy > Mentions, and select between "Everyone," "People you follow," or "No one."

### 13. Threads Profile Verification Badge
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Imports and displays the blue Meta-verified badge next to your handle to confirm identity authenticity, synced directly with your linked Instagram account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Syncing Identity Verification. Automatic upon logging in. Manage your subscription and check verification status under Settings > Account > Meta Verified.

### 14. Threads Share to Instagram Stories
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Cross-posts a thread directly onto your Instagram Stories feed, rendering the post as an interactive custom sticker.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Cross-platform Sharing. Tap the paper airplane icon underneath a thread, select "Add to story" from the share options, and edit the sticker in Instagram before posting.

### 15. Threads Follower Syncing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Replicates your Instagram social network by automatically following or queueing follow requests for the same users when they join Threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Social Graph Import. Access Settings > Follow and invite friends. Tap "Follow accounts from Instagram" to browse and follow your existing contacts in bulk.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Threads Message Button Integration
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Integrates a direct message option on Threads user profiles, routing messages through Meta's Instagram messaging backend.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Contact Initiation. Open any user's profile on Threads and tap the "Message" button at the top. This opens the Instagram app directly into a secure DM chat thread with that user.

### 17. Threads Share to Direct Message
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shares a specific post directly to a contact's Instagram Direct Message inbox from the Threads user interface.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Inbox Sharing. Tap the paper airplane share icon under any thread, select "Send via Instagram," type the recipient's name, and tap "Send" to forward the post.

### 18. Threads Group Messaging Link
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Generates secure invite or content sharing links for specific threads to be pasted directly into group chats on Instagram.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Share Generation. Tap the paper airplane icon under a thread, choose "Copy Link" from the menu, and paste the clipboard URL into any group message thread.

### 19. Threads Contact Quick Share
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Accelerates sharing by listing your top-interacted Instagram direct message contacts directly within the Threads sharing sheet.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Message Quick Send. Long-press the paper airplane icon under any thread to bring up a rapid-sharing tray of your top 5 message contacts, then tap a profile picture to send.

### 20. Threads Thread-to-DM Forwarding
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Forwards a copy of an active public thread directly into a private text conversation thread on Instagram.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Message Forwarding. Tap the paper airplane icon under the thread, select "Send," choose from the list of recent Instagram DM threads, and add an optional message.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Threads Branded Content Tag
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to label commercial partnerships in posts, appending an official "Paid partnership" notification tag to the thread header.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sponsored Post Compliance. When composing a thread, click the three dots, select "Add Paid Partnership Tag," and search for the brand partner's account to link them.

### 22. Threads Meta Verified Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monthly paid subscription that grants creators search prominence, enhanced support access, and an identity badge.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Paid Account Verification. Open Settings > Account, tap "Meta Verified," and follow the prompts to complete payment and identity verification.

### 23. Threads Shopping Link Referrals
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Formats e-commerce URLs inside posts to render interactive, rich preview cards that direct users to checkout.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Product Referrals. Paste a valid shopping link (e.g. from an Instagram Shop or external merchant) directly into the composer. The app automatically fetches the product image, title, and link card.

### 24. Threads Creator Marketplace
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Connects brand partners with Threads creators for sponsored campaigns, managed through the central Meta Business portal.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sponsored Deals Integration. Creators configure their portfolio and collaboration settings in the Meta Creator Portfolio dashboard and sync it with their Threads account.

### 25. Threads Affiliate Link Previews
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Generates metadata-rich product cards when affiliate links are posted, maximizing click-through rates and commission tracking.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Affiliate Marketing. Paste your tracking link in the thread composer. The system checks the destination URL, pulls the product cover photo and price, and renders it as an e-commerce card.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Threads Account Insights Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides creators and businesses with a web-based dashboard showing follower counts, impressions, and post engagement rates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Web Creator Insights. Log into Threads via a desktop browser, click the graph icon in the navigation bar, and view metrics showing post performance over the last 7, 14, or 30 days.

### 27. Threads Post View Count
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays a public indicator of total views and impressions on individual threads, helping creators evaluate reach.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Reach Auditing. Look at the bottom of any thread post. Next to the repost and reply counts, the view count icon shows the total number of times the post has appeared on screens.

### 28. Threads Follower Demographics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Breaks down follower distribution data by age group, gender, country, and city to optimize content strategy.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Demographics. Open the Threads web dashboard, navigate to "Insights," and click on the "Audience" tab to view breakdown charts.

### 29. Threads Web Editor & Scheduler
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows accounts to schedule posts in advance from the desktop web interface to optimize posting schedules.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Scheduled Posting. Log into `threads.net` on desktop, write your post in the composer, click the clock icon, set the date and time, and click "Schedule."

### 30. Threads Profile Analytics Summary
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A mobile summary showing net follower growth, profile visits, and likes over the last 30 days.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Quick Mobile Analytics. Go to your Threads profile, tap the "Insights" button beneath your bio, and swipe through the cards representing views, replies, and net followers.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Threads Hidden Words List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Filters out offensive replies containing user-specified words, phrases, or emojis from threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Blocklists. Navigate to Settings > Privacy > Hidden Words, and add your custom phrases to the blocklist.

### 32. Threads Profile Muting
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Mutes posts and replies from specific accounts without unfollowing or blocking them, hiding their content silently.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Muting. Tap the three dots in the top right corner of any post or profile page, and select "Mute" from the dropdown menu.

### 33. Threads Thread Reply Controls
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts who can reply to your thread, letting you limit discussion to specific circles or accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Conversation Controls. In the thread composer, tap the "Anyone can reply" text in the bottom left, and choose between "Anyone," "Profiles you follow," or "Only mentioned profiles."

### 34. Threads Sensitive Content Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Adjusts the volume of sensitive or mature content recommended to you in search and feed screens.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Content Moderation. Access Settings > Privacy > Sensitive Content, and select either "Standard," "More," or "Less" to adjust the recommendation engine.

### 35. Threads Blocked Accounts List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Syncs blocklists with Instagram to prevent designated accounts from viewing or finding your profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Blocklist. Navigate to Settings > Privacy > Blocked. This displays accounts blocked on both Threads and Instagram. Tap "Unblock" to restore access.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Threads Notification Pause
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily halts all push notification alerts from Threads for a designated duration.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Focus Mode Muting. Navigate to Settings > Notifications, toggle "Pause all" on, and select a duration: 15 minutes, 1 hour, 2 hours, 4 hours, or 8 hours.

### 37. Threads Take a Break Reminder
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Prompts a full-screen screen time warning when the user reaches a designated limit of continuous app scrolling.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Usage Reminder. Go to Settings > Account > Take a break. Select a frequency of 10, 20, or 30 minutes, or turn the reminder off.

### 38. Threads Custom Push Categories
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows granular configuration of push alerts for individual interaction categories such as likes, replies, and mentions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Filtering. Go to Settings > Notifications > Threads and replies. Customize alerts to "Off," "From people I follow," or "From everyone" for each event.

### 39. Threads Thread Notification Subscriptions
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Subscribes users to receive real-time push notifications for all subsequent replies to a selected post.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Thread Subscriptions. Tap the three dots in the top right of any thread you are reading, and select "Turn on notifications" to receive updates for replies.

### 40. Threads Quiet Mode Syncing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically aligns Threads notification silencing schedules with the Quiet Mode settings configured in Instagram.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Synced Silent Periods. Access Settings > Notifications > Quiet Mode. Toggle the sync switch to inherit quiet periods from Instagram's profile scheduler.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Threads Graph API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic HTTP interface enabling developers to publish text and media, retrieve replies, and manage threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RESTful API Endpoint. Configured under Meta Developer Portal. Integrates OAuth access tokens to call HTTP endpoints (e.g., POST `/v1.0/me/threads`).

### 42. Threads API Webhooks
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Sends real-time HTTPS callback payloads to developer servers when mentions, replies, or changes occur on an authorized account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Webhook Alerts. Set up on the Meta Developer Dashboard. Developers register a secure HTTPS endpoint and subscribe to specific feed events (e.g., `threads_replies`).

### 43. Threads OAuth 2.0 Authentication
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Implements secure user-delegated authorization protocol allowing third-party apps to access Threads content.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Authorization. Developers configure OAuth redirect URIs in their app dashboard, directing users to authorize their client and return code tokens.

### 44. Threads API Insights Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic endpoint that allows developers to fetch account-level and post-level metrics for third-party analytics integrations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Analytics API Query. Make HTTP GET requests to `/v1.0/me/threads_insights` with an access token, passing parameters to filter by metrics like impressions, reach, and follower count.

### 45. Threads Media Publishing Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Specialized API resource supporting programmatically scheduled uploads of image and video media files to Threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Upload Pipeline. Make a POST request to `/v1.0/me/threads` with `media_type` set to `IMAGE` or `VIDEO` and a URL parameter referencing the hosted media.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Threads Profile Deactivation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Temporarily hides your Threads profile, threads, replies, and likes without deleting your linked Instagram account.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Temporary Account Deactivation. Navigate to Settings > Account > Deactivate or delete profile, and select "Deactivate profile."

### 47. Threads Account Center Integration
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Centralizes security, logins, and authentication settings via the Meta Account Center dashboard.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Unified Security Hub. Navigate to Settings > Account > Account Center. Manage password resets, active login sessions, and two-factor authentication.

### 48. Threads Account Deletion
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permanently deletes your Threads profile data, comments, and posts from the network.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Data Purge. Navigate to Settings > Account > Deactivate or delete profile, tap "Delete profile," and enter your account password to confirm.

### 49. Threads Private Profile Toggle
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Restricts profile visibility so only approved followers can view, reply to, or share your threads.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Visibility Toggle. Navigate to Settings > Privacy > Private Profile. Switch the toggle on to require manual follower approval.

### 50. Threads Data Portability Export
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to download an archive containing their posts, comments, likes, and profile settings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Data Download. Navigate to Settings > Account > Account Center > Your information and permissions > Download your information. Select "Threads" and submit the export request.

---

### Platform: TikTok

This document compiles the feature research for TikTok, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Green Screen Effect
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Replaces the video background with an image or video from your device's library in real time during camera capture.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Chroma Keying. Open the TikTok camera, tap "Effects" on the left of the record button, search and select the green screen icon, select an image/video from your gallery, and record.

### 2. Adjust Clips (Multi-track Editing)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides an in-app timeline interface to split, trim, speed up, or reorder individual video clips and audio tracks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-track Timeline. After recording or uploading multiple clips, tap the "Adjust clips" or scissor icon in the right-hand menu, split individual clips, or drag to reorder.

### 3. Voice Effects & Filters
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Apply audio distortion effects to recorded voice clips post-recording.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Voice Modulation. Record a video, tap the "Audio Editing" or voice icon in the right-side editing menu, select a voice filter (e.g., "Joey" or "Robot"), and tap save.

### 4. Stitch
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to trim and integrate up to 5 seconds of footage from another creator's video into their own video.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Clip Insertion. Tap the "Share" button on a Stitch-enabled video, tap the "Stitch" icon at the bottom, drag the crop handles to select a portion, tap "Next," and record your contribution.

### 5. Duet
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Places your recorded video side-by-side with another creator's video in a split-screen format, syncing playback.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Split-screen Video Recording. Tap the "Share" button on a Duet-enabled video, select "Duet," choose your preferred layout (e.g., Left & Right, Picture in Picture), and tap the record button to film.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. For You Page (FYP) Algorithm
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Algorithmic feed that surfaces videos based on user watch history, comments, and real-time interest profiles.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Machine-Learning Feed. Launch the TikTok app on your device, and the "For You" tab will be selected by default at the top of the main home screen. Swipe up vertically on the screen to view the next recommended video in the algorithmic stream.

### 7. Refresh For You Feed (Algorithm Reset)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Resets your For You Page recommendations to the default state, clearing historical interest tracking completely.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Reset Switch. Go to Settings and Privacy > Content Preferences > Refresh your For You feed, tap "Refresh," and confirm to clear interests.

### 8. STEM Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A specialized secondary feed containing strictly educational videos about Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Curated Content Feeds. Go to Settings > Content Preferences > STEM feed, and toggle it to active to display a "STEM" tab on your Home screen.

### 9. Custom Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Refines search query results by upload date (e.g., past 24 hours, past week) and popularity (most liked).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Search Result Filtering. Type your query in the search bar, tap the filter adjustment icon (two sliders) next to the search bar, select "This week" and "Most liked," and tap "Apply."

### 10. Search Trends & Auto-Suggest
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays trending topics, music tracks, and hashtags with dynamic autocomplete suggestions in the search tab.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Trending Topic Discovery. Tap the search bar on the top right to view automated search trend boxes, and type terms to see real-time search suggestions.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Video Replies to Comments
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates a new video post that highlights and overlays a specific comment from a previous video as a sticker.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Comment Stickers. Open the comments of your video, tap the comment you want to address, tap the red video camera icon next to it, record your response, and place the floating comment sticker on the screen.

### 12. Repost Button
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Recommends a video to your mutual friends' For You feeds without saving or re-uploading the video yourself.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Peer-to-Peer Feed Sharing. Tap the "Share" button (arrow icon) on any video on your For You Page, and tap the yellow "Repost" button.

### 13. TikTok LIVE Q&A
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows creators to toggle a dedicated Q&A panel during LIVE broadcasts, letting viewers submit questions that the host can select and display on-screen to answer in real-time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live Stream Q&A. In the LIVE setup screen or during a live broadcast, tap the "Q&A" button. Viewers submit questions via the Q&A icon in the chat. The creator can browse submitted questions, select one to pin to the live screen for the audience, and answer it live.

### 14. Video Playlists (Collections)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Categorizes public videos on a creator's profile into themed playlists displayed at the top of their grid.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Playlist Sorting. On your profile page, tap "Sort videos into playlists" (available to eligible accounts), name the playlist, select the relevant videos, and save.

### 15. Profile View History
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows you to see which users have viewed your profile in the past 30 days, and makes your profile views visible to them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Visitor Tracking. Tap the footprints icon at the top of your profile page, tap the gear icon, and toggle "Profile view history" to on.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. In-App Group Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Creates a private group message board within TikTok for sharing and discussing videos with up to 32 mutual followers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Chat Rooms. Navigate to the Inbox tab, tap the chat bubble icon in the top right, select multiple friends from your mutuals list, and tap "Start group chat."

### 17. Quick Send (Hold-to-Share)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Instantly shares a video with a specific friend with a single long-press action.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Instant Message Sharing. Long-press on the middle of the screen while watching a video, and tap a contact's profile icon on the radial menu.

### 18. DM Read Receipts
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shows indicators in direct message threads to let you know if a mutual follower has viewed your message.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Read Receipt Settings. Go to Settings > Privacy > Direct Messages. Toggle "Read status" to active to see when messages are read.

### 19. Giphy Integration in DMs
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to search and send animated GIFs directly within the messaging interface.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: GIF Keyboard. Open a direct chat, tap the emoji smiley face on the keyboard bar, select the "GIF" tab, enter a search term, and tap the desired GIF to send.

### 20. TikTok Direct Message Voice Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send private audio messages to their mutual followers directly within a chat thread.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Voice Messages. Open the Inbox tab, tap on a chat thread, press and hold the microphone icon next to the chat bar to record a voice message, and release to send.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Creator Rewards Program
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Pays eligible creators based on the high-quality views and engagement of original videos that are longer than 60 seconds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Payout Systems. Navigate to Profile > Settings > Creator Tools > Creator Rewards Program. If you meet the criteria (10k+ followers, 100k+ views in 30 days), tap "Apply."

### 22. TikTok Creator Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables eligible creators to offer recurring monthly paid subscriptions in exchange for exclusive perks, such as custom subscriber badges, exclusive emotes, subscriber-only chat mode during streams, and subscriber-only video content.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: TikTok Creator Paywalls. Navigate to Profile > Settings and Privacy > Creator Tools > Subscription. If eligible, set up a monthly subscription price tier, customize badges/emotes, and publish exclusive videos or toggle subscriber-only chat.

### 23. LIVE Gifts & Diamonds
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows LIVE streamers to collect virtual gifts from viewers, which accumulate as Diamonds and can be withdrawn as cash.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Streamer Virtual Tips. Start a LIVE broadcast, and viewers will see a "Gift" icon at the bottom of their screen. Viewers buy Coins to send gifts.

### 24. Creator Marketplace
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: The official platform connecting brands with TikTok creators for sponsored campaigns and collaboration deals.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sponsored Deal Directories. Go to Settings > Creator Tools > Creator Marketplace, register your profile, set baseline rates, and select content niches.

### 25. TikTok Shop Storefront Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows brands and registered sellers to exhibit products directly on their profile under a shopping tab.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: E-Commerce Shop Integration. Set up a TikTok Shop Seller account via Seller Center, link your official TikTok account, and upload inventory to create a shopping bag tab on your profile.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Creator Analytics Portal
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays detailed metrics on account growth, profile views, video view trends, and specific content performance parameters.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Page Metrics Console. Open Settings and Privacy > Creator Tools > Analytics to access charts detailing video views, profile views, likes, comments, shares, and follower growth patterns.

### 27. LIVE Analytics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks real-time and historical LIVE streaming metrics including total play time, viewer retention, diamond earnings, and new subscriber growth.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Performance Insights. Go to Creator Tools > LIVE Center > LIVE Analytics to view comprehensive summaries of broadcast length, peak viewer counts, and earnings breakdowns.

### 28. Web Content Scheduler
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators to schedule video posts in advance via the TikTok desktop web portal.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: TikTok Web Publisher. Log in to your TikTok account on a desktop web browser, click the upload icon, select your video file, write your caption, toggle "Schedule video," choose the target publish date and time, and click schedule.

### 29. Promote Tool
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators and businesses to pay to boost video reach, choose specific engagement goals, and define target audience segments.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: In-App Advertising Campaigns. Tap the three-dot menu on any of your public videos, select "Promote," choose a goal (e.g., more video views, website visits, or followers), configure the budget and duration, and select your target demographics.

### 30. TikTok Creative Center Trends
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators and businesses to search and analyze trending music tracks, hashtags, creators, and popular videos in real time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Trend Research Database. Access the portal at `ads.tiktok.com/business/creativecenter/trends` via a web browser to filter trending audio and keywords by region, industry, and time range.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Filter Video Keywords
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Excludes videos containing specified tags or keywords in captions from showing up on your feeds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Feed Content Filtering. Navigate to Settings > Content Preferences > Filter video keywords, tap "Add keyword," type restricted words, and select target feeds.

### 32. Family Pairing
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Connects a parent's TikTok account to their teen's account to remotely manage screen time, DMs, and content filters.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Parental Control Linking. Open Settings > Family Pairing on both devices. Scan the QR code displayed on the parent's device using the teen's phone.

### 33. Bulk Comment Management
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows creators to delete, report, or block multiple accounts in bulk (up to 100 at once) from their comment section.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mass Comment Moderation. Long-press a comment, tap "Manage multiple comments," select up to 100 comments, and select "Delete," "Report," or "Block."

### 34. Filter Comment Keywords
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically hides comments on your videos if they contain specific keywords you define.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Moderation Filter lists. Navigate to Creator Tools > Settings > Comments. Toggle "Filter keywords" to active, tap "Add keywords," and type your terms.

### 35. DM Permission Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts incoming direct messages based on relationship status to prevent unsolicited messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inbox Gating. Go to Settings > Privacy > Direct Messages. Select from: Everyone, Suggested Friends, or No One.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Screen Time Breaks & Daily Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Limits app usage by locking the app or displaying a fullscreen reminder after reaching a custom time threshold.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Screen Time Limiters. Go to Settings > Screen Time > Daily Screen Time, set a limit (e.g., 60 minutes), and establish a passcode to lock the app.

### 37. Notification Category Mutes
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggle notifications individually for likes, comments, live events, and video recommendations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Push Alerts. Go to Settings > Push Notifications, and toggle the individual sliders off/on for likes, comments, or direct messages.

### 38. Sleep Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Alerts users to close the app at bedtime and mutes push notifications during their sleeping window.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sleep Breaks. Go to Settings > Screen Time > Sleep Reminders, set your sleep time, and enable notifications to turn off during this window.

### 39. Push Notifications Scheduling
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Restricts push notifications from being delivered to the device during set hours of the day.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Notification Time Gating. Navigate to Settings > Push Notifications > Notification Schedule, and select hours to pause notifications (e.g., 9:00 PM to 7:00 AM).

### 40. Screen Time Dashboard
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Displays a comprehensive dashboard showing total daily and nightly app usage, open frequencies, and break histories.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Usage Metrics tracking. Navigate to Settings > Screen Time. Review visual bar charts detailing total screen hours per day/week.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. TikTok Login API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: OAuth login enabling users to sign in to third-party applications securely using their TikTok credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: OAuth Sign-In. Connect via developer SDKs using the platform's OAuth endpoints to verify user profiles.

### 42. TikTok Display API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Enables developers to securely fetch and display a user's public TikTok profile information, video feeds, and media metadata on third-party websites or applications after obtaining user consent.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: External Video Feeds. Register an application on the TikTok Developer Portal, request approval for the "Display API" scope, implement the OAuth authorization flow, and call the `/video/list/` or `/user/info/` endpoints to retrieve and render the user's video list or profile details on external platforms.

### 43. TikTok Content Posting API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows third-party developer platforms (e.g., Hootsuite, Sprout Social) to schedule and publish video posts programmatically.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Posting APIs. Authorized partners configure developer API keys and submit video binaries and captions to the content posting endpoint.

### 44. TikTok Research API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic access for academic researchers to fetch public TikTok account information, video metadata, comments, and query performance data.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Academic Research Queries. Register the research project on the TikTok Developer portal, request access to the Research API, obtain developer credentials, and send queries to the endpoint https://open.tiktokapis.com/v2/research/video/query/ to download public post logs for social science research.

### 45. TikTok Webhooks API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Delivers real-time HTTP POST events to external server endpoints when users perform specific actions, such as video uploads or profile updates.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Webhook Server Subscriptions. Configured in the TikTok Developer Console by registering a secure endpoint URL, validating it via challenge-response, and selecting event scopes like video posting alerts.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Two-Step Verification (SMS/Email)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Protects account login via secondary verification codes sent to external phone numbers or email addresses.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Two-Step Login Security. Navigate to Settings > Security > 2-Step Verification, select SMS, Email, or Authenticator App, and verify your credentials.

### 47. Device Session Manager & Remote Logout
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays all devices currently logged into your account and provides instant remote sign-out.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Remote Session Termination. Go to Settings > Security > Manage devices, review active devices, and tap the trash can icon to log out unrecognized logins.

### 48. Verification Badge Application Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: In-app portal to apply for verification checkmarks to verify public profiles and brand identities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Verification. Navigate to Settings > Account > Request verification, upload credentials or business licenses, and submit.

### 49. Download Your Data
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Request a downloadable archive containing all your video history, comments, draft metadata, and profile settings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: GDPR Data Access. Settings > Privacy > Download your data. Select TXT or JSON format, and request the zip file.

### 50. Switch to Business Account
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Toggles account type from personal to professional to access advanced commercial tools, page statistics, and auto-publishing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Type Toggling. Navigate to Settings > Account > Switch to Business Account, select your business category, and complete onboarding.

---

### Platform: Twitch

This document compiles the feature research for Twitch, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Twitch Studio Broadcasting
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A free, dedicated desktop streaming software designed by Twitch for new creators to set up their stream layout. It provides guided optimization steps to configure encoder, microphone, and webcam settings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Broadcasting Software. Download and install Twitch Studio from `twitch.tv/broadcast/studio`, log in with Twitch credentials, run the guided optimization setup to configure encoder settings, and click "Start Stream" to go live.

### 2. Twitch Soundtrack Integration
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A tool that provides creators with a library of rights-cleared music that can be integrated into live streams. It routes the music audio to a separate channel so it does not appear in recorded VOD archives, avoiding copyright strikes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Management. Download the Soundtrack app on desktop, set up your audio routing to output Soundtrack audio to a secondary channel, and play music during live broadcasts.

### 3. Twitch Stream Marker Placement
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows streamers and editors to mark specific timestamps during a live broadcast. These markers help editors quickly locate highlights and key moments when creating VOD summaries later.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Timeline Tagging. Click the "Add Stream Marker" button in the Quick Actions widget on the Creator Dashboard, or type `/marker [description]` in the chat window during a live stream.

### 4. Twitch Clips Creation Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables viewers and creators to capture and edit short, vertical or horizontal video segments from a live stream or VOD. These clips are saved to the platform and can be shared externally to social media channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Vertical Video Clips. Click the clip icon (movie clapboard) at the bottom-right of the video player, adjust the sliders to select the desired start and end times, write a title, and click "Publish."

### 5. Twitch Guest Star
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A built-in browser-based tool that lets creators invite guests, co-hosts, or viewers directly into their stream. It automatically handles webcam and audio feeds, integrating them directly into the broadcast layout.
