- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Broadcast Layouts. Open the Stream Manager in the Creator Dashboard, click "Guest Star" in the quick actions menu, set up your guest slot, generate an invite link, and send it to your guest to join.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Twitch Category Browse Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A directory of live broadcasts grouped by specific video games, creative topics, or real-life activities. Users can browse categories sorted by current view counts to discover new creators.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Directory Search. Click the "Browse" tab in the top navigation bar, filter by "Categories," and click on a game or topic card (e.g., "Just Chatting") to see all active streams in that category.

### 7. Twitch Stream Tag Filtering
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to filter the browse directories by specific creator-defined tags such as gameplay style or language. This helps viewers find niche communities and streams that match their exact interests.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Tag Filtering. Navigate to the Browse tab, click the search bar inside the browse page, type or select specific tags (e.g., "Speedrun" or "No Backseating"), and view the filtered results.

### 8. Twitch Recommendation Carousel
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dynamic carousel on the home page highlighting live channels, category previews, and promotional broadcasts. The content is personalized based on the user's historical viewing habits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Personalized Discovery Feed. Navigate to `twitch.tv` (or open the home screen on mobile) and scroll or swipe left/right on the main banner carousel to preview active streams.

### 9. Twitch Live Directory Sidebar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A vertical sidebar on the desktop interface that lists followed active channels and recommended streams. It allows users to quickly navigate between live channels without leaving their current screen.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sidebar Discovery. Access the left-hand panel of the desktop interface to see online followed channels, or click the collapse/expand arrow at the top-left to hide or show the sidebar.

### 10. Twitch Drops Discovery Page
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated discovery directory showing which active streams have enabled in-game loot drops for viewers. Users can track their progress toward earning rewards by watching these channels.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Drops Directory. Open the profile menu dropdown, click "Drops & Rewards," and select "All Campaigns" to see active and upcoming in-game drops, with direct links to participating live streams.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Twitch Live Chat Window
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A real-time, side-car text communication pane allowing viewers to chat with the creator and other audience members. It fosters community discussion and interactive engagement during live broadcasts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Community Chat. Located on the right side of the video player on desktop or below the player on mobile. Type a message in the text input box and press enter to post.

### 12. Twitch Channel Points Rewards
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A customizable rewards program where viewers earn points for watch time and redeem them for channel-specific perks. Creators can customize the point costs and reward options to fit their brand.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Loyalty Rewards. Tap the circular points icon at the bottom of the chat window to open the rewards store, select a reward (e.g., "Highlight My Message"), and click redeem.

### 13. Twitch Chat Predictions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: An interactive tool where creators set a question and viewers use their earned Channel Points to predict the outcome. It increases chat activity and viewer retention during key gameplay moments.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Chat Betting. Initiated by creators or moderators via the `/prediction` command in chat. Viewers vote by selecting an outcome panel that appears at the top of the chat window.

### 14. Twitch Chat Polls
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Real-time interactive questionnaires launched by streamers or moderators to collect community votes on specific topics. Results are updated live in a visual bar at the top of the chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Polls. Created by typing `/poll` in chat or via the Quick Actions panel in the Creator Dashboard. Viewers vote by clicking their desired response button in the chat overlay.

### 15. Twitch Hype Train Event
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A community-wide celebration triggered when a surge of support (subscriptions or bits) occurs in a channel. Viewers collaborate to fill a progress bar and unlock exclusive channel emotes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collective Event Rewards. Triggered automatically when threshold levels of bits or subscriptions are met. Viewers participate by clicking the "Cheer" or "Subscribe" buttons on the Hype Train overlay at the top of the chat window.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Twitch Whispers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A private, direct messaging tool that allows two users to send private text messages to each other on the platform. It enables one-on-one communication outside of public channel chat rooms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Direct Messaging. Click the Whisper icon (chat bubble with lines) in the top-right corner of the screen, search for a username, and select them to open a private chat bubble.

### 17. Twitch Chat Mentions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A chat notification mechanism that highlights a message for a specific user and alerts them inside the active chat window. It changes the message background color and plays an optional notification sound.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: User Mention Alerts. Type `@` followed by the recipient's username in the chat input, choose the name from the autocomplete dropdown, and submit the message.

### 18. Twitch Chat Whisper Command
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A chat command that enables starting or sending a private Whisper message directly from the public chat feed interface. It provides a quick shortcut for users without needing to open the dedicated whisper panel.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Command Whispering. Type `/w [username] [message]` in the public chat input bar of any channel and press enter to send the message privately to that user.

### 19. Twitch Whisper Block Settings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A privacy filter that blocks users who are not friends from sending private Whisper messages. It helps reduce spam and unwanted messages from strangers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Direct Message Filtering. Go to Settings > Security and Privacy, scroll down to "Privacy," and toggle the "Block Whispers from Strangers" setting to active.

### 20. Twitch Friend List Status
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A presence indicator displaying which of your followed friends are online, offline, or busy. It allows you to see what streams your friends are watching and send them direct messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Friend Presence Tracker. Click the Whispers button or search for friends on the left panel, view the colored presence dot (green for online), and click on their name to message them.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Twitch Bits and Cheering
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A virtual item purchased by viewers to show support for creators in chat, which triggers animated emotes. Cheering with bits contributes directly to the creator's revenue.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Virtual Cheering Currency. Purchase Bits by clicking the Bits icon in the chat input box. Cheer during a live stream by typing `cheer100` (or selecting a Cheer emote) in the chat window.

### 22. Twitch Channel Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A recurring monthly payment made by viewers to support a channel. Subscribing unlocks custom emotes, loyalty badges, and ad-free viewing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Recurring Channel Support. Click the purple "Subscribe" button below the video player of a partnered/affiliated channel, select the tier, and complete checkout.

### 23. Twitch Gifted Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows viewers to purchase a channel subscription for another specific user or random community members in chat. It is a popular way for viewers to support both the creator and the community.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Peer Subscription Gifting. Click the "Subscribe" (or "Gift a Sub") button, select "Gift to a specific viewer" or "Gift to the community," choose the number of subs, and complete the purchase.

### 24. Twitch Prime Gaming Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A free monthly channel subscription benefit included for users who link their Amazon Prime account to Twitch. It allows Prime members to support their favorite creator at no extra cost.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bundled Subscription Benefit. Link Amazon Prime in Twitch settings, then click the "Subscribe" button on any partner or affiliate channel, and select "Use Prime Sub" checkbox before checking out.

### 25. Twitch Turbo Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A platform-wide premium monthly subscription service that provides ad-free viewing across all channels on Twitch. It also grants subscribers an exclusive chat badge and custom emote colors.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Platform Ad-Free Pass. Visit `twitch.tv/turbo`, click "Subscribe to Twitch Turbo," and complete the payment details.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Twitch Creator Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: The central administration portal that provides creators with all the tools, layouts, and data feeds necessary to run a live broadcast. Streamers can customize widgets, edit stream info, and view live chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Control Panel. Navigate to `dashboard.twitch.tv` (or select "Creator Dashboard" from the profile dropdown) to manage layouts, widgets, and stream status.

### 27. Twitch Stream Summary Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A post-broadcast analytics report summarizing viewer peaks, average viewership, new followers, and chat engagement metrics. It helps creators analyze stream performance trends over time.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post-Stream Dashboard. Access this report by navigating to Creator Dashboard > Analytics > Stream Summary, where you can select specific historical stream dates to review charts.

### 28. Twitch Revenue Analytics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An itemized earnings report that displays exact revenue generated from subscriptions, advertisements, game sales, and bits. It provides creators with transparent payout logs and historical financial summaries.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Income Visualizer. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Analytics > Earnings, and use the interactive date picker to see charts of revenue sources and payout history.

### 29. Twitch Custom Emote Management
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A creator portal for uploading, organizing, and assigning custom subscriber emojis for various subscription tiers. It allows creators to customize their brand presence in chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Emote Upload Suite. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Viewer Rewards > Emotes, select a subscription tier, drag and drop the PNG files, and click "Submit."

### 30. Twitch Streamer Ad Manager
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An automation tool that helps creators schedule, set up, and automate mid-roll ad breaks during their live broadcasts. It allows streamers to optimize ad revenue without manually triggering breaks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Ad Scheduling. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Partner/Affiliate > Ad Manager, configure the ad spacing duration (e.g., 3 minutes of ads every hour), and toggle the schedule to active.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Twitch AutoMod
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated content moderation system that uses machine learning to screen chat messages and hold inappropriate content. It filters messages before they appear in public chat, waiting for moderator approval.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Chat Moderation. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Moderation > AutoMod Controls, and adjust the filtering sensitivity levels (1 to 4) for categories like hostility or profanity.

### 32. Twitch Moderator View
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A specialized, customizable channel interface tailored for moderators to view chat, track user histories, and perform mod actions. It organizes moderation tools into a single, high-efficiency dashboard.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Moderator Command Hub. Navigate to a channel's chat, click the sword icon at the bottom of the chat panel, or go directly to `twitch.tv/moderator/[channel_name]`.

### 33. Twitch Shield Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An emergency button that allows streamers and moderators to instantly activate stricter chat restrictions during spam or hate attacks. It helps quickly lock down a channel to protect the community.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: One-Tap Panic Settings. Type `/shield` in chat or click the Shield icon in the chat feed or Mod View to activate pre-configured safety measures like chat phone-verification.

### 34. Twitch Ban Evasion Detection
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A machine learning system that automatically scans chatters and flags users who are suspected of bypassing channel bans. It identifies alternative accounts linked to banned users to prevent harassment.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ban Evasion Blocker. Go to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Moderation > Suspicious User Controls, and select whether to "Restrict" or "Monitor" suspected ban evaders.

### 35. Twitch Suspicious User Controls
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows streamers and moderators to manually tag, monitor, and restrict chatters who exhibit suspicious behavior. It helps moderation teams track potential troublemakers without banning them outright.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Selective Chat Monitoring. Click a user’s name in chat to open their viewer card, click the moderation cog icon, and select "Add to monitored list" or "Add to restricted list."

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Twitch Live Push Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Instant notifications sent to mobile devices or desktop browsers when a followed channel initiates a live broadcast. It alerts viewers so they can tune in immediately.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Go-Live Alerts. Open a creator's channel page, click the follow heart icon, and toggle the bell icon to enable or disable go-live notifications.

### 37. Twitch VOD Watch History
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Tracks user progress through video-on-demand (VOD) archives, enabling them to resume long videos from the exact point they left. It provides a convenient way to watch long broadcasts in multiple sessions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Resume Video Progress. Navigate to the Twitch homepage or mobile application and view the "Continue Watching" row to click and load active video history.

### 38. Twitch Snooze Live Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A utility that lets viewers temporarily snooze or silence push notifications for followed channels. It helps users manage interruptions during busy or quiet periods of their day.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Push Notification Muting. Tap and hold a Twitch push notification on your mobile lock screen, and select the option to snooze go-live notifications for the next 1, 2, or 24 hours.

### 39. Twitch Chat Feed Pausing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Stops the live scrolling of chat when a user scrolls up, preventing them from losing their place. It is useful for reading older messages in fast-moving chat rooms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Manual Chat Review. Scroll up inside the chat pane during a high-activity live stream; a "Chat Paused" banner will appear at the bottom. Scroll to the bottom to resume scrolling.

### 40. Twitch Email Broadcast Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automated email notifications dispatched to the user's inbox summarizing active stream categories, titles, and thumbnails. It keeps offline users updated on their favorite streamers' schedules.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Alert Preferences. Go to Settings > Notifications > Email, and toggle the "Live Broadcast" alerts checkbox on or off for the entire account or specific channels.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. Twitch API Helix
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic HTTP interface (Helix) allowing developers to query live stream statuses, fetch user profiles, and search games. It is the primary REST API used to integrate Twitch features into third-party apps.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RESTful API Endpoint. Log in to the Twitch Developer Portal, register an application to generate a Client ID and secret, obtain an OAuth token, and perform GET requests to endpoints like `https://api.twitch.tv/helix/streams`.

### 42. Twitch EventSub Webhooks
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A subscription-based webhook service that pushes real-time JSON event payloads to developer servers for events like new followers or subs. It eliminates the need for developers to poll the API for changes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Real-time Webhooks. Send a POST request to `https://api.twitch.tv/helix/eventsub/subscriptions` specifying the event type (e.g., `channel.follow`), callback URL, and signature secret.

### 43. Twitch Chat WebSocket Protocol
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A WebSocket interface using IRC protocol standards that allows custom chat bots to read, write, and manage messages. It enables programmatic interaction with live stream chat rooms.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: WebSocket Chat Connection. Establish a connection to `wss://irc-ws.chat.twitch.tv:443` via an IRC client or script, send credentials (`PASS oauth:token` and `NICK username`), and join channels to listen for events.

### 44. Twitch Extensions SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A JavaScript helper library and developer framework that allows building interactive web-overlays or panels. It lets developers build interactive mini-apps directly on the video player.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Overlay SDK. Create a project in the Twitch Developer console, import the `twitch-ext.min.js` script into your HTML/JS overlay bundle, and utilize the `window.Twitch.ext` listener.

### 45. Twitch OAuth 2.0 Authentication Service
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: The industry-standard secure authentication flow used by developers to request specific permission scopes from Twitch users. It secures user data while allowing third-party tools to access necessary account functions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Authentication API. Direct users to `https://id.twitch.tv/oauth2/authorize` with query parameters specifying `client_id`, `redirect_uri`, and required permission `scope` to receive authorization codes.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Twitch Two-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A security setting requiring users to enter a mobile verification code in addition to their password during login. It protects accounts from unauthorized access attempts and credential leaks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Security Verification. Go to Settings > Security and Privacy > Two-Factor Authentication, click "Set Up Two-Factor Authentication," verify your phone number, and connect an app like Authy or Google Authenticator.

### 47. Twitch Connected Third-Party Accounts
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to link their Twitch account to third-party services like Amazon, Discord, Steam, and Battle.net. It enables cross-platform game rewards, sharing subscription statuses, and profile integrations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Account Linking. Go to Settings > Connections, locate the desired third-party application, click the "Connect" button, and approve the connection in the pop-up window.

### 48. Twitch Login Device History
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: An audit log displaying recent devices, browser types, dates, and geographic locations that have logged into the account. It allows users to monitor account activity and revoke access to unrecognized devices.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Security Device Management. Navigate to Settings > Security and Privacy, scroll to "Security," and inspect the active list of devices or click "Log Out From All Devices" to revoke access.

### 49. Twitch Username Cooldown Release
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A settings control that allows users to change their display username, releasing their old name back into the pool after a cooldown. It helps users rebrand their accounts while maintaining their existing followers.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Re-naming. Go to Settings > Profile, click the edit pencil icon next to the "Username" field, enter a new available username, and click "Save."

### 50. Twitch Creator Agreement Dashboard
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: An account portal containing the Twitch Affiliate or Partner contracts, tax documents, and payout preference selections. It allows streamers to review their legal agreements and update payment methods.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Agreement Management. Navigate to Creator Dashboard > Settings > Partner or Affiliate, click on "Affiliate Onboarding," and fill out or review the active tax and payout information forms.

---

### Platform: WhatsApp

This document compiles the feature research for WhatsApp, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Status Updates
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to share text, photo, video, and voice note updates that disappear after 24 hours.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Status. Tap the camera icon in the Updates tab to capture/select media, or the pencil icon for text, and share to Status.

### 2. Disappearing Messages
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically deletes messages in a chat after a pre-selected duration of 24 hours, 7 days, or 90 days.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ephemeral Chats. Open chat settings, tap "Disappearing messages," and select the default message timer.

### 3. View-Once Media
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables photos and videos to be viewed only once by the recipient, deleting automatically after being opened.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Single-view Media. Tap the '1' icon in the caption box when sending a photo or video to enable View-Once mode.

### 4. In-App Photo Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides tools to crop, add text, draw, apply filters, and pixelate sensitive parts of photos before sending.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Built-in Media Editor. Tap the camera icon or attach a photo in a chat, then use the toolbar at the top of the editing screen to customize.

### 5. Voice Note Waveform Preview
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Displays a visual waveform of a voice message as it is recorded or played back, allowing users to pause and preview before sending.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Recorder. Swipe up on the microphone icon in a chat to lock the recording, view the waveform preview, and play or delete before sending.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Updates Tab Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Consolidates Status updates from contacts and channels followed by the user into a dedicated tab for browsing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Status Feed. Tap the "Updates" tab at the bottom navigation bar to view vertical lists of channels and horizontal Status previews.

### 7. Channel Search Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to discover and subscribe to public broadcast channels by category, region, or popularity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Directory Browsing. Tap "Find Channels" in the Updates tab, filter by region/category, or search keywords, and tap "+" to follow.

### 8. Deep Chat Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Enables searching for specific keywords, messages, links, media, or documents within an individual chat or across all chats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat Query Tool. Tap the search icon at the top of the Chats list to query all chats, or tap a chat's header and select "Search" for deep contextual queries.

### 9. Pin Chats
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Keeps important individual or group chats at the top of the chats list for quick and easy access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Priority Chats. Tap and hold a chat in the list (on mobile) or swipe right, then tap the pin icon to secure it at the top (maximum of 3 chats).

### 10. Chat Archiving
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Moves inactive or low-priority chats out of the main chats list into an Archived folder without deleting them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Folder Storage. Long-press a chat and select the Archive icon (box with down arrow). Access archived chats by tapping "Archived" at the top of the Chats list.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. Group Chats
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates shared chat rooms where up to 1024 members can exchange messages, media, and participate in calls.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Collaboration. Tap the new chat icon, select "New Group," add participants from contacts, enter a group name, and tap "Create."

### 12. Communities Hub
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Links multiple related group chats under a single umbrella community, facilitating organized announcements and discussions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Organizational Portal. Tap the Communities tab, select "New Community," set the name, and link existing groups or create new sub-groups.

### 13. Group Call Screen Sharing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to share their mobile or desktop screen with participants during a live WhatsApp video call.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Video. During a video call, tap the screen sharing icon (a phone with an arrow) to broadcast your device's display.

### 14. Message Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Lets users react to messages using any emoji, avoiding unnecessary clutter in conversations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Emoji Feedback. Long-press a message and select one of the default emojis, or tap the "+" icon to choose any emoji from the keyboard.

### 15. In-Chat Polls
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to create multiple-choice polls within individual or group chats to collect quick feedback.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Survey Utility. Tap the attachment icon (paperclip/plus), select "Poll," input the question and options, and tap send.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. Hands-Free Voice Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record voice messages without holding down the microphone button.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Hands-Free Recording. Tap and hold the microphone icon in a chat, then swipe up towards the padlock icon to lock the recording in hands-free mode.

### 17. Instant Video Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send circular, short-form video messages up to 60 seconds directly in a chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Round Video Messages. Tap the microphone icon to toggle to video mode, then long-press or swipe up to record a hands-free circular video message.

### 18. Live Location Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shares a user's real-time physical location with a chat for a set duration of 15 minutes, 1 hour, or 8 hours.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Geo-tracking. Tap the attachment icon, select "Location," tap "Share live location," choose the duration, and tap send.

### 19. Contact Cards
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shares a contact's phone number, name, and profile details directly into a chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: VCard Share. Tap the attachment icon, select "Contact," choose one or more contacts from your address book, and send as a card.

### 20. Document Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends documents and files of various formats (PDF, DOCX, ZIP) up to 2GB in size directly through a chat.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: File Transfer. Tap the attachment icon, select "Document," browse local files or cloud storage, and choose the file to transmit.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Business Catalog Showcase
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows businesses to display their products and services directly on their WhatsApp Business profile with prices, descriptions, and links.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Virtual Storefront. In WhatsApp Business settings, go to Business tools > Catalog, tap "Add new item," upload photos, enter details, and save.

### 22. In-Chat Payments
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables users to send and receive money securely directly within a WhatsApp chat using linked bank accounts or payment gateways.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Peer-to-Peer Payments. Tap the attachment icon or the currency symbol in a chat, enter the amount, authenticate with a PIN/biometrics, and send.

### 23. E-Commerce Cart
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows customers to browse a business's catalog, add multiple items to a shopping cart, and send the order as a single message.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Conversational Cart. When viewing a business catalog, tap "Add to cart" on items, then tap the cart icon to review and send the selected order.

### 24. Quick Reply Business Templates
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables businesses to save and reuse frequent messages to answer common customer inquiries rapidly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Response Automation. In Business settings, go to Quick replies. Set keyboard shortcuts (e.g. "/thanks") that expand into full messages.

### 25. Click-to-WhatsApp Ads
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows businesses to run ads on Facebook or Instagram that open a WhatsApp chat window with the business when clicked.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ad Integration. Created via Meta Ads Manager. Select "WhatsApp" as the messaging app destination to link social media ads directly to chats.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Business Profile Details
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides businesses with an enhanced profile page listing operational hours, address, website, email, and business description.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Business Registry. Configure in Business settings > Business profile. Fill in fields to display professional credentials to customers.

### 27. Broadcast Lists
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows users to send a single message to multiple contacts simultaneously without creating a group chat, delivered as individual messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bulk Notification. Tap "Broadcast Lists" (iOS) or the menu icon and "New broadcast" (Android), select contacts, and send messages.

### 28. WhatsApp Business API
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Connects medium and large businesses with customers at scale using automated backend integrations, custom CRM platforms, and chatbots.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Scale Developer Tool. Configured via the Meta Developer Portal. Integrates with existing customer service databases and ERP systems.

### 29. Messaging Statistics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays basic statistics on the number of messages sent, delivered, read, and received.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Metrics Dashboard. In WhatsApp Business, go to Settings > Business tools > Stats to view analytical counts of chat interactions.

### 30. Automated Greetings
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Automatically sends a greeting message to customers when they first message the business or after 14 days of inactivity.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Greeting Automation. In Business settings > Greeting message, toggle the message on, customize the text, and select the recipients.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. End-to-End Encryption
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures all text, voice, media, and call data so that only the sender and recipient can read or listen to them.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Security Protocol. Activated automatically by default for all chats. Tap a contact's name in a chat, then tap "Encryption" to verify the 60-digit security code.

### 32. Chat Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures specific chat threads behind a device passcode, face ID, or fingerprint lock, keeping them hidden from the main chats list.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Locked Chats Folder. Tap the contact or group name in a chat, select "Chat lock," toggle it on, and authenticate. Access via the hidden "Locked Chats" folder.

### 33. Biometric Screen Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires Face ID, Touch ID, or passcode to open the WhatsApp application on the device.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: App Lock. Go to Settings > Privacy > App Lock / Screen Lock, enable the toggle, and select the timeout duration (e.g. immediately or after 1 minute).

### 34. Silence Unknown Callers
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically silences calls from numbers not saved in the contact list, listing them in the Calls tab.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Spam Prevention. Navigate to Settings > Privacy > Calls, and toggle "Silence unknown callers" to on.

### 35. View-Once Screenshot Blocking
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents recipients from taking screenshots or screen recordings of media sent using the "View-Once" feature.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: DRM Protection. Enforced automatically by the platform; attempting to capture a screenshot displays a blocked message screen.

---

## Category 8: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 36. Cloud API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to host the WhatsApp Business API on Meta's servers, facilitating quick setups and messaging capabilities.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Serverless API. Set up on the Meta Developers Platform by adding the WhatsApp product to an app and generating access tokens.

### 37. Developer Webhooks
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Receives real-time HTTP POST notifications of inbound messages, delivery statuses, and user interactions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Listener. Configure the callback URL and verification token in the Webhooks section of the Meta Developer Console.

### 38. Custom wa.me Links
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Generates a short URL that allows users or customers to open a chat directly with a specific phone number.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chat URL. Format the link as `https://wa.me/<number>` where `<number>` is the full phone number in international format.

### 39. Embedded Signup Flow
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates an onboard portal on developer websites to allow clients to register their phone numbers for WhatsApp API.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Partner Onboarding. Add the JavaScript SDK and Meta login buttons to initiate the WhatsApp Business Account setup.

### 40. Contact Sync API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Synchronizes the device's address book with WhatsApp to identify which contacts are active users.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sync Engine. Request address book permissions on mobile OS, then make secure hashing queries to WhatsApp's servers.

---

## Category 9: Notifications & Time Management

### 41. Custom Group Tones
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sets unique notification sounds and vibration patterns for specific group or individual chats.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Customization. Tap the group/contact name, select "Custom notifications," check "Use custom notifications," and select the tone.

### 42. Chat Mute Options
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notification sounds and alerts for specific chats for 8 hours, 1 week, or Always.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Suppression. Long-press a chat in the chats list, tap the speaker icon at the top (or swipe on iOS), and select the mute duration.

### 43. High Priority Previews
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Displays notification previews at the top of the device screen, showing the sender and message snippet even when the device is locked.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Push Settings. Go to Settings > Notifications, and toggle "Use high priority notifications" to control preview displays.

### 44. DND Mode Silence
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically silences incoming voice and video calls when the device is set to Do Not Disturb mode.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: OS Integration. Inherits settings from the Android or iOS Do Not Disturb configuration without requiring in-app setup.

### 45. Notification Vibrate Toggles
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures the vibration pattern length (Default, Short, Long, or Off) for new incoming chat notifications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Haptic Feedback. Go to Settings > Notifications > Vibrate, and select the desired haptic feedback duration.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Change Number Wizard
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Transfers account details, groups, and settings from an old phone number to a new phone number.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Migration. Go to Settings > Account > Change number, enter the old and new phone numbers, and verify via SMS.

### 47. Passkey Logins
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to log back into their WhatsApp account using biometric authentication (face or fingerprint) or device lock pin.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Passwordless Auth. Go to Settings > Account > Passkeys, and tap "Create passkey" to link the account to the device's key store.

### 48. Two-Step Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Requires a custom 6-digit PIN when registering the phone number with WhatsApp again to prevent unauthorized access.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Two-Factor Verification. Go to Settings > Account > Two-step verification, tap "Enable," set the PIN, and add an email address.

### 49. Request Account Info
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates a downloadable report of account information, settings, and profile details (excluding messages).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: GDPR Data Request. Go to Settings > Account > Request account info, tap "Request report," and download the ZIP file once ready (typically 3 days).

### 50. Encrypted Cloud Backups
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Encrypts chat histories stored in iCloud or Google Drive with a custom password or 64-digit key.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Secure Backup. Go to Settings > Chats > Chat backup > End-to-end encrypted backup, tap "Turn on," and set the password.

---

### Platform: X

This document compiles the feature research for X/Twitter, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. Long-form Posts (Articles)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to write posts containing up to 25,000 characters, supporting rich text formatting such as bold, italics, bulleted lists, and inline media embeds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Rich Text Articles. Available to Premium and Premium+ subscribers; composed using the standard post editor on web or mobile, which automatically switches to long-form mode once the 280-character threshold is crossed.

### 2. Drafts Saving & Scheduling
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to write posts and schedule them to be published at a specific future date and time, or save them as drafts for editing later.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post Scheduler. Accessed via the calendar icon in the post composer on the web client. Drafts are synchronized locally on mobile devices and accessible via the "Drafts" folder.

### 3. Interactive Polls
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to embed a poll within a post, offering up to four response options and a customizable voting duration.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Poll Creator. Triggered by clicking the bar graph icon in the post composer. Voting durations range from 5 minutes to 7 days. Results display in real-time.

### 4. Post Threading (Thread Composer)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Chains multiple posts together sequentially, allowing creators to tell longer stories or present multi-part ideas in a structured, connected format.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Multi-Post Composer. Accessed by clicking the "+" button within the active post composer to add another post to the thread. The entire thread can be published simultaneously.

### 5. Image & Video Editing (In-App)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides built-in filters, cropping tools, sticker overlays, and video trimming tools before publishing media.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Editor. Triggered automatically after uploading a photo or video in the post composer. Users can select aspect ratios and trim videos to a maximum of 2 minutes and 20 seconds (or longer for Premium users).

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. Pinned Custom Lists
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to pin custom curated feeds of specific accounts as swipeable tabs on their home screen, letting them view niche feeds easily.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom Curated Feeds. Created under the "Lists" tab in the navigation bar. Pin up to 5 lists, which will display alongside the "For You" and "Following" tabs.

### 7. Bookmarks Collections
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Enables users to save posts privately, categorizing them into custom folders for easy discovery and retrieval.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Folders. Tap the share icon on any post, select "Bookmark." Premium users can organize bookmarks into folders by tapping "New Folder" inside the Bookmarks tab.

### 8. Topics to Follow
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Feeds the algorithm recommendations by allowing users to follow specific interest topics (e.g., Gaming, Technology) rather than just individual accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interest-Based Algorithmic Filters. Managed in Settings > Privacy and safety > Content you see > Topics. Users can follow, unfollow, or block suggested topics.

### 9. Trending Summarizations (Grok News)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays real-time summaries of current news events and trending hashtags using AI compilation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: AI News Compilation. Appears at the top of the search feed under the "Explore" tab when clicking on a trending news keyword. Summarizes key posts.

### 10. Advanced Search Operators
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to perform precise searches using operators like `from:`, `to:`, `filter:links`, and dates to filter chronological results.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Granular Search Queries. Type query syntax (e.g., `from:X corp since:2026-01-01`) in the top search bar, or click "Advanced search" next to search results.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. X Communities
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Dedicated, semi-private spaces centered around specific topics where users can post content seen primarily by community members.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Niche Sub-Forums. Found via the Communities tab. Community owners can set privacy to "Open," "Restricted," or "Private," and configure unique community moderation rules.

### 12. Pinned Posts in Communities
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables moderators and administrators of an X Community to lock a specific post at the top of the community feed.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Community Announcements. Accessed by clicking the three-dot icon on any post within the community feed and selecting "Pin to Community."

### 13. Spaces (Live Audio)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Hosts or joins live, interactive audio conversations with other users on the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Live Audio Streams. Started by holding the "+" icon on mobile and selecting "Spaces." Hosts can assign up to 2 co-hosts, invite 10 speakers, and record the broadcast.

### 14. Scheduled Spaces
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables hosts to schedule a live audio Space in advance, allowing followers to subscribe to launch notifications and generating a unique shareable link.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Planning. Press and hold the "+" icon in the bottom-right of the mobile app, tap the Spaces icon, select "Schedule for later," choose a date and time, and share the generated scheduling link on the timeline.

### 15. Affiliation Badge (Verified Organizations)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays a square logo icon of a parent company next to an employee's or affiliate's checkmark badge.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Corporate Branding. Managed via the Portal for Verified Organizations, where admin users invite sub-accounts to join, confirming their official affiliation.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. End-to-End Encrypted DMs
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Secures private direct messages between two eligible users using cryptographic encryption, ensuring that X cannot read the messages.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Cryptographic Chats. In the mobile or web app, open a DM chat with an eligible user (both must be verified or Premium subscribers), tap the settings icon, and toggle on "Encryption" to start a secure conversation thread.

### 17. DM Voice Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send audio messages within their private chat threads instead of typing text.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audio Snippets. Accessed by tapping and holding the microphone icon in the chat input bar on the mobile app. Voice recordings are limited to 140 seconds.

### 18. Group DM Administration
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to create group chats with up to 150 participants and manage group-wide settings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Group Moderation. Group creators can add or remove members, change the group photo/name, and generate a shareable join link via the chat info screen.

### 19. DM Reactions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables users to quickly react to any individual direct message with a selection of emoji icons.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Message Reactions. Activated by double-tapping or long-pressing a received message, which displays a horizontal bar of emojis to apply.

### 20. Direct Message Filters & Requests
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Segregates incoming DMs from accounts you do not follow into a separate "Requests" folder, keeping the primary inbox clean.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Inbox Segmentation. Configured in Settings > Privacy and safety > Direct Messages, where users can choose to accept messages from "No one," "Only verified users," or "Everyone."

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. Location Spotlight
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays physical business coordinates, operating hours, contact telephone/email, and a miniature interactive map on the profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Location Maps. Configured through the "Edit Professional Profile" menu. Integrates with maps services to provide routing coordinates.

### 22. Shop Spotlight
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Showcases a carousel of up to five products with price tags directly at the top of a business profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: E-Commerce Showcase. Configured via the Professional Home dashboard by linking a product catalog from supported e-commerce partners (e.g., Shopify).

### 23. Link Spotlight
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Adds a prominent call-to-action button (e.g., "Book Now", "View Menu", "Shop Now") with an external hyperlink directly under the user's bio.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Custom CTA Buttons. Managed via the Profile Edit menu on professional accounts; provides standard CTA labels to improve click-through rates.

### 24. Creator Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to lock specific posts, live spaces, and interactions behind a monthly subscription fee.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subscriber Paywalls. Configured in the Monetization tab. Price points range from $2.99 to $9.99/month. Subscribed users receive a badge next to their names in replies.

### 25. Ad Revenue Sharing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Distributes a portion of the advertisement revenue generated by ads placed in the reply sections of a creator's posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Ads Revenue Share. Tap the profile icon on the top left, tap "Monetization," select "Ad Revenue Sharing," and tap "Join and Setup Payouts" if eligibility is met (requires Stripe account setup).

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. Post Analytics View
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Shows performance statistics for a specific post, detailing impressions, retweets, likes, detail expands, and profile clicks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Performance Metrics. Accessible by tapping the bar chart icon located at the bottom-left of any individual post on mobile or desktop.

### 27. X Ads Manager Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A mobile workspace for creators and professionals to view performance analytics, track growth benchmarks, and monitor monetization accounts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Creator Dashboard Hub. Tap "X Ads Manager Dashboard" on the side menu of the mobile application to access visual summaries of follower counts, impressions, and engagement rates over a 28-day range.

### 28. Media Studio Library
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An advanced web-based dashboard at `studio.x.com` for scheduling videos, editing metadata, managing media libraries, and tracking video-specific analytics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Media Manager. Access `studio.x.com` via a web browser, upload video assets to the library, set titles/descriptions, schedule publication times, and review video view retention graphs.

### 29. X Premium Analytics Portal
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A comprehensive analytics portal at `analytics.x.com` providing account-level summaries, monthly growth parameters, and follower interest trends.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Account Analytics. Log in to `analytics.x.com` on a web browser to review month-over-month summaries of top posts, total post impressions, profile visits, and mention counts.

### 30. X Ads Manager Insights
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An advertising dashboard for tracking campaign reach, tracking pixels, conversion parameters, CPC, and demographic distributions.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Campaign Metrics Tracking. Log in to `ads.x.com`, select "Campaign Manager" to view detailed tables tracking ad impressions, spend, click-through rates (CTR), and custom tracking events.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. Reply Limits
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts who can reply to a specific post, preventing unsolicited comments or targeted harassment.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Comment Gating. Set during post composition using the dropdown menu. Options are: "Everyone," "People you follow," or "Only people you mention."

### 32. Community Notes Contextual System
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows a community-driven moderation group to add helpful context notes to posts that contain misleading information.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Crowdsourced Fact-Checking. On any post containing a Community Note, tap the "Rate this note" button at the bottom of the note container. To apply to write notes, navigate to the web page x.com/i/communitynotes/signup in a browser, log in, verify eligibility, and tap "Join Community Notes."

### 33. Muted Words Filtering
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Hides posts containing specific keywords, phrases, hashtags, or handles from notifications and the timeline.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Keyword Muting. Set in Settings > Privacy and safety > Mute and block > Muted words. Users can choose duration (24 hours, 7 days, 30 days, or forever).

### 34. Hide Replies
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables a post author to hide specific replies to their post, moving them to a hidden tab.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post-Level Hiding. Accessible via the three-dot icon on any reply to the user's post. Moves it to a separate, clickable "Hidden replies" page.

### 35. Private Account (Protected Posts)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Gated posting where only approved followers can view or interact with your posts, preventing public search indexation.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Audience Privacy Settings. Navigate to Settings > Privacy and safety > Audience and tagging, and toggle on "Protect your posts."

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. Quality Filter for Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically filters out duplicate notifications or posts that appear to be automated spam.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Spam Muting. Managed in Notifications > Filters > Quality Filter. Toggling this on uses platform heuristics to silence low-quality activity.

### 37. Mute Notifications Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notifications from accounts based on specific criteria (such as new accounts, or accounts that lack a profile picture).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Advanced Alert Muting. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Preferences > Mute Notifications, and check boxes next to specific criteria (e.g., "Those who don't follow you").

### 38. Email Digest Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Customize frequency and categories of email reports, limiting updates to daily or weekly intervals.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Email Frequencies. Managed under Settings > Notifications > Preferences > Email notifications. Toggle off specific reports or set digests to weekly.

### 39. Smart Push Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Employs machine learning to send push notifications for highlights and posts you are highly likely to engage with.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Push Alerts. Configured under Settings > Notifications > Preferences > Push Notifications. Users toggle "Highlights" or "For You" notifications.

### 40. Notification Sound Customization
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows mobile app users to toggle or change the sound profiles for different alert categories (such as DMs vs mentions).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Alert Tone Settings. Accessible through Settings > Notifications > Preferences, linking to system-level sound settings for the application.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. X API Developer Access (v2)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic access to post, search, and map tweets using developer plans.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: RESTful API Access. Developers create accounts on `developer.x.com` to configure projects, generate access tokens, and access endpoint paths.

### 42. OAuth 2.0 with PKCE Authorization Flow
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Standard security protocol allowing third-party developers to authenticate X users securely with granular scope permissions (read, write, DMs) without exposing user credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Programmatic Login. Managed via `developer.x.com`. Developers configure their client application settings to enable OAuth 2.0, define redirect URIs, select appropriate scopes (e.g., `tweet.read`, `users.read`), and implement the PKCE challenge-verifier exchange.

### 43. X Webhooks (Account Activity API)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Provides real-time notifications of user account activities (such as direct messages, tweets, retweets, and likes) to external developer servers via HTTPS webhooks.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Event Listening. Configured under `developer.x.com` under the Account Activity API dashboard. Developers register a secure HTTPS webhook URL and perform a CRC (Challenge-Response Challenge) handshake to verify the endpoint.

### 44. X Ads API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic access to manage ad campaigns, target audiences, and retrieve campaign performance metrics.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Campaign Ad Automation. Developers obtain API approval, use OAuth access tokens, and send HTTP requests to endpoints like `/2/ads_accounts/{id}/campaigns` to manage ad spend.

### 45. X API v2 DMs Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic endpoint allowing developers to send, receive, and manage direct messages and group conversations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: DM API Integrations. Calls `POST /2/dm_conversations/with/{participant_id}/messages` using OAuth 2.0 user-context tokens to send direct messages programmatically.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. Advanced Security (Two-Factor Authentication)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Adds an extra layer of protection by requiring a secondary verification code during account login.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: X Multi-Factor Settings. Configured in Settings > Security and account access > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Supports security keys, authenticator apps, and SMS.

### 47. Hardware Key Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Supports physical USB or NFC security keys (e.g., YubiKeys) for hardware-based two-factor authentication.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Strong FIDO2 Credentials. Registered in the 2FA settings menu. Users tap their physical hardware key during login to authenticate.

### 48. X Archive Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Request a downloadable ZIP file containing complete account data, post history, media, and search history.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: GDPR Data Export. Settings > Your account > Download an archive of your data. Requires password re-entry and sends download link within 24-48 hours.

### 49. Account Deactivation Loop
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Initiates the deactivation process, which deletes all data permanently after a 30-day recovery window.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Profile Deletion. Accessed in Settings > Your Account > Deactivate your account. Verify password to queue account for permanent deletion.

### 50. Social Sign-In OAuth
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Log in or register new accounts using Google or Apple credentials via secure OAuth protocols.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Federated Sign-On. On the login screen, click "Sign in with Google" or "Sign in with Apple" to skip password entry.

---

### Platform: YouTube

This document compiles the feature research for YouTube, categorized into the reconciled 10-category taxonomy. Each category contains exactly 5 unique, specific, and actionable features, totaling 50 features.

---

## Category 1: Content Creation & Editing

### 1. YouTube Shorts Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A mobile creation tool for recording, editing, and publishing short-form, vertical videos. It provides creators with a library of licensed audio tracks, speed adjustments, recording timers, and a green screen utility.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mobile Video Creator. Open the YouTube mobile app, tap the "+" button in the center of the bottom navigation bar, select "Create a Short," and use the side panel controls to record and edit your video.

### 2. YouTube Video Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A browser-based video editing workspace built directly into the YouTube Studio dashboard. It allows creators to trim or cut video segments, blur sensitive elements (like faces or license plates), and add audio tracks from the royalty-free Audio Library after a video has been uploaded.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Browser-Based Editor. Log in to YouTube Studio, navigate to the "Content" tab, click on the thumbnail of the video you wish to edit, click "Editor" in the left sidebar, and apply your cuts or blur zones.

### 3. YouTube Auto-Generated Captions
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: An automated transcription system that uses machine learning to generate captions for uploaded videos. It automatically creates timed text tracks in multiple supported languages to increase video accessibility.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Automated Captions. Navigate to YouTube Studio > Content, click on your video, select "Subtitles" from the left menu, and choose to publish or edit the auto-generated caption track.

### 4. YouTube Chapter Markers
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Divides long-form videos into distinct, clickable sections on the playback progress bar. This helps viewers navigate to specific topics or highlights easily by referencing time-stamped headings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Time-Stamed Navigation. Open the video details page in YouTube Studio, scroll to the description box, and type a list of timestamps starting with `00:00` followed by a space and the section title.

### 5. YouTube Cards & End Screens
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Clickable visual overlays added to videos to recommend other content, promote merchandise, or encourage channel subscriptions. Cards can appear at any point in the video, while End Screens are placed in the final 5 to 20 seconds.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Screen Overlays. Open your video details in YouTube Studio, click the "End Screen" or "Cards" option in the right-hand panel, select the elements you want to add, and set their timeline positions.

---

## Category 2: Content Discovery & Search

### 6. YouTube Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Refines search queries using granular criteria to locate relevant videos, channels, playlists, or movies. Users can filter results by upload date, video duration, definition formats (such as 4K or HDR), and sort them by relevance or view count.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Query Refinement Tools. Type a search term into the main search bar, press enter, click the "Filters" button at the top of the search results page, and select your desired filtering options.

### 7. YouTube Subscriptions Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated chronological feed that displays newly published videos solely from channels the user has subscribed to. This feed bypasses algorithmic recommendation systems, giving users a simple view of updates from their favorite creators.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Chronological Content Feed. Tap the "Subscriptions" tab in the bottom menu of the mobile app, or click "Subscriptions" in the left sidebar of the desktop browser interface.

### 8. YouTube Explore Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A discovery portal that aggregates trending videos and categorizes content into specific interest hubs. Users can browse dedicated sections for gaming, music, movies, fashion, news, and live broadcasts to find popular videos on the platform.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Topic Trend Directory. Click the "Explore" button in the left-hand navigation pane on desktop, or tap the compass icon in the top-left corner of the mobile app home screen.

### 9. YouTube Recommended Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: The primary feed displayed on the homepage, driven by deep neural network algorithms. It customizes a feed of videos based on the user's viewing history, search history, active subscriptions, and general engagement habits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Algorithmic Home Feed. Access the homepage by loading `youtube.com` in a browser or opening the mobile app, and scroll down to view personalized recommendations.

### 10. YouTube Watch Later Playlist
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A private default playlist where users can save videos they want to watch at a later time. The playlist syncs across all logged-in devices and allows users to easily clear watched content.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Private Video Queue. Hover over a video thumbnail and click the clock icon, or tap the three-dot menu next to a video and select "Save to Watch Later" to queue it.

---

## Category 3: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

### 11. YouTube Community Posts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: An interactive feed on the channel homepage where creators can publish text updates, polls, images, and GIFs. This allows creators to communicate and poll their audience without uploading a full video.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Feed Composer. Open YouTube Studio, click the "Create" button in the top right, select "Create post," choose your post type (text, poll, or image), write the content, and click "Post."

### 12. YouTube Channel Membership
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A recurring monthly subscription model that allows fans to financially support creators in exchange for exclusive perks. Perks include custom loyalty badges, custom emojis for live chat, access to member-only videos, and private community posts.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Fan Subscription Service. Visit a participating channel's homepage, click the "Join" button next to the subscribe button, select a membership tier, and complete the billing details.

### 13. YouTube Live Chat & Moderation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A real-time conversation feed that displays alongside live streams and video Premieres. Creators and designated moderators can manage the chat feed using filters, word blocklists, and user timeouts to maintain a safe environment.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Stream Moderation Center. Open the Live Control Room in YouTube Studio, navigate to chat settings, assign moderator roles to trusted users, and manage live messages using the chat panel controls.

### 14. YouTube Comments & Pinning
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A discussion section located beneath videos where viewers can post feedback, ask questions, and interact with the creator. Creators can pin a single comment to the very top of the feed to highlight important updates or positive feedback.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Comment Section Control. Scroll below a video, click the three-dot menu next to a comment you want to highlight, and select "Pin" to lock it at the top of the comment feed.

### 15. YouTube Premiere Chat
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A specialized viewing format that allows creators and viewers to watch a newly uploaded video together in real time. It features a synchronized countdown and a live chat room that fosters community engagement during the initial broadcast.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Synced Broadcast Room. Upload a video in YouTube Studio, select "Premiere" under the visibility options, set a date and time, and join the live chat room when the broadcast countdown begins.

---

## Category 4: Direct Messaging & Communication

### 16. YouTube Creator Studio Inbox
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A centralized communication dashboard in YouTube Studio designed for reviewing and managing viewer interactions. It compiles and filters comments, replies, and mentions across all channel videos for streamlined responses.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interaction Management Hub. Log in to YouTube Studio, click "Comments" in the left-hand navigation menu, and use the filter tabs (such as "I haven't responded" or "Held for review") to reply to messages.

### 17. YouTube Share to Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A sharing shortcut that compiles video links and previews to send directly to contacts. While native direct messaging inside YouTube has been deprecated, this system integrates with mobile device share sheets to forward links to messaging applications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Link Sharing. Tap the "Share" button beneath any video player on mobile, select a messaging application from the system tray, choose a contact, and send the message.

### 18. YouTube Live Q&A Sessions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: An interactive tool for live broadcasts that allows creators to host organized question-and-answer sessions. Viewers submit questions in a dedicated feed, and the creator can select and pin questions to the top of the chat for all viewers to see.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Interactive Q&A Panel. During a live stream in the Live Control Room, click the "+" icon in the chat panel, select "Start a Q&A," and pin submitted questions to the stream display.

### 19. YouTube Mention Tags
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows creators to tag other channels in video titles, descriptions, or community posts using the "@" symbol. Tagged channels receive a notification in their YouTube Studio dashboard, making collaborations and shoutouts easier.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Channel Tagging System. When writing a video title or description in YouTube Studio, type the "@" character followed immediately by the name of the channel you want to tag, and select it from the autocomplete list.

### 20. YouTube Live Chat Super Stickers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Animated digital stickers that viewers can purchase to send during live streams and Premieres. The stickers display as bright animations in the live chat feed, helping the viewer's message stand out from normal text.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Animated Gifting Stream. Open a live chat window during a broadcast, tap the dollar sign icon, select "Super Sticker," choose an animation, and complete the purchase.

---

## Category 5: Monetization & E-Commerce

### 21. YouTube Partner Program (YPP)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: The foundational monetization framework that allows eligible channels to earn revenue from advertisements and YouTube Premium views. Creators must meet specific subscriber and watch time thresholds to apply.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Monetization Program Application. Open YouTube Studio, click the "Earn" tab in the left-hand sidebar, monitor your eligibility progress, and click "Apply Now" once requirements are met.

### 22. YouTube Super Chat
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monetization tool that allows viewers to buy highlighted messages in live chat streams. The message is pinned to the top of the feed for a set period, depending on the purchase amount, ensuring the creator can see it.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Highlighted Chat Purchase. Tap the dollar sign icon in a live stream's chat panel, select "Super Chat," choose your payment tier, write your custom message, and tap send to highlight it.

### 23. YouTube Shopping Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to connect official store platforms (like Shopify or Spring) to their channel. It displays a scrollable shelf of products below videos and lets creators tag items in videos and live streams.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Product Shelf Linkage. Go to YouTube Studio > Earn > Shopping, click "Connect Store," select your e-commerce platform, and manage product tags for your videos using the interface.

### 24. YouTube Super Thanks
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A tipping feature that allows viewers to show appreciation for individual uploaded videos or Shorts. When a tip is sent, the viewer's comment is posted with a distinct, colored background that displays the tip amount.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Post-Upload Tipping. Click the "Thanks" button located in the toolbar below a video player, select a tip amount, enter payment details, and publish your highlighted comment.

### 25. YouTube BrandConnect
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A matchmaking service within YouTube Studio that connects creators with brands for sponsored video campaigns. The tool manages campaign details and calculates audience value using YouTube's internal data.
