- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Sponsorship Matchmaker. Navigate to YouTube Studio > Earn, select "BrandConnect" from the top menu, complete your creator profile, set your pricing preferences, and view brand deal offers.

---

## Category 6: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

### 26. YouTube Studio Analytics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A comprehensive reporting suite providing detailed statistics on channel performance. It tracks metrics such as total views, watch time, subscriber trends, and estimated revenue over customizable date ranges.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Performance Metrics Panel. Log in to YouTube Studio, click "Analytics" in the left navigation menu, and toggle between the "Overview," "Content," "Audience," and "Revenue" tabs.

### 27. YouTube Audience Retention Graph
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A line graph that visualizes how long viewers stay engaged throughout a specific video. It pinpoints exact seconds where viewers drop off, skip ahead, or rewatch sections, helping creators improve video pacing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Engagement Timeline Analyzer. Go to YouTube Studio > Analytics, select a video, click "Engagement," scroll down to the "Audience retention" section, and click on the graph to analyze playback behavior.

### 28. YouTube Research Tab
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An audience search analyzer built into YouTube Studio that displays trending search terms and search volumes. It highlights content gaps where viewers are searching for topics that do not have many high-quality videos.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Topic Demand Finder. Open YouTube Studio, click "Analytics," select the "Research" tab from the top menu, and enter search terms into the query field to review popularity.

### 29. YouTube Content ID System
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An automated copyright detection system that scans newly uploaded videos against a database of audio and visual content submitted by copyright owners. It alerts owners of matches and applies automated actions based on their preferences.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Copyright Rights Matching. Managed via the Content ID dashboard for approved media companies. Rights holders configure rules to track, monetize, or block matching user uploads.

### 30. YouTube Page Access Roles
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows channel owners to invite team members to help manage the channel with granular permissions. Access roles include Manager, Editor, Editor (Limited), Subtitle Editor, and Viewer to secure channel credentials.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Collaborative Team Permissions. Open YouTube Studio, click "Settings" in the bottom-left corner, select "Permissions," click "Invite," enter the email address of your team member, select their role, and send the invitation.

---

## Category 7: Privacy, Security & Safety

### 31. YouTube Restricted Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An optional setting that filters out potentially mature or inappropriate content from search results and feeds. It uses signals like video metadata, community flagging, and age-restrictions to identify and hide sensitive videos.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Mature Content Filter. Click on your profile icon in the top-right corner of the interface, scroll to the bottom of the pop-up menu, select "Restricted Mode," and toggle it to "On."

### 32. YouTube Custom Video Visibility
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Controls who can view an uploaded video by setting its visibility state. Creators can choose Public (visible to everyone), Unlisted (accessible only via link), or Private (visible only to the owner and selected accounts).
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Privacy Toggles. In YouTube Studio, navigate to the Content tab, hover over a video's visibility column, click the dropdown menu, select "Public," "Unlisted," or "Private," and save.

### 33. YouTube Comment Blocklist
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated comment moderation tool that holds comments containing blocked words or links for review. Creators can customize a list of words, phrases, and usernames that are blocked from appearing publicly.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Text Filter Settings. Open YouTube Studio, go to Settings > Community, scroll down to the "Blocked Words" field, enter your list of terms, check "Block links," and click "Save."

### 34. YouTube Kids Account Restrictions
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Parental control settings that restrict content access to a kid-safe version of YouTube. Parents can select age tiers (Preschool, Younger, Older), manually approve allowed videos, and set daily viewing limits.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Child Account Setup. Open the YouTube app settings, select "Parental Settings," click on your child's profile, select "Content Settings," and adjust the age levels or approved video lists.

### 35. YouTube SafeSearch
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Integrates search engine filtering to block explicit content, sexual imagery, and extreme violence from search results. This helps ensure that video searches return family-friendly listings.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Search Moderation Toggle. Accessed via connected Google Account settings under the "Search Settings" panel, where users can toggle the SafeSearch filter on or off.

---

## Category 8: Notifications & Time Management

### 36. YouTube Notification Bell
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows viewers to customize how they receive push and email notifications for channels they subscribe to. Viewers can set preferences to "All" (every upload), "Personalized" (based on viewing habits), or "None."
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subscription Alert Selector. Navigate to a creator's channel page, click the bell icon next to the "Subscribed" button, and select your preferred notification frequency from the dropdown menu.

### 37. YouTube Scheduled Video Release
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows creators to schedule an uploaded video to transition from private to public status at a future date and time. This helps creators coordinate video releases with specific times when their audience is most active.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Video Publishing Scheduler. When uploading a video in YouTube Studio, go to the "Visibility" step, select "Schedule," choose your timezone, date, and time, and click "Schedule."

### 38. YouTube Pause Watch History
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Suspends the tracking of videos watched by the user, preventing newly viewed videos from influencing homepage recommendations. This is useful when searching for topics you do not want added to your profile.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Tracking Control Panel. Open the left menu on YouTube, click "History," then select "Pause watch history" from the right-hand panel on desktop, or access "Manage all history" on mobile.

### 39. YouTube Take a Break Reminder
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An in-app utility that prompts users to stop watching videos after a specified period of continuous usage. The reminder displays as a full-screen alert that pauses video playback.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Screen Time Limit. Open the mobile app, tap your profile icon > Settings > General, select "Remind me to take a break," and set the reminder frequency (e.g., every 1 hour).

### 40. YouTube Bedtime Reminder
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A time-management feature that alerts users when it is time to close the app at night. Users can set the reminder to display immediately at the scheduled hour or wait until the current video finishes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Nighttime Usage Alert. Navigate to Settings > General in the mobile app, tap "Remind me when it's bedtime," set your start and end hours, and choose your display preferences.

---

## Category 9: Developer APIs & Integrations

### 41. YouTube Data API v3
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic REST API that allows developers to search videos, retrieve channel statistics, upload video files, and manage playlists. This interface supports integration of YouTube's core content catalog into external applications.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: REST Data API. Register a project in the Google Cloud Console, enable the YouTube Data API v3, generate API keys or OAuth credentials, and make HTTP requests to the API endpoints (e.g., `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/videos`).

### 42. YouTube Player API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An iframe-based JavaScript API that allows developers to embed a YouTube video player directly into their websites. It provides programmatic controls to play, pause, seek, adjust volume, and listen to player state changes using custom code.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Client-Side Video Player. Include the YouTube Iframe Player API script in your website's HTML, create a placeholder element, and initialize the player object using JavaScript.

### 43. YouTube Live Streaming API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A specialized component of the Data API that allows developers to schedule live broadcasts, manage chat feeds, and monitor stream health programmatically. This enables external streaming software to automate stream configurations.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Programmatic Live Controller. Authenticate with OAuth2 credentials, and call live resource endpoints (e.g., `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/liveBroadcasts`) to create and bind video streams.

### 44. YouTube Analytics API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Retrieves custom reports on channel performance, video engagement, and viewer demographics. This API allows creators and enterprise partners to build automated reports and dashboards.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Analytics Data Retrieval. Set up OAuth2 user authentication, and execute HTTP queries against the Analytics endpoint (`https://youtubeanalytics.googleapis.com/v2/reports`) specifying parameters such as dimensions, metrics, and dates.

### 45. YouTube Reporting API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Designed for enterprise channels and content owners to download bulk datasets containing system performance and monetization metrics. It delivers pre-generated CSV reports containing raw data for deep analytical processing.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Bulk Data Pipeline. Set up OAuth credentials, call the API endpoint (`https://youtubereporting.googleapis.com/v1/jobs`) to create reporting jobs, and download generated data files using the returned URLs.

---

## Category 10: Account Settings & Authentication

### 46. YouTube Google Account Recovery
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Configures backup recovery details to restore account access if a password is forgotten or the account is compromised. Users link backup email addresses and phone numbers to receive secure verification codes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Access Recovery Settings. Tap your profile icon, select "Manage your Google Account," navigate to the "Security" tab, and add credentials under the "Ways we can verify it's you" section.

### 47. YouTube Account Linkage
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Connects third-party gaming, streaming, or smart home accounts to a YouTube profile. Linking accounts allows users to earn in-game rewards during sponsored streams and simplifies logins on external devices.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Third-Party Integrations. Navigate to YouTube Settings in a browser or mobile app, select "Connected apps" from the menu, choose the target platform, and complete the authorization flow.

### 48. YouTube Premium Membership Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A subscription management portal where users can manage billing methods, toggle auto-renew settings, and view membership benefits. It also allows users to configure offline download quality settings for mobile devices.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Subscription Billing Manager. Open the mobile app, tap your profile icon, select "Purchases and memberships," and click on your Premium membership plan to modify details.

### 49. YouTube Two-Step Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures login sessions by requiring a second authentication factor in addition to a password. Authentication options include security keys, Google prompt notifications, or SMS verification codes.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Two-Factor Login Setup. Go to your Google Account settings, select "Security," tap "2-Step Verification" under the "Signing in to Google" section, and configure your preferred verification method.

### 50. YouTube Account Data Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to download a comprehensive archive of their YouTube activity, including uploaded videos, search history, watch history, comment logs, and playlists. This ensures data transparency and account portability.
- **Sub-category / Actionable Details**: Activity Data Export. Navigate to the Google Takeout dashboard (`takeout.google.com`), select "YouTube and YouTube Music" from the product list, select the files you want to download, choose your archive format, and request the download link.

---

## 3. Master Combined Feature List

The following is a deduplicated compilation of the features analyzed across the 25 platforms. The features are organized under the 10 reconciled taxonomy categories. For each unique feature, the implementing platforms and original names are mapped.

### Category: Content Creation & Editing

#### 1. 3D Bitmojis In Snaps
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Places a personalized three-dimensional avatar of the user into the camera view using augmented reality. The avatar can be animated to perform dances, express emotions, or react to the environment in real time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat 3D Bitmojis in Snaps

#### 2. AI Assist Content Generator
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Integrates with artificial intelligence to automatically generate post captions, rewrite copy, or recommend hashtags based on user prompts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: AI Assist Content Generator

#### 3. AR Camera Effects
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Applies augmented reality filters, face distortions, and virtual backgrounds to photos, videos, and live video calls.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: AR Camera Effects

#### 4. Adjust Clips (Multi-track Editing)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides an in-app timeline interface to split, trim, speed up, or reorder individual video clips and audio tracks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Adjust Clips (Multi-track Editing)

#### 5. Alt Text Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Prompts users to add descriptive alternative text descriptions to all image uploads to enhance accessibility for screen readers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Alt Text Editor

#### 6. Articles Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A long-form publishing tool that allows users to write blog-style articles directly on the platform. It supports adding header images, styling text with markdown, and embedding hyperlinks or multimedia elements.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Articles Editor

#### 7. Attachment Uploader (PDF, Doc, ZIP)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables uploading and sharing of productivity and binary files directly within posts and chat rooms, supporting large file attachments.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Attachment Uploader (PDF, Doc, ZIP)

#### 8. Auto-Cropping Canvas
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically resizes and crops photos to optimized canvas ratios matching the target chat or channel layout.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Auto-Cropping Canvas

#### 9. Auto-Generated Captions
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: An automated transcription system that uses machine learning to generate captions for uploaded videos. It automatically creates timed text tracks in multiple supported languages to increase video accessibility.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Auto-Generated Captions

#### 10. Auto-Scheduling & Queue System
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically queues posts into the next available preset time slot for each social media account, ensuring consistent publishing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Auto-Scheduling & Queue System

#### 11. Avatar Decorations
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to customize their visual presence by applying animated, themed borders and effects to their profile picture.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Avatar Decorations

#### 12. Badges (Lifestyle, Interests, Work)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Simple icon indicators that users can add to their profiles to quickly display height, zodiac sign, exercise frequency, relationship goals, or education levels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Bumble Badges (Lifestyle, Interests, Work)

#### 13. Bizz / BFF Bio Sections
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides distinct profile text editors and formatting options specifically tailored to professional networking (Bizz) or friendship seeking (BFF).
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Bumble Bizz / BFF Bio Sections

#### 14. Boomerang Loops
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Records short, back-and-forth looping video clips using the in-app camera.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Boomerang Loops

#### 15. Broadcast Stream Key Generation
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Generates unique RTMP stream URLs and secure stream keys required to connect external encoding software to Kick servers. These credentials must be kept confidential as they allow anyone to stream directly to the creator's channel.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Broadcast Stream Key Generation

#### 16. Built-in Image & Video Editor (Canva & VistaCreate Integration)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Integrates Canva and VistaCreate within the Publer editor, allowing users to design and modify visual media without leaving the app.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Built-in Image & Video Editor (Canva & VistaCreate Integration)

#### 17. Bulk Media Uploader & Scheduler
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows uploading up to 500 images, videos, or GIFs at once, automatically creating separate scheduled posts for each file.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Bulk Media Uploader & Scheduler

#### 18. Cards & End Screens
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Clickable visual overlays added to videos to recommend other content, promote merchandise, or encourage channel subscriptions. Cards can appear at any point in the video, while End Screens are placed in the final 5 to 20 seconds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Cards & End Screens

#### 19. Carousel Posts
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Post up to 10 photos or videos in a single swipeable feed post, allowing multi-media story collections.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram, LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: Carousel Posts, LinkedIn Carousel Posts

#### 20. Chapter Markers
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Divides long-form videos into distinct, clickable sections on the playback progress bar. This helps viewers navigate to specific topics or highlights easily by referencing time-stamped headings.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Chapter Markers

#### 21. Character Count Limits
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Offers a default 500-character text post capacity, though individual federated instances can configure this limit higher or lower.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Character Count Limits

#### 22. Character Expansion
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides a generous text limit of 500 characters per individual post, giving users more room for detailed thoughts compared to other microblogging platforms.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Character Expansion

#### 23. Chat Bot Integration Setup
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows streamers to connect external moderators and bots to handle automated chat features and overlay graphics. It streamlines chat moderation and enhances community interaction through custom commands and loyalty points systems.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat Bot Integration Setup

#### 24. Clips
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Records and saves recent gameplay and audio directly within a screen-share stream, saving it locally for quick post creation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Clips

#### 25. Clips Creation Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables viewers and creators to capture and trim up to 60-second video segments from a live stream or past broadcast. These captured highlights are stored on the channel's profile page and can be easily shared across other social networks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick, Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Clips Creation Tool, Twitch Clips Creation Tool

#### 26. Content Warning
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to hide the text or media of their post behind a custom spoiler warning text label, requiring readers to click to reveal it.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Content Warning

#### 27. Creative Layout Templates
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Pre-styled visual layouts specifically optimized for categories like Fashion, Beauty, Travel, and Food. These templates help creators design aesthetically pleasing, magazine-like posts with minimal manual effort.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Creative Layout Templates

#### 28. Creator Dashboard Broadcast Feed Preview
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A low-latency video player inside the creator dashboard that displays the outgoing live video feed. It allows streamers to monitor their video quality, frame rates, and connection status in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Creator Dashboard Broadcast Feed Preview

#### 29. Custom Emoji Packs
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to upload and use personalized custom emoji sets in chats, reactions, and statuses.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Emoji Packs

#### 30. Custom Emojis
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Permits users to insert custom emojis uploaded and managed by the administrator of their specific home instance.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Custom Emojis

#### 31. Custom Emojis And Stickers
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows server administrators to upload custom graphic images and animated stickers for members to use in messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Custom Emojis and Stickers

#### 32. Director Mode
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Accesses a suite of professional video editing tools directly within the Snapchat app interface. Features include green screen overlays, dual-camera capture, speed controls, and a precise multi-clip trimmer.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Director Mode

#### 33. Disappearing Messages
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically deletes messages in a chat after a pre-selected duration of 24 hours, 7 days, or 90 days.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Disappearing Messages

#### 34. Disappearing Stories
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Shares photos or short videos that remain visible to friends or followers for exactly 24 hours before disappearing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook, Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Disappearing Stories, Messenger Stories

#### 35. Draft Event Save
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables organizers to save an in-progress event configuration as a draft, allowing them to resume editing and publish later.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Draft Event Save

#### 36. Drafts Saving & Scheduling
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to write posts and schedule them to be published at a specific future date and time, or save them as drafts for editing later.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Drafts Saving & Scheduling

#### 37. Dual Camera Capture
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables capturing photos or videos using the front and rear cameras of the device simultaneously to capture action and reaction.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Dual Camera Capture

#### 38. Dual Camera Photography
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Captures front-facing and rear-facing photos simultaneously when the user takes their daily post. It ensures that the viewer sees both what the creator is looking at and their immediate reaction.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Dual Camera Photography

#### 39. Duet
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Places your recorded video side-by-side with another creator's video in a split-screen format, syncing playback.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Duet

#### 40. Dynamic Text Stylizer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Stylizes text messages using custom fonts, kinetic text effects, and colorful gradients before sending.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Dynamic Text Stylizer

#### 41. Event Custom Image Crop & Upload
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows organizers to upload custom banner images for events and crop them to fit the standard Meetup display dimensions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Event Custom Image Crop & Upload

#### 42. Event Scheduler
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows group organizers to create and schedule physical or virtual events, specifying the date, time, location, and event details.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Meetup Event Scheduler

#### 43. Feeling/Activity Status Post
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Appends a descriptive mood or action emoji to a standard text post (e.g., "feeling excited" or "eating pizza").
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Feeling/Activity Status Post

#### 44. Filters
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Overlay artistic designs, location-specific geofilters, current time, temperature, or speed metrics onto captured photos or videos. These filters dynamically change based on physical location and real-time environmental context.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Filters

#### 45. Font Styling Overlays
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: An overlay tool that enables creators to add customizable text titles and descriptions directly on their images. It offers a variety of fonts, colors, borders, and shadows to highlight key aspects of the post.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Font Styling Overlays

#### 46. Green Screen Effect
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Replaces the video background with an image or video from your device's library in real time during camera capture.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Green Screen Effect

#### 47. Grid Preview
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to preview how a draft post or Reel will fit visually into their existing profile grid layout before publishing it.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Grid Preview

#### 48. Group About Page Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A rich text editor for describing the Meetup group's purpose, rules, history, and target member demographic.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Group About Page Editor

#### 49. Guest Star
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A built-in browser-based tool that lets creators invite guests, co-hosts, or viewers directly into their stream. It automatically handles webcam and audio feeds, integrating them directly into the broadcast layout.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Guest Star

#### 50. Image & Video Editing (In-App)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides built-in filters, cropping tools, sticker overlays, and video trimming tools before publishing media.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Image & Video Editing (In-App)

#### 51. Image & Video Uploads
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A native media uploader that supports hosting photos, photo galleries, and video files directly on Reddit's servers. Creators can add captions and custom alt-text descriptions to images for accessibility before publishing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Image & Video Uploads

#### 52. Image Markup / Annotation Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides built-in drawing and annotation tools to edit images, add labels, insert arrows, and crop before publishing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Image Markup / Annotation Tool

#### 53. In-App Media Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides advanced editing tools for photos and videos, including drawing, adding animated stickers, text, and adjusting brightness/contrast.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: In-App Media Editor

#### 54. In-App Photo Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Provides tools to crop, add text, draw, apply filters, and pixelate sensitive parts of photos before sending.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8, WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 In-App Photo Editor, In-App Photo Editor

#### 55. In-app GIF Designer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Converts short video loops or image sequences into custom animated GIFs with text captions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: In-app GIF Designer

#### 56. Late Posting Marker
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Permits users to post their daily BeReal after the initial two-minute window has expired, attaching a timestamp showing how late they were. It ensures that users can still share their day even if they missed the immediate alert.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Late Posting Marker

#### 57. Lenses
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Applies real-time augmented reality filters to faces or environments through the camera interface. This allows users to morph their appearance, play interactive mini-games, or project digital objects into their physical space.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Lenses

#### 58. Live Producer Streaming
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Broadcasts high-definition live video feeds to Facebook Pages or Groups using professional external cameras and encoding software.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Live Producer Streaming

#### 59. Live Streaming Tools
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: The dedicated streaming management dashboard for Kick creators to change their current title, category, and tags before going live. It allows real-time edits to the broadcast's metadata to optimize search indexing and viewer attraction.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick, Snapchat, Telegram, Telegram, Twitch, YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Creator Dashboard Live Stream Management, Snapchat Live Video Calling, Public Broadcasting Channels, Voice Chat Live Streams, Twitch Studio Broadcasting, YouTube Live Streaming API

#### 60. Long-form Posts (Articles)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to write posts containing up to 25,000 characters, supporting rich text formatting such as bold, italics, bulleted lists, and inline media embeds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Long-form Posts (Articles)

#### 61. Media Formatting & Alt Text
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Attaches alternative text descriptions to photos, videos, and audio uploads to support accessibility tools.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Media Formatting & Alt Text

#### 62. Microphone Sensitivity Tuning
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Adjusts background noise suppression levels and microphone input sensitivity to filter out wind, traffic, or chatter.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Microphone Sensitivity Tuning

#### 63. Multi-Photo Carousel
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to upload up to 10 photos in a single post, creating swipeable slide carousels. This feature enables sharing structured storytelling collections, product reviews, or step-by-step guides.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Multi-Photo Carousel

#### 64. Multi-Platform Post Composer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to draft, format, and customize a single post layout to be shared simultaneously across multiple connected social media networks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-Platform Post Composer

#### 65. Multi-frame Collage
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Combines multiple photos into custom grid collages directly in the composer.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-frame Collage

#### 66. Newsletter Creator
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to group their articles under a subscription newsletter feed. Subscribers receive automatic email and in-app notifications whenever a new issue is published.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Newsletter Creator

#### 67. One-Tap Voice Note Recorder
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send voice messages instantly by holding a single button on the screen, capturing high-quality audio formats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: One-Tap Voice Note Recorder

#### 68. Photo Grid Layout
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to organize up to 10 photos or videos in a single post using pre-built visual carousel or grid arrangements.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Photo Grid Layout

#### 69. Photo Verification Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A verification feature where the platform requests users to take a real-time photo copying a specific pose, certifying their identity and granting a blue checkmark badge.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Photo Verification Tool

#### 70. Post Background Styling
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Highlights short text posts by placing the text on top of a selected graphic background or gradient.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Post Background Styling

#### 71. Post Composer Templates
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Preset visual backgrounds and text layouts designed to make short posts stand out. Users can choose from various color schemes, layouts, and pre-formatted text headers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Post Composer Templates

#### 72. Post Flairs
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Customizable text or emoji tags added to posts to categorize content within a specific subreddit. Post flairs help organize discussions and allow users to filter the subreddit feed by topic tags.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Post Flairs

#### 73. Post Language Selector
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Tags posts with specific language identifiers to assist other users with translation tools and timeline filtering.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Post Language Selector

#### 74. Post Rich Text Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to write community posts with styled text including bold, italics, underlines, bulleted lists, and inline hyperlinks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Post Rich Text Editor

#### 75. Post Threading (Thread Composer)
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Chains multiple posts together sequentially, allowing creators to tell longer stories or present multi-part ideas in a structured, connected format.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Post Threading (Thread Composer)

#### 76. Profile Prompts & Icebreakers
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to answer pre-written questions (e.g., "My ideal Sunday is...") that display directly on their profile card to start conversations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Profile Prompts & Icebreakers

#### 77. Quick Voice Overlay
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Records and overlays voice commentary onto images or video clips before sharing them in chats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Quick Voice Overlay

#### 78. RealMojis Selfie Capture
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to take specific selfie reactions to represent emojis (e.g., thumbs up, laughing face) for reacting to friends' posts. These custom reactions are saved in the user's reaction drawer to be used repeatedly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealMojis Selfie Capture

#### 79. Recurring Event Template
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Permits organizers to configure repeat schedules for events that happen on a regular basis (e.g., weekly or monthly) without recreating them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Recurring Event Template

#### 80. Retake Tracker
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Counts the number of times a user re-shoots their daily photo before publishing it, displaying the count to their friends. It promotes visual authenticity by showing if a post was carefully staged or captured on the first try.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Retake Tracker

#### 81. Rich Text Facets
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Formats interactive elements like user mentions, links, and hashtags within a post dynamically without counting toward character limits.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Rich Text Facets

#### 82. Rich Text Markdown
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Supports inline text styling and layouts inside channel chats using standard markdown notation like asterisks, tildes, and code blocks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Rich Text Markdown

#### 83. Rich Text Post Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A multi-format composer that supports markdown formatting, lists, tables, and inline media. It allows users to write comprehensive text posts and add headings or blockquotes before submitting them to subreddits.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Rich Text Post Editor

#### 84. Scheduled Messages
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Sends messages automatically at a specified date and time in the future.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Scheduled Messages

#### 85. Short-Form Video Feed
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A mobile creation tool for recording, editing, and publishing short-form, vertical videos. It provides creators with a library of licensed audio tracks, speed adjustments, recording timers, and a green screen utility.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook, Instagram, Instagram, Instagram, YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: Reels Creation & Audio Sync, Reels Templates, Adjustable Reels Playback/Recording Speed, Feed & Reels Product Tagging, YouTube Shorts Editor

#### 86. Soundboard
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to play short audio clips directly into voice channels, broadcasting the sound effects to all participants.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Soundboard

#### 87. Soundmojis
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Sends emojis that play a short, matching sound clip in the chat window when tapped.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Soundmojis

#### 88. Sounds
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Adds licensed music tracks or custom audio recordings to snaps prior to sharing. Users can browse a vast library of trending songs or create their own sound clips to overlay on video content.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Sounds

#### 89. Soundtrack Integration
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A tool that provides creators with a library of rights-cleared music that can be integrated into live streams. It routes the music audio to a separate channel so it does not appear in recorded VOD archives, avoiding copyright strikes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Soundtrack Integration

#### 90. Spoiler And NSFW Tags
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Privacy tags that blur post images and videos to prevent users from seeing sensitive or spoiler content by default. Users must click on the blurred post to reveal the hidden media.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Spoiler and NSFW Tags

#### 91. Spotify Favorite Artists Link
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Integrates with a user's Spotify account to show their top played musical artists directly at the bottom of their Bumble profile page.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Spotify Favorite Artists Link

#### 92. Status Updates
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to share text, photo, video, and voice note updates that disappear after 24 hours.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Status Updates

#### 93. Sticker Library
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A library of icons, arrows, pointers, and seasonal graphics that creators can place onto images. These stickers help draw viewers' attention to specific product details or design elements within a photo.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Sticker Library

#### 94. Stitch
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to trim and integrate up to 5 seconds of footage from another creator's video into their own video.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Stitch

#### 95. Stream Marker Placement
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows streamers and editors to mark specific timestamps during a live broadcast. These markers help editors quickly locate highlights and key moments when creating VOD summaries later.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Stream Marker Placement

#### 96. Text Composer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to post text updates up to 300 characters, with pasted URLs automatically processed and resolved into rich link card previews.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Text Composer

#### 97. Thread Composer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows creators to build and publish multiple connected posts at once, creating a clean conversational thread.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Thread Composer

#### 98. To-Do List And Task Assigner
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows group members to create checkboxes for specific tasks, set deadlines, and assign them to group members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: To-Do List and Task Assigner

#### 99. Video Captioning
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically processes and overlays closed captions onto uploaded video files to ensure accessibility and quiet viewing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Video Captioning

#### 100. Video Clips
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: An option that records a short, three-second video clip leading up to the static daily photo capture. It captures a quick snippet of live action to add motion and depth to the daily post.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Video BeReal Clips

#### 101. Video Editor
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A browser-based video editing workspace built directly into the YouTube Studio dashboard. It allows creators to trim or cut video segments, blur sensitive elements (like faces or license plates), and add audio tracks from the royalty-free Audio Library after a video has been uploaded.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Video Editor

#### 102. Video Profile Avatars
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to set a short looping video as their profile avatar instead of a static photo.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Video Profile Avatars

#### 103. Video Uploads
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables users to upload and publish vertical or horizontal video clips up to 60 seconds long directly in their posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Video Uploads

#### 104. Video Uploads & Captions
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: A native video uploader supporting professional and educational video sharing. Creators can upload custom SRT subtitle files to ensure that videos are accessible when played without sound.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Video Uploads & Captions

#### 105. View-Once Media
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Enables photos and videos to be viewed only once by the recipient, deleting automatically after being opened.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: View-Once Media

#### 106. Voice Effects & Filters
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Apply audio distortion effects to recorded voice clips post-recording.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Effects & Filters

#### 107. Voice Filter & Effect Changer
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Applies digital audio effects (e.g., echo, pitch adjustment, robotic tone) to recorded voice clips before they are sent.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Filter & Effect Changer

#### 108. Voice Note Trim / Edit Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to crop or trim silent or unwanted portions from their recorded voice messages before publishing or sending.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Note Trim / Edit Tool

#### 109. Voice Note Waveform Preview
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Displays a visual waveform of a voice message as it is recorded or played back, allowing users to pause and preview before sending.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Note Waveform Preview

#### 110. Voice Posts
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Allows users to record voice clips to share as threads, which are automatically transcribed into readable text overlays.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Voice Posts

#### 111. Voice Transcription
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Transcribes voice and video messages into readable text with a single tap.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Transcription

#### 112. Voice-to-Text Transcription Tool
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Automatically transcribes spoken voice messages into text overlays in real-time, aiding accessibility and readability.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice-to-Text Transcription Tool

#### 113. Word Effects
- **Category**: Content Creation & Editing
- **Description**: Triggers screen-filling floating emoji animations when specific custom key phrases are sent in a chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Word Effects

### Category: Content Discovery & Search

#### 114. "Not Interested" Feedback
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Instructs the Explore page and feed algorithms to stop recommending content similar to a selected post.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: "Not Interested" Feedback

#### 115. Active Contacts Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays a list of Facebook friends and contacts who are currently online or were recently active.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Active Contacts Tab

#### 116. Advanced People Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search tool that allows users to find professional profiles using specific filters. Users can refine searches by industry, current or past employer, geographic location, and connection degree.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Advanced People Search

#### 117. Advanced Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to locate posts, photos, videos, people, pages, and groups on the platform using granular filter criteria such as date, location, and source.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Advanced Search Filters

#### 118. Advanced Search Filters (Premium Filters)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to filter potential matches based on specific criteria such as political leanings, height, relationship intent, or education.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Advanced Search Filters (Premium Filters)

#### 119. Advanced Search Operators
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to perform precise searches using operators like `from:`, `to:`, `filter:links`, and dates to filter chronological results.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Advanced Search Operators

#### 120. Archived Conversations
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Hides conversations from the main chats feed by moving them into an archived archive folder.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Archived Conversations

#### 121. Audio Page Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Groups all Reels using a specific audio track or sound, allowing creators to assess trends and save audio for future use.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Audio Page Search

#### 122. BFF & Bizz Modes Toggle
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to toggle their discovery feed among dating matches, friendly connections, or professional networking opportunities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Bumble BFF & Bizz Modes Toggle

#### 123. Bookmarks Collections
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Enables users to save posts privately, categorizing them into custom folders for easy discovery and retrieval.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Bookmarks Collections

#### 124. Browse Channels Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated management view inside servers allowing members to subscribe to or hide channels from their left-hand sidebar list.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Browse Channels Tab

#### 125. Calendar Integration & Feed Export
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Generates a personalized calendar feed URL containing the user's upcoming Meetups, compatible with external calendars like Google Calendar or Apple Calendar.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Calendar Integration & Feed Export

#### 126. Category Browse Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A catalog that displays all active live streams on the platform categorized by specific game titles or creative activities. It organizes broadcasts in descending order of current viewers to help users explore trending genres.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick, Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Category Browse Directory, Twitch Category Browse Directory

#### 127. Category Navigation Tabs
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Horizontal navigation menus that divide the platform's feeds into interest topics like Fashion, Beauty, Food, Travel, and Pets. Users can tap these tabs to explore content in specific niches without relying on search queries.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Category Navigation Tabs

#### 128. Channel Search Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to discover and subscribe to public broadcast channels by category, region, or popularity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Channel Search Directory

#### 129. Channel Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Offers a robust query search functionality inside text channels using criteria parameters like sender, dates, and media attachments.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Channel Search Filters

#### 130. Chat Archiving
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Moves inactive or low-priority chats out of the main chats list into an Archived folder without deleting them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Chat Archiving

#### 131. Chat Pinning Matrix
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Pins and organizes multiple conversations into custom grid layouts at the top of the chat page.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Chat Pinning Matrix

#### 132. Chronological Feeds Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated navigation shortcut that displays posts from friends, groups, and followed pages in a strict reverse-chronological order, bypassing the main algorithmic feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Chronological Feeds Tab

#### 133. Content Library Search & Tag Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to save media assets and templates in a library, using keyword searches and tag filters to locate them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Content Library Search & Tag Filters

#### 134. Custom Feeds
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A feed aggregation tool that allows users to group multiple subreddits into a single, custom feed. This lets users organize their home page by topic, such as creating a feed for tech news and another for hobbies.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky, Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Custom Feeds, Reddit Custom Feeds

#### 135. Custom Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Refines search query results by upload date (e.g., past 24 hours, past week) and popularity (most liked).
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Search Filters

#### 136. Customizable Chat Folders
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Groups chat threads into distinct tabs based on custom filters like "Unread," "Channels," "Groups," or manually selected chats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Customizable Chat Folders

#### 137. Deep Chat Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Enables searching for specific keywords, messages, links, media, or documents within an individual chat or across all chats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Deep Chat Search

#### 138. Directory & Public Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to explore and join public Band groups categorized by interests, hobby types, or search terms.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Band Directory & Public Search

#### 139. Discover
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A content hub featuring curated stories, shows, and articles from verified publishers, media companies, and popular creators. The layout uses tile-based previews that update daily with localized news, pop culture, and entertainment content.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Discover

#### 140. Discover Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A default personalized algorithmic feed showcasing popular posts, trending discussions, and customized content recommendations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Discover Feed

#### 141. Discover Friends Via Contacts Sync
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Matches users with contacts in their address book who have registered Buz accounts, suggesting them as friends.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Discover Friends via Contacts Sync

#### 142. Discovery Geolocation Map
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An interactive map view displaying the location pins of public BeReal posts globally, helping users find content in specific regions. Users can click on geographical pins to explore local posts in different cities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Discovery Geolocation Map

#### 143. Drops Discovery Page
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated discovery directory showing which active streams have enabled in-game loot drops for viewers. Users can track their progress toward earning rewards by watching these channels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Drops Discovery Page

#### 144. Explore Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A curated discovery tab showcasing trending posts, popular hashtags, and recommended users on your server.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Explore Feed

#### 145. Explore Tab
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A discovery portal that aggregates trending videos and categorizes content into specific interest hubs. Users can browse dedicated sections for gaming, music, movies, fashion, news, and live broadcasts to find popular videos on the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Explore Tab

#### 146. Favorites Feed Filter
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Changes the main home feed to display only chronological posts from a pre-selected list of favorite accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Favorites Feed Filter

#### 147. Federated Timeline
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays a real-time chronological stream of public posts from users across all external servers that are federated with your instance.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Federated Timeline

#### 148. Feed Preferences (Manage Favorites)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to designate up to 30 friends and pages to prioritize their content at the top of their Feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Feed Preferences (Manage Favorites)

#### 149. Feeds Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public repository of all registered custom feeds that can be searched and filtered by popularity, creator, or topic.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Feeds Directory

#### 150. Find A Group/Event Category Browser
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A structured directory classifying Meetup groups into specific top-level categories (e.g., Tech, Writing, Fitness) for guided browsing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Find a Group/Event Category Browser

#### 151. Followed Channels Sidebar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A collapsing left-hand sidebar on the desktop view that lists followed creators in order of their live status. It provides quick, one-click access to active streams that the user regularly watches.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Followed Channels Sidebar

#### 152. Following Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays a chronological stream composed strictly of posts from profiles the user actively follows, bypassing the main algorithmic recommendations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Following Feed

#### 153. For You Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An algorithmically driven timeline that curates posts, replies, and trends based on your interactions, followed accounts, and overall network engagement.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads For You Feed

#### 154. For You Page (FYP) Algorithm
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Algorithmic feed that surfaces videos based on user watch history, comments, and real-time interest profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: For You Page (FYP) Algorithm

#### 155. For You Recommendation Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A personalized home feed that uses machine learning algorithms to serve content tailored to the user's interests. It dynamically adjusts recommendation streams based on the user's historical interaction and viewing patterns.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 For You Recommendation Feed

#### 156. Friends Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: The main chronological feed showcasing the daily BeReal posts shared by a user's approved friends list. To encourage participation, a user must publish their own daily post before they can view their friends' uploads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Friends Feed

#### 157. Global Discovery Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public feed tab listing daily posts shared by users worldwide who have set their visibility settings to public. It allows users to peek into the daily lives of people from different cultures across the globe.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Global Discovery Directory

#### 158. Global Search Within
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to run keyword searches across all posts, comments, chat histories, uploaded files, and photos within a specific Band.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Global Search within Band

#### 159. Global Username Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Finds public channels, groups, bots, and users by entering their unique `@` username in the search bar.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Global Username Search

#### 160. Global Voice Channel Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public directory cataloging open voice streams and walkie-talkie groups categorized by language, topic, or region.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Global Voice Channel Directory

#### 161. Hash-tag Directory & Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Automatically catalogs posts using hashtags and provides a directory to view all group content associated with specific topics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Hash-tag Directory & Filters

#### 162. Hashtag Following
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to follow specific hashtag topic channels to customize their feed. Following hashtags ensures that relevant professional discussions appear on the user's homepage.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn, Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Hashtag Following, Mastodon Hashtag Following

#### 163. Hashtag Generator & Suggestion Engine
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Recommends popular or trending hashtags based on the caption text entered in the post composer.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Hashtag Generator & Suggestion Engine

#### 164. Hashtag Topic Feeds
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Aggregates all public posts, articles, and discussion threads containing a specific hashtag into a unified, scrollable topic feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Hashtag Topic Feeds

#### 165. Hidden Words Feed Filter
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Removes specific posts, threads, and search results containing designated keywords from appearing on the user's discovery feeds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Hidden Words Feed Filter

#### 166. Home Feed Sort Options
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Modifies the sorting algorithm of the user's home or subreddit feeds to prioritize different posts. Sorting options include Best, Hot, New, Top, and Rising, which arrange posts based on vote counts, age, and activity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Home Feed Sort Options

#### 167. Hubs For Students
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Connects verified school email accounts to a localized network directory of student-run Discord servers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Hubs for Students

#### 168. Incognito Mode (Incognito Swiping)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Hides a user's profile from the public swiping queue, showing their card only to users they have actively swiped right on.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Incognito Mode (Incognito Swiping)

#### 169. Interactive Map Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A map-based search tool showing geotagged posts and popular businesses near a selected location.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Interactive Map Search

#### 170. Interest-Based Channels
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to explore and join public channels cataloged by specific topic interests.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Interest-Based Channels

#### 171. Interest-Based Personalization Engine
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Recommends groups and events based on interests selected by the user during onboarding or updated in their profile settings.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Interest-Based Personalization Engine

#### 172. Job Search Engine
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A comprehensive job board listing opportunities across industries. Users can filter listings by remote status, experience level, salary range, and application type.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Job Search Engine

#### 173. Keyword Chat Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Finds specific text messages and keyword matches across all historical chats or within a single chat thread.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Keyword Chat Search

#### 174. Keyword Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Searches the entire platform's database for public posts containing specific words or phrases rather than just searching for user account handles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Keyword Search

#### 175. Keyword Search Console
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search interface with auto-suggestions that allows users to find posts, accounts, and popular hashtags. It provides real-time search results to help users discover relevant inspiration and creator profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Keyword Search Console

#### 176. Keyword Search With Radius Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to input search terms and filter results by distance radius from a specific zip code or city.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Keyword Search with Radius Filters

#### 177. Live Directory Sidebar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A vertical sidebar on the desktop interface that lists followed active channels and recommended streams. It allows users to quickly navigate between live channels without leaving their current screen.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Live Directory Sidebar

#### 178. Live Search Auto-Suggest
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dynamic search bar that returns instant, auto-suggested listings for channels, games, and active categories. It updates recommendations as you type to speed up user navigation across the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Live Search Auto-Suggest

#### 179. Local Timeline
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Shows a real-time chronological stream of public posts written only by users registered on your specific server.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Local Timeline

#### 180. Map (Snap Map)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An interactive geographical map that displays the location of friends who choose to share their coordinates. It also aggregates public snaps onto a heatmap, allowing users to discover events and stories happening nearby or around the world.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Map (Snap Map)

#### 181. Map-Based Event Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays upcoming local Meetup events on an interactive map, allowing users to discover communities by physical proximity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Map-Based Event Search

#### 182. Marketplace Chats Index
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Organizes buyer and seller conversations from Facebook Marketplace in a dedicated sub-folder.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Marketplace Chats Index

#### 183. Memories Calendar Archive
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A private grid calendar showing a chronological visual archive of all the user's past daily BeReal posts. It acts as a personal photo journal, allowing users to look back on what they did on any specific day.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Memories Calendar Archive

#### 184. Message Requests Filter
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Filters messages sent by users who are not connected with the recipient, categorizing them as spam or request inquiries.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Message Requests Filter

#### 185. Nearby Voice Channels
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Discovers local public voice rooms or walkie-talkie circles based on GPS location data.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Nearby Voice Channels

#### 186. People Nearby Discovery
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to find and connect with other Telegram users and public groups physically close to them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: People Nearby Discovery

#### 187. Pin Chats
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Keeps important individual or group chats at the top of the chats list for quick and easy access.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Pin Chats

#### 188. Pinned Custom Lists
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to pin custom curated feeds of specific accounts as swipeable tabs on their home screen, letting them view niche feeds easily.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Pinned Custom Lists

#### 189. Pinned Post Section (Notice Board)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Highlights important announcements by pinning up to 10 posts at the top of the Band board for easy visibility by all members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Pinned Post Section (Notice board)

#### 190. Post Collections
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A bookmarking feature that lets users save inspiring posts and organize them into categorized, themed folders. These collections are saved privately in the user's profile for future reference.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Post Collections

#### 191. RSS Feed Automation Parser
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Automatically imports content from external blog RSS feeds and schedules updates whenever a new article is published.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: RSS Feed Automation Parser

#### 192. RealMojis Notification Widget
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A mobile home screen widget displaying friends' latest BeReal photos in real-time without needing to open the app. It updates automatically when friends upload new content, keeping users connected directly from their home screens.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealMojis Notification Widget

#### 193. Recommendation Carousel
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dynamic carousel on the home page highlighting live channels, category previews, and promotional broadcasts. The content is personalized based on the user's historical viewing habits.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Recommendation Carousel

#### 194. Recommended Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: The primary feed displayed on the homepage, driven by deep neural network algorithms. It customizes a feed of videos based on the user's viewing history, search history, active subscriptions, and general engagement habits.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Recommended Feed

#### 195. Recommended Live Carousel
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A prominent visual slider at the top of the Kick homepage showcasing featured live broadcasts across gaming, music, and creative arts. It helps users discover prominent creators who are currently streaming live on the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Recommended Live Carousel

#### 196. Refresh For You Feed (Algorithm Reset)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
