- **Description**: Resets your For You Page recommendations to the default state, clearing historical interest tracking completely.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Refresh For You Feed (Algorithm Reset)

#### 197. STEM Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A specialized secondary feed containing strictly educational videos about Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: STEM Feed

#### 198. Saved Items
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A bookmarking system where users can store saved jobs, articles, and posts. Saved items are grouped in a private portal for easy reference.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Saved Items

#### 199. Saved Messages Cloud
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A personal cloud storage chat where users can forward important messages, store media, and keep notes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Saved Messages Cloud

#### 200. Saved Posts & Comments
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A private bookmarking system that allows users to save posts and comments to a dedicated list. This list is synced across all devices, enabling users to retrieve important information easily.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Saved Posts & Comments

#### 201. Scan
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: An intelligent visual search utility that uses the camera to identify objects in the physical world. It can recognize plants, scan food labels for nutritional info, solve math equations, or identify songs playing in the background via Shazam.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Scan

#### 202. Search Bar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A global search utility at the top of the interface used to find accounts, lenses, publisher shows, and trending topics. It provides instant suggestions as the user types and displays categorized results for quick navigation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Search Bar

#### 203. Search Bar & Advanced Operators
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search engine that scans subreddits, posts, comments, and user profiles across the platform. Users can filter queries using advanced parameters such as `author:username`, `site:domain.com`, or `subreddit:name` to pinpoint information.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Search Bar & Advanced Operators

#### 204. Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Refines search queries using granular criteria to locate relevant videos, channels, playlists, or movies. Users can filter results by upload date, video duration, definition formats (such as 4K or HDR), and sort them by relevance or view count.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Search Filters

#### 205. Search Query Syntax
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Supports advanced operators within the search bar to locate specific posts and profiles on the network.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Search Query Syntax

#### 206. Search Trends & Auto-Suggest
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays trending topics, music tracks, and hashtags with dynamic autocomplete suggestions in the search tab.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Search Trends & Auto-Suggest

#### 207. Server Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A searchable directory of federated servers that can be filtered by topic, language, and signup policies.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Server Directory

#### 208. Server Discovery
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A public directory of verified, partnered, and community-run Discord servers that users can browse by interest tags.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Server Discovery

#### 209. Server Search Bar
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A localized search engine that parses messages, links, and user profiles strictly within the currently active server.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Server Search Bar

#### 210. Shared Album Media Browser
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Organizes all uploaded photos and videos in a dedicated, structured gallery interface featuring folder organization.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Shared Album Media Browser

#### 211. Shared Links Library
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Consolidates all web links shared across chats into a single searchable library.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Shared Links Library

#### 212. Skill Assessment Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A directory of standardized tests that allow users to verify their technical and professional skills. Passing an assessment adds a verification badge to the user's profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Skill Assessment Directory

#### 213. Social Media Feed Search (Inbox)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Searches through brand mentions, comments, and direct message contents across connected social channels in a single search console.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Social Media Feed Search (Inbox)

#### 214. Spotlight
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated, algorithmically driven feed that showcases short-form, vertical videos submitted by the community. Users can scroll endlessly to discover trending challenges, comedy sketches, and creative content from other creators.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Spotlight

#### 215. Story Highlights
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Pins expired Stories to folders on the user's profile page, bypassing the default 24-hour disappearance rule.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Story Highlights

#### 216. Stream Tag Filtering
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to filter the browse directories by specific creator-defined tags such as gameplay style or language. This helps viewers find niche communities and streams that match their exact interests.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Stream Tag Filtering

#### 217. Sub-Category Tag Filtering
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows users to filter category feeds using specific descriptive labels such as language, genre, or stream style. It makes discovery much faster by filtering out irrelevant broadcasts and highlighting exact content matches.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Sub-Category Tag Filtering

#### 218. Subreddit Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A categorized explorer that showcases popular and trending subreddits grouped by interest categories like gaming, sports, or technology. This directory helps users discover new communities that align with their personal interests.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Subreddit Directory

#### 219. Subscriptions Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated chronological feed that displays newly published videos solely from channels the user has subscribed to. This feed bypasses algorithmic recommendation systems, giving users a simple view of updates from their favorite creators.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Subscriptions Feed

#### 220. Swiping Profile Discovery Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: The core swiping card interface that allows users to discover local profiles, swiping right to indicate interest or left to pass.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Swiping Profile Discovery Feed

#### 221. Tagged Search Filters
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Uses hashtags and custom label tags to search and sort historical messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Tagged Search Filters

#### 222. Tagged Topic Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Filters search results and clusters public discussions using hyperlinked topic tags, replacing traditional hashtags with inline keywords.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Tagged Topic Search

#### 223. Topic Hashtags
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Aggregates all posts containing a specific hashtag into a chronological stream of posts featuring that tag.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Topic Hashtags

#### 224. Topics To Follow
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Feeds the algorithm recommendations by allowing users to follow specific interest topics (e.g., Gaming, Technology) rather than just individual accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Topics to Follow

#### 225. Travel Mode
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Allows premium users to temporarily change their swipe location coordinates to another city, matching with users there before arriving.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Travel Mode

#### 226. Trending Summarizations (Grok News)
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays real-time summaries of current news events and trending hashtags using AI compilation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Trending Summarizations (Grok News)

#### 227. Trending Topic Hashtag Directory
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A search-page listing that aggregates current popular hashtags and topic campaigns run by the community. Clicking on any hashtag opens a dedicated feed displaying all related posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Trending Topic Hashtag Directory

#### 228. Updates Tab Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Consolidates Status updates from contacts and channels followed by the user into a dedicated tab for browsing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Updates Tab Feed

#### 229. Visual Calendar Planner
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Displays all scheduled, draft, and published posts in an interactive calendar format supporting drag-and-drop rescheduling.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Visual Calendar Planner

#### 230. Voice Note Tagging & Folder Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Organizes saved voice notes using tags (e.g., `#work`, `#ideas`), allowing users to search and play saved audio notes quickly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Note Tagging & Folder Search

#### 231. Voice Status Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Permits users to search for active contacts or channels based on their active voice status icons (e.g., "Studying," "Gym," "Do Not Disturb").
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Status Search

#### 232. Voice-to-Text Search
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: Performs voice searches to find chats, channels, contacts, and shared files.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice-to-Text Search

#### 233. Watch Later Playlist
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A private default playlist where users can save videos they want to watch at a later time. The playlist syncs across all logged-in devices and allows users to easily clear watched content.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Watch Later Playlist

#### 234. Watch Video Feed
- **Category**: Content Discovery & Search
- **Description**: A dedicated video discovery tab that aggregates recommended long-form videos, live streams, and reels based on user viewing habits.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Watch Video Feed

### Category: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

#### 235. "Add Yours" Interactive Prompts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates public, interactive chains in Stories where other users can respond to a prompt with their own Stories.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: "Add Yours" Interactive Prompts

#### 236. Affiliation Badge (Verified Organizations)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays a square logo icon of a parent company next to an employee's or affiliate's checkmark badge.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Affiliation Badge (Verified Organizations)

#### 237. Auto-Follow / Auto-Like Rules
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Automatically engages with target profiles or hashtags based on user-defined interaction rules to grow accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Auto-Follow / Auto-Like Rules

#### 238. Birthday Calendar & Auto-congratulations
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Aggregates member birthdays in a group calendar and automatically publishes celebratory notices on the Band board.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Birthday Calendar & Auto-congratulations

#### 239. Bitmoji Outfits & Customization
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables users to design and modify a digital avatar that represents them across the platform. Users can customize facial features, hair, and select clothing items from designer brands to update their look in chats and on the Snap Map.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Bitmoji Outfits & Customization

#### 240. Broadcast Channels
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: One-to-many messaging tool for creators to share text, voice notes, photos, and polls with fans.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook, Facebook Messenger, Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Messenger Broadcast Channels, Broadcast Channels, Broadcast Channels

#### 241. Channel Discussion Groups
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Links a public group chat to a broadcast channel, allowing subscribers to comment on and discuss channel posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Channel Discussion Groups

#### 242. Channel Emote Selection
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: An interface that displays global Kick emotes and creator-specific custom emotes for subscribers to post in chat. It enables expressive visual communication and highlights subscriber status in public chat feeds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Channel Emote Selection

#### 243. Channel Membership
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A recurring monthly subscription model that allows fans to financially support creators in exchange for exclusive perks. Perks include custom loyalty badges, custom emojis for live chat, access to member-only videos, and private community posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Channel Membership

#### 244. Channel Points Rewards
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A customizable rewards program where viewers earn points for watch time and redeem them for channel-specific perks. Creators can customize the point costs and reward options to fit their brand.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Channel Points Rewards

#### 245. Chat Predictions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: An interactive tool where creators set a question and viewers use their earned Channel Points to predict the outcome. It increases chat activity and viewer retention during key gameplay moments.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Chat Predictions

#### 246. Co-AR Call Effects
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables video call participants to apply matching or interactive AR filters that react to each other simultaneously.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Co-AR Call Effects

#### 247. Co-Host / Channel Administrator Delegation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables channel creators to delegate administrative permissions to other group members to moderate live audio streams.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Co-Host / Channel Administrator Delegation

#### 248. Collaborative Posts (Collabs)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows a single feed post or Reel to be co-authored by up to 4 accounts (1 owner + 3 collaborators), sharing likes, views, and comments across profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Collaborative Posts (Collabs)

#### 249. Comment Auto-Responder (Auto-Comment On Post)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows scheduling a follow-up comment to post automatically alongside the main post, useful for sharing links.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Comment Auto-Responder (Auto-Comment on Post)

#### 250. Comments & Pinning
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A discussion section located beneath videos where viewers can post feedback, ask questions, and interact with the creator. Creators can pin a single comment to the very top of the feed to highlight important updates or positive feedback.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Comments & Pinning

#### 251. Communities
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Dedicated, semi-private spaces centered around specific topics where users can post content seen primarily by community members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: X Communities

#### 252. Communities Hub
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Links multiple related group chats under a single umbrella community, facilitating organized announcements and discussions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Communities Hub

#### 253. Community Karma
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A numerical score displayed on profiles that represents the user's contributions to the platform. It is calculated based on upvotes received on posts and comments, serving as a measure of digital reputation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Community Karma

#### 254. Community Moderation Rules
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Sets up to 10 community rules that display on the group's "About" page, outlining expected behavior and guidelines.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Community Moderation Rules

#### 255. Community Posts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: An interactive feed on the channel homepage where creators can publish text updates, polls, images, and GIFs. This allows creators to communicate and poll their audience without uploading a full video.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Community Posts

#### 256. Compliments Tool
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables users to send a short message to a potential match before an official match has occurred, attaching it to a specific profile card element.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Compliments Tool

#### 257. Connections System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Defines professional relationships using three degrees of connection. This helps users map their professional network and understand how they are connected to other members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Connections System

#### 258. Contact Sync Friend Discovery
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Scans the user's mobile device contact list to find and send friend invitations to people they know. It makes building a network fast by identifying which contacts already have active accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Contact Sync Friend Discovery

#### 259. Creator Raid Redirect
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows streamers to send their entire active audience to another creator's live stream at the end of their broadcast. It fosters cross-channel networking and keeps viewers engaged within the platform's ecosystem.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Creator Raid Redirect

#### 260. Cross-Platform Post Export
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to share their daily BeReal to external applications such as Instagram Stories or WhatsApp chats. It helps users cross-promote their content and share daily moments with their other social networks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Cross-Platform Post Export

#### 261. Custom Lists
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates custom timeline views of selected users to track their activity without cluttering your main feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Custom Lists

#### 262. Custom Member Onboarding Questionnaires
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Prompts prospective members to answer up to three custom questions before admins review their request to join a private group.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Member Onboarding Questionnaires

#### 263. Customer Sentiment Tagging
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Uses natural language processing to tag incoming inbox messages as positive, negative, or neutral.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Customer Sentiment Tagging

#### 264. Decoupled Quote Posts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows the creator of a post to detach their post from another user's quote post to prevent unwanted associations or contexts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Decoupled Quote Posts

#### 265. Direct Link Content Sharing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Generates direct links, QR codes, or custom cards to share Lemon8 posts across external messaging and social apps. It allows users to easily share inspirational content with friends who are not on the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Direct Link Content Sharing

#### 266. Direct Reblogs
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Shares public posts directly to your followers' feeds, preserving the original author's federated identity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Direct Reblogs

#### 267. Emoji Voice Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows listeners to send floating emoji reactions that trigger short sound effects while a user is speaking in a live channel.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Emoji Voice Reactions

#### 268. Event Attendance Tracker
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Provides organizers with a tool to mark members as present, absent, or no-shows during or after an event.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Event Attendance Tracker

#### 269. Event RSVP List
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays the names and profiles of members who have RSVP'd to an event, including waitlist status and guests.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Event RSVP List

#### 270. Events & Live Audio
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Virtual hubs that host live audio panel discussions or video broadcasts. Users can RSVP to events, invite connections, and participate in live chat during the broadcast.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Events & Live Audio

#### 271. Events Scheduler
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Organizes online or offline events with geographic coordinates, ticket links, invitation lists, and public discussion feeds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Facebook Events Scheduler

#### 272. Extend Match Timer
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to add 24 hours to the countdown timer of an expiring match to keep the match from dissolving.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Extend Match Timer

#### 273. Follow System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Subscribes a user to a creator's profile, prioritizing their posts in the "Following" tab of the homepage. It helps users build a curated feed of their favorite influencers and friends.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Follow System

#### 274. Follower Syncing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Replicates your Instagram social network by automatically following or queueing follow requests for the same users when they join Threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Follower Syncing

#### 275. Forum Channels
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Provides structured, message-board-style discussion spaces where users create separate posts with tag labels and comments.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Forum Channels

#### 276. Group Accounts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Automated community accounts that re-share any post mentioning their handle to all their followers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Group Accounts

#### 277. Group Call Hand-raise
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables participants in large group calls to raise their virtual hand to request speaking privileges.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Call Hand-raise

#### 278. Group Call Screen Sharing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to share their mobile or desktop screen with participants during a live WhatsApp video call.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Call Screen Sharing

#### 279. Group Chats
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates shared chat rooms where up to 1024 members can exchange messages, media, and participate in calls.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger, Reddit, Snapchat, WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Chats, Reddit Group Chats, Snapchat Group Chats, Group Chats

#### 280. Group Discussions & Comments
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Threaded message boards on group and event pages that allow members to post questions, share resources, and interact before and after events.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Meetup Group Discussions & Comments

#### 281. Group Photo Album Contributions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows members and organizers to upload photos taken during Meetup events to a shared, group-specific photo album.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Photo Album Contributions

#### 282. Group Topic
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Organizes discussion within large groups by creating sub-topic channels to keep conversations structured.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Topic Threads

#### 283. Groups & Admin Tools
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to create closed or public discussion groups with moderator tools, member lists, and customizable rules.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Facebook Groups & Admin Tools

#### 284. Groups Directory
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Niche discussion forums where professionals can share ideas, ask questions, and network. Groups are organized around specific industries, interests, or alumni networks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Groups Directory

#### 285. Heart Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows viewers to show appreciation for a post by double-tapping the image or clicking the heart icon. It provides direct engagement feedback that influences the recommendation algorithm.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Heart Reactions

#### 286. Hype Train Event
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A community-wide celebration triggered when a surge of support (subscriptions or bits) occurs in a channel. Viewers collaborate to fill a progress bar and unlock exclusive channel emotes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Hype Train Event

#### 287. InMail Messaging
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A premium messaging feature that allows users to send messages directly to people they are not connected with. This is widely used by recruiters and sales professionals for outreach.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn InMail Messaging

#### 288. Interactive Polls
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows creators to embed a poll within a post, offering up to four response options and a customizable voting duration.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band, Band, Instagram, Kick, Reddit, Telegram, Threads, Twitch, WhatsApp, X
- **Original Name(s)**: Polling Tool with Multi-Choice & Anonymous voting, Poll Results Export, Interactive Story Polls, Kick Chat Polls Creator, Reddit Poll Creation, Interactive Polls & Quizzes, Threads Interactive Polls, Twitch Chat Polls, In-Chat Polls, Interactive Polls

#### 289. Interactive Shared Scribble
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A collaborative whiteboard where group chat members can draw, sketch, and annotate together in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Interactive Shared Scribble

#### 290. LIVE Q&A
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows creators to toggle a dedicated Q&A panel during LIVE broadcasts, letting viewers submit questions that the host can select and display on-screen to answer in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: TikTok LIVE Q&A

#### 291. Level / Roles Administration
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows creators to designate member roles (Admin, Co-admin, Member) and customize group permissions granularly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Band Level / Roles Administration

#### 292. Link In Bio (Linkin.bio Page Creator)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A customizable landing page generator that links social posts to specific product or webpage URLs.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Link in Bio (Linkin.bio Page Creator)

#### 293. Lists
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables users to create and manage custom collections of accounts for muting, blocking, or creating custom feed filters.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Lists

#### 294. Live Chat & Moderation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A real-time conversation feed that displays alongside live streams and video Premieres. Creators and designated moderators can manage the chat feed using filters, word blocklists, and user timeouts to maintain a safe environment.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Live Chat & Moderation

#### 295. Live Chat Window
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A real-time chat interface displaying text messages, subscription alerts, and sub emotes next to the stream. It serves as the primary hub for immediate discussion and social interaction between the streamer and the audience.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick, Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Live Chat Window, Twitch Live Chat Window

#### 296. Live Rooms (Up To 4 Users)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Host live video broadcasts with up to three guests simultaneously in split-screen format.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Live Rooms (Up to 4 Users)

#### 297. Live Stage Broadcasts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows verified creators to stream live video broadcasts to an audience with moderation controls.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Live Stage Broadcasts

#### 298. Live Voice Listener List
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays the profile avatars of all users who are currently listening to a live voice channel or walkie-talkie stream.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Live Voice Listener List

#### 299. Local Server Rules
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Outlines instance policies that users must agree to during signup and follow to avoid account suspension.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Local Server Rules

#### 300. Loyalty Badge System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A customized badge asset system showing loyalty badges next to subscriber names in chat based on subscription age. Creators can design and upload unique badge graphics for different subscription milestones.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Loyalty Badge System

#### 301. Member Onboarding Screens
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Displays welcome popups, rules verification steps, and channel customization questionnaires for new members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Member Onboarding Screens

#### 302. Member Profiles & Bio Cards
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Custom user profile cards within each Band, showing band-specific roles, bios, contact details, and activity histories.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Member Profiles & Bio Cards

#### 303. Mention Control
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Manages permission levels for who can tag or mention your profile name in their public threads and replies.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Mention Control

#### 304. Message Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Lets users react to messages using any emoji, avoiding unnecessary clutter in conversations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Message Reactions

#### 305. Mod Queue & Tools
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A moderation dashboard that displays reported posts, comments, and spam alerts within a subreddit. Subreddit moderators use this hub to approve, remove, or lock content that violates community guidelines.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Mod Queue & Tools

#### 306. Multi-option Surveys
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Launches interactive, multi-option surveys and question forms in group chats to collect member feedback.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-option Surveys

#### 307. Opening Moves
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to set a default prompt question that matches can respond to immediately to open the conversation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Opening Moves

#### 308. Organizer Roles & Permissions Delegation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables the primary group organizer to assign co-organizer, assistant organizer, or event host roles to trusted members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Organizer Roles & Permissions Delegation

#### 309. Pages For Business
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Specialized profiles for brands, public figures, and businesses to build a public following and run targeted advertising campaigns.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Facebook Pages for Business

#### 310. Pinned Posts In Communities
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables moderators and administrators of an X Community to lock a specific post at the top of the community feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Pinned Posts in Communities

#### 311. Post Comments
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A private commenting section under a friend's BeReal post that is only visible to the user and their shared friends. It provides a secure space for friends to discuss their daily activities and plan hangouts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal, Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Post Comments, Lemon8 Post Comments

#### 312. Premiere Chat
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A specialized viewing format that allows creators and viewers to watch a newly uploaded video together in real time. It features a synchronized countdown and a live chat room that fosters community engagement during the initial broadcast.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Premiere Chat

#### 313. Profile Verification Badge
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Imports and displays the blue Meta-verified badge next to your handle to confirm identity authenticity, synced directly with your linked Instagram account.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Profile Verification Badge

#### 314. Profile View History
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows you to see which users have viewed your profile in the past 30 days, and makes your profile views visible to them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Profile View History

#### 315. Public Profiles
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Dedicated profile spaces for creators, brands, and public figures to showcase their public content. These profiles allow users to add a bio, website link, subscriber count, and pin permanent stories called highlights.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Public Profiles

#### 316. Quote Posts
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Shares another user's post with your own text comment or media attachment appended above the original content.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Quote Posts

#### 317. RSVP Event Calendar
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A shared calendar where admins can schedule events, collect RSVPs, and manage attendee lists.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: RSVP Event Calendar

#### 318. RealMoji Customization Panel
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A manager within the reaction menu that allows users to delete and re-record their saved RealMojis. It gives users the flexibility to refresh their reaction selfies whenever they want.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealMoji Customization Panel

#### 319. RealMojis Reactions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables reacting to a friend's daily post using a custom pre-recorded selfie RealMoji instead of standard keyboard characters. It creates a personalized way of responding to friends' posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealMojis Reactions

#### 320. Recommendations And Endorsements
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Features that allow connections to validate a user's skills and write reviews of their professional experience. These testimonials are displayed publicly on the user's profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Recommendations and Endorsements

#### 321. Reply Thread Views
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Customizes the layout of thread replies to show conversations chronologically, by popularity, or in a nested tree structure.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Reply Thread Views

#### 322. Repost & Quote
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Shares public posts directly with your followers as a clean repost, or with attached commentary in a quote post format.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Repost & Quote

#### 323. Repost Button
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Recommends a video to your mutual friends' For You feeds without saving or re-uploading the video yourself.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Repost Button

#### 324. Role Hierarchy And Permissions
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Establishes administrative rights and visual labels by creating and assigning server roles with custom priorities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Role Hierarchy and Permissions

#### 325. Scheduled Spaces
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables hosts to schedule a live audio Space in advance, allowing followers to subscribe to launch notifications and generating a unique shareable link.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Scheduled Spaces

#### 326. Server Events
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows administrators to schedule voice, video, or physical events with calendar reminder links for server members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Server Events

#### 327. Server Migration Tool
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Moves your profile, followers, blocks, and mutes from one server instance to another without losing your social graph.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Server Migration Tool

#### 328. Share To Stories
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Cross-posts a thread directly onto your Instagram Stories feed, rendering the post as an interactive custom sticker.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Share to Instagram Stories

#### 329. Shared Audio Playlist
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Permits group members to upload MP3 audio files to a shared channel queue, playing music or audio synchronously.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Shared Audio Playlist

#### 330. Shared Group Albums
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows group chat members to upload, view, and organize photos and videos into shared albums inside the group.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Shared Group Albums

#### 331. Shout-outs & Badges
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Permits admins and members to award recognition badges or custom digital stickers to highlight exceptional member contributions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Shout-outs & Badges

#### 332. Spaces
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates interactive audio and video rooms for live discussions, meetings, and presentations within communities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Apaya Spaces

#### 333. Spaces (Live Audio)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Hosts or joins live, interactive audio conversations with other users on the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Spaces (Live Audio)

#### 334. Speed Dating (Blind Chat Event)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A scheduled real-time event where users are paired to chat for three minutes without seeing each other's photos, revealing profiles only if both agree.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Speed Dating (Blind Chat Event)

#### 335. Stage Channels
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Moderated audio rooms designed to host structured panel discussions, presentations, and QA sessions for large audiences.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Stage Channels

#### 336. Starter Packs
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to bundle a set of recommended accounts and custom feeds into a shareable package to help new users onboard.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Starter Packs

#### 337. Stories (My Story)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to post chronological photo and video updates that are visible to their friends or the public. The compiled content remains viewable for exactly 24 hours before automatically expiring.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Stories (My Story)

#### 338. Streaks
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Tracks the consecutive number of days two friends have sent direct photo or video snaps to each other. This visual counter encourages daily communication and displays a flame emoji next to the contact's name.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Streaks

#### 339. Subreddit Creation
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows any account that meets basic age and karma requirements to establish a new subreddit. Creators define the community name, rules, topic tags, and assume the initial moderator role.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Subreddit Creation

#### 340. Supergroups
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enables massive group chats hosting up to 200,000 members, featuring advanced moderation and pinning.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Supergroups

#### 341. Template Application
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows users to reuse the exact visual templates and layouts designed by other creators in their own posts. It promotes community layout sharing and makes aesthetic post creation accessible to everyone.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Template Application

#### 342. Unified Social Inbox
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Consolidates comments, direct messages, and brand reviews from multiple social channels into a single inbox, allowing users to reply directly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Unified Social Inbox

#### 343. Upvote/Downvote System
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A democratic voting system that determines the visibility and ranking of posts and comments. Upvotes increase visibility and push content to the top, while downvotes lower content and hide low-quality posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Upvote/Downvote System

#### 344. User Flairs
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Customizable text or image labels that appear next to a user's name when posting in a specific subreddit. Subreddit moderators define these flairs to indicate roles, expertise, or community jokes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit User Flairs

#### 345. Video Playlists (Collections)
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Categorizes public videos on a creator's profile into themed playlists displayed at the top of their grid.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Video Playlists (Collections)

#### 346. Video Replies To Comments
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Creates a new video post that highlights and overlays a specific comment from a previous video as a sticker.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Video Replies to Comments

#### 347. Walkie-Talkie Group Channel
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: A live voice channel where group members can broadcast live audio to all connected members in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Walkie-Talkie Group Channel

#### 348. Watch Together Co-Viewing
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Allows group call participants to watch videos, Facebook watch shows, and movies together in real-time sync.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Watch Together Co-Viewing

#### 349. Women-Initiate-First Match Control
- **Category**: Interpersonal & Community Engagement
- **Description**: Enforces a double-opt-in rule where only female users can send the first message after a heterosexual match, with a 24-hour expiration window.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Women-Initiate-First Match Control

### Category: Direct Messaging & Communication

#### 350. Attachment Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to send resumes, PDFs, photos, and spreadsheets directly within direct messages. This streamlines the application and networking process.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Attachment Sharing

#### 351. Audio Read Receipts
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Displays a visual indicator showing whether the recipient has played a sent voice message.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Audio Read Receipts

#### 352. Auto-Play Voice Sequence
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Plays multiple unread voice messages in a conversation consecutively without requiring the user to press play on each one.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Auto-Play Voice Sequence

#### 353. Canned Responses Shortcut
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Stores text templates for frequently asked questions, allowing users to insert them into chat windows with shortcuts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Canned Responses Shortcut

#### 354. Chat Block And Report
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A safety control to block unwanted users from sending direct messages and report malicious conversations to the help desk. It ensures user safety by preventing harassment and filtering spam.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Chat Block and Report

#### 355. Chat Channels
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Public, real-time chat rooms hosted within specific subreddits for community discussions. These channels allow members to chat casually about trending topics without creating post threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Chat Channels

#### 356. Chat Emojis And GIPHY Integration
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Integrates emojis and animated GIFs into messaging threads to make conversations more engaging. Users can quickly search and add visual elements to express ideas.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Chat Emojis and GIPHY Integration

#### 357. Chat Link Integrations
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to paste video conference or private chat links inside direct posts, formatting them as clickable badges.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Chat Link Integrations

#### 358. Chat Mentions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A chat notification mechanism that highlights a message for a specific user and alerts them inside the active chat window. It changes the message background color and plays an optional notification sound.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Chat Mentions

#### 359. Chat Message Deletion
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables users to delete specific text or photo messages from the chat view for both themselves and the recipient. It allows retracting accidental messages or clearing sensitive chats permanently.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Chat Message Deletion

#### 360. Chat Reactions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Reacts to individual chat messages in a thread using specialized Bitmoji stickers or standard emojis. This allows users to quickly express feelings like laughter, shock, or approval without typing a text reply.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Chat Reactions

#### 361. Chat User Card Inspector
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A clickable pop-up profile summary within chat that allows users to check account details. It displays quick actions like follow, block, report, and direct message shortcuts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat User Card Inspector

#### 362. Chat Username Mentions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: An alert mechanism that draws a user's attention in chat by typing their username and highlighting the chat block. It highlights the target message block in yellow and triggers a browser notification if configured.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat Username Mentions

#### 363. Chat Whisper Command
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A chat command that enables starting or sending a private Whisper message directly from the public chat feed interface. It provides a quick shortcut for users without needing to open the dedicated whisper panel.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Chat Whisper Command

#### 364. Chat Whispers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A direct, private messaging channel that allows users to send private text messages to other registered users. It enables one-on-one private chats away from public channel communication fields.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat Whispers

#### 365. Circular Video Snapshots
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Captures and sends circular video clips up to 30 seconds directly from the chat camera interface.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Circular Video Snapshots

#### 366. Consolidated Shared Media Viewer
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Groups all media, files, documents, and web links shared in a message thread into a structured library.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Consolidated Shared Media Viewer

#### 367. Contact Cards
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shares a contact's phone number, name, and profile details directly into a chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Contact Cards

#### 368. Contact Organizer Tool
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Provides a direct messaging link on the group homepage, allowing prospective or current members to ask organizers private questions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Contact Organizer Tool

#### 369. Contact Quick Share
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Accelerates sharing by listing your top-interacted Instagram direct message contacts directly within the Threads sharing sheet.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Contact Quick Share

#### 370. Creator Studio Inbox
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A centralized communication dashboard in YouTube Studio designed for reviewing and managing viewer interactions. It compiles and filters comments, replies, and mentions across all channel videos for streamlined responses.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Creator Studio Inbox

#### 371. Delayed Sending Queue
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Places outgoing messages in a queue scheduled for delivery at custom times or user status triggers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Delayed Sending Queue

#### 372. Direct Chat System
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A direct, private text messaging feature that allows friends to chat privately inside the application. It provides an integrated chat workspace to continue conversations started in comment threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Direct Chat System

#### 373. Direct Messaging
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Provides private direct messaging channels for users to send one-on-one text messages to each other. It facilitates private networking and communication between creators and followers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band, Bluesky, Bluesky, Bluesky, Bluesky, Bluesky, Discord, Discord, Instagram, Instagram, Lemon8, Lemon8, Lemon8, Mastodon, Mastodon, Mastodon, Meetup, Publer, Publer, Reddit, Threads, Threads, TikTok, TikTok, TikTok, TikTok, X, X, X, X, X, X
- **Original Name(s)**: DM Ban/Ignore list, Bluesky Direct Messaging, Bluesky DM Permission Controls, Bluesky DM Message Requests, Bluesky Direct Message Deletion, Bluesky DM Notification Badges, Discord Direct Message Voice Calls, Discord DM Group Chats, Hands-Free DM Voice Notes, Shopping in DMs, Lemon8 Direct Messaging, Lemon8 Direct Message Notifications Toggle, Lemon8 Direct Message Permissions, Mastodon DM Filtering, Mastodon DM Notification Alerts, Mastodon Direct Message History, Direct Message Chat Rooms, Direct Message Inbox Manager, Real-Time DM Alerts, Reddit Direct Messages, Threads Share to Direct Message, Threads Thread-to-DM Forwarding, DM Read Receipts, Giphy Integration in DMs, TikTok Direct Message Voice Notes, DM Permission Control, End-to-End Encrypted DMs, DM Voice Messages, Group DM Administration, DM Reactions, Direct Message Filters & Requests, X API v2 DMs Endpoint

#### 374. Direct Video Meetings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables users to start video calls directly from messaging threads. The system integrates with Microsoft Teams, Zoom, or LinkedIn's native video conferencing tool.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Direct Video Meetings

#### 375. Document Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends documents and files of various formats (PDF, DOCX, ZIP) up to 2GB in size directly through a chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Document Sharing

#### 376. Emoji Message Reactions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to quickly react to any individual direct message with a specific emoji instead of typing a text response.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Emoji Message Reactions

#### 377. Emoji Reactions In Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to react to specific chat bubbles inside direct messages and group chats using custom emojis. This helps users quickly respond to messages without sending text replies.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Emoji Reactions in Chat

#### 378. End-to-End Encrypted Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Provides private chat rooms that encrypt messages, voice calls, and media, ensuring they cannot be accessed by third parties.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: End-to-End Encrypted Messenger Chats

#### 379. Ephemeral Chat Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Text, voice, and media messages sent in direct threads that are deleted by default after viewing. Users can tap on messages to save them in the chat history, which highlights them in grey.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Ephemeral Chat Messages

#### 380. Event Discussion Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A dedicated chat room specific to a single event that automatically includes all members who have RSVP'd.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Event Discussion Chat

#### 381. Forwarding Limits
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Limits forwarding a message to a maximum of 5 chats at a time to prevent the spread of spam and misinformation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Forwarding Limits

#### 382. Friend List Status
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A presence indicator displaying which of your followed friends are online, offline, or busy. It allows you to see what streams your friends are watching and send them direct messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Friend List Status

#### 383. Group Chat Rooms (Open & Private)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows members of a Band to open dedicated, real-time group chat threads for quick messaging separate from the main board.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Chat Rooms (Open & Private)

#### 384. Group Messaging Link
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Generates secure invite or content sharing links for specific threads to be pasted directly into group chats on Instagram.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Group Messaging Link

#### 385. Group Video Calls
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Launches high-definition video calls hosting multiple participants with grid layouts and interactive call options.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Video Calls

#### 386. Group-Wide Organizer Announcements
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows organizers to broadcast emails and push notifications containing important updates to all registered group members simultaneously.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Group-Wide Organizer Announcements

#### 387. Hands-Free Voice Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record voice messages without holding down the microphone button.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Hands-Free Voice Notes

#### 388. In-App Group Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Creates a private group message board within TikTok for sharing and discussing videos with up to 32 mutual followers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: In-App Group Chats

#### 389. In-App Video & Voice Calling
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables matches to start video calls or voice chats directly inside the chat interface without sharing personal contact numbers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: In-App Video & Voice Calling

#### 390. In-Chat Translation
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Translates messages written in foreign languages directly within the chat interface in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: In-Chat Translation

#### 391. Instant Video Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send circular, short-form video messages up to 60 seconds directly in a chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Instant Video Notes

#### 392. Instant Walkie-Talkie (Push-to-Talk) DM
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A direct messaging function that immediately streams and plays voice messages out loud on the recipient's phone if they have the app active.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Instant Walkie-Talkie (Push-to-Talk) DM

#### 393. Interactive Question Game
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: An interactive game built into the chat console where both matched users must answer the same card-style question before their answers are revealed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Interactive Question Game

#### 394. Internal Team Chat Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows team members to leave private notes and comments inside customer message threads, invisible to the customer.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Internal Team Chat Notes

#### 395. Live Chat Super Stickers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Animated digital stickers that viewers can purchase to send during live streams and Premieres. The stickers display as bright animations in the live chat feed, helping the viewer's message stand out from normal text.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Live Chat Super Stickers

#### 396. Live Location Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shares a user's real-time physical location with a chat for a set duration of 15 minutes, 1 hour, or 8 hours.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Live Location Sharing

#### 397. Live Q&A Sessions
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: An interactive tool for live broadcasts that allows creators to host organized question-and-answer sessions. Viewers submit questions in a dedicated feed, and the creator can select and pin questions to the top of the chat for all viewers to see.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Live Q&A Sessions

#### 398. Map Location Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Shares your live real-time location or static coordinates with a friend directly inside a chat thread. This allows friends to track your arrival or find where you are on the Snap Map.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Map Location Sharing

#### 399. Member Profile Message Block
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to restrict who can initiate direct message conversations with them to prevent spam or unwanted outreach.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Member Profile Message Block

#### 400. Mention Tags
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows creators to tag other channels in video titles, descriptions, or community posts using the "@" symbol. Tagged channels receive a notification in their YouTube Studio dashboard, making collaborations and shoutouts easier.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Mention Tags

#### 401. Message Assigner / Internal Delegation
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Assigns customer direct messages or comment threads to specific team members in the workspace.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Message Assigner / Internal Delegation

#### 402. Message Button Integration
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Integrates a direct message option on Threads user profiles, routing messages through Meta's Instagram messaging backend.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Message Button Integration

#### 403. Message Inboxes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A divided messaging panel that separates conversation threads into Focused and Other tabs. This keeps important professional chats organized while filtering out marketing pitches and spam.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Message Inboxes

#### 404. Message Read Receipts (Detailed View)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Tracks who has opened chat messages, displaying a count and a list of specific readers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Message Read Receipts (Detailed view)

#### 405. Message Threading
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Creates nested, sub-channel conversations stemming from a single message to keep chat topics organized.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Message Threading

#### 406. Multi-lingual Translator
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Automatically translates incoming messages into the user's native language in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-lingual Translator

#### 407. Offline Voice Messaging Queue
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Saves recorded voice notes locally when offline and automatically delivers them when a cellular or Wi-Fi connection is restored.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Offline Voice Messaging Queue

#### 408. Photo & GIF
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Enables matched users to share images from their camera rolls or search and send animated GIFs.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Photo & GIF Messenger

#### 409. Photo Sharing In DM
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows sending images directly from the device camera roll inside private chat threads. It enables users to share inspiration photos and product ideas privately.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Photo Sharing in DM

#### 410. Pin Message
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Saves crucial posts or links in a dedicated channel registry, making them easily retrievable by members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Pin Message

#### 411. Post Card Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows sharing Lemon8 post cards directly to a friend's private message inbox from the post view. It lets users share ideas and recommendations without leaving the in-app chat interface.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Post Card Sharing

#### 412. Private Mention Visibility
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Restricts post visibility to only people mentioned in the post, acting as a direct message within the federated network.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Private Mention Visibility

#### 413. Private Photo Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to send private, one-off photos to friends directly inside a private chat window. These photos are captured using the front and rear cameras to maintain the platform's signature dual style.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Private Photo Sharing

#### 414. Push-to-Talk Intercom
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Turns chats into real-time walkie-talkie intercom lines, playing audio messages instantly out loud on receiving devices.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Push-to-Talk Intercom

#### 415. Quick Send (Hold-to-Share)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Instantly shares a video with a specific friend with a single long-press action.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Quick Send (Hold-to-Share)

#### 416. Reaction Customization
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to react to specific chat bubbles with a customized selection of emojis.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Reaction Customization

#### 417. Reaction Emojis & Stickers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Permits users to apply emoji reactions directly to specific message bubbles in their chats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Reaction Emojis & Stickers

#### 418. RealChat Notification Mute
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A setting that silences notifications for a specific private chat thread, reducing incoming alerts. It helps users manage busy conversations without leaving the chat room entirely.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealChat Notification Mute

#### 419. RealMojis In Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to send their pre-saved RealMoji selfie reactions as direct, standalone chat messages. It makes messaging more expressive by letting users respond with their actual facial expressions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealMojis in Chat

#### 420. Saved Replies (Quick Replies)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows professional and creator accounts to assign keyboard shortcuts to pre-written message templates.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Saved Replies (Quick Replies)

#### 421. Secret Chats
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Provides end-to-end encrypted chats with self-destruct timers that leave no trace on Telegram's servers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Secret Chats

#### 422. Sent Message Editing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to edit the text of sent messages within 48 hours of dispatch.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Sent Message Editing

#### 423. Share To Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A sharing shortcut that compiles video links and previews to send directly to contacts. While native direct messaging inside YouTube has been deprecated, this system integrates with mobile device share sheets to forward links to messaging applications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Share to Chat

#### 424. Silent Message Dispatch
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends a message to a recipient without playing a notification sound on their device.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Silent Message Dispatch

#### 425. Silent Messages (`/Silent`)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Delivers a direct message without triggering a push notification or sound on the recipient's device.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Silent Messages (`/silent`)

#### 426. Smart Replies
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: AI-generated quick reply options displayed at the bottom of the chat interface. These replies are customized based on the context of the incoming message to help users respond quickly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Smart Replies

#### 427. Swipe To Reply
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Quotes a specific message in a chat by swiping right on it, allowing structured, inline conversations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Swipe to Reply

#### 428. Telescope Video Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Records and sends round video messages up to 60 seconds that stream instantly in-chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Telescope Video Messages

#### 429. Vanish Mode
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Deletes all messages, photos, and links within a direct message thread as soon as the recipient reads them and both users close the chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook, Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Messenger Vanish Mode, Vanish Mode

#### 430. Video Screen Sharing
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Broadcasts the caller's mobile or desktop screen display to other participants during a video call.
