- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Video Screen Sharing

#### 431. Voice & Video Group Calling
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Built-in VoIP voice and video calls within chat rooms, allowing multiple members to join and share screens.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice & Video Group Calling

#### 432. Voice Message Recording
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Records and sends short audio voice messages directly into a direct message or server chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Voice Message Recording

#### 433. Voice Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send short audio voice clips directly into a chat window.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Messages

#### 434. Voice Messaging Waves
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends voice notes with visual sound wave previews that let recipients scrub through audio durations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Messaging Waves

#### 435. Voice Notes
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends recorded voice messages directly within chat threads. This is useful for hands-free communication, displaying a waveform in the chat bubble that recipients can play at their convenience.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Voice Notes

#### 436. Voice Notes In Chat
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to record and send voice messages directly into a match chat thread.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Notes in Chat

#### 437. Whisper Block Settings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A privacy filter that blocks users who are not friends from sending private Whisper messages. It helps reduce spam and unwanted messages from strangers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Whisper Block Settings

#### 438. Whisper Messages
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Sends temporary text messages that blur out after reading, requiring the recipient to tap to reveal them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Whisper Messages

#### 439. Whisper Mode (Low-volume PTT)
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Automatically routes voice playback from the external speaker to the earpiece speaker when the phone is held to the ear.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Whisper Mode (Low-volume PTT)

#### 440. Whisper Mute Settings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: Allows users to block or mute individual users from sending them direct messages or whispers on the platform. It helps protect users from harassment and filters out unsolicited chat conversations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Whisper Mute Settings

#### 441. Whisper Spam Filter
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A security filter that blocks whispers from unknown users unless they are followed or friends. It protects the user's private inbox from automated bot spam and unsolicited messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Whisper Spam Filter

#### 442. Whispers
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A private, direct messaging tool that allows two users to send private text messages to each other on the platform. It enables one-on-one communication outside of public channel chat rooms.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Whispers

#### 443. Whitelist Messaging Settings
- **Category**: Direct Messaging & Communication
- **Description**: A safety setting that controls who can initiate chat requests or send direct messages to your account. Users can choose to receive messages from everyone, accounts older than 30 days, or block all incoming requests.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Whitelist Messaging Settings

### Category: Monetization & E-Commerce

#### 444. AR Shopping Lenses
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Interactive try-on experiences that allow users to virtually test cosmetics, eyewear, and clothing using the camera. These lenses feature product details and a direct "Shop" button that links to checkout pages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat AR Shopping Lenses

#### 445. Ad Revenue Sharing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Distributes a portion of the advertisement revenue generated by ads placed in the reply sections of a creator's posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Ad Revenue Sharing

#### 446. Ad-Free Group Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows Band admins to pay a platform fee that removes all third-party advertisements from their Band for all members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Ad-Free Group Subscription

#### 447. Ad-Free Subscription Tier
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monthly platform subscription plan that removes banner ads and audio promos from the app experience.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Ad-Free Subscription Tier

#### 448. Admin Donation Pages
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays instance-wide crowdfunding links (like Patreon, Open Collective, or LiberaPay) on the server's landing page.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Admin Donation Pages

#### 449. Ads Bid Manager
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A self-serve dashboard where companies bid on sponsored post slots, megathreads, and conversation ads. Advertisers target niche interest groups by selecting specific subreddits, category tags, and user locations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Ads Bid Manager

#### 450. Ads Manager Campaign Portal
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An advertising dashboard where businesses set budgets and create sponsored content, message ads, or dynamic text ads. Campaigns can be configured to target specific professional cohorts based on company size, job seniority, and industry fields.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Ads Manager Campaign Portal

#### 451. Affiliate Link Preview Support
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays optimized product card layouts when posting ecommerce affiliate URLs, showing prices and buy buttons.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Affiliate Link Preview Support

#### 452. Affiliate Link Previews
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Generates metadata-rich product cards when affiliate links are posted, maximizing click-through rates and commission tracking.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Affiliate Link Previews

#### 453. Affiliate Program Partner
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Provides users with referral links and displays a metrics dashboard tracking sign-ups, clicks, and affiliate payouts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Publer Affiliate Program Partner

#### 454. Affiliate Storefront Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows verified creators to link Amazon storefronts, LTK shops, or personal blogs directly in their profile bio. It helps creators monetize their influence by directing traffic to their affiliate hubs.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Affiliate Storefront Links

#### 455. App Shop
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app storefront where users can buy premium avatar decorations, profile effects, and soundboard sounds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord App Shop

#### 456. Automated Billing Bot
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates an automated billing bot that generates invoices, receipts, and tracks payment statuses in-chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Automated Billing bot

#### 457. Backtrack Feature (Premium)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows premium users to undo an accidental left swipe (rejection) and return the profile to the screen.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Backtrack Feature (Premium)

#### 458. Bits And Cheering
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A virtual item purchased by viewers to show support for creators in chat, which triggers animated emotes. Cheering with bits contributes directly to the creator's revenue.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Bits and Cheering

#### 459. BrandConnect
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A matchmaking service within YouTube Studio that connects creators with brands for sponsored video campaigns. The tool manages campaign details and calculates audience value using YouTube's internal data.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube BrandConnect

#### 460. Branded Content Tag
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to label commercial partnerships in posts, appending an official "Paid partnership" notification tag to the thread header.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Branded Content Tag

#### 461. Branded Product Tagging
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows official brand accounts to tag products in their daily BeReal posts, routing users to their digital shop. Viewers can tap these tags to explore product specifications and purchase details.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Branded Product Tagging

#### 462. Business Catalog Showcase
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows businesses to display their products and services directly on their WhatsApp Business profile with prices, descriptions, and links.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Business Catalog Showcase

#### 463. ByteDance Brand Campaigns Portal
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app campaign center that connects popular creators with public relations agencies for sponsored content requests. It allows creators to apply for paid campaigns directly within the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 ByteDance Brand Campaigns Portal

#### 464. Channel Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A recurring monthly payment made by viewers to support a channel. Subscribing unlocks custom emotes, loyalty badges, and ad-free viewing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Channel Subscriptions

#### 465. Chat Message Pinning
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A premium moderation tool that allows streamers or moderators to pin important text or sponsor links. Pinned messages remain fixed at the top of the chat panel for high visibility.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat Message Pinning

#### 466. Click-to- Ads
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows businesses to run ads on Facebook or Instagram that open a WhatsApp chat window with the business when clicked.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Click-to-Messenger Ads, Click-to-WhatsApp Ads

#### 467. Client Billing Management
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Provides agency owners with tools to configure workspace plans and invoice clients for managing their social accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Client Billing Management

#### 468. Coins In-App Currency
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app virtual currency that users can purchase and spend to activate Spotlights and SuperSwipes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Bumble Coins In-App Currency

#### 469. Collectible Avatars
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Limited-edition, blockchain-backed digital avatars that users can purchase in the Reddit Shop. These avatars allow users to customize their profile icon and display special visual effects on comments.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Collectible Avatars

#### 470. Commercial Affiliate Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Supports publishing affiliate product links with custom descriptions, making links easy to read without tracking parameters.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Commercial Affiliate Links

#### 471. Contributor Program
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monetization program that allows eligible creators to earn real money payouts based on the gold and karma they receive. Creators must meet verification requirements and maintain active engagement to withdraw funds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Contributor Program

#### 472. Creator Marketplace
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: The official platform connecting brands with TikTok creators for sponsored campaigns and collaboration deals.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat, Threads, TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Creator Marketplace, Threads Creator Marketplace, Creator Marketplace

#### 473. Creator Profile Tip Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Provides verified tip and donation link buttons on user profiles via structured metadata table fields.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Creator Profile Tip Links

#### 474. Creator Rewards Program
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Pays eligible creators based on the high-quality views and engagement of original videos that are longer than 60 seconds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Creator Rewards Program

#### 475. Creator Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to lock specific posts, live spaces, and interactions behind a monthly subscription fee.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick, TikTok, X
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Creator Subscriptions, TikTok Creator Subscriptions, Creator Subscriptions

#### 476. Creator Tip Links
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays links on user profiles pointing to third-party payment services like Ko-fi, Patreon, or Buy Me a Coffee.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Creator Tip Links

#### 477. Custom Brand Watermarking
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Automatically overlays a logo file as a watermark on scheduled image or video posts to protect intellectual property.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Brand Watermarking

#### 478. Custom Feed Monetization
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows developers of custom feeds to embed sponsor banners or external tip links in feed descriptions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Custom Feed Monetization

#### 479. Digital Tipping Gateway
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users to send digital tips and micro-payments directly to creators or contacts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Digital Tipping Gateway

#### 480. Domain Registration Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates with third-party domain registrars to let users purchase and map custom domains to use as their handle directly inside the app.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Domain Registration Integration

#### 481. E-Commerce Cart
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows customers to browse a business's catalog, add multiple items to a shopping cart, and send the order as a single message.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: E-Commerce Cart

#### 482. Fragment TON Marketplace
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A decentralized auction platform where users can buy and sell collectible usernames, anonymous phone numbers, and ads using TON cryptocurrency.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Fragment TON Marketplace

#### 483. Gifted Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows viewers to buy channel subscriptions and distribute them to other chat participants. It is a key tool for community building and rewarding active chat participants.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick, Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Gifted Subscriptions, Twitch Gifted Subscriptions

#### 484. Gold System
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A purchasing system that allows users to buy virtual gold to award to high-quality posts and comments. Awarding gold highlights the content, showing appreciation for helpful contributions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Gold System

#### 485. Group Member Dues
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows organizers to require members to pay a recurring subscription fee (monthly or annually) to maintain active membership in the group.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Member Dues

#### 486. Group Merch / Print-on-Demand Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates with custom merchandising platforms to let groups design and sell custom clothing or gear to members.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Merch / Print-on-Demand Integration

#### 487. In-App Checkout
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows customers to purchase tagged items directly inside Instagram using stored Meta Pay credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: In-App Checkout

#### 488. In-App Digital Item Purchase Shop
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app storefront created by Voodoo that allows users to purchase premium frames, visual themes, or emoji packs. It provides a non-intrusive monetization model that lets users customize their profile aesthetics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal In-App Digital Item Purchase Shop

#### 489. In-App Payment Bots
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates bots that accept payments from credit cards and third-party gateways (Stripe, Google Pay) inside chats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: In-App Payment Bots

#### 490. In-App Sticker Store
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Offers premium digital sticker and emoji packs for purchase to customize messaging and board replies.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: In-App Sticker Store

#### 491. In-Chat Business Checkout
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables businesses to send payment requests and product links for checkout directly within the chat window.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: In-Chat Business Checkout

#### 492. In-Chat Payments
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables users to send and receive money securely directly within a WhatsApp chat using linked bank accounts or payment gateways.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: In-Chat Payments

#### 493. In-chat Showcase Catalog
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows merchants to send interactive product showcases and buyable catalogs directly into chat windows.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: In-chat Showcase Catalog

#### 494. LIVE Gifts & Diamonds
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows LIVE streamers to collect virtual gifts from viewers, which accumulate as Diamonds and can be withdrawn as cash.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: LIVE Gifts & Diamonds

#### 495. Learning Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A subscription-based learning portal offering thousands of professional video courses. Users can complete courses to earn certificates that display on their profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Learning Subscriptions

#### 496. Link Spotlight
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Adds a prominent call-to-action button (e.g., "Book Now", "View Menu", "Shop Now") with an external hyperlink directly under the user's bio.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Link Spotlight

#### 497. Localized Marketplace Listing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users to post items for sale, listing them in a geographic grid accessible to local buyers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Localized Marketplace Listing

#### 498. Location Spotlight
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays physical business coordinates, operating hours, contact telephone/email, and a miniature interactive map on the profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Location Spotlight

#### 499. Marketplace Buyer/Seller Ratings
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A feedback system that lets buyers and sellers rate their transaction experience on a 1-5 star scale.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Marketplace Buyer/Seller Ratings

#### 500. Nitro Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monthly paid upgrade service that boosts individual user capabilities across the entire Discord platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Nitro Subscription

#### 501. One-Time Purchases
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates checkout mechanisms for buying digital tickets, games, or exclusive content inside developer applications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord One-Time Purchases

#### 502. Organizer Subscription Billing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Meetup's native billing system that charges organizers a monthly or semi-annual subscription fee to host groups on the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Organizer Subscription Billing

#### 503. Paid Ad Boost Scheduler
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Schedules Facebook and Instagram ad boosting budgets directly from the scheduling dashboard.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Paid Ad Boost Scheduler

#### 504. Paid Channel Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows channel creators to charge a monthly subscription fee for access to exclusive live voice rooms or audio archives.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Paid Channel Subscription

#### 505. Paid Member Dues & Stripe Connect
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Restricts access to a Band to paying subscribers, managing recurring membership fee collection.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Paid Member Dues & Stripe Connect

#### 506. Partner Program (YPP)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: The foundational monetization framework that allows eligible channels to earn revenue from advertisements and YouTube Premium views. Creators must meet specific subscriber and watch time thresholds to apply.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Partner Program (YPP)

#### 507. Peer-to-Peer Payments
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users in supported regions to send and receive money directly through chat using a linked debit card or PayPal account.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Peer-to-Peer Payments

#### 508. Premium Paid Channels
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows channel owners to lock exclusive content or posts behind a paid subscription or Star fee.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Premium Paid Channels

#### 509. Premium Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables channel owners to restrict access to exclusive feeds, chats, or forums behind monthly subscription tiers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya, LinkedIn, Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Premium Subscriptions, LinkedIn Premium Subscriptions, Reddit Premium Subscription

#### 510. Premium Voice Filters Pack
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Offers access to premium audio modulation and character voice synthesis packs for purchase.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Premium Voice Filters Pack

#### 511. Premium/Boost Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Paid recurring subscription packages that unlock premium features like unlimited swipes, backtracking, and advanced search filters.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Bumble Premium/Boost Subscriptions

#### 512. Prime Gaming Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A free monthly channel subscription benefit included for users who link their Amazon Prime account to Twitch. It allows Prime members to support their favorite creator at no extra cost.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Prime Gaming Subscription

#### 513. Product Showcase Carousel
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A dedicated display carousel on a creator's profile page containing catalog listings of partnered brand products. It creates a personalized storefront for creators to recommend and sell curated items.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Product Showcase Carousel

#### 514. Product Tagging In Media
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows pages to tag specific items from their Shop catalog directly in feed photos, videos, or reels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Product Tagging in Media

#### 515. Professional Accounts
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Specialized profiles for business and media entities that support custom external storefront links.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Professional Accounts

#### 516. Professional Shops
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Digital storefronts that allow businesses to showcase catalogs and sell products directly through Facebook.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Professional Shops

#### 517. Profile Storefront ( Shop)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays a dedicated shopping tab on a business's profile, hosting custom collections and catalog items.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Profile Storefront (Instagram Shop)

#### 518. Promotional Feed Placement
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Interstitial advertising slots inserted between friends' posts on the home feed. These placements are labeled clearly and allow users to discover products while catching up with friends.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Promotional Feed Placement

#### 519. Quick Reply Business Templates
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables businesses to save and reuse frequent messages to answer common customer inquiries rapidly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Quick Reply Business Templates

#### 520. RealBrands Official Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows users to search for and subscribe to verified official brand accounts, celebrities, and creators. Subscribing adds these public profiles to a secondary tab within the user's daily feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealBrands Official Subscriptions

#### 521. Retail Product Tagging
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to tag specific items in photos, linking them directly to external retail web stores. It provides viewers with direct shopping access to items featured in fashion and home decor posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Retail Product Tagging

#### 522. Sales Navigator
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A lead generation platform offering advanced lead search filters, lead recommendations, and CRM integrations. It helps sales professionals identify and contact key decision makers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Sales Navigator

#### 523. Server Boosting
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows members to purchase boosts that collectively upgrade server performance, audio quality, and custom slot allowances.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Server Boosting

#### 524. Server Membership Fees
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows server administrators to gate registration behind required contributions or subscriptions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Server Membership Fees

#### 525. Server Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows server owners to create paid tiers that grant members custom roles, special channels, and custom badges.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Server Subscriptions

#### 526. Shipping And Payment Processing
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Integrates shipping label creation and payment collection through Facebook Marketplace for nationwide delivery.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Shipping and Payment Processing

#### 527. Shop Spotlight
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Showcases a carousel of up to five products with price tags directly at the top of a business profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Shop Spotlight

#### 528. Shop Storefront Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows brands and registered sellers to exhibit products directly on their profile under a shopping tab.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: TikTok Shop Storefront Integration

#### 529. Shopify & WooCommerce Product Linker
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Connects with online stores to tag products directly in social posts, facilitating social selling.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Shopify & WooCommerce Product Linker

#### 530. Shopping Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows creators to connect official store platforms (like Shopify or Spring) to their channel. It displays a scrollable shelf of products below videos and lets creators tag items in videos and live streams.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Shopping Integration

#### 531. Shopping Link Referrals
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Formats e-commerce URLs inside posts to render interactive, rich preview cards that direct users to checkout.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Shopping Link Referrals

#### 532. Sponsored Audio Ads
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Short sponsored audio ads inserted between voice note playbacks in public interest channels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Sponsored Audio Ads

#### 533. Sponsored Banner Ads
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays non-intrusive sponsored banner ads at the bottom of public discovery feeds and channels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Sponsored Banner Ads

#### 534. Sponsored Behind-The-Scenes Campaigns
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A promotional placement tool that enables official brand partners to post behind-the-scenes content in the Discovery feed. It allows brands to engage with users in the same candid format as normal profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Sponsored Behind-The-Scenes Campaigns

#### 535. Sponsored Content Flag
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A regulatory setting that enables creators to flag specific posts as sponsored collaborations or paid partnerships. It ensures legal compliance and transparency regarding paid promotions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Sponsored Content Flag

#### 536. Sponsored Inbox Messages
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays targeted promotional ads from businesses directly within the Messenger chat list alongside user conversations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Sponsored Inbox Messages

#### 537. Sponsored Messages Ad Platform
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Displays context-based, privacy-respecting sponsored posts at the bottom of public channels with large subscriber bases.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Sponsored Messages Ad Platform

#### 538. Sponsored Post Placement
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables organizations to run sponsored banner ads targeted to public interest Band directories.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Sponsored Post Placement

#### 539. Sponsorship Banner Placements
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables organizers to feature local businesses or sponsors on their group's homepage and event pages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Sponsorship Banner Placements

#### 540. Spotlight Challenges
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Direct monetization programs where creators can submit short vertical videos to specific topic challenges. Users compete for cash prizes by producing highly engaging content using featured sounds, lenses, or topics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Spotlight Challenges

#### 541. Spotlight Feature
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A premium purchase that highlights a user's profile card to the front of local discovery queues for 30 minutes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Spotlight Feature

#### 542. Stars Currency
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A virtual currency used to pay for digital goods, services, and exclusive content offered by creators and bots.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Telegram Stars Currency

#### 543. Store
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An in-app digital marketplace where users can purchase official Snapchat hardware, brand merchandise, or exclusive virtual assets. Transactions are completed within the application using stored payment methods.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Store

#### 544. Stripe Integration For Organizers
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Connects an organizer's Meetup account with Stripe to process event fees and membership dues securely, depositing funds directly into their bank account.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Stripe Integration for Organizers

#### 545. Stripe Payout Integration
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Creator portal integration that connects the creator's Kick account with Stripe to receive monthly payout earnings. It automates financial payouts and ensures secure processing of all digital transactions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Stripe Payout Integration

#### 546. Subscription Leaderboards
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A leaderboard widget displayed in the chat header listing the top community subscription gifters in real-time. It encourages friendly competition among viewers and publicly recognizes top channel supporters.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Subscription Leaderboards

#### 547. Subscription Message Alerts
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows businesses to send recurring automated notifications, updates, and promotions to users who have opted into subscription alerts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Subscription Message Alerts

#### 548. Subscriptions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables creators to charge a monthly fee in exchange for exclusive content, badges, and communication channels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Instagram Subscriptions

#### 549. Super Chat
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monetization tool that allows viewers to buy highlighted messages in live chat streams. The message is pinned to the top of the feed for a set period, depending on the purchase amount, ensuring the creator can see it.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Super Chat

#### 550. Super Thanks
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A tipping feature that allows viewers to show appreciation for individual uploaded videos or Shorts. When a tip is sent, the viewer's comment is posted with a distinct, colored background that displays the tip amount.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Super Thanks

#### 551. SuperSwipe Feature
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A paid interaction that lets another user know you are highly interested in them before they swipe on your card.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: SuperSwipe Feature

#### 552. Talent Solutions
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: An enterprise recruiter platform that allows companies to search, track, and contact potential candidates. It provides advanced search filters and candidate tracking tools.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Talent Solutions

#### 553. Ticketed Events (Event Fee Collections)
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Enables organizers to charge a fee to attend specific events, requiring payment during the RSVP process.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Ticketed Events (Event Fee Collections)

#### 554. Tokens
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A virtual in-app currency that users can purchase with real money to gift to creators or buy digital items. Gifting tokens translates to financial rewards for creators, fostering an ecosystem of viewer support.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Tokens

#### 555. Turbo Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A platform-wide premium monthly subscription service that provides ad-free viewing across all channels on Twitch. It also grants subscribers an exclusive chat badge and custom emote colors.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Turbo Subscription

#### 556. Verified Link Sponsorships
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Uses rel="me" link tags to verify ownership of external store links, displaying them in green on the user's profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Verified Link Sponsorships

#### 557. Verified Subscription
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: A monthly paid subscription that grants creators search prominence, enhanced support access, and an identity badge.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Meta Verified Subscription

#### 558. Virtual Gifting During Live Audio
- **Category**: Monetization & E-Commerce
- **Description**: Allows listeners to buy and send virtual stickers and gifts to speakers in live rooms, which hosts can exchange for cash payouts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Virtual Gifting during Live Audio

### Category: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

#### 559. "Beeline" Profile Views (Who Liked Me)
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays a list of profiles that have already swiped right on your card, allowing for instant matching.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: "Beeline" Profile Views (Who Liked Me)

#### 560. Ad Campaign Reporting
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An advertising metrics dashboard tracking conversion rates, return on ad spend, and demographic data. This dashboard helps advertisers optimize campaigns and measure audience responses.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Ad Campaign Reporting

#### 561. Ads Manager
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A self-serve web application that enables businesses to create, target, and run advertisement campaigns across Snapchat. It supports formats like single image/video ads, collection ads, and story ads with budget optimization.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Ads Manager

#### 562. Ads Manager Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A mobile workspace for creators and professionals to view performance analytics, track growth benchmarks, and monitor monetization accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: X Ads Manager Dashboard

#### 563. Announcement Channels
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Specialized text channels that allow admins to broadcast posts to external servers that choose to follow the channel.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Announcement Channels

#### 564. Attendance History Reports
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Generates and downloads historical records of event attendance, including member details and no-show statuses, as a CSV file.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Attendance History Reports

#### 565. Audience Location Demographics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Aggregates demographic location data showing where the brand's active followers are located globally. It helps brands customize their posting schedules and product offerings for specific geographic regions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Audience Location Demographics

#### 566. Audience Retention Graph
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A line graph that visualizes how long viewers stay engaged throughout a specific video. It pinpoints exact seconds where viewers drop off, skip ahead, or rewatch sections, helping creators improve video pacing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Audience Retention Graph

#### 567. Audio Creator Stats Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays analytics for voice channels, including total listening hours, peak listeners, and listener country distributions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Audio Creator Stats Dashboard

#### 568. Audio Transcription Export
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Exports the text transcriptions of conversations and voice chats into text or spreadsheet files.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Audio Transcription Export

#### 569. Automated FAQ Bots
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Deploys automated chatbots that scan customer queries and provide instant answers from a built-in FAQ database.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Automated FAQ bots

#### 570. Automated Greetings
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Automatically sends a greeting message to customers when they first message the business or after 14 days of inactivity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Automated Greetings

#### 571. Automated Instant Responses
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Automatically responds to customer messages with predefined welcome greetings or away messages during non-business hours.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Automated Instant Responses

#### 572. Automated PDF Report Generator
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Generates and emails PDF reports of social media performance to client or team email addresses on weekly or monthly schedules.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Automated PDF Report Generator

#### 573. Bot Welcome Intros
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Configures custom start screens, media, and description texts that display before a user launches a bot.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Bot Welcome Intros

#### 574. Brand Profiles
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Permanent, customizable homepages for businesses to showcase their brand assets, active AR lenses, highlights, and connected stores. This serves as a central landing page for organic Snapchat traffic.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Brand Profiles

#### 575. Broadcast Lists
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows users to send a single message to multiple contacts simultaneously without creating a group chat, delivered as individual messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya, WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Broadcast Lists, Broadcast Lists

#### 576. Business API
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Connects medium and large businesses with customers at scale using automated backend integrations, custom CRM platforms, and chatbots.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: WhatsApp Business API

#### 577. Business Hours Auto-Reply
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Automatically responds to incoming messages with custom messages during designated non-business hours.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Business Hours Auto-Reply

#### 578. Business Page Inbox
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A unified inbox that allows page administrators to manage customer conversations from both Facebook and Instagram.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Business Page Inbox

#### 579. Business Profile Details
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides businesses with an enhanced profile page listing operational hours, address, website, email, and business description.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Business Profile Details

#### 580. Business Suite
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Unlocks professional features for business accounts, including greeting messages, away replies, custom quick replies, and location tags.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Telegram Business Suite

#### 581. Campaign Scheduling Console
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An interface that enables verified brand accounts to schedule promotional posts to align with campaign timelines. It provides marketing coordinators with a tool to manage and queue content in advance.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Campaign Scheduling Console

#### 582. Column Layout
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An advanced web user interface featuring multiple scrollable columns for monitoring timelines, notifications, and custom lists simultaneously.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Column Layout

#### 583. Competitor Performance Tracker
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Benchmarks engagement levels and posting frequencies of competitor accounts alongside your own.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Competitor Performance Tracker

#### 584. Content ID System
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An automated copyright detection system that scans newly uploaded videos against a database of audio and visual content submitted by copyright owners. It alerts owners of matches and applies automated actions based on their preferences.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Content ID System

#### 585. Content Scheduling Calendar
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A grid calendar displaying scheduled, drafted, and published posts, allowing creators to organize content timelines.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Content Scheduling Calendar

#### 586. Conversation Labels
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Organizes customer chats by applying custom labels like "New Customer," "Pending Payment," or "Order Shipped."
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Conversation Labels

#### 587. Creative Center Trends
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators and businesses to search and analyze trending music tracks, hashtags, creators, and popular videos in real time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: TikTok Creative Center Trends

#### 588. Creator Academy Tutorials
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A resource center with tutorials, guides, and trends to help creators improve photo quality and caption writing. It provides creators with regular updates on what styles are trending.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Creator Academy Tutorials

#### 589. Creator Analytics Dashboard

- **Description**: A comprehensive analytics dashboard that provides data on story views, view time, subscriber growth, and audience demographics. This tool helps creators understand what content resonates best with their viewers.

#### 591. Creator Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools

#### 592. Creator Hub
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A portal that provides tutorials, documentation, and best practices for growing and managing communities on Reddit. It helps creators learn how to increase engagement and moderate effectively.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Creator Hub

#### 593. Creator Mode
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A profile setting that highlights your content and lists your followed topics on your profile card. It changes the default action on your profile from "Connect" to "Follow."
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Creator Mode

#### 594. Creator Portal
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A web resource containing tutorials, analytics guides, and monetization optimization tools for server managers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Creator Portal

#### 595. Creator Program Progress Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A checklist tracker that monitors a streamer's metrics against the requirements for the Kick Creator Incentive Program. It displays real-time progress for hours streamed, active days, and unique viewers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Creator Program Progress Dashboard

#### 596. Custom Emote Management
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A creator portal for uploading, organizing, and assigning custom subscriber emojis for various subscription tiers. It allows creators to customize their brand presence in chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Custom Emote Management

#### 597. Custom Handle Manager
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Upgrades user handles from standard `.bsky.social` subdomains to custom DNS domains to verify brand authenticity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Custom Handle Manager

#### 598. Customer Lead Templates
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Creates interactive questionnaires within the chat window to qualify leads and gather customer contact information automatically.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Customer Lead Templates

#### 599. Detailed Audience Demographics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Visualizes information regarding the age, gender, geographic cities, and countries of a page's followers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Detailed Audience Demographics

#### 600. Developer Console
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A developer hub that allows users to register applications, retrieve client IDs, and manage API applications. This console is used to configure OAuth redirect URLs and test API integrations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Developer Console

#### 601. Draft Post Vault
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators to save, edit, and organize multiple draft posts, retaining edits, stickers, and links until they are ready to publish. It provides a convenient workspace for creators working on campaigns or content batches.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Draft Post Vault

#### 602. Employee Advocacy Tools
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A management tool that allows companies to curate content for employees to share on their personal feeds. This helps companies extend their reach through their employees' networks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Employee Advocacy Tools

#### 603. Feed Performance Metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides developers of custom feeds with dashboards showing active subscriber counts, API requests, and usage.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Feed Performance Metrics

#### 604. Follower Demographics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Breaks down follower distribution data by age group, gender, country, and city to optimize content strategy.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Follower Demographics

#### 605. Follower Demographics Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Visualizes follower demographic profiles, showing gender splits, age distributions, and location percentages. It helps creators tailor their content and schedule posts based on their target audience.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Follower Demographics Dashboard

#### 606. Group Promo Codes
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Permits organizers to create discount or promotional code strings that members can apply to bypass or reduce ticketed event fees.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Promo Codes

#### 607. In-App Content Scheduling
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows professional accounts to schedule feed posts and Reels up to 75 days in advance directly in the composer interface.

- **Original Name(s)**: In-App Content Scheduling

#### 608. Individual Post Performance Metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays detailed statistics for individual posts, showing traffic sources, views, saves, and watch-time ratios. It helps creators identify their most successful content and optimize future uploads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Individual Post Performance metrics

#### 609. Individual Post Performance Tracker
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks detailed engagement metrics for specific published posts, listing likes, comments, retweets, and clicks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Individual Post Performance Tracker

#### 610. Interactive Bot API
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows developers to build highly interactive bots and mini-apps using Python, Node.js, and HTTP requests.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Interactive Bot API

#### 611. Lens Web Builder
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A web-based creation platform designed for brands to build custom augmented reality lenses without writing code. It offers template libraries, simple customization fields, and immediate publishing options for ad campaigns.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Lens Web Builder

- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays retention charts showing when listeners joined or left during a live voice broadcast.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Live Room Audience Retention Tracker

#### 613. Media Studio Library
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An advanced web-based dashboard at `studio.x.com` for scheduling videos, editing metadata, managing media libraries, and tracking video-specific analytics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Media Studio Library

#### 614. Member Activity Reports
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Provides creators with visual charts summarizing daily active users, new membership signups, and board engagement levels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Band Member Activity Reports

#### 615. Member Survey Tool
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows organizers to publish simple polls to members to gather feedback on event locations, times, or topics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Member Survey Tool

#### 616. Message Delivery Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks real-time delivery and read statuses for broadcast lists and group announcements.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Message Delivery Dashboard

#### 617. Messaging Statistics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays basic statistics on the number of messages sent, delivered, read, and received.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Messaging Statistics

#### 618. Moderator Action Audit Log
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A panel displaying a history of all moderation actions, such as user timeouts and message deletions, taken in chat. It helps streamers monitor moderator activity and maintain consistency in channel rules enforcement.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Moderator Action Audit Log

#### 619. Page Access Management
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows page owners to assign granular, task-based access permissions (e.g., content creation, messaging, ads management) to team members without sharing password credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Meta Page Access Management

#### 620. Page Access Roles
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows channel owners to invite team members to help manage the channel with granular permissions. Access roles include Manager, Editor, Editor (Limited), Subtitle Editor, and Viewer to secure channel credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Page Access Roles

#### 621. Post Engagement Statistics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays detailed statistics on how many subscribers reacted to a post and which RealMoji emojis were used most. It allows brand coordinators to analyze which styles of content resonate best with their target audience.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Post Engagement Statistics

#### 622. Post View Count
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays a public indicator of total views and impressions on individual threads, helping creators evaluate reach.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Post View Count

#### 623. Post View Counters
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays a public counter showing the total number of views or impressions on individual posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Post View Counters

#### 624. Professional Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A mobile hub showing real-time statistics on net followers, post impressions, engagement rates, and content reach.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook, Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Facebook Professional Dashboard, Instagram Professional Dashboard

- **Original Name(s)**: Professional Resume Linker (Bumble Bizz)

#### 626. Profile Metadata Fields
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows users to define up to 4 custom label-value metadata pairs to showcase links, pronouns, or professional details.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Profile Metadata Fields

#### 627. Profile Share Cards
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Generates stylized image files containing QR codes and profile details for cross-platform sharing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Profile Share Cards

#### 628. Profile Strength Meter
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An interactive tracker displaying profile completeness and suggesting changes to optimize match rates.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Profile Strength Meter

#### 629. Promote Tool
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators and businesses to pay to boost video reach, choose specific engagement goals, and define target audience segments.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Promote Tool

#### 630. Public Post Statistics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Displays total reblogs (boosts), favorites, and replies on individual posts across federated servers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Public Post Statistics

#### 631. RSVP Conversion Metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks the ratio of unique page views to confirmed RSVPs for individual events, helping organizers evaluate their event marketing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: RSVP Conversion Metrics

#### 632. RealBrands Follower Growth Tracker
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A tracking widget showing weekly statistics for new subscribers, retention rates, and unfollow trends. It helps creators and brand marketing teams monitor their audience growth over time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealBrands Follower Growth Tracker

#### 633. Research API Access
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Programmatic access for academic researchers to fetch public TikTok account information, video metadata, comments, and query performance data.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok, YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: TikTok Research API, YouTube Research Tab

#### 634. Revenue Breakdown Dashboard
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An analytics widget detailing income sources, separating earnings between subscriptions, gifted subs, and ads. It provides creators with clear financial transparency and historical revenue data.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Revenue Breakdown Dashboard

#### 635. Server Stats API
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A public API endpoint that outputs general instance statistics including total users, active users, and post counts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Server Stats API

#### 636. Sign-up Sheets (Duty Roster Creator)
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Creates interactive volunteer sign-up sheets that allow members to lock in specific time slots or duties.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Sign-up Sheets (Duty Roster Creator)

#### 637. Stream Sessions Log
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A historical log showing all past live stream sessions, total view hours, and peak concurrent viewers. It allows creators to review the analytics of individual broadcasts for scheduling optimization.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Stream Sessions Log

#### 638. Streamer Ad Manager
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: An automation tool that helps creators schedule, set up, and automate mid-roll ad breaks during their live broadcasts. It allows streamers to optimize ad revenue without manually triggering breaks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Streamer Ad Manager

#### 639. Subreddit Traffic Stats
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: A moderator tool that displays page views, unique visitors, and subscriber growth over daily, weekly, and monthly periods. This tool helps moderators track community activity trends.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Subreddit Traffic Stats

#### 640. Swipe/Match Peak Time Alerts
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Monitors local swipe volumes and notifies users when activity levels are high in their area.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Swipe/Match Peak Time Alerts

#### 641. Topic Engagement Metrics
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Tracks view count, message counts, and active member statistics inside individual group topics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Topic Engagement Metrics

#### 642. Voice Note Download Utility
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows users and creators to export and download voice messages to their devices as high-quality WAV files.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Note Download Utility

#### 643. Web Content Scheduler
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows creators to schedule video posts in advance via the TikTok desktop web portal.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Web Content Scheduler

#### 644. Web Editor & Scheduler
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Allows accounts to schedule posts in advance from the desktop web interface to optimize posting schedules.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Web Editor & Scheduler

#### 645. Welcome Screen Customizer
- **Category**: Analytics, Business & Creator Tools
- **Description**: Builds a clean, visual landing popup page displaying recommended channels and descriptions for new visitors.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Welcome Screen Customizer

### Category: Privacy, Security & Safety

#### 646. Account Activity Logs
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A security log that displays recent IP addresses, browser agents, and locations that accessed the account. This allows users to audit login history and detect unauthorized access.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Account Activity Logs

#### 647. Account Blocking With Ban Evasion Prevention
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Blocks a user and preemptively blocks any new profiles they create under their IP or device footprint.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Blocking with Ban Evasion Prevention

#### 648. Active Device Manager
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Displays a list of all active sessions and devices logged into the account, with the ability to terminate sessions remotely.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Active Device Manager

#### 649. Active Session Auditing
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A security dashboard showing all devices, browsers, and locations currently logged into the account. Users can audit login history and close active sessions remotely.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Active Session Auditing

#### 650. Anonymous Browsing Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A temporary browsing session that does not record search history, vote logs, or modify recommendation algorithms. This allows users to browse Reddit privately without affecting their profile data.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Anonymous Browsing Mode

#### 651. App Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures access to the Messenger app using biometric authentication (Face ID/Touch ID) or the device passcode.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Messenger App Lock

#### 652. Auditing Logs (Activity History)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Tracks and logs all actions performed in a workspace, noting who created, modified, approved, or deleted posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Auditing Logs (Activity History)

#### 653. Auto-Delete Timers
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically deletes all messages in a selected chat after a duration of 24 hours, 7 days, or 1 month.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Auto-Delete Timers

#### 654. Auto-Delete Voice History
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically deletes voice message files from the app interface and device storage immediately after playback.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Auto-Delete Voice History

#### 655. AutoMod
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated content moderation system that uses machine learning to screen chat messages and hold inappropriate content. It filters messages before they appear in public chat, waiting for moderator approval.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord, Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord AutoMod, Twitch AutoMod

#### 656. AutoMod Bad Word Filter
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated filter that screens chat messages and blocks comments containing banned or blacklisted words. It intercepts toxic comments before they appear in public to maintain a healthy chat environment.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick AutoMod Bad Word Filter

#### 657. Automated Post Archiving
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically deletes or archives posts that are older than a user-specified duration.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Automated Post Archiving

#### 658. Ban Evasion Detection
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A machine learning system that automatically scans chatters and flags users who are suspected of bypassing channel bans. It identifies alternative accounts linked to banned users to prevent harassment.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Ban Evasion Detection

#### 659. Banned Users Management List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A portal displaying all banned or timed-out users in a channel, with options to manage ban appeals. It gives creators and head moderators central control over the channel's moderation records.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Banned Users Management List

#### 660. Biometric Screen Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires Face ID, Touch ID, or passcode to open the WhatsApp application on the device.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Biometric Screen Lock

#### 661. Block & Mute List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents designated accounts from direct messaging you, sending friend requests, or showing up in text and voice channels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Block & Mute List

#### 662. Block List Management
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents blocked users from sending walkie-talkie voice calls or messaging you on the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Block List Management

#### 663. Block Member Action
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents a blocked user from sending direct messages to you, viewing your profile, or joining any group where you are the primary organizer.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Block Member Action

#### 664. Block Propagation
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Instantly hides the user's posts, replies, and profile page from blocked accounts across the decentralized network.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Block Propagation

#### 665. Block User Settings
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A security feature that allows users to block specific accounts. Once blocked, the account's posts, comments, and direct message requests are completely hidden from your feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Block User Settings

#### 666. Blocked Accounts List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Syncs blocklists with Instagram to prevent designated accounts from viewing or finding your profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Blocked Accounts List

#### 667. Blocking & Reporting
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to block accounts and report profiles for violating community guidelines. Blocking prevents the user from viewing your profile, sending messages, or connecting.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Blocking & Reporting

#### 668. Bulk Comment Management
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows creators to delete, report, or block multiple accounts in bulk (up to 100 at once) from their comment section.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Bulk Comment Management

#### 669. Channel Moderation Filter
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows channel hosts to mute, kick, or ban members who post inappropriate or disruptive audio.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Channel Moderation Filter

#### 670. Chat Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures specific chat threads behind a device passcode, face ID, or fingerprint lock, keeping them hidden from the main chats list.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Chat Lock

#### 671. Chat Slow Mode Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts chat message frequency, requiring users to wait a set number of seconds between messages. It helps moderators manage fast-moving chats and reduces comment spam during peak times.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat Slow Mode Control

#### 672. Client Access Sandbox Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Provides clients with a viewing dashboard where they can approve or request changes to posts without editing capabilities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Client Access Sandbox Mode

#### 673. Close Friends List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts access to specific Stories and feed posts to a custom-curated subset of followers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Close Friends List

#### 674. Comment Blocklist
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated comment moderation tool that holds comments containing blocked words or links for review. Creators can customize a list of words, phrases, and usernames that are blocked from appearing publicly.
