- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Comment Blocklist

#### 675. Comment Filtering System
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to filter and auto-hide public comments that contain specific keywords or offensive phrases. It helps creators maintain a positive and safe community environment under their posts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Comment Filtering System

#### 676. Community Notes Contextual System
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows a community-driven moderation group to add helpful context notes to posts that contain misleading information.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Community Notes Contextual System

#### 677. Connection Visibility Controls
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Controls whether your connections can see your list of connections. Restricting this setting prevents other members from browsing your professional network.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Connection Visibility Controls

#### 678. Content Blurring
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A display setting that automatically blurs NSFW or sensitive media by default. This helps prevent users from viewing explicit content unexpectedly while scrolling.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Content Blurring

#### 679. Content Filters
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Configures visibility rules for sensitive content, hate speech, spam, and violence.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Content Filters

#### 680. Content Forward Protection
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts members from forwarding messages, copying text, or saving media from private groups or channels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Content Forward Protection

#### 681. Content Reporting System
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An in-app flag tool that allows users to report posts, comments, or RealMojis that violate guidelines. Reported content is flagged and sent directly to review teams for moderation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Content Reporting System

#### 682. Content Reporting Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An interface to report posts, comments, or accounts that violate platform guidelines to moderators. It helps keep the platform safe by routing reported content to review teams.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Content Reporting Tool

#### 683. Cryptographic Vault
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A secure, encrypted folder in the app to store confidential documents, photos, and messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Cryptographic Vault

#### 684. Custom Admission Questions
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prompts applicants with customized screening questions that they must answer before admins approve their join request.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Admission Questions

#### 685. Custom Audience Lists
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Divides Facebook friends into subgroups (e.g., "Close Friends," "Acquaintances") to tailor post visibility.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Audience Lists

#### 686. Custom Comment Filters
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows page owners to upload a CSV file containing specific offensive words or phrases to be blocked.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Comment Filters

#### 687. Custom Mute Lists
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables users to create and subscribe to public blocklists and mute lists created by the community.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Custom Mute Lists

#### 688. Custom Report Reasons
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A reporting tool that allows users to flag posts or comments for violating subreddit-specific rules or platform guidelines. Users can choose from a list of rules or submit custom reasons.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Custom Report Reasons

#### 689. Custom Story Privacy
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables users to create private or custom stories where they manually choose which friends can view and add content. This provides absolute control over who participates in shared digital scrapbooks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Custom Story Privacy

#### 690. Custom Video Visibility
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Controls who can view an uploaded video by setting its visibility state. Creators can choose Public (visible to everyone), Unlisted (accessible only via link), or Private (visible only to the owner and selected accounts).
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Custom Video Visibility

#### 691. Data Sharing Preferences
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to manage how LinkedIn shares profile data with third-party partners. Users can opt out of data sharing for research, advertising, and job match systems.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Data Sharing Preferences

#### 692. Email-Verified Chat Constraint
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents non-verified accounts from posting messages in chat, blocking automated spam accounts. It requires chatters to complete email verification before they can participate in live streams.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Email-Verified Chat Constraint

#### 693. Encrypted Chat
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Provides end-to-end encrypted chats where all messages, media, and calls are stored securely on-device.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Encrypted Chat Threads

#### 694. End-to-End Encryption
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures all text, voice, media, and call data so that only the sender and recipient can read or listen to them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: End-to-End Encryption

#### 695. Event Host Moderation Tools
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Gives designated event hosts the authority to remove members from an event RSVP list or ban them from the group during or after an event.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Event Host Moderation Tools

#### 696. Family Pairing
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Connects a parent's TikTok account to their teen's account to remotely manage screen time, DMs, and content filters.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Family Pairing

#### 697. Filter Comment Keywords
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically hides comments on your videos if they contain specific keywords you define.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Filter Comment Keywords

#### 698. Filter Video Keywords
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Excludes videos containing specified tags or keywords in captions from showing up on your feeds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Filter Video Keywords

#### 699. Follower-Only Chat Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts chat participation to users who have followed the channel for a designated duration. It prevents drive-by chat raids and encourages viewers to follow to participate in the conversation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Follower-Only Chat Mode

#### 700. Friend List Hiding
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A privacy setting that hides the user's friend list from other users on the platform. It helps protect user privacy and prevents strangers from mining contact lists.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Friend List Hiding

#### 701. Friend Request Filters
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts the range of users who are allowed to send you incoming friend invitations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Friend Request Filters

#### 702. Geolocation Toggle
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to enable or disable sharing their precise GPS coordinates on their daily post. Disabling location removes the map pin while keeping the photo viewable.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Geolocation Toggle

#### 703. Ghost Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Hides online presence, last seen status, typing indicators, and read receipts across the app.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya, Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Ghost Mode, Snapchat Ghost Mode

#### 704. Granular Block Options
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to block someone only on Messenger (messages and calls) while keeping them as a friend on Facebook.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Granular Block Options

#### 705. Hidden Words Filtering
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically hides comments and message requests that contain specific offensive keywords, phrases, or emojis defined by Meta or the user.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Hidden Words Filtering

#### 706. Hidden Words List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Filters out offensive replies containing user-specified words, phrases, or emojis from threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Hidden Words List

#### 707. Hide Member List
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows admins to hide the member directory from regular members to protect privacy.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Hide Member List

#### 708. Hide Replies
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables a post author to hide specific replies to their post, moving them to a hidden tab.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Hide Replies

#### 709. In-App Reporting
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A reporting tool that allows users to submit objectionable content or abusive profiles directly to safety teams. The system categorizes reports (harassment, spam, self-harm) to expedite review and action.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat In-App Reporting

#### 710. In-Chat Safety Notices
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Displays safety tips and educational banners when a user receives a message from a suspicious account or stranger.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: In-Chat Safety Notices

#### 711. Incognito Voice Profile (Voice Masking)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Scrambles or alters voice pitch automatically in public channels to protect a user's real voice identity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Incognito Voice Profile (Voice Masking)

#### 712. Instance Domain Blocking
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Blocks communication with entire external server domains to prevent their users from interacting with your profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Instance Domain Blocking

#### 713. Invite Code / QR Code Access
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts group joining to secure invitation links, numerical invite codes, or scanned QR codes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Band Invite Code / QR Code Access

#### 714. Kids Account Restrictions
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Parental control settings that restrict content access to a kid-safe version of YouTube. Parents can select age tiers (Preschool, Younger, Older), manually approve allowed videos, and set daily viewing limits.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Kids Account Restrictions

#### 715. Labeling Services
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to subscribe to independent third-party moderation services that apply warnings or filter content in their feeds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Labeling Services

#### 716. Limits Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Temporarily blocks or restricts comments and DMs from accounts that do not follow you, or have only followed you recently.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Limits Control

#### 717. Local App Shield
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents external apps and screen capture tools from reading data or taking screenshots within the app.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Local App Shield

#### 718. Member Approval Queue
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires new members to answer onboarding questions and obtain organizer approval before gaining access to a private group.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Member Approval Queue

#### 719. Moderation Assist
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An automated assistant that screens and hides comments based on rules set by the page owner.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Moderation Assist

#### 720. Moderator View
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A specialized, customizable channel interface tailored for moderators to view chat, track user histories, and perform mod actions. It organizes moderation tools into a single, high-efficiency dashboard.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Moderator View

#### 721. Muted Words Filtering
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Hides posts containing specific keywords, phrases, hashtags, or handles from notifications and the timeline.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Muted Words Filtering

#### 722. My Eyes Only
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A secure, password-protected folder within the Memories section of the app. It allows users to hide sensitive snaps from their main gallery, requiring a separate 4-digit PIN or passcode to view them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat My Eyes Only

#### 723. Opt-Out Of Search Indexing
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requests search engines and internal search utilities not to index the user's posts or profile details.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Opt-Out of Search Indexing

#### 724. Password Session Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Secures access to the Telegram application using a local PIN or alphanumeric password.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Password Session Lock

#### 725. Phone Number Hiding
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Hides the user's phone number from all users or specific contacts, using the username as the primary identity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Phone Number Hiding

#### 726. Post Approval Workflow
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires posts created by junior members to be reviewed and approved by managers before they are scheduled.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Post Approval Workflow

#### 727. Post Audience Selector
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables users to set their daily post visibility to either "Friends Only" or "Discovery" (Public) before uploading. It allows users to keep their daily lives private or share them globally.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Post Audience Selector

#### 728. Post Visibility Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables setting the visibility of individual posts to "Public," "Friends Only," or "Private" when publishing or after. It gives users control over who can view specific uploads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Post Visibility Control

#### 729. Private Account (Protected Posts)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Gated posting where only approved followers can view or interact with your posts, preventing public search indexation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Private Account (Protected Posts)

#### 730. Private Account Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Sets the account to private, requiring manually approving or declining new follower requests. It limits profile and post visibility to approved followers only.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Private Account Mode

#### 731. Private Detector (Automatic NSFW Blurring)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically detects and blurs explicit or NSFW photos sent in chats, prompting users with a safety warning before viewing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Private Detector (Automatic NSFW Blurring)

#### 732. Private Group Settings
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts visibility of the group's event details, location pins, and member list to approved group members only.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Private Group Settings

#### 733. Private Profile Viewing Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A privacy setting that hides your identity when visiting other member profiles. When active, the profile owner only sees that an anonymous member viewed their profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Private Profile Viewing Mode

#### 734. Profile Approval Requirement
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Requires manual approval of all follower requests before they can view your posts and timeline.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Profile Approval Requirement

#### 735. Profile Lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts access to a user's profile photos, albums, and posts, displaying them only to confirmed friends.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Profile Lock

#### 736. Profile Muting
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Mutes posts and replies from specific accounts without unfollowing or blocking them, hiding their content silently.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Profile Muting

#### 737. Quick Add Privacy
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A settings toggle that controls whether a user's account is suggested to others in the "Quick Add" section. Disabling this prevents acquaintances or strangers from finding the account via mutual connections.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Quick Add Privacy

#### 738. Reply Limits
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts who can reply to a specific post, preventing unsolicited comments or targeted harassment.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Reply Limits

#### 739. Report & /Ban Member Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Enables admins to permanently eject disruptive members and ban them from rejoin attempts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Report & Kick/Ban Member Tool

#### 740. Report And Block Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to block and report profiles for harassment, fake photos, or behavior violating the terms of service.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Report and Block Tool

#### 741. Report Fediverse Propagation
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Forwards a moderation report to the administrators of the user's remote home server for evaluation.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Report Fediverse Propagation

#### 742. Report Member/Group Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to flag individual profiles, event pages, or entire groups that violate Meetup's community guidelines or terms of service.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Report Member/Group Tool

#### 743. Restrict Account Option
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Quietly limits a problematic user's ability to interact with your profile without blocking them or notifying them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Restrict Account Option

#### 744. Restricted Accounts Mute
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Mutes a contact's notifications and hides their chat from the active chat list without letting them know they are restricted.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Restricted Accounts Mute

#### 745. Restricted Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An optional setting that filters out potentially mature or inappropriate content from search results and feeds. It uses signals like video metadata, community flagging, and age-restrictions to identify and hide sensitive videos.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Restricted Mode

#### 746. Safe Direct Messaging
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Scans and automatically deletes direct messages that contain explicit media, files, or links.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Safe Direct Messaging

#### 747. SafeSearch
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Integrates search engine filtering to block explicit content, sexual imagery, and extreme violence from search results. This helps ensure that video searches return family-friendly listings.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube SafeSearch

#### 748. Safety Center Hub
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A dedicated in-app resource directory providing security guidelines, support helplines, and reporting instructions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Safety Center Hub

#### 749. Safety Reporting Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to flag abusive, explicit, or threatening audio messages for review by Buz moderation teams.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Safety Reporting Tool

#### 750. Secure API Key Encryption
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Encrypts and stores connected social platform OAuth tokens securely, hiding raw account passwords from the interface.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Secure API Key Encryption

#### 751. Sensitive Content Control
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Adjusts the volume of sensitive or mature content recommended to you in search and feed screens.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Sensitive Content Control

#### 752. Shield Mode
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: An emergency button that allows streamers and moderators to instantly activate stricter chat restrictions during spam or hate attacks. It helps quickly lock down a channel to protect the community.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Shield Mode

#### 753. Silence Unknown Callers
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically silences calls from numbers not saved in the contact list, listing them in the Calls tab.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Silence Unknown Callers

#### 754. Snooze Mode (Mental Health Break)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Pauses profile visibility in discovery feeds without deleting matches, chats, or profile details.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Snooze Mode (Mental Health Break)

#### 755. Support Inbox
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: A tracking portal where users can monitor reports they have filed and view notices of copyright or community standards violations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Support Inbox

#### 756. Suspicious User Controls
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows streamers and moderators to manually tag, monitor, and restrict chatters who exhibit suspicious behavior. It helps moderation teams track potential troublemakers without banning them outright.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Suspicious User Controls

#### 757. Thread Reply Controls
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts who can reply to your thread, letting you limit discussion to specific circles or accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Thread Reply Controls

#### 758. Thread Reply Hiding
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows the author of a thread to hide replies to keep their discussion sections relevant.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Thread Reply Hiding

#### 759. Trusted Devices Manager
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Audits and manages devices authorized to access the account, requiring confirmation from existing devices for new logins.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Trusted Devices Manager

#### 760. Unmatch Tool
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Allows users to dissolve a match, permanently deleting the chat history and removing profiles from both sides' feeds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Unmatch Tool

#### 761. User Blocking
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Blocks a user, preventing them from finding your account, viewing your posts, or sending you chat requests. It is a critical safety tool to stop harassment and enforce personal boundaries.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal User Blocking

#### 762. Verification Levels
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Server-wide safety requirements that set criteria for how long an account must be registered or verified before posting.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Verification Levels

#### 763. View-Once Media Screen-lock
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically destroys view-once media if the app detects a lock-screen event or focus loss.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: View-Once Media Screen-lock

#### 764. View-Once Screenshot Blocking
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Prevents recipients from taking screenshots or screen recordings of media sent using the "View-Once" feature.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: View-Once Screenshot Blocking

#### 765. Word Filtering (Auto-moderation)
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Automatically reviews board posts and comments, blocking those that contain specified keywords.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Word Filtering (Auto-moderation)

#### 766. Workspace Access Roles & Permissions
- **Category**: Privacy, Security & Safety
- **Description**: Restricts workspace tool and social account access by assigning roles (Owner, Admin, Editor, Client) with custom permissions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Workspace Access Roles & Permissions

### Category: Developer APIs & Integrations

#### 767. & Fediverse API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with decentralized Fediverse platform APIs to schedule posts to Mastodon servers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon & Fediverse API Integration

#### 768. API Channel Status Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic JSON endpoint returning live status, viewer count, category details, and stream title for any channel. It allows developers to integrate real-time stream status indicators into external apps.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick API Channel Status Endpoint

#### 769. API Developer Access (V2)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic access to post, search, and map tweets using developer plans.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: X API Developer Access (v2)

#### 770. API For
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Enables developers to programmatically receive and respond to user direct messages and comments using external messaging platforms and webhooks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Messenger API for Instagram

#### 771. API Helix
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic HTTP interface (Helix) allowing developers to query live stream statuses, fetch user profiles, and search games. It is the primary REST API used to integrate Twitch features into third-party apps.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch API Helix

#### 772. AT Protocol XRPC
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: The core remote procedure call protocol used to query, create, and modify records in the decentralized network.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky AT Protocol XRPC

#### 773. ActivityPub Protocol Endpoints
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Core decentralized ActivityPub endpoints used to deliver and retrieve posts, likes, and follows across servers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon ActivityPub Protocol Endpoints

#### 774. Ads API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic access to manage ad campaigns, target audiences, and retrieve campaign performance metrics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: X Ads API

#### 775. App Registration Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: API endpoint used by developers to register new client applications and retrieve OAuth credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon App Registration Endpoint

#### 776. AppView Service
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Central indexing API service used to query compiled timelines, threads, and user profiles across servers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky AppView Service

#### 777. Apple Health / Fitness Link
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Syncs activity metrics from Apple Health to automatically assign lifestyle badges (e.g., "Active").
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Apple Health / Fitness Link

#### 778. Apple Music API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic API integration that fetches details of the user's currently playing track from Apple Music to display on daily posts. It allows viewers to click the track to listen to a preview or save it to their library.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Apple Music API Integration

#### 779. AutoModerator Config API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An API endpoint that allows moderators to programmatically read and update subreddit AutoModerator YAML rule files. This allows developers to automate rule updates and spam filter settings.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit AutoModerator Config API

#### 780. Basic Display API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows external websites to retrieve public profile details, images, and video files from public Instagram profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Instagram Basic Display API

#### 781. Bitly & Custom URL Shorteners Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates link shortening tools to automatically compress post links and track click-through numbers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Bitly & Custom URL Shorteners Integration

#### 782. Bitmoji Kit
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to import and display users' personalized Bitmoji avatars inside third-party mobile applications and web tools. This creates cross-platform personalized profiles using Snapchat's avatar ecosystem.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Bitmoji Kit

#### 783. Bot Framework
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Provides software libraries and APIs to build, test, and host interactive bots within the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Apaya Bot Framework

#### 784. Bot-to-Human Handover Protocol
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Passes control of a conversation from an automated chatbot to a live customer service agent seamlessly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Bot-to-Human Handover Protocol

#### 785. Browser Extension Scheduler
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A browser extension for Chrome, Firefox, and Safari that allows scheduling text, links, or images from any webpage.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Browser Extension Scheduler

#### 786. Business Manager API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects external agency platforms to programmatically manage ad accounts, product catalogs, and pixel trackers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Business Manager API

#### 787. Business Persona API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to display custom names and avatars for customer service agents rather than the generic Page name.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Business Persona API

#### 788. Camera Kit SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A software development kit that allows developers to integrate Snapchat's camera features and augmented reality lenses directly into their own mobile applications. This extends Snapchat's AR ecosystem to external platforms.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Camera Kit SDK

#### 789. Chat WebSocket Protocol
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: WebSocket service allowing developers to connect custom chat bots to read and send chat messages. It enables developers to handle real-time chat moderation and interactive games programmatically.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick, Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat WebSocket Protocol, Twitch Chat WebSocket Protocol

#### 790. Cloud API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to host the WhatsApp Business API on Meta's servers, facilitating quick setups and messaging capabilities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Cloud API Integration

#### 791. Contact Sync API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Synchronizes the device's address book with WhatsApp to identify which contacts are active users.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Contact Sync API

#### 792. Content Posting API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows third-party developer platforms (e.g., Hootsuite, Sprout Social) to schedule and publish video posts programmatically.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: TikTok Content Posting API

#### 793. Content Share SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer SDK enabling third-party photo editors and travel apps to upload images and text directly to Lemon8 from their apps. It streamlines content workflows by bypassing local device storage.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Content Share SDK

#### 794. Creative Kit
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer utility that enables external apps to pass media, links, or dynamic stickers directly to the Snapchat camera. This lets users share third-party app experiences, such as music tracks or achievements, as a custom snap sticker.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Creative Kit

#### 795. Custom Wa.me Links
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Generates a short URL that allows users or customers to open a chat directly with a specific phone number.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom wa.me Links

#### 796. Data API V3
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic REST API that allows developers to search videos, retrieve channel statistics, upload video files, and manage playlists. This interface supports integration of YouTube's core content catalog into external applications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Data API v3

#### 797. Database Sync API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Synchronizes local user data and chat metadata with external backup databases or CRM suites.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Database Sync API

#### 798. Developer Platform (Devwit SDK)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A development platform and SDK that allows developers to build native apps, interactive post widgets, and moderation bots directly on Reddit's infrastructure. It supports TypeScript-based app builds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Developer Platform (Devwit SDK)

#### 799. Direct Web Widgets
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Embeds channel feeds, chat rooms, and follow buttons directly onto third-party web pages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Direct Web Widgets

#### 800. Display API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Enables developers to securely fetch and display a user's public TikTok profile information, video feeds, and media metadata on third-party websites or applications after obtaining user consent.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: TikTok Display API

#### 801. Embedded App SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An SDK that enables developers to build web apps and multiplayer games that run directly inside Discord voice channel activities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Embedded App SDK

#### 802. Embedded Signup Flow
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates an onboard portal on developer websites to allow clients to register their phone numbers for WhatsApp API.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Embedded Signup Flow

#### 803. Extensible Bot API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Provides rich widgets, custom keyboard overlays, and inline queries for third-party bots.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Extensible Bot API

#### 804. Extensions SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A JavaScript helper library and developer framework that allows building interactive web-overlays or panels. It lets developers build interactive mini-apps directly on the video player.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Extensions SDK

#### 805. External Calendar Sync (ICal/Google)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Syncs Band calendar events to external personal calendar software.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: External Calendar Sync (iCal/Google)

#### 806. External Microphone Bluetooth Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Bluetooth headsets, utilizing headset hardware buttons to activate and record push-to-talk messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: External Microphone Bluetooth Integration

#### 807. Feed Aggregation API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A RESTful JSON API used by ByteDance partners to pull public trending posts and display them in external widgets. It enables displaying curated lifestyle feeds programmatically on external websites.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Feed Aggregation API

#### 808. Feed Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects with Instagram to display a grid of the user's latest 24 Instagram posts directly on their Bumble profile page.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Instagram Feed Integration

#### 809. Firehose API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A WebSockets subscription endpoint that streams every public event and record modification across the network in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Firehose API

#### 810. Gateway API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A WebSockets-based API that streams real-time events like message creations, voice status changes, and server updates to developer clients.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Gateway API

#### 811. Google Drive & Dropbox File Linker
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects cloud storage platforms to select and link remote documents within post updates.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Google Drive & Dropbox File Linker

#### 812. Google Drive / Dropbox Import Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects cloud storage accounts, allowing users to import photos, videos, and media directly into the Publer library.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Google Drive / Dropbox Import Integration

#### 813. Google Sign-In API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects Google authentication to allow secure, one-tap login and registration.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Google Sign-In API integration

#### 814. Graph API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic HTTP interface enabling developers to publish text and media, retrieve replies, and manage threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook, Instagram, Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Facebook Graph API, Instagram Graph API, Threads Graph API

#### 815. Graph API Publishing Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic endpoint allowing developers to upload photo or video binaries and publish them automatically as feed posts or Reels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Instagram Graph API Publishing Endpoint

#### 816. In-Chat HTML5 Web Apps
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Launches full-scale HTML5 web applications (Mini Apps) directly inside chat windows.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: In-Chat HTML5 Web Apps

#### 817. Interactions API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Receives user-triggered actions (like slash commands, buttons, and select menus) and sends responses via HTTP webhooks.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Interactions API

#### 818. Learning API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows enterprise organizations to integrate LinkedIn Learning progress, user records, and course catalogs with external learning management systems (LMS). It supports standard LMS protocols like xAPI.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Learning API

#### 819. Lexicons
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Schema definitions written in JSON that define data types, RPC methods, and records for the network.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Lexicons

#### 820. Login API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: OAuth login enabling users to sign in to third-party applications securely using their TikTok credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: TikTok Login API

#### 821. Login Kit
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An identity integration SDK that allows developers to add secure "Log in with Snapchat" functionality to external websites and applications. It simplifies user registration by retrieving the user's display name and Bitmoji avatar.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Login Kit

#### 822. Login Via API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic login API that allows developers of third-party apps to authenticate Lemon8 users using ByteDance/TikTok account credentials. It simplifies registration for external portals and partners.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Login via TikTok API

#### 823. MTProto Protocol API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A high-performance, secure protocol used for accessing the Telegram API from client applications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: MTProto Protocol API

#### 824. Marketing API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic REST API that allows developers and agencies to manage ad campaigns, automate ad creation, and update budgets. It enables direct programmatic access to extract performance metrics from Snap's advertising database.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Marketing API

#### 825. Marketing API SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic SDKs in Python, Java, and PHP that allow developers to automate ad campaign creation, custom audience building, and real-time budget management.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Meta Marketing API SDK

#### 826. Marketing Developer Platform API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic interface allowing developers to manage ad accounts, campaigns, budgets, and retrieve lead generation data. This API supports integration with enterprise marketing automation systems.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Marketing Developer Platform API

#### 827. Media Publishing Endpoint
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Specialized API resource supporting programmatically scheduled uploads of image and video media files to Threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Media Publishing Endpoint

#### 828. Microsoft Teams / Slack Integration Bridge
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Relays Band announcements to internal enterprise chat rooms.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Microsoft Teams / Slack Integration Bridge

#### 829. OAuth 2.0 Authentication
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Implements secure user-delegated authorization protocol allowing third-party apps to access Threads content.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya, BeReal, Buz Voice Connects, Discord, Facebook, Kick, Lemon8, Meetup, Reddit, Threads, Twitch, X, X
- **Original Name(s)**: OAuth 2.0 Identity Bridge, BeReal OAuth 2.0 Web Authentication, Federated OAuth Sign-In (Google & Apple), Discord OAuth 2.0 Identity Endpoint, Facebook Login SDK (OAuth), Kick OAuth 2.0 Authentication Service, Lemon8 Web OAuth 2.0 Authentication, OAuth 2.0 Identity Login, Reddit OAuth2 Authentication, Threads OAuth 2.0 Authentication, Twitch OAuth 2.0 Authentication Service, OAuth 2.0 with PKCE Authorization Flow, Social Sign-In OAuth

#### 830. Open API (REST)
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer API providing access to post announcements, read boards, and fetch member details programmatically.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Band Open API (REST)

#### 831. Payment Gateway API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects Telegram bots to merchant payment gateways to handle credit card payments in-app.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Payment Gateway API

#### 832. Personal Data Server API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: API endpoints on Personal Data Server (PDS) nodes used to manage repositories, uploads, and authentication.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Personal Data Server API

#### 833. Platform API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Connects external backend servers to Messenger to send and receive text, templates, and quick replies.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Messenger Platform API

#### 834. Player API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An iframe-based JavaScript API that allows developers to embed a YouTube video player directly into their websites. It provides programmatic controls to play, pause, seek, adjust volume, and listen to player state changes using custom code.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Player API

#### 835. Post Published Webhook
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Webhook integration that sends real-time HTTPS POST callbacks with JSON payloads to developer servers when a user uploads their daily post. It allows developers to trigger external automations or update stats immediately.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Post Published Webhook

#### 836. REST API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A RESTful interface that allows developers to programmatically extract subreddits, submit posts, add comment replies, and vote on content. This API serves as the backbone for custom client applications and automated moderating systems.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord, Mastodon, Meetup, Publer, Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord REST API, Mastodon REST API, Meetup REST API, Publer REST API, Reddit REST API

#### 837. RealMojis Web SDK
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A developer SDK that allows integrating BeReal custom RealMoji selfie reactions into third-party blogging platforms or comment widgets. It extends the platform's unique reaction format to external websites.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal RealMojis Web SDK

#### 838. Reporting API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Designed for enterprise channels and content owners to download bulk datasets containing system performance and monetization metrics. It delivers pre-generated CSV reports containing raw data for deep analytical processing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Reporting API

#### 839. SDK For Games
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A mobile game SDK that allows developers to integrate Buz's instant voice walkie-talkie communication into external mobile games.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Buz SDK for Games

#### 840. Share API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A REST-based API that enables developers to automate sharing updates, links, and media to a member's professional feed. This interface is widely integrated with content management systems and corporate marketing tools.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Share API

#### 841. Sign In API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An identity integration API based on the OpenID Connect protocol. It allows third-party developers to implement "Sign in with LinkedIn" buttons on their websites to retrieve profile details securely.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Sign In API

#### 842. Siri / Google Assistant Voice Shortcuts
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with iOS Siri and Google Assistant, allowing users to send voice walkie-talkie messages using OS voice commands.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Siri / Google Assistant Voice Shortcuts

#### 843. Smart TV Casting
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Streams group video feeds, live webcasts, or photo galleries onto smart TVs.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Smart TV Casting

#### 844. Smart Watch Walkie-Talkie App
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A dedicated app for Apple Watch and WearOS that lets users send and play voice messages directly from their smartwatch.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Smart Watch Walkie-Talkie App

#### 845. Spotify API Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A programmatic linkage that enables the BeReal app to check the user's Spotify active playback and share music details on their posts. It displays the song title, artist, and album art directly on the daily photo.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Spotify API Integration

#### 846. Spotify Top Tracks Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Spotify to let users choose a specific song to highlight as their profile "Anthem," playable by visitors.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Spotify Top Tracks Integration

#### 847. Streaming API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A WebSockets-based API that streams real-time updates and notification events to external clients.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Streaming API

#### 848. TDLib Open Source Library
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: An open-source library that implements all Telegram client features, allowing developers to build custom Telegram apps.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: TDLib Open Source Library

#### 849. Third-Party Overlay API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: API connectors allowing third-party tools to import and display Kick follower and subscription alerts. It lets developers and streamers create dynamic browser alerts for on-screen stream overlays.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Third-Party Overlay API

#### 850. Voice Webhook Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Delivers real-time HTTP callbacks to external developer endpoints when new voice messages are received and transcribed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Buz Voice Webhook Integration

#### 851. Web Client Platform
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: A web-based client that lets users swipe, manage matches, and message from desktop browsers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Bumble Web Client Platform

#### 852. Webhook Events API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Programmatic webhook subscriptions pushing JSON payloads to developer servers for subscription or donation events. It removes the need for polling and alerts developers instantly when channel monetization events occur.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Webhook Events API

#### 853. Webhook Subscriptions
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Server-level webhook triggers that send JSON payloads to developer servers on events like status updates or reports.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Webhook Subscriptions

#### 854. Webhooks API
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Delivers real-time HTTP POST events to external server endpoints when users perform specific actions, such as video uploads or profile updates.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya, Facebook, Instagram, Lemon8, LinkedIn, Reddit, Threads, TikTok, Twitch, WhatsApp, X
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Webhooks, Facebook Webhooks API (Real-time Developer Alerts), Instagram Webhooks (Graph API Subscriptions), Lemon8 Brand Portal Webhooks, LinkedIn Webhooks API, Reddit Webhooks API, Threads API Webhooks, TikTok Webhooks API, Twitch EventSub Webhooks, Developer Webhooks, X Webhooks (Account Activity API)

#### 855. Website Chat Plugin
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Embeds a Messenger chat window on external websites, letting visitors chat with the business using their Facebook account.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Website Chat Plugin

#### 856. Webview Chat Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Allows developers to open custom HTML/CSS/JS web pages inside a modal window directly within the Messenger app.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Webview Chat Integration

#### 857. WordPress Event Plugin Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Supports embedding Meetup group details and upcoming event calendars on external WordPress websites via shortcodes or widgets.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: WordPress Event Plugin Integration

#### 858. Zapier Automation Connectors
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Zapier to trigger automated actions (such as adding RSVPs to Google Sheets) when a user interacts with a Meetup group.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Zapier Automation Connectors

#### 859. Zoom Virtual Event Link Integration
- **Category**: Developer APIs & Integrations
- **Description**: Integrates with Zoom to automatically generate and assign virtual meeting links when organizers schedule an online event.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Zoom Virtual Event Link Integration

### Category: Notifications & Time Management

#### 860. Alert Snoozing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily mute notifications and live audio playback from a busy chat or channel.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Alert Snoozing

#### 861. App Badges
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggles the numerical notification count badge displayed on the app icon. This helps users manage screen time by removing visual cues that encourage app opens.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit App Badges

#### 862. BFF Event Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends push notifications and alerts when local mixers or BFF community events are scheduled in the user's area.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Bumble BFF Event Notifications

#### 863. Badge Count Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures the red notification badge counts on the app icon to only update for specific event categories.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Badge Count Controls

#### 864. Bedtime Reminder
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A time-management feature that alerts users when it is time to close the app at night. Users can set the reminder to display immediately at the scheduled hour or wait until the current video finishes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Bedtime Reminder

#### 865. Channel Join/Leave Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggles notification alerts when users enter or exit a live walkie-talkie stream.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Channel Join/Leave Notifications

#### 866. Chat Expiration Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures whether chat messages in a direct thread are deleted immediately after viewing or 24 hours after they are read. This gives users flexibility in managing their conversation archives.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Chat Expiration Controls

#### 867. Chat Feed Pausing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Stops the live scrolling of chat when a user scrolls up, preventing them from losing their place. It is useful for reading older messages in fast-moving chat rooms.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Chat Feed Pausing

#### 868. Chat Mute Options
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notification sounds and alerts for specific chats for 8 hours, 1 week, or Always.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Chat Mute Options

#### 869. Chat Scroll Freeze
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Freezes chat scrolling when the user scrolls up, enabling them to read past comments. It stops auto-scrolling so moderators or users can read specific messages at their own pace.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Chat Scroll Freeze

#### 870. Creator Live Email Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automated email notifications containing the stream category, title, and live thumbnail sent to followers. It provides offline users with detailed stream information in their personal inboxes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Creator Live Email Alerts

#### 871. Custom Alert Tone Selection
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to select custom audio alert tones for BeReal notifications on their mobile devices. It lets users personalize the daily notification alert to stand out from other app sounds.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Custom Alert Tone Selection

#### 872. Custom Chat Ringers
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Assigns distinct ringtones and alert sounds to specific contacts and groups.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Chat Ringers

#### 873. Custom Chat Themes
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Changes the chat bubble colors, gradients, and background wallpaper for individual chat threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Chat Themes

#### 874. Custom Group Tones
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sets unique notification sounds and vibration patterns for specific group or individual chats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Group Tones

#### 875. Custom Mute Durations
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes chat notifications for a completely customizable duration, such as 2 hours, 3 days, or permanently.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Mute Durations

#### 876. Custom Notification Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to customize how they receive updates for tags, comments, group activity, and page updates.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Custom Notification Controls

#### 877. Custom Push Categories
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows granular configuration of push alerts for individual interaction categories such as likes, replies, and mentions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Custom Push Categories

#### 878. Custom Story Expiration
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows Snapchat+ subscribers to customize the duration of their stories, changing them from the standard 24-hour window. Stories can be set to expire in 1 hour, 4 hours, 12 hours, 2 days, or up to 1 week.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Custom Story Expiration

#### 879. DND Mode Silence
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically silences incoming voice and video calls when the device is set to Do Not Disturb mode.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: DND Mode Silence

#### 880. Daily Digest Emails
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Consolidates unread group activity into a single daily notification summary email.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band, LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: Daily Digest Emails, LinkedIn Daily Digest Emails

#### 881. Daily Limit Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Prompt users with a full-screen alert once they hit their set daily app limit.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Daily Limit Reminders

#### 882. Daily Swiping Limit Cap
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Restricts the number of right swipes a user can perform in a 24-hour period on the free tier, showing a countdown timer until reset.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Daily Swiping Limit Cap

#### 883. Daily Time Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Set a daily time threshold that prompts a full-screen block once reached, forcing users to exit.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Daily Time Limits

#### 884. Desktop Notification Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Controls unread indicators, push notification sounds, text-to-speech alerts, and system-level alerts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Desktop Notification Settings

#### 885. Digests Via Email
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Bundles popular posts and updates from followed subreddits into daily or weekly emails. This helps users stay updated without checking the app constantly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Digests via Email

#### 886. Do Not Disturb Mode
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Changes your user presence status to suppress all incoming sound alerts and desktop popups globally.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Do Not Disturb Mode

#### 887. Do Not Disturb Schedule
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Auto-blocks all incoming push alerts during specified daily hours (e.g., sleeping hours).
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Do Not Disturb Schedule

#### 888. Do Not Disturb Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily pauses all Messenger notifications for a set duration, letting users focus without distractions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Do Not Disturb Toggle

#### 889. Email Broadcast Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automated email notifications dispatched to the user's inbox summarizing active stream categories, titles, and thumbnails. It keeps offline users updated on their favorite streamers' schedules.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Email Broadcast Alerts

#### 890. Email Digest Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Customize frequency and categories of email reports, limiting updates to daily or weekly intervals.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Email Digest Controls

#### 891. Email Match Digests
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Compiles recent match numbers and profile views into a weekly email summary digest.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Email Match Digests

#### 892. Event Schedule Conflict Detector
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Evaluates a user's calendar when they RSVP to an event and warns them if they have already committed to another Meetup at the same time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Event Schedule Conflict Detector

#### 893. Failed Post Email & Push Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends immediate email or push alerts to workspace owners when a scheduled post fails to publish.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Failed Post Email & Push Alerts

#### 894. Feed Auto-Refresh Controls
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A setting that controls whether the feed auto-updates when the app is opened or active. Users can manage this setting to save mobile data and prevent feed layout changes while reading.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Feed Auto-Refresh Controls

#### 895. Feed Preference Customization
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggles feed sorting between Top (algorithmic recommendations) and Recent (chronological updates). This allows users to control how content is organized on their homepage.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Feed Preference Customization

#### 896. Filter Rules
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Creates rules to hide posts containing specific keywords from notifications, home feeds, and explore views.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Filter Rules

#### 897. Floating Chat Heads
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Displays round chat bubbles on top of other mobile applications (Android only) for quick messaging access.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Floating Chat Heads

#### 898. Focus Filter Sync
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Integrates with Apple Focus or Android Work modes to filter which Telegram notifications can wake the screen.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Focus Filter Sync

#### 899. Group Notification Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures post alerts on a per-group basis to limit feed clutter from hyperactive communities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Group Notification Settings

#### 900. Hide Notification Previews
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Hides the sender's name and message content in push notifications, displaying only "1 new message" or similar.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Hide Notification Previews

#### 901. High Priority Previews
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Displays notification previews at the top of the device screen, showing the sender and message snippet even when the device is locked.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: High Priority Previews

#### 902. High-Priority Previews
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Pinpoints high-priority notifications, displaying detailed message content on top of other alerts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: High-Priority Previews

#### 903. Holiday Calendar Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Integrates a holiday calendar displaying international dates alongside ready-made content templates.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Holiday Calendar Notifications

#### 904. In-App Alert Bell
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A dedicated notifications center inside the app listing all user comments, mentions, likes, and system alerts. It organizes all account activity in a single feed.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 In-App Alert Bell

#### 905. Inbox Alerts Muting
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to mute notifications for individual posts or comment threads they have participated in. This prevents inbox spam when a thread becomes popular.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Inbox Alerts Muting

#### 906. Job Alert Frequency
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to customize the frequency of email and push alerts for saved job search criteria. Users can set alerts to arrive daily or weekly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Job Alert Frequency

#### 907. Live Feed Updates Pause
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A control that pauses feed synchronization, reducing battery usage and screen time. It lets users manual refresh the feed only when they choose.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Live Feed Updates Pause

#### 908. Match Expiring Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends urgent push notifications to users when a match is within 1 hour of expiring to prompt messaging.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Match Expiring Notifications

#### 909. Message Read Receipts Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to control whether their matches can see when they have read direct messages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Message Read Receipts Toggle

#### 910. Multi-Option Thread Muting
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes alerts for specific chat threads for pre-defined durations (15 minutes, 1 hour, 8 hours, 24 hours, or Until I turn it back on).
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-Option Thread Muting

#### 911. Mute And Block Timers
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily silences notifications or posts from specific users for a set duration before expiring.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Mute and Block Timers

#### 912. Mute Conversation
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notifications for individual message threads without deleting the conversation. This prevents push and email alerts from interrupting your work.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Mute Conversation

#### 913. Mute Notifications Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notifications from accounts based on specific criteria (such as new accounts, or accounts that lack a profile picture).
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Mute Notifications Settings

#### 914. Mute Schedules
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically silences notifications during set daily schedules, such as working hours or sleep times.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Mute Schedules

#### 915. Mute Thread
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes notifications for a specific conversational thread to stop receiving alerts from replies.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Mute Thread

#### 916. New Event Push Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends immediate push notifications to a user's mobile device when a group they belong to publishes a new event.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: New Event Push Alerts

#### 917. Non-Contact Auto-Archive
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically archives and mutes messages from new, unknown users who are not in the contact list.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Non-Contact Auto-Archive

#### 918. Notification Alert Exceptions
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Overrides general notification settings to customize alerts for specific contacts or groups.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Notification Alert Exceptions

#### 919. Notification Bell
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows viewers to customize how they receive push and email notifications for channels they subscribe to. Viewers can set preferences to "All" (every upload), "Personalized" (based on viewing habits), or "None."
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Notification Bell

#### 920. Notification Bundler
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Consolidates alerts from active group chats into a single bundled notification to reduce lock-screen clutter.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
