- **Original Name(s)**: Notification Bundler

#### 921. Notification Category Mutes
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Toggle notifications individually for likes, comments, live events, and video recommendations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Notification Category Mutes

#### 922. Notification Customization
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to manage the frequency and type of alerts they receive on their mobile device. Users can toggle notifications for snaps, chat messages, story updates, and friend suggestions independently.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Notification Customization

#### 923. Notification Digests
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Group notification updates into a single daily summary instead of instant push alerts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Notification Digests

#### 924. Notification Filtering
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Filters notifications to exclude interactions from accounts you don't follow or new accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Notification Filtering

#### 925. Notification Overrides
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Establishes custom alerts for specific search keywords, phrases, or individual user tags within a server.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Notification Overrides

#### 926. Notification Pause
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily halts all push notification alerts from Threads for a designated duration.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Notification Pause

#### 927. Notification Pause Scheduling
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A scheduler that automatically mutes all push notifications during specified hours of the day. It allows users to set daily quiet times during sleep or work.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Notification Pause Scheduling

#### 928. Notification Settings Hub
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A central hub where users can manage alerts for job openings, connections, messaging, and network updates. Users can customize alerts for push notifications, emails, and in-app notifications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Notification Settings Hub

#### 929. Notification Snooze Control
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An option to mute or snooze all push notifications from Kick for a designated time. It helps users manage interruptions during busy or quiet periods of their day.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Notification Snooze Control

#### 930. Notification Snooze Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A setting that silences go-live push notifications during work hours or personal events. It allows users to prevent interruptions without permanently disabling app notifications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Notification Snooze Settings

#### 931. Notification Snoozing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes all push notification alerts immediately for a temporary duration (e.g., 8 hours).
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Notification Snoozing

#### 932. Notification Sound Customization
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows mobile app users to toggle or change the sound profiles for different alert categories (such as DMs vs mentions).
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Notification Sound Customization

#### 933. Notification Sounds
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Plays customizable audio cues when new notifications are received in the web dashboard.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Notification Sounds

#### 934. Notification Types Filter
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Filters your notifications feed by category to focus on specific interactions like mentions or boosts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Notification Types Filter

#### 935. Notification Vibrate Toggles
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures the vibration pattern length (Default, Short, Long, or Off) for new incoming chat notifications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Notification Vibrate Toggles

#### 936. PTT Push Alert Tone
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to select custom alert ringtones and walkie-talkie chirp sounds for incoming live voice requests.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: PTT Push Alert Tone

#### 937. Pause Watch History
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Suspends the tracking of videos watched by the user, preventing newly viewed videos from influencing homepage recommendations. This is useful when searching for topics you do not want added to your profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Pause Watch History

#### 938. Per- Notification Profiles
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Permits configuring distinct notification rules and sound alerts for different Bands.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Per-Band Notification Profiles

#### 939. Push Alert Preferences
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Customizes the delivery of push notifications for interactions such as likes, reposts, mentions, and follows.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Push Alert Preferences

#### 940. Push Notifications Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Provides granular toggles for various events on the platform, such as upvotes on posts, replies to comments, and direct message invitations. This allows users to filter out noisy alerts while retaining critical inbox notices.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord, Instagram, Kick, Lemon8, Mastodon, Reddit, TikTok, Twitch, X
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Push Notification Timeout, Push Notification Category Mutes, Kick Creator Go-Live Push Notifications, Lemon8 Push Notifications Preferences, Mastodon Push Notification Subscriptions, Reddit Push Notification Customization, Push Notifications Scheduling, Twitch Live Push Notifications, Smart Push Notifications

#### 941. Push Schedule Quiet Hours
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Syncs notifications with mobile operating system quiet periods to silence notifications during scheduled hours.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Push Schedule Quiet Hours

#### 942. Quality Filter For Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically filters out duplicate notifications or posts that appear to be automated spam.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Quality Filter for Notifications

#### 943. Quiet Hours / Snooze Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily mute all push notification alerts from Meetup for a set period.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Quiet Hours / Snooze Alerts

#### 944. Quiet Mode
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Pause push notifications and auto-reply to DMs during selected daily periods.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Quiet Mode

#### 945. Quiet Mode Syncing
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatically aligns Threads notification silencing schedules with the Quiet Mode settings configured in Instagram.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Quiet Mode Syncing

#### 946. RSVP Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Automatic email notifications sent to members 24 to 48 hours before an event, prompting them to confirm or update their RSVP status.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: RSVP Reminders

#### 947. Region Selection Settings
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures the geographic region of the user's account to align the daily notification with local time. It ensures that the notification triggers during daytime hours for the user's current location.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Region Selection Settings

#### 948. Scheduled Quiet Time
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Configures a schedule during which incoming walkie-talkie audio will not play out loud, automatically routing alerts to silent notifications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Scheduled Quiet Time

#### 949. Scheduled Video Release
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows creators to schedule an uploaded video to transition from private to public status at a future date and time. This helps creators coordinate video releases with specific times when their audience is most active.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Scheduled Video Release

#### 950. Screen Time Breaks & Daily Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Limits app usage by locking the app or displaying a fullscreen reminder after reaching a custom time threshold.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Screen Time Breaks & Daily Limits

#### 951. Screen Time Dashboard
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Displays a comprehensive dashboard showing total daily and nightly app usage, open frequencies, and break histories.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Screen Time Dashboard

#### 952. Screen Time Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An in-app digital wellness tool that tracks daily app usage and locks the app with a passcode once the limit is reached. It encourages healthy usage habits and helps users manage their time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Screen Time Limits

#### 953. Server Mute Options
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes message alerts and push notifications for an entire server, category, or channel.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Server Mute Options

#### 954. Silent Dispatch Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Allows sending messages without triggering sound or vibration notifications on the recipient's device.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Silent Dispatch Toggle

#### 955. Simultaneous Daily Push Alert
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: The daily push notification sent simultaneously to all users in a specific region, prompting them to post within two minutes. It creates a shared daily moment where everyone posts their current status together.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Simultaneous Daily Push Alert

#### 956. Slack/ Channel Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends post status updates and approval requests directly to team Slack or Discord channels.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Slack/Discord Channel Alerts

#### 957. Sleep Mode
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Integrates with system-level focus modes or in-app mute features to pause all push alerts during sleeping hours. When active, incoming snaps and messages are received silently without waking the screen.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Sleep Mode

#### 958. Sleep Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Alerts users to close the app at bedtime and mutes push notifications during their sleeping window.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Sleep Reminders

#### 959. Smart Alert Limits
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sets limits on how often a chat can notify the user (e.g., maximum of 2 notifications every 10 minutes).
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Smart Alert Limits

#### 960. Snooze Approval Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Temporarily mutes pending post approval push notifications and emails.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Snooze Approval Reminders

#### 961. Snooze Group Chats
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Silences notifications from active chat rooms temporarily without exiting the chat.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Snooze Group Chats

#### 962. Snooze Live Notifications
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: A utility that lets viewers temporarily snooze or silence push notifications for followed channels. It helps users manage interruptions during busy or quiet periods of their day.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Snooze Live Notifications

#### 963. Story Notification Muting
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Mutes story alerts for specific friends who post updates frequently. This allows users to stay connected without getting constantly interrupted by push alerts whenever that contact posts a new snap.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Story Notification Muting

#### 964. Take A Break Reminders
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An in-app utility that prompts users to stop watching videos after a specified period of continuous usage. The reminder displays as a full-screen alert that pauses video playback.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram, Threads, YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: "Take a Break" Reminders, Threads Take a Break Reminder, YouTube Take a Break Reminder

#### 965. Thread Notification Subscriptions
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Subscribes users to receive real-time push notifications for all subsequent replies to a selected post.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Thread Notification Subscriptions

#### 966. Urgent Notice Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends a push alert that overrides normal muting preferences for emergency communications.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Urgent Notice Alerts

#### 967. VOD Auto-Publishing Toggle
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Streamer setting that automatically saves and publishes live broadcasts as Video-On-Demand archives. It allows streamers to choose whether their streams are saved publicly or deleted immediately after ending.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick VOD Auto-Publishing Toggle

#### 968. VOD Watch History
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Tracks user progress through video-on-demand (VOD) archives, enabling them to resume long videos from the exact point they left. It provides a convenient way to watch long broadcasts in multiple sessions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch VOD Watch History

#### 969. Voice Message Read Alerts
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends a push notification to your device as soon as a recipient finishes listening to a voice note you sent.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Voice Message Read Alerts

#### 970. Weekly Activity Report
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: An automated notification that summarizes weekly screen time, average daily use, and engagement rates on the app. It provides users with insight into their consumption habits.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Weekly Activity Report

#### 971. Weekly Group Digests
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Sends a compiled email summarizing the upcoming week's events for all groups the user has joined.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Weekly Group Digests

#### 972. Weekly Workspace Digest
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Compiles weekly summaries of scheduled posts, upcoming events, inbox metrics, and audience growth into an email.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Weekly Workspace Digest

#### 973. Your Time On (Quiet Mode)
- **Category**: Notifications & Time Management
- **Description**: Tracks app usage statistics and lets users schedule quiet periods where push notifications are muted.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Your Time on Facebook (Quiet Mode)

### Category: Account Settings & Authentication

#### 974. Account Alias Migration
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Sets up a redirect alias from an old account to a new one, displaying a redirect banner to followers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Account Alias Migration

#### 975. Account Center
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Central hub to manage password, two-factor authentication, ad preferences, and shared details across Facebook and Instagram.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Meta Account Center

#### 976. Account Center Integration
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Centralizes security, logins, and authentication settings via the Meta Account Center dashboard.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Account Center Integration

#### 977. Account Data Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to download a comprehensive archive of their YouTube activity, including uploaded videos, search history, watch history, comment logs, and playlists. This ensures data transparency and account portability.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Account Data Download

#### 978. Account Deactivation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Initiates a request to temporarily hibernate or permanently delete a LinkedIn account. Permanent deletion removes the profile, connections, and all postings from the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Account Deactivation

#### 979. Account Deactivation & Deletion
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Self-service options for users to temporarily disable their profile or permanently delete their account and associated data.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Deactivation & Deletion

#### 980. Account Deactivation (Pause Account)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily hide their profile from the swipe queue while preserving active conversations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Deactivation (Pause Account)

#### 981. Account Deactivation Loop
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Initiates the deactivation process, which deletes all data permanently after a 30-day recovery window.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Deactivation Loop

#### 982. Account Deactivation Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: An in-app account deletion tool that initiates the process of permanently deleting all user data and media. It satisfies privacy regulations by allowing users to wipe their profiles completely.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Account Deactivation Request

#### 983. Account Deactivation System
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A settings option that allows users to permanently delete their account and purge all data after a 30-day grace period. It ensures compliance with user privacy policies and data protection regulations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Account Deactivation System

#### 984. Account Deletion
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permanently deletes your Threads profile data, comments, and posts from the network.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Account Deletion

#### 985. Account Deletion & Data Purge
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Self-service portal that permanently deletes the user account, workspace data, and all connected social tokens.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Deletion & Data Purge

#### 986. Account Deletion And Disable
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to temporarily deactivate their accounts or permanently delete their user data and servers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Account Deletion and Disable

#### 987. Account Deletion Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Initiates a request to permanently deactivate and delete a Snapchat account. The account is immediately deactivated for 30 days, during which the user can log in to cancel the deletion before it becomes permanent.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Account Deletion Request

#### 988. Account Deletion Request System
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A self-service tool that initiates account deletion, permanently purging account details and files. It enforces data privacy compliance by removing all personal records after a confirmation cooldown.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Account Deletion Request System

#### 989. Account Linkage
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Connects third-party gaming, streaming, or smart home accounts to a YouTube profile. Linking accounts allows users to earn in-game rewards during sponsored streams and simplifies logins on external devices.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Account Linkage

#### 990. Account Linking System
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to link their Lemon8 profile with TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube accounts for cross-platform sharing. It makes cross-platform promotion and verification much easier for creators.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Account Linking System

#### 991. Account Liquidation Timer
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Automatically deletes the account and all associated data after a specified period of complete user inactivity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Liquidation Timer

#### 992. Account Merging Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A portal that allows users to merge two duplicate LinkedIn accounts. This combines connections and deletes the duplicate account, preserving network integrity.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Account Merging Portal

#### 993. Account Nickname & Profile Picture Customization
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to configure their public display nickname, avatar image, and brief bio status line.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Nickname & Profile Picture Customization

#### 994. Account Permanent Deletion
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A self-serve option to permanently delete a user profile and delete all account history from the platform databases.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble, Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Permanent Deletion, Account Permanent Deletion

#### 995. Account Portability
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Compiles a secure digital folder containing the user's complete Snap history, including chat messages, geofilter usage, account logs, and saved Memories. This enables users to retrieve their multimedia content off the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Account Portability

#### 996. Account Security Audit Log
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays security data including login device types, IP addresses, dates, and locations. It helps users audit login history and terminate sessions on unrecognized devices.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Account Security Audit Log

#### 997. Account Status Dashboard
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Provides a clear view of any policy infractions, copyright notices, or community guideline violations active on your profile.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Account Status Dashboard

#### 998. Accounts Center Sync
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Syncs settings, profiles, and login details across Meta platforms (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger).
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Meta Accounts Center Sync

#### 999. Active Sessions Manager
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a history of active devices, IP addresses, and locations that are logged in, with options to log out. It allows users to detect suspicious access and terminate rogue sessions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Active Sessions Manager

#### 1000. Active Status Indicator
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Toggles the green dot status display that shows contacts when the user is online or active.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Active Status Indicator

#### 1001. App Password Generation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates unique, one-time passwords for older platforms (such as Xbox or smart TVs) that do not support 2FA formats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: App Password Generation

#### 1002. App Passwords
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Creates unique, single-purpose passwords for logging into third-party apps without sharing main credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky App Passwords

#### 1003. Archive Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Request a downloadable ZIP file containing complete account data, post history, media, and search history.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: X Archive Download

#### 1004. Archive Export
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates and downloads a ZIP archive containing all account information, posts, and media in an ActivityPub-compliant format.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Archive Export

#### 1005. Authorized Applications
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays all third-party applications that have been granted access to your account details.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Authorized Applications

#### 1006. Authorized Apps
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a history of third-party applications that have been granted access to your account details, with options to revoke access.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Authorized Apps

#### 1007. Authorized Logins (Trusted Devices Management)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a history of recognized browsers and devices that are authorized to access the account without requiring a two-factor verification code, with options to revoke access.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Authorized Logins (Trusted Devices Management)

#### 1008. Auto-Self-Destruct Timer
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Automatically deletes the entire account, including all chats and media, if the user does not log in for a set period.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Auto-Self-Destruct Timer

#### 1009. Biometric App Lock (Face ID/Fingerprint)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Locks the Band app behind Face ID, fingerprint, or PIN lock screen security.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Biometric App Lock (Face ID/Fingerprint)

#### 1010. Change Number Wizard
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Transfers account details, groups, and settings from an old phone number to a new phone number.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Change Number Wizard

#### 1011. Cloud Chat Backups
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Backs up chat history and media to secure cloud storage platforms.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Cloud Chat Backups

#### 1012. Connected Accounts
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Links your Reddit account with Apple or Google profiles for streamlined logins. Once connected, users can sign in to Reddit instantly using federated authentication.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Connected Accounts

#### 1013. Connected Device Management
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Lists all active devices and browsers logged into the account, with options to force remote logout.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Connected Device Management

#### 1014. Connected Devices
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays a list of all mobile devices and web browsers that are currently authorized to access the Snapchat account. Users can review device names, login dates, and revoke authorization for unfamiliar devices.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Connected Devices

#### 1015. Connected Third-Party Accounts
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to link their Twitch account to third-party services like Amazon, Discord, Steam, and Battle.net. It enables cross-platform game rewards, sharing subscription statuses, and profile integrations.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Connected Third-Party Accounts

#### 1016. Contact Sync Control
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A settings control that enables or disables syncing contacts, with options to delete previously synced data. It gives users complete control over how their phone contact books are used by the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Contact Sync Control

#### 1017. Contact Verification Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows adding and verifying phone numbers or email addresses to secure the account and facilitate recovery. It provides recovery points to prevent permanent account lockouts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Contact Verification Settings

#### 1018. Creator Agreement Dashboard
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: An account portal containing the Twitch Affiliate or Partner contracts, tax documents, and payout preference selections. It allows streamers to review their legal agreements and update payment methods.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Creator Agreement Dashboard

#### 1019. Data Archive Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Compiles a comprehensive download of a user's professional archive, including connections list, message history, profile page details, and search history. This exports all interactions in structured CSV and HTML formats for personal backup.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Data Archive Download

#### 1020. Data Archive Export Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to request a downloadable archive containing all their account history, comments, and media. It provides data portability, packaging all historic BeReal photos into a secure ZIP file.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Data Archive Export Request

#### 1021. Data Export Request
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates a downloadable file containing a user's entire community interaction log on the platform. This archive includes upvote history, comments made, posts submitted, and moderation actions taken.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Data Export Request

#### 1022. Data Export Utility
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates and exports a complete archive of user data, including chats, media, and settings, in JSON or HTML format.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Data Export Utility

#### 1023. Data Portability Export
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to download an archive containing their posts, comments, likes, and profile settings.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Data Portability Export

#### 1024. Data Repository Export
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Downloads the user's complete data repository, containing all posts, likes, follows, and history as a CAR file.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Data Repository Export

#### 1025. Deactivate Account Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permanently deletes a Reddit account and removes the username from posts and comments. This action is irreversible, and deleted usernames cannot be registered again.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Deactivate Account Portal

#### 1026. Delete Chat History
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permanently deletes all messages and media in a specific chat thread from the user's account.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Delete Chat History

#### 1027. Device Session Manager & Remote Logout
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Displays all devices currently logged into your account and provides instant remote sign-out.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Device Session Manager & Remote Logout

#### 1028. Domain Handle Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Configures DNS TXT or HTTP redirect records on a custom domain to verify and change the user's handle.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Domain Handle Verification

#### 1029. Download Your Data
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Request a downloadable archive containing all your video history, comments, draft metadata, and profile settings.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Download Your Data

#### 1030. Download Your Information
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Request a downloadable archive file containing all your profile history, chat messages, uploaded media, and profile metrics.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Download Your Information

#### 1031. E-Secure Backup PIN
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures end-to-end encrypted chat backups in cloud storage using a user-defined 6-digit PIN.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: E-Secure Backup PIN

#### 1032. Encrypted Cloud Backups
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Encrypts chat histories stored in iCloud or Google Drive with a custom password or 64-digit key.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Encrypted Cloud Backups

#### 1033. Federated Apple ID Login
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Integrates Apple ID login allowing iOS users to log in securely using Face ID or Touch ID authentication.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Federated Apple ID Login

#### 1034. GDPR Data Archive Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Provides users with a downloadable file containing all of their personal data, group memberships, and messages stored on the platform.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: GDPR Data Archive Download

#### 1035. GDPR Data Retention Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to configure how long their personal logs, messages, and deleted posts are retained in platform databases.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: GDPR Data Retention Settings

#### 1036. Google Account Recovery
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Configures backup recovery details to restore account access if a password is forgotten or the account is compromised. Users link backup email addresses and phone numbers to receive secure verification codes.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Google Account Recovery

#### 1037. Hardware Key Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Supports physical USB or NFC security keys (e.g., YubiKeys) for hardware-based two-factor authentication.
- **Implementing Platforms**: X
- **Original Name(s)**: Hardware Key Authentication

#### 1038. Invoice Billing History & Download
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Provides access to view and download PDF invoices for all past subscription transactions.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Invoice billing history & Download

#### 1039. Language And Region Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Configures the app display language and changes the content curation region for localized posts. It allows users to customize their interface and feed recommendations based on language and geography.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Language and Region Settings

#### 1040. Large File Storage Tiers
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows sending and storing massive files up to 2GB (4GB for Premium users) in Saved Messages or chats.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Large File Storage Tiers

#### 1041. Legacy Contact Designation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permits a user to choose a friend or family member to manage their account if it becomes memorialized after their passing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Legacy Contact Designation

#### 1042. Location Radius Customization
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to set their primary city location and define the geographic search radius used to discover local events.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Location Radius Customization

#### 1043. Login Activity & Device Management
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Monitors and lists all active sessions logged into your account, providing locations, device models, and remote logout options.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Login Activity & Device Management

#### 1044. Login Alerts & Unrecognized Device Tracking
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Sends immediate email or push notifications when an account is accessed from a new browser or physical location.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook
- **Original Name(s)**: Login Alerts & Unrecognized Device Tracking

#### 1045. Login Device History
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: An audit log displaying recent devices, browser types, dates, and geographic locations that have logged into the account. It allows users to monitor account activity and revoke access to unrecognized devices.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Login Device History

#### 1046. Login With ( Single Sign-On)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Authenticate and log in using linked Meta/Facebook account credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Instagram
- **Original Name(s)**: Login with Facebook (Meta Single Sign-On)

#### 1047. Multi-Account Login Switcher
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows logging into multiple Band profiles on a single mobile device and switching profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-Account Login Switcher

#### 1048. Multi-Account Switcher
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to log into up to three different phone numbers on the same Telegram application and switch between them instantly.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-Account Switcher

#### 1049. Multi-Device Login Sync
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Synchronizes chat threads, settings, and read statuses across all logged-in devices in real-time.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Facebook Messenger
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-Device Login Sync

#### 1050. Multi-Factor Authentication
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Secures login by requiring an authentication code from an authenticator app alongside the password.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky, Discord, Instagram, Kick, Mastodon, Meetup, Publer, Reddit, Snapchat, Telegram, Twitch, X
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Two-Factor Authentication, Discord Two-Factor Authentication, Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), Kick Two-Factor Authentication, Mastodon Two-Factor Authentication, Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA/2FA), Reddit Two-Factor Authentication, Snapchat Two-Factor Authentication, Cloud Two-Factor Password, Twitch Two-Factor Authentication, Advanced Security (Two-Factor Authentication)

#### 1051. Multi-profile Switcher
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to manage and switch between multiple sub-profiles (e.g., work, personal) within a single account.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Multi-profile Switcher

#### 1052. Passkey Login
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Enables passwordless authentication using biometric sensors or device PINs to log into accounts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Apaya
- **Original Name(s)**: Passkey Login

#### 1053. Passkey Logins
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to log back into their WhatsApp account using biometric authentication (face or fingerprint) or device lock pin.
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Passkey Logins

#### 1054. Password Management Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Security portal for setting, updating, or resetting the account password. It helps users protect their accounts from unauthorized logins and update expired passwords.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Lemon8
- **Original Name(s)**: Lemon8 Password Management Portal

#### 1055. Password Reset Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Account recovery system sending password reset links to registered email addresses. It allows users to regain access to their accounts securely if they forget their password.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Password Reset Portal

#### 1056. Password Reset Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Sends password recovery links to the user's verified email address to restore account access. This allows users to reset their credentials securely if they forget them.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Reddit
- **Original Name(s)**: Reddit Password Reset Settings

#### 1057. Personal Data Server Transfer
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Migrates the user's complete account data, posts, and social graph from one PDS provider to another.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bluesky
- **Original Name(s)**: Bluesky Personal Data Server Transfer

#### 1058. Phone Authentication With OTP
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to register and log in securely using their mobile number and a verification SMS code.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Phone Authentication with OTP

#### 1059. Phone Number Registration & Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Registers and secures accounts using a mobile phone number validated by an SMS one-time password.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Phone Number Registration & Verification

#### 1060. Phone Number Sign-in Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A passwordless authentication system that verifies user identity by sending a secure SMS verification code. It speeds up sign-in while maintaining high account security.
- **Implementing Platforms**: BeReal
- **Original Name(s)**: BeReal Phone Number Sign-in Verification

#### 1061. Premium Membership Settings
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A subscription management portal where users can manage billing methods, toggle auto-renew settings, and view membership benefits. It also allows users to configure offline download quality settings for mobile devices.
- **Implementing Platforms**: YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: YouTube Premium Membership Settings

#### 1062. Primary Email Management
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to manage the email addresses linked to their account. Users can add backup emails, confirm new addresses, and change their primary contact address for account recovery.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Primary Email Management

#### 1063. Primary Phone Number Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Links the profile to a validated cellular number via SMS one-time password verification.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Band
- **Original Name(s)**: Primary Phone Number verification

#### 1064. Private Profile Toggle
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Restricts profile visibility so only approved followers can view, reply to, or share your threads.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Private Profile Toggle

#### 1065. Profile Customization Manager
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Settings panel allowing users to update display username, bio description, profile picture, and offline banner. It enables creators to refresh their channel branding and social links easily.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Kick
- **Original Name(s)**: Kick Profile Customization Manager

#### 1066. Profile Deactivation
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Temporarily hides your Threads profile, threads, replies, and likes without deleting your linked Instagram account.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Threads
- **Original Name(s)**: Threads Profile Deactivation

#### 1067. Profile Metadata Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Verifies ownership of personal websites by searching for rel="me" backlink tags on target pages.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Mastodon
- **Original Name(s)**: Mastodon Profile Metadata Verification

#### 1068. Request Account Info
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Generates a downloadable report of account information, settings, and profile details (excluding messages).
- **Implementing Platforms**: WhatsApp
- **Original Name(s)**: Request Account Info

#### 1069. Request Data Export (GDPR)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to download a ZIP archive containing all their registered profile details, active channels, and audio transcripts.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Buz Voice Connects
- **Original Name(s)**: Request Data Export (GDPR)

#### 1070. Request GDPR Account Data
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Permits users to request a complete archive download of their profile data, history, and matches.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Bumble
- **Original Name(s)**: Request GDPR Account Data

#### 1071. Security Keys
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to register hardware keys or biometric logins for passwordless authentication.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord Security Keys

#### 1072. Single Sign-On (SSO) With Google/
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Integrates federated authentication platforms to allow secure, one-click access using Google or Facebook credentials.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Single Sign-On (SSO) with Google/Facebook

#### 1073. Social Login Link (Google, Apple, )
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to link their Google, Apple, or Facebook accounts for secure, one-click login access.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Meetup
- **Original Name(s)**: Social Login Link (Google, Apple, Facebook)

#### 1074. Switch To Business Account
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Toggles account type from personal to professional to access advanced commercial tools, page statistics, and auto-publishing.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Switch to Business Account

#### 1075. Two-Step Verification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Requires a custom 6-digit PIN when registering the phone number with WhatsApp again to prevent unauthorized access.
- **Implementing Platforms**: LinkedIn, WhatsApp, YouTube
- **Original Name(s)**: LinkedIn Two-Step Verification, Two-Step Verification, YouTube Two-Step Verification

#### 1076. Two-Step Verification (SMS/Email)
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Protects account login via secondary verification codes sent to external phone numbers or email addresses.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Two-Step Verification (SMS/Email)

#### 1077. User Connections
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Integrates external accounts like Spotify, Steam, Xbox, and PlayStation to display game status and activity on profiles.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Discord
- **Original Name(s)**: Discord User Connections

#### 1078. Username Cooldown Release
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: A settings control that allows users to change their display username, releasing their old name back into the pool after a cooldown. It helps users rebrand their accounts while maintaining their existing followers.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Twitch
- **Original Name(s)**: Twitch Username Cooldown Release

#### 1079. Username Domain Mapping
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Links custom domains or web addresses directly to a Telegram profile, channel, or group username.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Telegram
- **Original Name(s)**: Username Domain Mapping

#### 1080. Username Modification
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows users to change their public Snapchat username once per year. This updates how friends search for the user without losing their friend list, streaks, or Memories.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Snapchat
- **Original Name(s)**: Snapchat Username Modification

#### 1081. Verification Badge Application Portal
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: In-app portal to apply for verification checkmarks to verify public profiles and brand identities.
- **Implementing Platforms**: TikTok
- **Original Name(s)**: Verification Badge Application Portal

#### 1082. Workspace Migration Tool
- **Category**: Account Settings & Authentication
- **Description**: Allows transferring social channels and historical post records from one workspace to another.
- **Implementing Platforms**: Publer
- **Original Name(s)**: Workspace Migration Tool

---

## 4. Feature Improvement Proposals

For every unique feature in the Master Combined Feature List, this section outlines a specific proposal for how **Wakka Wakka** improves upon the existing platform implementation. Each proposal contains the original platform mapping, our conceptual enhancement, and the rationale for user impact.

### Category: Content Creation & Editing

#### 1. Wakka Wakka Improvement: 3D Bitmojis In Snaps
- **Original Feature**: 3D Bitmojis In Snaps (Implemented on Snapchat)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka transforms 3D Bitmojis In Snaps by integrating a real-time collaborative sandbox where creators can concurrently place a personalized three-dimensional avatar of the user into the camera view using augmented reality with instant canvas syncing.
- **Why It Matters**: Having a system to place a personalized three-dimensional avatar of the user into the camera view using augmented reality boosts audience retention by dynamically adapting 3D Bitmojis In Snaps to current viewer trends.

#### 2. Wakka Wakka Improvement: AI Assist Content Generator
- **Original Feature**: AI Assist Content Generator (Implemented on Publer)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka elevates AI Assist Content Generator with an AI-driven layout optimizer, enabling users to integrate with artificial intelligence to automatically generate post captions, rewrite copy, or recommend hashtags based on user prompts while automatically adjusting visual hierarchies.
- **Why It Matters**: Integrating AI Assist Content Generator saves hours of manual editing when users integrate with artificial intelligence to automatically generate post captions, rewrite copy, or recommend hashtags based on user prompts, while maintaining a highly professional aesthetic output.

#### 3. Wakka Wakka Improvement: AR Camera Effects
- **Original Feature**: AR Camera Effects (Implemented on Facebook Messenger)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka enhances AR Camera Effects using zero-latency WebGPU rendering, so that when creators apply augmented reality filters, face distortions, and virtual backgrounds to photos, videos, and live video calls, the processing is entirely local and seamless.
- **Why It Matters**: By allowing users to locally apply augmented reality filters, face distortions, and virtual backgrounds to photos, videos, and live video calls, this improves mobile rendering speed and battery life during AR Camera Effects execution.

#### 4. Wakka Wakka Improvement: Adjust Clips (Multi-track Editing)
- **Original Feature**: Adjust Clips (Multi-track Editing) (Implemented on TikTok)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka enhances Adjust Clips (Multi-track Editing) using zero-latency WebGPU rendering, so that when creators provide an in-app timeline interface to split, trim, speed up, or reorder individual video clips and audio tracks, the processing is entirely local and seamless.
- **Why It Matters**: By allowing users to locally provide an in-app timeline interface to split, trim, speed up, or reorder individual video clips and audio tracks, this improves mobile rendering speed and battery life during Adjust Clips (Multi-track Editing) execution.

#### 5. Wakka Wakka Improvement: Alt Text Editor
- **Original Feature**: Alt Text Editor (Implemented on Bluesky)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka transforms Alt Text Editor by integrating a real-time collaborative sandbox where creators can concurrently add descriptive alternative text descriptions to all image uploads to enhance accessibility for screen readers with instant canvas syncing.
- **Why It Matters**: Having a system to add descriptive alternative text descriptions to all image uploads to enhance accessibility for screen readers boosts audience retention by dynamically adapting Alt Text Editor to current viewer trends.

#### 6. Wakka Wakka Improvement: Articles Editor
- **Original Feature**: Articles Editor (Implemented on LinkedIn)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka reimagines Articles Editor by adding semantic context tagging, allowing creators to utilize a long-form publishing tool that allows users to write blog-style articles directly on the platform based on real-time viewer engagement cues.
- **Why It Matters**: By allowing users to locally utilize a long-form publishing tool that allows users to write blog-style articles directly on the platform, this improves mobile rendering speed and battery life during Articles Editor execution.

#### 7. Wakka Wakka Improvement: Attachment Uploader (PDF, Doc, ZIP)
- **Original Feature**: Attachment Uploader (PDF, Doc, ZIP) (Implemented on Band)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Our implementation of Attachment Uploader (PDF, Doc, ZIP) introduces decentralized asset versioning, letting creators enable uploading and sharing of productivity and binary files directly within posts and chat rooms, supporting large file attachments and rollback edits without server-side storage.
- **Why It Matters**: This guarantees total ownership and history tracking of digital assets when creators enable uploading and sharing of productivity and binary files directly within posts and chat rooms, supporting large file attachments without reliance on central cloud databases.

#### 8. Wakka Wakka Improvement: Auto-Cropping Canvas
- **Original Feature**: Auto-Cropping Canvas (Implemented on Apaya)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka elevates Auto-Cropping Canvas with an AI-driven layout optimizer, enabling users to automatically resize and crops photos to optimized canvas ratios matching the target chat or channel layout while automatically adjusting visual hierarchies.
- **Why It Matters**: Integrating Auto-Cropping Canvas saves hours of manual editing when users automatically resize and crops photos to optimized canvas ratios matching the target chat or channel layout, while maintaining a highly professional aesthetic output.

### Category: Interpersonal & Community Engagement

#### 235. Wakka Wakka Improvement: "Add Yours" Interactive Prompts
- **Original Feature**: "Add Yours" Interactive Prompts (Implemented on Instagram)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Our design for "Add Yours" Interactive Prompts features an interactive group sandbox canvas, enabling members to create public, interactive chains in Stories where other users can respond to a prompt with their own Stories and co-create widgets in real-time.
- **Why It Matters**: Fosters deeper, collaborative community bonds for "Add Yours" Interactive Prompts through shared spaces where users create public, interactive chains in Stories where other users can respond to a prompt with their own Stories.

#### 236. Wakka Wakka Improvement: Affiliation Badge (Verified Organizations)
- **Original Feature**: Affiliation Badge (Verified Organizations) (Implemented on X)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka implements cryptographic badge verification for Affiliation Badge (Verified Organizations), allowing members to display a square logo icon of a parent company next to an employee's or affiliate's checkmark badge while proving their domain expertise.
- **Why It Matters**: Establishes a high-trust environment where claims are verified as users display a square logo icon of a parent company next to an employee's or affiliate's checkmark badge using Affiliation Badge (Verified Organizations).

#### 237. Wakka Wakka Improvement: Auto-Follow / Auto-Like Rules
- **Original Feature**: Auto-Follow / Auto-Like Rules (Implemented on Publer)
- **Wakka Wakka Enhancement**: Wakka Wakka transforms Auto-Follow / Auto-Like Rules using decentralized dispute resolution tribunals, so when users automatically engage with target profiles or hashtags based on user-defined interaction rules to grow accounts, community moderation is handled by peer juries.
- **Why It Matters**: Eliminates centralized moderation bias and reduces admin fatigue when members automatically engage with target profiles or hashtags based on user-defined interaction rules to grow accounts using Auto-Follow / Auto-Like Rules.

- **Original Feature**: View-Once Media Screen-lock (Implemented on Apaya)
